Was last year’s planner the perfect fit for your busy, complicated life? Of course it wasn’t. There is no one perfect planner, because some of you are runners (yeah, none of us is, but we get that you might be into that whole "health" thing), some of you are rock stars (the real ones, with guitars and stuff), some are moms, some are lawyers, some have half finished knitting projects all over the house, some obsessively clean, some are saving for a house. Are you involved in 31 different clubs and activities that you have to schedule?  We can help. Do you have to keep your own mileage and expenses for work? We can help with that, too. Are you training to do your first 5K?  How about a half marathon?  How about an Iron Man?  Any of those, too. Trying to lose weight?  We got you. Saving your pennies?  Got it. Planning a wedding?  A party?  A Candyland Tournament?  Totally have an insert for that. Learning to play the cello?  Insert for that.  Quit the cello and took up water polo?  No problem -- we can make that switch for you. Go ahead -- throw your unique mix of people, places, activities and dreams at us -- betcha we have what you need to track and achieve it. The Product Our product is a planner that is fully adaptable to meet each individual’s needs. This mid-size (A5) planner fits easily into a backpack or purse. The starter kit will consist of a binder with a monthly and weekly calendar with various styles to pick from, plus two insert modules of the customer’s choice. Here are two examples, a horizontal layout and a vertical column layout: Weekly Calendar - Horizontal Blocks Weekly Calendar - Columns With Times Insert modules are pre-printed organizational tools, enough for one year, with almost unlimited choices, such as shopping lists, food diary, exercise log, crafting/project log, to-do and errand lists, etc. Customers can buy additional modules and accessories a la carte, as they wish. This is a partial list of available inserts: List of Inserts Here are just a few examples: Creative Project Planning Page Cycling Log Eating Log Our organizational guru, Jody, has already designed dozens of templates for the insert modules, with more coming each week.  Many ideas come from the people we talk to and are based on their needs and interests. Our Kickstarter Campaign will fund the first run of planners, including a variety of calendars, inserts and of course, durable ring binders. We want to finish our campaign NOW so we can get our product printed and ready to sell on our website for back-to-school in late summer and the new calendar year (2018). Jody shows Jennifer some new designs. Planner Problems We Have Solved 1. I can never find a planner with everything I like.  For example, I may like the monthly calendar and notes pages, but the weekly calendar is horizontal and I have too many appointments each day to make that work. We offer seven different weekly calendar styles, including horizontal, vertical and block page layouts.  Choose the one that's right for you. 2. A lot of the activities I plan or track are seasonal.  I don't garden in the winter months, and I do most of my crafting in winter. Our activity inserts are created on pads that you can tear off and put into the ring binder.  You decide what inserts to use each week, and how many to use.  You can keep track of one activity, or dozens!  It's up to you. Not tracking an activity for a while?  Remove those pages.  Your planner is as adaptable as you need it to be. 3. I don't use a planner for leisure activities.  I use my planner for work! No problem.  We carry a wide range of business/work inserts, from mileage and expense trackers to project and call log sheets. 4. I want to be more organized, but I am terrible at it, and frankly, Jody's skills scare me a little.  I can't be like her. Us too.  Jody amazes and frightens all of us.  Not only do we have tools and inserts for beginning and advanced time managers, but we will continuously offer tips, tools and video how-to's to help you achieve your organizational goals. 5. I'm liking all of this, but why "Starfish"?  I don't get it. The name refers to the story below and is about making a difference. The Starfish Story Timeline of Product Launch March 2017 -- Launch Kickstarter campaign, combine artwork with organizational templates. April  2017 -- Purchase binders and print inserts. May 2017 -- Assemble kits and launch a kick-butt social media campaign! Ship kits to our backers! July 2017 -- Assemble and ship orders in time for the start of the academic year. September 2017 -- Ship more orders in plenty of time to beat the holiday mail rush. January 2018 and beyond!   -- Once we establish the paper planners aspect of our business, we intend to branch out to marry paper planning to digital organizational systems. Our Budget The largest expense, by far, is the actual printing of the pieces for our first run product. Among other expenses we anticipate are the purchase of wholesale merchandise, website development, advertising, packaging and shipping. We will need to raise $15,000 to do our first run. There are no personnel costs, as the team has agreed to give our time and talent in-kind until mutually agreed-upon dates and conditions.

UFO7 cover by Tomasz Maronski Our mission is to produce a funny, irreverent anthology of humorous science fiction and fantasy short stories every year, featuring a recurring cast of amazing headliners and the best funny up-and-comers we can find. The 2018 volume is headlined by Esther Friesner, Mike Resnick, Seanan McGuire, Gini Koch, and Laura Resnick. It includes twenty funny stories written by the field's top writers as well as exciting newcomers. Here's a tiny taste of the stories you'll get in this book: * A long time ago in a galaxy close enough not to violate any copyrights, the clone army fighting for the side of the evil empire is made up of a bunch of bros named Chad. * Can a couple of wise guys from New Jersey broker a sit down between two groups of warring aliens? * Witness an epic battle of mad science vs. dark magic. * US presidents elected in 1860 and 1960 were both assassinated. What's going to happen to whoever's elected in 2060? * Beware the dragon polite enough to return your drone after it breached the barriers between worlds and bonked him on the snout. Each UFO volume features offbeat and unique stories unlike any other anthology series.
 If you haven't yet read any UFO books, check out these sample stories: * Read a sample story from UFO1 by Jake Kerr written in the form of a Twitter feed . * Listen to Ken Liu's UFO2 story "The MSG Golem" at PodCastle . * Listen to Jim C. Hines's UFO2 story "Stranger vs. the Malevolent Malignancy" at PodCastle . We publish a range of humorous stories, from outright hilarious to snarky, and try to cover a wide range of humor styles, from satire to absurdist. Our books are illustrated, featuring nine original illustrations per volume drawn by the amazing Barry Munden. Our covers are drawn by the equally awesome Tomasz Maronski. Barry's illustration for Jennifer Lee Rossman's "Take Meme to Your Leader" We believe that any crowd-funded anthology should provide an opportunity for newer authors to be included. A large portion of the stories we publish each year are accepted via our open submission window. Of the twenty stories included here, fifteen were selected this way. Each of these writers earned a pro rate of $0.10 per word, their sales to UFO qualify them for associate membership in the Science Fiction Writers of America (SFWA), and their work will appear alongside well-known masters in our field. Your support of this campaign ensures that we'll be able to continue to work with authors, illustrators, and other professionals, and offer them fair pay above the industry average. The following stories and authors are included in this volume: "The Dragon, the Drudge, and the Drone" by Esther Friesner A dragon follows a drone into our world. We're pretty sure Esther wrote this story inspired by the cover of UFO6 ! "Dethroning the Champeen" (a Lucifer Jones tale) by Mike Resnick Lucifer Jones makes his way to the shores of Australia and gets into all sorts of new trouble. "The Vampire's Apprentice" by Gini Koch The true story of Count Dracula, as told through the letters of his loyal apprentice, Willoughby. "Falling's Free, Gravity Costs" by Seanan McGuire An interstellar carnival ship encounters space pirates. "The Sit Down" by Laura Resnick Wise-guy mobsters from Joisey negotiate a peace between warring alien factions. "Chad vs. the Rebel Alliance" by Shane Halbach "Old School: An Oral History of Captain Dick Chase" by Val Nolan "Quick Cash in the Old Kingdom" by Elin Korund "The Fermi Loneliness Problem" by Beth Goder "The Secret Destiny of Heroes" by Matthew Bailey "Spear Carrier's Union #109" by Jamie Kress "The Day After Halloween" by Greg Sisco "Key Fang and Klaw" by Fred Stesney "The Assassination of 2063" by David Vaughan "Bimple Bimple Bop Bop" by Richard Anderson "The Ebony Egg" by David Vierling "Take Meme to Your Leader" by Jennifer Lee Rossman "Mission Log Nuptuals" by Langley Hyde "Contractual Obligations" by C. Flynt "Three Ways to Leave Hawaii" by Zach Shephard Help us continue this annual series and share these wonderful stories with our readers! The Rewards Of course, the primary reward we'd like to offer you are copies of UFO7 in ebook and print formats. But all other UFO Publishing books are also available; you can mix and match titles as you like. 1) Unidentified Funny Objects 2) Unidentified Funny Objects 2 3) Unidentified Funny Objects 3 4) Unidentified Funny Objects 4 5) Unidentified Funny Objects 5 6) Unidentified Funny Objects 6 7) Unidentified Funny Objects 7 8) Explaining Cthulhu to Grandma and Other Stories by Alex Shvartsman 9) H. G. Wells, Secret Agent by Alex Shvartsman 10) The Golem of Deneb Seven and Other Stories by Alex Shvartsman 11) Funny Science Fiction 12) Funny Fantasy 13) Funny Horror 14) Coffee: 14 Caffeinated Tales of the Fantastic 15) Future Science Fiction Digest, issue 0 To learn more about any of these books, please visit our catalog page . Reward Tiers E-books  (in PDF, MOBI, and EPUB formats): $5: CONSPIRACY THEORIST: One previously-published UFO e-book of your choice. $10: UFO HUNTER: UFO7 e-book. $15: AREA 51 CUSTODIAN: UFO7 e-book + 1 more e-book. $20: UFO ABDUCTEE: UFO7 e-book + 3 more e-books. $25: UFO PILOT: UFO7 e-book + 5 more e-books. $40: QUANTUM MECHANIC: All fifteen UFO e-books. Paperbacks ( All paperbacks tiers include e-book versions as well! ): $20: LITTLE GREEN READER: UFO7 paperback. $25: MAD SCIENTIST: UFO7 paperback signed by the editor. $35: ANGRY ENGINEER: UFO7 signed paperback + 1 more paperback. $45: FURIOUS RESEARCHER: UFO7 signed paperback + 2 more paperbacks. $55: APOPLECTIC PROFESSOR: UFO7 signed paperback + 3 more paperbacks. $65: INDIGNANT ACADEMIC: UFO7 signed paperback + 4 more paperbacks. $75: GRUMPY GENIUS: UFO7 signed paperback + 5 more paperbacks. $160: UFO TRAFFIC CONTROLLER: All 15 paperbacks. UNIQUE/LIMITED REWARDS: $50: INVASION FLEET MARINE 1: UFO7 signed by the editor as well as UFO2 signed by Esther Friesner, Ken Liu, and Alex Shvartsman $50: INVASION FLEET MARINE 2: UFO7 signed by the editor as well as UFO5 signed by David Gerrold and Alex Shvartsman $50: INVASION FLEET MARINE 3: UFO7 signed by the editor as well as UFO6 signed by Jack Campbell, Lawrence Watt-Evans, Bill Ferris, Ken Liu, David Vierling, and Alex Shvartsman ̶$̶7̶5̶:̶ ̶I̶N̶V̶A̶S̶I̶O̶N̶ ̶F̶L̶E̶E̶T̶ ̶S̶E̶R̶G̶E̶A̶N̶T CLAIMED Jennifer Lee Rossman will create a custom cross-stitch piece of up to 6 inches square, similar to the one shown. If you select this tier your name (or the name of your choice) will be used in one of the stories in this book. We won't tell you in advance which story; you could be a villain, a hero, or merely a bystander, but when you read UFO7 you will suddenly come across your own name and it will be pretty awesome! You will also receive a random tuckerization from the FLEET ADMIRAL reward tier. Add-Ons (for US backers): Add-ons are extra items backers can add to their pledge level. They're not available as regular rewards because of their limited quantity, because UFO Publishing does not have rights to distribute e-book versions of them, and for other reasons. Because of very high overseas shipping costs, these are being made available to US-based backers. We'll confirm with you before we ship. For example, if you pledge at the LITTLE GREEN READER tier but also want a copy of THE CACKLE OF CTHULHU, add $20 to your pledge. Add-Ons: The Cackle of Cthulhu anthology paperback signed by Alex Shvartsman - $20 Humanity 2.0 anthology signed by Alex Shvartsman - $20 Explaining Cthulhu to Grandma audio book, loaded onto your choice of 8 GB custom USB flash drive or a CD - $20 Blank custom 8 GB USB flash drive - $10

title: Computer Microchips Artistic Jewelry
description: I am Sergio Gutierrez. I am very passionate about making art from electronic waste, specifically from circuit boards and microchips. After working for years creating art using electronic waste materials and patenting a technique of transforming microchips, I bring to you a new kind of jewelry. Made of parts extracted from computer circuit boards, ATG Jewelry gives a new meaning to tech awareness through wearable art forms. Introducing our new project, the ART TECH GALLERY Space (ATG), giving meaning to protecting the planet with creativity and imagination, It’s Sergio Gutierrez' next step. His first creation, SGLiquid Metal , features countless celebrities, movies and TV shows such as  Breaking Bad (pictured on Skylar White), Queen of the Damned (worn by Aaliyah) and Stuart Townsend, Wild Target (worn by Bill Nighy and Emily Blunt) and Eternal Sunshine and the Spotless Mind (worn by Kate Winslet) among others. We want you to have a great experience with ATG jewelry. So, please take this chart measurement into accuracy. Size exchanges will have a 15% restocking fee plus shipping costs. If the  available sizes in this chart do not fit you, please email us at arttechcustomer@gmail.com and we will try to accommodate you as best possible. Leave your input at atrtechgallery.com . Your input is very important for the future development of ATG, any of the 7 issues you may wish to share with us will expand our knowledge of your personal view of technology that affects us in our daily life and also share your  inventions or artforms you make that in some way relate to technology.

title: Worthefy: Financial Tracker
description: In a world where everything is digital, real-time data should be more than just numbers on a screen—it should be something you can see, feel, and stay connected to . That’s why we created Worthefy , a first-of-its-kind smart display gadget designed to bring your most important metrics to life . Whether you’re tracking your net worth, business revenue, subscribers, investments, or any key milestone , Worthefy turns abstract progress into a real, tangible display —keeping you motivated every day. What if tracking your progress was effortless? We wanted to see net worth, sales, subscribers, and key metrics instantly—without logging in, refreshing dashboards, or leaving a computer running all day. Progress should be seamless and always visible. So, we built an app that connects to existing API gateways , pulling real-time data from the platforms you use. It allows you to track multiple sources in one place, customize your display, and even integrate your own API keys , giving you full control over what you monitor. To make this work, we needed a fast, efficient, and always-on system. We used an ESP32 microcontroller to fetch real-time data from the cloud and display it on a high-contrast VFD screen , ensuring a crisp, clear view at all times. With a custom circuit for power efficiency , Worthefy delivers a sleek, distraction-free tracking experience—built for everyday use. No complicated setup required! Worthefy is easy to use and fully customizable. Just connect your accounts, and it pulls real-time data seamlessly. With Worthefy, you can track: Net Worth: Sync with banks, investments, and crypto wallets for instant financial updates. Sales & Business Metrics: Monitor revenue, Shopify sales, and CRM leads without refreshing dashboards. Subscribers & Social Growth: Keep track of YouTube, Instagram, and newsletter subscribers. Custom Data: Use your own API keys to track any metric that matters to you. Since Worthefy is an open system , developers can integrate additional data sources, automate updates, and create custom tracking solutions. Worthefy API and Developer Integration Worthefy is built to be open and flexible , allowing seamless data tracking from multiple sources through its Remote API and SDKs . Whether you're a casual user or a developer, you can integrate custom data feeds and automate updates to fit your needs. Remote API and SDKs Worthefy connects to external platforms using API gateways, making it easy to fetch and display real-time data. Any device capable of sending API requests can interact with Worthefy , including web apps, mobile apps, or automation tools. While our API is still evolving, we encourage developers to provide feedback, helping us improve and expand its capabilities. In addition to the open API , we are actively developing SDKs for: Android SDK iOS SDK Node.js and Python SDKs On-Device Processing and Custom Integrations Worthefy runs on an ESP32 microcontroller , allowing it to fetch and process data independently. Developers can integrate their own API keys , enabling the display to track custom business metrics, financial data, or any other real-time updates. For advanced users , Worthefy supports additional development through: Custom API endpoint configuration Webhook-based event triggers Custom OpenAPI integration Worthefy Developer Edition The standard Worthefy model comes optimized for fast, real-time tracking of key financial and business metrics. However, for power users and developers , we offer a Developer Edition that supports extended integrations, including: More API connections for broader data tracking Custom firmware modifications for advanced automation Enhanced data processing for multiple sources Endless Use Cases We designed Worthefy as a versatile and open platform , enabling users to track any metric that matters . Here are some of the best use cases: 📊 Financial Tracking – Keep real-time visibility on net worth, investments, or sales performance . 📈 Business Growth Monitoring – Track CRM leads, Shopify sales, Stripe revenue, and more . 🎥 Content & Social Growth – Stay updated on subscriber counts, engagement rates, and milestones . 🛠 Developer Integrations – Automate custom business insights, server monitoring, or market data tracking . 🏫 Education & Research – Use Worthefy to visualize live data for research projects, automation, or business training . Specifications General Size: Custom-designed case with a sleek, modern finish Display: High-contrast VFD screen for clear, real-time data visibility Weight: Lightweight, compact build for seamless desk integration Connectivity & Data WiFi & Bluetooth support for seamless cloud syncing ESP32 microcontroller with efficient power management Secure API integration with real-time data fetching Custom API key support for advanced user customization Processing & Performance Processor: ESP32 dual-core CPU for efficient, low-latency operation Memory: Optimized flash storage for fast data retrieval Power Efficiency: Custom circuit design for continuous, always-on tracking Customization & Compatibility User-defined API keys for personalized tracking Developer-friendly SDKs for advanced customization Display & Interface High-contrast VFD screen for crisp readability Configurable real-time updates through API connections Compact, minimalist design built to fit any workspace Meet The Team Why We Need Your Support The next step is mass production —refining the design, optimizing assembly, and securing high-quality components, many of which have large minimum order quantities (MOQ). Your support will help us move from prototype to production, ensuring the best performance, durability, and experience. By backing this project, you become part of Worthefy’s journey —helping shape the final product while gaining early access. Your feedback will help us fine-tune features, improve integrations, and ensure a seamless tracking experience for all users. Join us in bringing real-time progress tracking to life! Let’s build the future of effortless data visibility—together. Thank you! — The Worthefy Team

title: GIRDZ iPad and Tablet Holster
description: Introducing the GIRDZ iPad & Tablet Holster A simple, compact, convenient and hands-free way to carry your iPad. Go hands-free and leave the bag behind with our new GIRDZ iPad & Tablet Holster. It's designed to fit a variety of sizes, from 7-10” tablets, including iPad, iPad Mini, Samsung Galaxy Tab S3 & S4, with cases up to 3/4” thick. Made with a durable high-tech polymer, it's the perfect iPad companion when you’re on the go. It fits inside your waistband, in the small of your back. Goes with a jacket, or without, In the office or out in the field. It's simple, compact, lightweight, convenient, hands-free and bag free. Slide your tablet into the top fold of your GIRDZ iPad Holster. Slide your GIRDZ iPad Holster along with your tablet inside your waistband. Where did our inspiration come from? We had a group of people working out in the field who used tablets every day. They got tired of carrying a bag around with them everywhere and also of having to be always holding their tablet. Often we would see them stuffing their tablet in the back of their pants. After seeing them fuss with it sliding down into their pants and having to awkwardly fish it out. We made a simple prototype to test the concept. It was initially much larger and cumbersome. We went through several rounds of design changes as we field tested and refined the design based on their feedback. We determined optimal size, shape, and materials. This was fine for testing the general concept but was not sufficient for some of the finer details needed to make this a really useful product that users would love. It needed a more precise design that we could produce on a larger scale. Through our field testing we added some refined details: A catch that would secure it to your belt when you pull out your tablet A lip to pull outward when removing the holster from your belt A notch for use with pants with a center belt loop in the back A consistent wall thickness A radius large enough to accommodate thick tablet cases Materials with the right flex and toughness to stand up to wear. The 3D Design Phase Finally, it was time to get serious with 3D modeling that could be printed and molded. Designed on a tablet for a tablet One of the cool things about this project was that the final designs for the GIRDZ Tablet Holster were created on a tablet itself. Testing Our New Design It was really cool to see a physical prototype printed from our designs. We went through a few more rounds of design refinements with 3D prints to accommodate various iPad and tablet sizes and case thicknesses. A 3D print of our finished model. What's next: We need funding to get the GIRDZ iPad & Tablet Holster to the finish line, by: Creating molds Completing the first run of holsters Printing and assembling the retail packaging Launching our retail and online distribution and marketing campaign Purchasing targeted marketing and advertising Thanks for being part of the team, by helping fund the next phase of our project. title: PIXEL - Full-Color LED Flashlight Kit (Arduino Compatible)
description: Introducing The Zifnu PIXEL, the world's first, and most advanced, programmable & customizable full-color 16 LED flashlight kit. As the name implies, you can individually control each of the PIXEL's sixteen full-color LEDs (aka "pixels") by modifying the provided example Arduino sketch and uploading your changes to the PIXEL via USB. Pre-programmed Arduino Sketch with 13 display modes to get you started Learn the concepts of laser-cut case design and Arduino programming Customize the case design, or design your own, to personalize your PIXEL Program your own display modes to make your PIXEL even more unique Zifnu PIXEL Flashlight Kit Components The Zifnu PIXEL is completely open-source, this includes the circuit & PCB design, the software (Arduino Sketch), and the laser-cut case design. All of the files will be available for download once they are finalized after the successful completion of this campaign. The laser-cut case materials for the campaign rewards are clear Acrylic for the front and rear panels, and Bamboo for the center sections. This combination of the Acrylic and Bamboo give the PIXEL a modern, yet warm feel. With the downloadable case design files, you can cut your own parts to personalize your PIXEL. In the example images below, you will find a completely clear Acrylic case and one with translucent Blue center sections. Both awesome in their own right. What will you choose? PIXEL Flashlight Kit Feature Highlights: Arduino IDE compatible (sketch upload via USB port, no programmer required) Pre-programmed with the Micronucleus bootloader Loaded with an example sketch that includes 13 display modes ATTINY85-20SU 8-bit microcontroller running at 16MHZ Sixteen individually-addressable full-color LEDs (WS2812b) Sixteen high-quality PMMA LED lenses to focus the light 5VDC boost regulator to ensure consistent LED brightness 1500mAh Li-Po battery for long run times Li-Po Battery management IC with Blue status LED Micro USB port for charging and programming Combined Power/Mode switch with Blue indicator LED Externally-accessible Reset button (used for programming) Customizable laser-cut case design Laser-Cut Case Dimensions: Height: 145mm (5.71") Width: 35mm (1.38") Depth: 17mm (0.67") PCB Dimensions: Height: 130mm (5.12") Width: 26mm (1.02") Depth: 13mm (0.51") Assembled Case & PCB Assembled Case, PCB, & A Fully Assembled PIXEL Flashlight Assembled Case, PCB, & High-Quality PMMA Lenses Assembled PIXEL Flashlight - Back of Case PIXEL and a $20 for Size Comparison A Few Case Material Combinations A Trio of Awesomeness The Translucent Cases Light Up Nicely HIGH, Cool White HIGH, Warm White Medium, Warm White LOW, Warm White RED, All LEDs are Red GREEN, All LEDs are Green BLUE, All LEDs are Blue RED FLASH, All LEDs are Red and flash at ~350ms rate BEACON, All LEDs are Cool White for a 50ms burst every 3 seconds RED CHASE, All LEDs are Red and in a chase pattern YELLOW WIPE 1, All LEDs are Yellow and wipe from one side to the other YELLOW WIPE 2, All LEDs are Yellow and wipe from the center point outwards RAINBOW, All LEDs cycle through their colors in a chase pattern Power-On-Off-Sequence Beacon (50ms flash every 3 seconds (GIF period shortened to reduce GIF file size)) Red-Flash Red-Chase Edge-Sweep-Yellow Center-Sweep-Yellow Rainbow Zifnu is focused on the innovation and creation of uniquely-awesome electronic kits and modules. Our goal is to offer amazing kits that inspire, educate, and are just a bit different than you can find anywhere else. How You Can Help Us We need your support so that we can begin the production of the amazing Zifnu PIXEL full-color LED flashlight kit. Manufacturing in small quantities is not cost effective, and in some instances not even possible. We need your help funding a large enough order to be able to bring this kit to market at a reasonable price. In doing so, you will also be helping lay the groundwork for future kits and modules, some already in the prototyping stages. We have many awesome ideas we would love to share with the world; we need your support to help make that dream a reality. Our long-term goals include bringing as much manufacturing in-house as possible. Every successful campaign and sale brings us a step closer to realizing that goal...

Bring an Animatronic Songbird to Life: Inspiring a new Generation of Makers At Garner Holt Education through Imagination, LLC (ETI) , we believe that magic can be built, wired, and brought to life. Our mission is to bring the art and science of animatronics to makers of all ages, backgrounds, and skill levels through creative, hands-on learning. That’s why we're excited to introduce a project near and dear to our hearts: the Animatronic Songbird Mini STEM/STEAM Build Kits. Inspired by the classic charm and storytelling techniques of early theme park tiki bird animatronics, the Animatronic Songbird Mini was developed for educational spaces but is designed to allow makers of all levels to bring their very own animatronic character to life. Now, anyone can explore creativity, develop technical skills, and experience the wonder of animatronics from the comfort of their own home or classroom! Proven Success in Inspiring Young Minds We’ve prototyped and piloted this kit in schools across the country, and the results speak for themselves. At our “Bird Camps” students light up as they assemble their birds, give each one a unique personality, and create the illusion of life. Where Curiosity Comes to life: Hear from the students The Animatronic Songbird Mini Kit was designed to bring STEAM education to the forefront of a hands-on building experience. Along the way, the program has led to some unexpected and exciting outcomes. Students who are often unengaged in traditional classroom settings use their Animatronic Songbird Mini as a new outlet for self-expression. The result is more engaged learners at the powerful intersection of STEAM education and social-emotional learning. From the classroom to the Workshop: What teachers are saying Teachers and parents have shared how this hands-on experience builds confidence, fosters teamwork, and sparks a lasting love for innovation. Through the creative journey of putting together and finishing their very own animatronic character, makers gain valuable skills in engineering, programming, voice acting, and the arts. The process culminates in a fully programmed animatronic performance. This kit provides a meaningful, hands-on experience that inspires curiosity, celebrates individuality, and builds a true sense of accomplishment. From Working Prototype to a Fully Realized Product What’s New in This Version? Thanks to our prototypes, we know what works and what can be better. With Kickstarter funding, we are planning a wide range of upgrades and improvements to ensure the final Animatronic Songbird Mini kits are durable, user-friendly, and truly magical. Here’s what we have in store for the next version of the Songbird Mini: Injection-Molded Parts: We are completely redesigning all the bird’s parts for injection molding. This means replacing the 3D-printed prototype pieces with strong, smooth, production-quality plastic parts. The final kit will be more durable and professional, with components that fit perfectly and can withstand extensive use. New Animatronic Controller: Our engineering team is developing a custom animatronic controller board from the ground up. The prototype kits used off-the-shelf electronics; now we’re creating a dedicated controller tailored for the Songbird’s functions. The new controller will make the bird’s movements smoother and more lifelike, allow for easier programming of motion sequences, and potentially add features like sound or sensor integration down the line. Upgraded Servos & Electronics: We plan to equip the final kit with higher-quality servo motors and electronic components. The prototype proved the concept, but we identified ways to improve reliability and performance. Higher Quality servos will result in more fluid movement (a twitch of the head, a opening/closing beak that looks natural), and robust electronics will ensure the bird operates consistently show after show. No more worries about a motor burning out during your big demo – our upgraded components aim for longevity. Enhanced Art Materials & Packaging: In the prototype phase, we provided basic art supplies to decorate the bird. For the final product, we’re sourcing high-quality art materials (paints, brushes, faux feathers/fur, etc.) so that every creator can give their bird a truly polished look. We’re also designing attractive, informative packaging that doubles as a storage case for the kit. The packaging will include a colorful instruction booklet and educational content about animatronics, making the unboxing experience just as exciting as the build. Sustainable Domestic Supply Chain: We are committed to building a sustainable supply chain for this product. That means sourcing components and materials from reliable suppliers, largely within the USA, to minimize shipping delays and ensure quality. By creating a domestic supply network, we support local businesses and maintain greater control over manufacturing and quality assurance. It’s good for the product and good for the community. Made in the USA – Final Production: We plan to manufacture the Animatronic Songbird Mini entirely in the United States. Final injection molding, assembly of kits, and packaging will all be done domestically. This not only helps us oversee every step for top-notch quality, but also means backers can trust that the product is being made ethically and with care. “Made in the USA” is a point of pride for us – especially since Garner Holt Productions itself has always built its animatronic magic right here at home. Be a Part of Our Team of Animatronics Explorers By supporting this campaign you’ll be part of the Garner Holt animatronic legacy, making the magic of animatronics and hands-on learning accessible to all. We’re investing in injection molds, tooling, production equipment, and sourcing to reduce production costs and bring this one-of-a-kind STEAM kit to as many makers as possible. Our Animatronic Songbird Mini Kit will be proudly made in the USA, ensuring high-quality craftsmanship while supporting domestic manufacturing. Rewards for Animatronics Explorers We’ve created a variety of reward tiers to help you get involved in a way that’s meaningful to you. From early access to our Animatronic Explorers Club, to full Animatronic Songbird Mini Kits, to our Animatronics Inspirational Explorer tier—which sends an Animatronic Songbird Mini kit to a learner in need—there’s a level for every kind of backer. Whether you're just getting introduced to animatronic, or are a skilled hobbyist, or someone passionate about supporting STEAM education, our rewards are designed to welcome you into the world of animatronics in a fun and inspiring way. Who This Project Is For We’re focusing on STEAM education enthusiasts, animatronics aficionados, tiki culture fans, and theme park lovers—anyone who appreciates creativity, engineering, and the joy of bringing characters to life through this special medium. Whether you’re passionate about inspiring the next generation of makers or simply want a fun and interactive kit for yourself, we invite you to come along with us on this journey. Help us spread the magic of animatronics and empower learners through hands-on discovery. Back our campaign today and be part of something extraordinary! Join us on this Creative Journey Backing this project is more than just buying a kit – it’s joining a community of creative thinkers, educators, and fans who believe in the power of animatronics to inspire. By supporting us, you become an essential part of the Songbird Mini’s story. We’ll keep you updated every step of the way, from engineering design milestones to behind-the-scenes peeks at manufacturing. You’ll see how your contribution is helping transform a rough prototype into a polished final product that can ignite imaginations worldwide. We speak from experience when we say this kit can change lives . Some of the kids who built our prototype birds later dove deeper into coding and robotics, or discovered an artistic talent in painting their creations. We’ve watched a young student go from simply following instructions to tweaking the code and proudly declaring “I made it do a new trick!”. This is the kind of empowerment and confidence that hands-on making can bring, and it’s at the heart of why we’re doing this. With your help, the Animatronic Songbird Mini will soon take flight. Together, we can bring a little piece of theme park wonder into classrooms, homes, and makerspaces everywhere. Whether you’re a teacher eager to engage your students with something truly interdisciplinary, a Disney enthusiast longing to own a bit of animatronic magic, or a maker looking for your next innovative project – this campaign is for you. Join us, and let’s create something amazing. Thank you for believing in our project and for helping the Songbird Mini sing!

title: The MegaCube
description: Before you start reading, maybe you want to watch that video again , but this time in beautiful High Definition !  Go ahead, make it full screen and enjoy all those extra pixels.  (Kickstarter downsamples the main project video to SD quality to save a little bandwidth.) Wait, before we tell you about the project, why don't you tell us a little about yourself.  Start with number 1, 2 or 10 below. 1: I am an Electronics Guru Oh, you're an Electronics Guru and want to know all the gritty details?  Then you should GOTO 30! 2: I want to know how the MegaCube + eBOSS with ID Chip = Awesome It's true.  The MegaCube connected to an eBOSS with ID Chip is awesome.  To get right to the details on that, GOTO 45! 10: I am new to electronic wizardry.  What the heck is this? The MegaCube is a programmable, reusable, simple little computer. It allows anyone, particularly software and hardware engineers, to try out ideas, creating prototypes of their own electronic gizmos, with much less grunt work. The MegaCube can gather feedback from external sensors (detect light, motion, temperature, etc.) and control actions (turn on motors, illuminate lights, synchronize and communicate with other devices, etc.) There is related trend on the rise called the Maker Movement . This is a culture of invention, where people (not just engineers!) use tools like the MegaCube , 3D printers, CNC machines, robots, etc. to design their own things. The MegaCube is intended to act as the brains of the "things" in the Internet of Things (IoT) . Although it's in its infancy now, you'll hear more and more about the IoT in the next few years. 20: This is great and all, but what can I DO with it? You could use a MegaCube to: Control a robot to pick Cheetos up and hold them up for you to snack on hands free to keep the orange stuff off your fingers Act as the brains of a remote control vehicle Control equipment in a radio tower Be the core controller of a build-it-yourself 3D printer Activate motors to automatically adjust your window blinds based on current time, sunlight, outside temperature, and the temperature you want your house to be. Make a bunch of LED lights outside your house do crazy awesome stuff during the holidays (like, say, blink to the beat of music) The list of things you could make using a MegaCube are practically endless! Here are some of the fun things we've already done with it: Control a remote control car (it drove down the aisle at Mike's wedding, acting as a ring bearer, yes, really!) Control servos to move a robot arm Monitor a fish tank's water temperature and display it Display cool stuff on an LCD screen Monitor a clothes dryer and send a text when it's done Make a "Fruit Announcer" that tells you what fruit you just touched 30: I'm an Electronics Guru - tell me more! Mike, creator of the MegaCube , wanted to build a clone of an Arduino Mega, which is a flexible, easy to use hardware and software open source electronics development platform.  He wanted to build one that... Is able to store multiple programs simultaneously (streamlining use across projects with a unique eBOSS for each project) - GOSUB 45! Is smaller (check out its size vs. a quarter above) Is "Socket-able" Allowed access to all 100 pins of the processor Didn't require expensive proprietary connectors Used standard 0.1" pitch spacing to make it Protoboard friendly And, on top of all that, he wanted it to be more reasonably priced! 40: You say it's Socket-able, right? The Embedded Break Out Shield System ( eBOSS ) - allows embedding the MegaCube in your own project.  It has solder tabs for all 100 pins and still allows the MegaCube to be neatly unplugged and reused in other projects.  Due to the 0.1" pitch spacing of the pins, you can use our eBOSS or you can also solder your own female header pins on to protoboards to socket it directly into your own project. 45: Can I move the MegaCube between projects without reprogramming it? Yes, you can! The eBOSS has been redesigned to include a Unique ID chip which has a hard coded 64-bit registration number and 48-bit node address.  There are also programmable bits so you can add your own personal ID/data.  So why is this important? Having a unique ID allows you to have multiple programs (sketches) stored on the MegaCube at once and, when moving it between eBOSSes, the MegaCube runs the appropriate program based on ID. You can move your MegaCube between the eBOSS mounted in your Larson scanner LED project for your Knight Rider Car Club and the eBOSS soldered to your Battlestar Galactica Cylon helmet without having to stop at your computer to reprogram the MegaCube .  When you add another project, just add another program to the MegaCube and plug it into another inexpensive eBOSS.  Our API makes it easy and only using 1-wire communication means that it doesn't use up an SPI port or UART. It's not our problem if KITT gets mad when you move your MegaCube over to the Cylon. 50: Neat! I want one. Is it for me? The MegaCube is an affordable and enhanced electronics prototyping platform intended for the intermediate to pro user who is looking for more than what the Arduino Mega offers in a package that is smaller than an UNO and is easily embedded in a project at a lower cost than the Arduino Mega or its clone offerings. For anyone interested in getting into the Maker Movement and Arduino world, the MegaCube along with the BOSS and an FTDI cable (to connect directly to your computer's USB port) or ICSP programmer is all that you would need to get started. 60: Nice.  How can I keep it safe during testing? The MegaCube Holder is made of ABS and protects the MegaCube from touching conductive surfaces during your development process.  Mike decided it might be an important addition when he fried one by absentmindedly setting it on his aluminum laptop.  Now if he can just get rid of the burn marks on his laptop... 70: I want a MegaCube and a shield! Excellent!  Check out our Combos for a MegaCube or, if you want it all, go for our Ultimate Combo, which has the MegaCube , eBOSS and Holder. 80: I'm in!  I want it before everyone else. We have a limited supply of Early Adopter MegaCubes and Starter Combos, so be quick about it!  Not only is the price slashed, you get the honor of calling yourself an Early Adopter, and who doesn't want such a noble title?  Seriously, we'll post on Facebook or something about how tech-forward you are. 90: This is so cool, I wish my name was on it! You are in luck.  Become one of our Sponsors and your name will appear on the eBOSS or the MegaCube itself.  Seriously, you back us as a Sponsor and your name will be on every single MegaCube (or every single eBOSS) that we produce for this Kickstarter Campaign.  You will be immortalized!  Just imagine if one of these somehow makes it to space.  Then your name will be in space!  (We make no guarantees about your name making it to space.) Seriously, though, we can only fit so many names in the limited open area on the hardware, so claim your space today before it's all gone!  You can blame Mike if we run out of this reward because he was just too darned efficient with his designs. 100: Is everything going to look like it does in the photos? Although the early prototypes are green, the final MegaCube will use blue text and graphics on white circuit boards just like the eBOSS pictures.  Trust us.  It will look totally sexy, especially when you're holding it in your hand. 110: I want more details on this sweet tech! Glad to hear it!  Check out all the juicy bits on our website at http://megadom.net . 120: No, seriously, show me its innards! Our MegaCube Pinout Diagram should shed some light on it for you: Oh, you like to use Fritzing ?  We've got you covered with the MegaCube Fritzing Part: 130: Rewards Here's a nice visual version, but for all the details and to actually choose a reward, check out the rewards listed in the right column (you'll have to scroll up a ways!) The Rewards! 140: Who are you guys, again? The short version is that Mike, the creator of the MegaCube , started up his own company, DomCo Electronics Inc., an electrical engineering consultancy, and initially developed the MegaCube under that company, which is why you see that name and company web address on some of his MegaCube prototypes.  He got together with The Jo(h)ns and we formed MEGADOM Electronics Inc. as a small company specifically to bring Mike's prototypes to market so that all engineers can get their hands on them.  Of course, we're a new company and we need your backing (see below) to get us rocking, so thank you in advance!  Check out our Full Bio to learn more about each of us. 150: Why do you need our help? We're here on Kickstarter because we need your help to take the MegaCube from prototype to production.  We've gotten pretty far on our own, but now we need your financial backing to go the rest of the way. We'll use the Kickstarter funds to buy parts in bulk quantities, set up our assembly process, and ship the MegaCubes and eBOSSes to you as quickly as possible. Your support will go a long way to help us get our company off the ground (and into the hands of our customers!)  We think the most exciting thing about creating this product is seeing all of the awesome things that you guys find to do with it! 160: How did you figure out the funding goal? Mike has a ton of experience in building electronic devices for his career, so he used all the knowledge to determine the start up costs involved in putting together all the bits and pieces necessary to build the MegaCube in mass quantities.  Our ultimate costs will depend on how many of each unit we have to produce, and we determined the minimums we need to get reasonable pricing from manufacturers. Check out our Risks and Challenges below for more information. 170: I want a combo that you don't offer. No problem!  Send us a message and we'll see what we can do.  We'll either create another reward that meets your criteria (within the limits of KickStarter's rules, of course) or ask you to pick a similar reward and include the appropriate additional amount. 180: This seems mighty familiar... Yes, we launched a nearly identical KickStarter campaign in 2014, with a much higher funding goal, because we wanted to minimize our costs (manufacturers provide big price breaks at higher quantities).  We relaunched this KickStarter with a much more modest goal, with a much smaller income margin because we believe that the MegaCube needs to get into your hands.  Just getting the MegaCube out there will help slingshot us into the next phase of our production plan - we're just starting out smaller this time! 200. What the heck are all those numbers before the headings? What, you mean, like the 200 in front of this one?  That's a throwback to old programming languages like BASIC, just for fun.  And yeah, we skipped 190 because you didn't have to use every number in BASIC code, either.  See, Microsoft isn't the only one who can skip numbers. 210. Timeline Copyright Information Knight Rider is property NBC & Universal Television, with whom we are not affiliated.  On the other hand, if you used MegaCubes in a K.I.T.T. replica, that would be sweet! Battlestar Galactica's Cylons are property of Universal Pictures.  Same story there.  No relation, but if you build some Cylons with MegaCubes, please send us some pictures and video!  K.I.T.T. and the Cylon are only used as comedic, low resolution images for fun.  We cite Wikipedia's page in hopes that the concepts there also allow us to use such images.

title: ROGUE Wind Turbine: Power For Any Adventure
description: Rogue Turbine is the world’s most innovative portable power station Generate renewable energy wherever you go — ideal for charging essential devices, supporting off-grid adventures, and providing critical backup power when it matters most. Dependable off-grid power Rogue kits utilize a Triple Power Approach —seamlessly integrating wind, solar, and energy storage—to ensure maximum resilience and versatility in any environment. Experience nature, unleash your freedom Rogue’s renewable energy technology lets you capture the power of nature, no matter where your adventures take you. Power generation from apparent wind Rogue is the world’s first portable wind turbine capable of generating its own apparent wind through groundbreaking orbital spin technology . This innovation drastically expands its use cases, delivering unmatched efficiency and reliable power generation even in low-wind conditions. Carry Rogue on the go Go further and stay longer Quick setup Reliable Sustainable Energy Rogue Turbine: Dependable off-grid power for a sustainable future The Rogue Turbine redefines renewable energy with reliable, off-grid backup power—delivering clean energy whenever you need it. Its innovative design ensures durability and efficiency, keeping you prepared for emergencies and off-grid adventures alike. Compatible with popular power stations Examples of Rogue-compatible generators. All copyrights belong to their respective companies. Using Rogue off-grid Perfect for generating off-the-grid power Solar kit vs. Rogue Turbine Backup power, day or night Rogue's orbital spin mode generates power—even without wind. Recharge your devices anytime, anywhere. You’ve got the power. Science of orbital spin At the core of Rogue’s Spin Mode are two primary forces working together to generate apparent wind and real power: Truly portable, lightweight, and easy to carry With our proprietary technology, we've developed Rogue Turbine so it can fit on top of your backpack, weighing in at just 3 pounds. Designed for extreme weather & disasters Our patent-pending technology can be used in all wind conditions. Other wind turbine products lie dormant when there is no wind and when critical power generation is necessary. Wherever you go, whatever nature throws at you — go Rogue Sustainable power for your devices Power your vehicles with Rogue 40W Rogue Turbine specs: 25W Wind Generator 10W Solar Charger 5W 3000mAh Battery Rogue Stand Energy Management 120W Rogue Explorer specs: 25W Wind Generator 60W Solar Charger 30W Power Pack (20,000mAh) Battery 5W 3000mAh Battery Rogue Stand Energy Management Increase Your Resilience 20000mAh Power Pack add-ons (Available for U.S. Backers Only) Our 20000mAh power pack add-ons are designed to give you even more portable energy for your adventures, emergencies, or off-grid work. Rogue Power Link add-on Expand Your Wind Power Now available to U.S. backers, the Rogue Power Link is a 30-watt expansion module that lets friends, family, and neighbors team up to boost your wind power setup. It’s perfect for group adventures, emergency backup, or off-grid living made easy. ROGUE DIY Challenger add-on Ready to build Rogue yourself? The ROGUE DIY Challenger is just the spinner — no power components — perfect for educators, makers, and first-time builders. Build the Future with Rogue Rogue Kayak could help some of us commute to work — sustainably. 3-Year Warranty Your Rogue Turbine is backed by a 3-year limited warranty covering any defects in materials or workmanship. After the first year, feel free to reach out if you run into any issues — we’ve been field-testing the same Rogue for over two years, and it's still running strong. Timeline Rogue Turbine Rewards Shipping Cost Estimates About the Team We're passionate explorers of renewable energy's incredible potential, constantly innovating to create sustainable solutions for a brighter future! Team Rogue at Pacific Sky Power is a group of innovators committed to redefining how we live in a rapidly changing world. With a strong focus on sustainability and advanced technology, they empower explorers and preppers alike with reliable hybrid energy systems designed for versatility and efficiency. Fueled by our Hawaiian adventures, we dedicated ourselves to creating impactful technology for the greater good. Today, we’re proud to be recognized as leaders in portable wind turbines, with thousands of units powering off-grid living worldwide. Thanks to our university teams! Our Roots in Clean Tech Research The groundbreaking launch of the Rogue Turbine is the result of years of hands-on clean energy research in collaboration with university students and faculty. What began as academic exploration has evolved into a bold new form of hybrid power — combining wind, solar, and kinetic energy into one compact, real-world-ready system. Background Research Trials

Have you seen or heard the hype of the FPV (First person view) racers? Well they are here to stay! FPV racing really took off about one year ago with groups of guys getting together at parks and just starting to race. There seems to be events popping up all over the world, One of the biggest events took place not to long ago in Sacramento which had an amazing turn out of people. Since then a lot more organizations have started making more races possible in placed like California,Las Vegas and Hawaii. Our company started small custom building aerial platforms for anyone who wanted to fly their DSLR cameras. Soon we too became absolutely hooked with FPV racers. We wanted to bring something out to the market that hadn't been done before. Droneproz was the first company to offer 100% ready to fly racers right out of the box. We knew that there was a lot of people that loved the concept of the racers but didn't know where to start as far as building and choosing components for their quad. Every unit that was sold threw our company was built,tested and tuned here in the USA. When a customer received our unit all they had to do was fly. Since the initial release  of our graviton racer we have come out with various other models but the graviton was for sure our number one seller since everything is all included. WHAT IS FPV? FPV is a way to fly that a pilot uses either Monitor or goggles to view what the onboard camera of the quad is transmitting via a video transmitter in live time. Its the closest thing to sitting in a real plane and flying by what the unit can see. A lot of people relate it to a video game and when you try it for the fist time it becomes very addicting. Not all of us have the luxury of flying in a real plane every day so why not have the next best thing :) Gravitron V2 The Graviton v2 is a unit that has been perfected ever since the initial release of our first Graviton. We have made this unit a lot more easier to fly and way more durable. We have also increased the flight time of the Gravtiron to 5-8 minutes depending on your style and up to 10+ minutes with an upgraded battery! The Gravitron has a top speed of 50+ miles per hour making the perfect unit to get your adrenaline going when looking for speed. The over all look of the initial Graviton hasn't changed much but it has surely evolved to become one of the TOP racers in the industry! With 6mm carbon fiber arms the Gravitron is INDESTRUCTIBLE, We don't only say indestructible but we also back that with a LIFETIME WARRANTY on the carbon fiber arms. 3k Carbon Fiber Over 90% of the material used to make the Graviton is made of 3k Japanese carbon fiber which is one of the strongest carbon fiber out there. Not only is it very strong but is very very light. From day one our goal was not only to have a strong unit but at the same time have something that didn't weigh a ton and then sacrifice performance. Powerful Brushless Motors The Graviton V2 comes equipped with powerful 2204 2300kv motors. Unlike the V1 motors these motors have been optimized to give the most power possible while still being as efficient as possible. Achieving that balance was not easy since it is very hard to achieve both things. After tons of test on various different motors we have finally cracked it with these new motors. With enough power to carry a fully loaded unit and a Go Pro 3-4 its power is surely a force to be recond with. While the stock battery provided with each unit is a 3 cell Lipo (11.1V) the motors can easily handle a 4 cell Lipo (14.8V) for those who think they can handle the extra power. ESC (Electronic Speed Control) Wanting to make sure we gave the customer the best of the best we had our own 12amp esc made using the latest firmware flashed in these controllers which is the ever popular BLHELI software. Almost 90% of the ESC out on the market that is on a quad is  using BLheli  software. Making an esc capable of handling the high power current being supplied to the motors not an easy task but after various test with different components we found the perfect recipe. These ESC have a very fast refresh rate enabling the flight to be as smooth as possible. Matched with our 2204 motors these two are a match made in heaven. CC3D Flight Controller The Brain that makes flight for these amazing quads possible. The flight controller is the computer that controls these quads and processes all he information for flight to be possible. After our years of experience testing various controllers out on the market we found that the CC3D is the absolute best open source flight controller for all around flying. Although the Graviton does not have GPS, the cc3d does accept a GPS to be purchased and added at a later time down the road. The Gravitons come with 2 flight modes that can be switched while in flight. One of the flight modes is Self Level which is by far the most used mode especially for beginners. The way Self level works is every time you give an input through your radio you override the auto level feature, as soon as you release the input from the radio the unit automatically self levels on its own so you don't have to. You can clearly see why most pilots will love this mode. The second flight mode is ACRO, in this mode auto level is shut off so when you release the input form the radio the unit will not self level on its own and will continue its flight path. For FPV racing this is ideal because you want to be able to point the unit in your direction of travel and have it go. Most intermediate to advance pilot fly in this mode. Another nice feature about Self level mode is the aircraft WILL NOT tilt past 40 degrees making it impossible to flip. When you are leaning you do not want the unit to be able to flip until you learn how to fly it with confidence. In ACRO mode there is NO LIMIT so as long as you leave the radio stick to the right the unit will keep rolling to the right until you stop. Since these modes can be switched while in flight you can easily test the feel of ACRO and as soon as you get into trouble you can switch it back to Self Level. The CC3D is an open source flight control, for those of you who wish to add special sensors,GPS, or customize settings it is easily possible to do such things. FPV Monitor Provided with the Graviton is also a 5" monitor which transmits the LIVE video form the Graviton to the built in Video receiver so you the pilot can see exactly what the Graviton sees in live time. As you get more proficient at flying you will be able to fly with only looking at the monitor alone. For those looking for the edge in FPV racing Goggles can be purchased separately. 2.4ghz Radio The Provided 2.4ghz radio is a standard frequency hopping 2.4 radio that is widely used in the industry. With very good range (about 2000+ feet in a good enviroment) and pretty much no way to for the radio to get an interference it was clear that this was the Radio for the Graviton v2. Charger & Batteries Provided with each combo is a lithium wall charger. This charger allows you to charge both of your batteries provided in the combo. No need to worry about setting up the charger like most RC quads, simply plug the charger into the wall plug in one batter and done! Provided with every unit are 2 high power lithium polymer batteries. One battery is for the Gravtiron and the other battery is for the FPV monitor.  The battery used for the Gravtiron enables it to stay airborne for 5-8  minutes which is plenty of time for racers. The battery can always be upgraded in the future to give the Gravitorn over 10 minutes of flying time. This photo is still processing Check back in a few minutes! ACTION CAMERAS The Graviton 250 racer is designed to carry any of the 2 most popular cameras in the industry. You can easily choose to strap a Gopro hero 2-4 or a Mobius action camera with ease. If you choose to go the Gopro 4 route this can become a racer that will be capturing 4K footage as you are recording. TELEPORTER V3 FPV GOGGLES For those of you who wish to have goggles there will be combos offered with FPV goggles. These goggles are made from the #1 manufacture for FPV goggles in the industry which is Fatshark. The Teleports are intro level goggles which give the user a great experience and more immersed experience vs the standard monitors. 200MW VS 600MW VIDEO TRANSMITTER The Graviton V2 is offered in two combos, one of them being 200mw and the other 600mw. The number stands for the video transmitter strength which is what feeds you the live video to the video receiver on your monitor. Obviously the higher the number the better signal strength you will have and farther you will be able to fly without getting video break up. Typically the 200mw is good for 500-900 feet in good conditions and the 600mw is good for 900-2000 feet in good conditions. The antennas on the video transmitter also play a bug role and can be upgraded at a later time for stronger signal strength. (Note the MW doesn't have anything to do with the range of the radio this is ONLY the video transition range) COMBO BREAK DOWN Every combo with a Gravitron comes 100% ready to fly with EVERYTHING you need already included (except first 3 pledges). The differences are 200mw vs 600mw video transmitters, LED lights added and lastly goggles added to the combos. In every Gravitron v2 combo CARBON FIBER GRAVITRON V2 FRAME MOTORS x4 PROPELLERS x12 ESC x4 FLIGHT CONTROLLER FPV CAMERA FPV VIDEO TRANSMITTER FPV 5" MONITOR MOUNTING BRACKETS FOR MONITOR TO MOUNT ON RADIO ANTENNAS FOR VIDEO TRANSMITTER AND RECIEVER BATTERY FOR GRAVITRON V2 BATTERY FOR FPV MONITOR CHARGER FOR BATTERIES 2.4ghz RADIO FOR GRAVITORN AA BATTERIES FOR RADIO MISC TOOLS TRAVEL CASE LED (OPTIONAL) GOGGLES (OPTIONAL) ALL UNITS ARE FULLY BUILT AND PROGRAMMED AS WELL AS TEST FLOWN BEFOR SHIPPING TRAINING QUAD A few combos will be offered with a small training quad for those who wish to have one. This little guy can teach you the fundamentals but is not necessary since every Gravitron comes with novice settings programmed into the flight controller.

True 4-Axis Jockey Technology , the Holy Grail of cinematic video stabilization, has arrived. This patent pending 4-axis technology stabilizes the vertical axis, a critical deficiency of traditional 3-axis gimbals in addressing bouncy videos. In developing the revolutionary Jockey Motion 4-Axis gimbal , Turbo Ace engineers have also adapted a seamless 4th-axis Jockey upgrade for Ronin, Ronin-M, Movi M5, Movi M10, Movi M15, AllSteady-6Pro and AllSteady-6Plus gimbals, providing easy transition between existing 3-axis and new 4-axis stabilization. Upgrade Ronin-M to 4 Axis Gimbal Upgrade Ronin to 4 Axis Gimbal Movi Toad to Ronin Converter is included in PRO PACKAGE-MR works on Ronin and Movi gimbals Movi Toad to Manfrotto Converter is included in PRO PACKAGE-M for backers who own both AllSteady and Movi gimbals FAILURE OF PREVIOUS 4-AXIS GIMBALS Despite many attempts, earlier 4-axis gimbal developments were unable to overcome 2 major roadblocks. First, basic spring attributes were not conducive to adjustments for varying payloads. Second, the challenge of gravity compounded by stored energy resulting in endless undulating bounces created by the spring. Both are extraordinarily difficult obstacles that gimbal developers have yet to overcome. You may have seen several carefully choreographed 4-axis gimbal videos on the web. But in each case, a spring of specific size and tension is selected to match the operating payload. Hence any payload change will destroy the equilibrium. Then, the operator had to counter every upward movement with a well-timed and equal downward movement. The need to constantly return to a centralized position demonstrates how these attempts at vertical stabilization will not work in real world applications, hence none of these prototypes were ever released as finished products. THE HYDRAULIC SHOCK SOLUTION To address vertical stabilization, Turbo Ace engineers integrated a patent pending suspension system with 4 Synchronized Hydraulic Shocks to absorb and slowly dissipate energy from the main spring. Instead of endless up and down oscillation, the hydraulic shocks enable filming to transition smoothly between opposing vertical displacements without having to return to a centralized position. A case in point, when suspension system was first introduced in the 20th century, there were basically springs implemented to absorb the initial force from a bump on the road but there was no solution to mitigate ensuing bounces that lingers for several seconds. The adaptation of hydraulic shocks is able to slowly disperse  that force. Another challenge was adaptability and adjustability, whereas a sedan will benefit from softer more responsive suspension, a heavier SUV definitely requires much stiffer support. Jockey's patent pending toolless adjustable spring mechanism with two adjustment knobs can easily adapt to varying payloads and enable operator to tune and tailor to specific production needs. A REVOLUTIONARY WAY TO REDISTRIBUTE PAYLOAD TO YOUR BODY WITHOUT CUMBERSOME  SHOULDER RIGS & ROBOTIC ARMS Many gimbal setups on the market consist of heavy equipment, leading to long exhausting sessions. While shoulder rigs or robotic arms may alleviate some arm and back strain, the additional weight and bulk of these devices causes an assortment of problems - from a significant increase in overall payload to obtrusive cables and vests that constantly get in the way. At less than 20% of the weight of a normal shoulder rig or robotic arm, our patent pending Super Light Weight Support Rig transfers the gimbal and camera weight to your hips instead of your upper body while providing a choice to switch between two operating modes. For cinematic panning shots or to make camera adjustments while on the go, insert the Jockey into its Support Rig holster and transfer all excess payload to your hips. At any moment, draw the Jockey out from the holster for increased mobility and range of movement. No more “missed opportunities” because you are unable to adjust your camera while holding the gimbal. No more "lagging behind action" because your arms are about to fall off. The Jockey Rig offers nimble unobtrusive unrestrained payload support - a compelling way to film for long duration. JOCKEY 4TH AXIS STABILIZER The Jockey’s patent pending 4th axis when coupled with the Jockey Rig put an end to undulating videos and shoulder/arm strain. Continue shooting for the entire day with the Jockey Support Rig without getting tired and say goodbye to rolling shutter footage from bounces. If you already own a DJI Ronin, DJI Ronin-M, Movi M5, Movi M10, Movi M15, AllSteady-6Pro or AllSteady-6Plus 3-axis gimbal, you can choose one of the JOCKEY 4TH-AXIS STABILIZER DELUXE or PRO PACKAGES to upgrade your gimbal to 4-axis . JOCKEY SUPPORT RIG, A REVOLUTIONARY WAY TO REDUCE WEIGHT Newly upgraded extra long all-around padding and suspension rig D-rings added Jockey Support Rig Underslung Kit- Extension Bracket, Quick Release Plate and Thumb Knob Eureka! We have found a revolutionary way to support your gimbal. Unobtrusive and inconspicuous, the patent pending Jockey Support Rig allows you to remain light and nimble. Whether if you are implementing the inverted-upright mode for eye level filming or the underslung mode to lower center of gravity, this small yet astonishing device can easily transfer more than 80% of the weight of your 4-Axis gimbal to your hips. You can now hold the gimbal with barely one hand, freeing the other hand to adjust camera and gimbal on the go. No more bulky shoulder rigs with restraining jackets and obtrusive cables. FAUX VS TRUE 4TH AXIS STABILIZERS A typical shoulder/hip rig function is to transfer most of the 3-axis gimbal weight from your hands and arms to your shoulders or hips. In contrast, the Jockey Support Rig is used strictly to support the weight of the gimbal leaving all 4 axis to function independently without any operator interference. Sedentary behavior (measured by time spent sitting) leads to higher rates of obesity, Type 2 Diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and premature death. 2. Manage your stress level, improve your working efficiency Heavy working can help accumulate stress. When your stress is high, you might as well take a break and relax. FitOn enables you to see your stress level and notify you when a break is needed. Keep a high-efficiency rate and wellness level at the same time with FitOn. Read More on Workplace Stress. The integrated short-term Heart-Rate-Variability feature and the RSA (determination of respiratory sinus arrhythmia) feature enables FitOn to detect your momentary stress levels, assess your health and risk situation, and helps you get a better understanding of internal stress triggers and nervous system responses. Sleep quality is important because we spend ⅓ of life in bed. A good quality night's sleep will make your day more enjoyable. To avoid any nights that lead to exhausted day at work, FitOn steps into play. It supports the following features and functionalities: Sleep Insights Get insights on your night. See valuable insights about your sleep to get a clearer picture of your nighttime habits, how your routine might be affecting your sleep quality and what you can do to improve. •Automatic Sleep Detection •Sleep Onset Latency – the time it takes you to fall asleep •Specific period of time you were awake during sleep •Light Sleep •Deep Sleep •Best time to wake you up to maximize your productivity •Total Sleep Time With the comprehensive analysis of your sleeping cycle, a quality night's sleep won’t be a wild wish anymore. We understand monitoring is not enough, and insight matters. That is why our software team is constantly improving our data accuracy and aspiring to develop advanced algorithms in vital sign analysis to help sense any potential sickness early. 1. HRV Testing  (Available on FitOn Wellness Pro) What is HRV? Heart rate variability (HRV) is the physiological phenomenon of variation in the time interval between heartbeats. It is measured by the variation in the beat-to-beat interval. A higher HRV value typically means you are healthier and in better aerobic shape. As shown in the graph to the left, two adults with the same heart rate of 60, the HRV value of user B is higher than that of user A, meaning that user B is healthier. By analyzing the differences when the heart beats each time and having timely access to health information, HRV can be used for stress recovery. Studies have shown that heart rate variability can detect coronary heart disease, hypertension, and heart failure. In particular, the prognosis of cardiovascular disease will continue and should be monitored. Controlling the changes in the heart may prevent the recurrence of deterioration. As shown in the picture to the top, by collecting the PP interval in the PPG graph (or the RR interval in the ECG/EKG graph or the JJ interval data in the BCG graph), the Lorenz plot is obtained. FitOn can roughly judge whether a person has a sinus heart rate or supraventricular and ventricular arrhythmias from the Lorenz plot analysis. 2. Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) Not many people aware of Oxygen Saturation's use in everyday life. But, do you know that periodic measurement of your SpO2 (especially during sleep) could benefit in early prevention of suffocation, choking, infections, (such as pneumonia) drowning diseases, (such as emphysema), lung cancer, and lung infections. Inhaling poisonous chemicals, heart failure, or a history of heart attacks allergic reactions general anesthesia sleep apnea. For those working in closed environments, such as miners and divers, or for those who might suffer from Hypoxia, like the mountain climbers, it's definitely necessary to have oxygen saturation monitored to stay safe. Above graphs show the abnormal sleeping status from a sick tester. 3. Vital Signs Notification Receiving reminders and notifications once the reading is over the default preset. This is to avoid any potential accidents and better control your energy output during vigorous exercise. 4. Hypoxia time period ---- Cardiac load ---- Respiratory Rate Wristwatches have a small screen size. We understand this. That is why we have developed the FitOn phone app that provides more detailed insights into your tracking.
