description: A big THANK YOU! With your help, we have finally reached our $250K funding goal! Some exciting updates: 👉 Ocean Park concept art revealing 👉 Houseboat concept art revealing Thank you for your continued love and support! We can't wait to bring you even more exciting events and showcase what we prepared for the stretch goals! ※ 日本語の紹介 は英語の下にあります。 ※ The Japanese introduction is provided below the English version. Starsand Island Welcome to Starsand Island – a subtropical paradise with year-round balmy weather. Locals here live by ancient traditions of harmony with nature and the ocean, earning its poetic name: " The Star in the Sea " . The island is star-shaped, with varying elevations—higher in the north and lower in the south—and distinct seasons that offer seasonal wonders.​ In a beautiful local legend, finding a piece of aquamarine starsand on the beach and making a wish upon it will make your dreams come true. As the sun sets and the sea breeze gently blows, strolling along the beach in search of the unique starsand has become the most romantic daily ritual for both the island residents and visitors. Our Vision Our team gathered together all because of our love for farm simulation games such as "Stardew Valley" and "My time at Sandrock", but as players, we have always imagined an ideal work that can realize our fantasy of an island life. This is how we started developing Starsand Island. The pumpkin carriage of Cinderella and the moonlight harp that we have longed for in fairy tales have become the source of inspiration for our creation, aiming to restore the carefree life of our childhood. Here, you can become a leisurely farmer, working in the fields and keeping company with animals; you can also become an explorer, riding an e-bike along the coast, exploring the ruins deep in the jungle; or just be a fisherman who enjoys the present, go fishing, and quietly enjoy the golden sunset pouring against the sea. Here, whoever you choose to be, you will be enjoying an unique and romantic life. Starsand Island isn't just a game for us; it's a reflection of our own life philosophy. We invite every player to find their own rhythm here, experiencing warmth and inspiration that resonate with their personal journey. Our wish is for every player to find a path that brings them joy, both in the game and in their everyday real lives. Introduction Feeling drained by city life? Starsand Island awaits – your peaceful retreat where you'll: Play as a homecomer reconnecting with their island roots after years in the concrete jungle. Here, you'll spend an unforgettable time with the local residents, the community, and the island itself. We have also crafted a unique anime-style for Starsand Island, aiming to have the highest quality performance of the Farming Simulation genre, hoping to convey the best experience for our players. On Starsand Island, you'll meet a vibrant cast of islanders, each with their own unique personality. We've already crafted distinct behavior patterns and rich personal backstories for each resident, so that these characters can live dynamically. They are not just your neighbors; they could become your lifelong partners, sharing laughter, tears, and growth. You can engage in various charming interactions with these characters. Give them gifts, go on dates, and when you reach the maximum affection level, you can even invite them to move in with you. Build meaningful bonds through heartfelt interactions. Whether pursuing friendship or romance , your choices shape lasting relationships that provide steadfast support throughout your journey. Enjoy life's simple rhythms with your feet on the ground. Farming on your own land, building the island, go fishing at the sea... Every imagination you might have about an island life could be found here. But this island guards secrets beneath its quilted hills. Explore mysterious ruins where thrilling battles await, discover rare treasures, and decipher ancient legends beneath the serene surface. Ultimately, YOU hold the quill that writes the island's future – we're not only offering gameplay you might as well experience in other farming sim games. We are offering a unprecedented creative freedom in building the island . Remember that every choice of yours matters. Gameplay This is YOUR island. We want our players to truly be a part of the island development, and we are offering a unprecedented creative freedom in building the island . Participating in its development, you can transform it into a resort haven or a technological hub based on your own vision. Alternatively, you can choose to preserve its rustic charm as a tranquil sanctuary. You may learn farming from the island's seasoned veterans, cultivating your land piece by piece, go hunting or fishing with your local friends, hanging around in the open world that this beautiful island offers, simply relishing the pleasures of island living. The decisions are entirely yours. Experience extensive customization options, including various home themes and outfits. Freely dye your clothing to create a personal style that reflects your preferences. Construct your ideal home brick by brick, tailoring every detail to your liking. Feel free to dive into diverse professions this island offers, each with a dedicated mentor to guide you along the journey: Manufacturing : Embrace the role of an engineer, crafting machinery to automate production processes, streamlining resource collection. Planting : Learn to cultivate local tropical fruits and vegetables, savoring the simplest joy of a bountiful harvest.​ Animal Husbandry : Discover the art of raising various animals, including kittens, puppies and capybaras, there's a also lot of rare species you become companions with.​ Fishing : Follow the fishing experts to explore diverse waters, aiming to catalog the hundreds of fish species and perhaps build your own little aquarium.​ Adventure : For those seeking adventure, delve into ancient ruins to confront formidable foes and unearth valuable treasures.​ Don't set limits along the journey of professions, you can choose different professions at the same time, or simply specialize at one of them. Get around the island your way: cruise on skateboards , rev up motorcycles , or even pilot speedboats and aeroplanes – every ride makes exploring more fun. A different way to move means a different perspective to enjoy the view~ Meet furry (and also magical!) companions: adopt classic pets like cats and dogs, or befriend exotic locals – from cuddly pandas to nine-colored deer (mythical forest guardians, legendary creatures from Asian folklore). In Starsand Island's world, you can feed, groom, and even train them to help with daily tasks, truly live a life with them. Take a break from farming with laid-back mini-games: challenge locals to classic poker games, play traditional Chinese mahjong, or beat retro arcade cabinets at the game center. Rewards Why Kickstarter With our initial budget, we have already made a cozy little island, but our vision doesn't stop there. We want to expand this world, offering a richer experience with more areas to explore, smoother gameplay, and features that keep you engaged. Also, we want to do something different. Who says amusement parks have to be on land? If "Raft" can let you build a home on the sea, and Starsand Island is surrounded by ocean, why can't we move the fun to the waves and let players experience the thrill of constructing their own floating theme park? No other simulation game has done this before—we think it's a fantastic idea, and that's one of our big ideas ! But our current budget only covers the core project, so we're asking for your help to bring this vision to life. We've seen firsthand how Kickstarter has helped other games grow into something bigger than their creators imagined, and we believe Starsand Island can be one of those success stories, with your help. Join us on this journey, and together, let's create a game that offers a peaceful escape and a sense of belonging. Thank you for every bit of support! We look forward to witnessing the final form of this island together with you! Schedule We're currently planning to release the full version of Starsand Island on PC (Steam) in Q4 2025. While we're actively working on adapting the game for consoles, we're also planning a global alpha test that includes a polished English version to ensure we deliver the best possible experience at launch. We'll keep our community closely updated as development progresses. Community We're still in early development — so join our community and help shape the future! We'll periodically open player voting events where community members can vote on certain future game content. Additionally, we'll hold monthly Q&A event with developers in specific channels to address feedback and ensure Starsand Island evolves in line with our players' vision. If you want more details of the up-mentioned events, just join the community right now! Your feedback and support are essential to us! Let's build Starsand Island an ideal heaven! 以下は 日本語での紹介 となります。 星砂島について 星砂島へようこそ！ここは一年中穏やかな気候が広がる亜熱帯の楽園です。地元の人々は、自然と海との調和を重んじる古代の伝統を守り、この島は「海にある明るいスター」という詩的な名前が付けられました。 島は星型をしており、北側は高く、南側は低く、四季折々の美しい自然の変化を楽しむことができます。​ 地元の美しい伝説によれば、砂浜でアクアのような青い星砂を見つけ、それに願いを込めると、あなたの夢が叶うと言われています。 夕日が沈み、海風が穏やかに吹く中、砂浜を歩きながら特別な星砂を探すことが、島の住民や訪れる人々にとって、最もロマンチックな日課となっています。 私たちのビジョン 私たちチームが集結したきっかけは、『Stardew Valley』や『My Time at Sandrock』のような農園シミュレーションゲームへの深い愛着でした。しかしプレイヤーとして常々抱いていたのは、 「理想の島暮らし」を体現する作品への憧れ 。その想いが『Starsand Island』開発の原動力となりました。シンデレラのカボチャ馬車や、童話に登場する月明かりのハープ——そんなファンタジー要素を織り交ぜながら、子どもの頃に思い描いた無垢な生活をデジタルの世界で再現しています。 この島では、のんびりと畑を耕す農夫として、愛らしい動物たちと共生する生活を送れます。浜辺をバイクで疾走する海岸線の冒険者になったり、密林の奥に眠る古代遺跡を探検する探検家になることも可能です。あるいはただ波の音に耳を傾けながら釣り糸を垂らし、海に沈む黄金色の夕日を眺める「今を生きる漁師」としての穏やかな時間も。 どの道を選んでも、あなただけのユニークでロマンチックな物語が紡がれていくのです 。 『Starsand Island』は単なるゲームではなく、私たちの人生観そのものの投影です。プレイヤーの皆様には、この世界でご自身の生きるリズムを見つけ、それぞれの旅路に宿る温もりや閃きを感じていただければ。ゲームの中でも、現実の日常生活でも、心躍る瞬間を見つけるきっかけとなりますように——それが開発者一同の心からの願いです。 ゲーム紹介 都会の生活に疲れ果てていませんか？星砂島は、あなたを待っている心地よい避暑地です。 ここでは、あなたはコンクリートジャングルでの長年の生活を経て、島のルーツと再び繋がるために帰郷したプレイヤーとして 、島の住民や島そのもの と忘れられない時間を過ごします。 本作では、アニメ風の 3Dスタイルを取り入れ、ファーミング系ライフシミュレーションとして、かつてない没入感と表現力の高さを目指しています。 プレイヤーの皆さまに心から楽しんでいただけるよう、世界の細部にまでこだわって丁寧に作り込んでいます。 星砂島では、個性豊かな島の住民たちと出会うことができます。彼らはそれぞれ独特な性格を持ち、 ユニークな行動パターンや豊かな個人ストーリー を持っています。これにより、キャラクターたちは生き生きと動き、単なる隣人にとどまらず、あなたの人生のパートナーとなり、共に笑い、泣き、成長していけるのです。 住民たちとは、さまざまな心温まる交流を楽しむことができます。プレゼントを渡したり、一緒にデートをしたり―― 好感度が最大まで高まると、一緒に暮らすこともできるようになります。 何気ない会話やふとした気遣いを重ねながら、少しずつ絆を育んでいく時間はきっと特別なものになるはず。友情を育むもよし、ロマンスを進展させるもよし。 あなたの選択が深い関係を築き、冒険を通じて強力なサポートを提供してくれます。 大地に足を踏みしめ、シンプルな生活を楽しんでください。自分の土地で農業をしたり、島を作り上げたり、海で釣りをしたり…… 島暮らし について想像できることはすべてここにあります。 しかし、この島には秘密が隠されています。苔むした廃墟を探索し、古代石像の守護者たちが、あなたの知恵を試す場面が待ち受けています。神秘的な遺跡を 探索 し、スリリングな戦闘を繰り広げ、貴重な宝物を発見し、穏やかな表面の下に眠る古代の伝説を解き明かしていきましょう。 最終的に、この島の未来を作り出すペンを握るのは あなた自身 です――ほかのシミュレーションゲームでは 味わえない自由度を提供し、島を思いのままに作り上げることができます 。覚えておいてください、あなたの選択がすべてを決めるのです。 ゲームプレイ ここはあなたが暮らしている島です。 島のすみずみにまで、あなたの手で少しずつ形を加えていけます。こ れまでにない自由度を提供 し、あなたのアイデアで島をリゾート地やテクノロジーセンターに変えることもできます。 もちろん、島の自然な魅力をそのまま生かし、静かな避難場所として過ごすこともできます。経験豊富な地元の農民から農業を学び、ひとつひとつの土地を耕し、仲間たちと一緒に狩りや釣りを楽しむ。美しい島を自由に探索し、島での生活を満喫することができるのです。すべての選択は、あなたの手の中にあります。 さまざまなホームテーマや衣装を含む、豊富なカスタマイズオプションを体験しましょう。自分好みに服を染めて、個性あふれるスタイルを作り上げることができます。理想の家を一から作り上げ、細部にわたって自分だけの空間を完成させましょう。 島にある多様な職業に挑戦しましょう。それぞれの職業には専任のメンターがついて、あなたをしっかりサポートしてくれます。 栽培 ：地元の熱帯果物や野菜を育てる方法を学び、豊かな収穫の喜びを感じましょう。 畜産 ：子猫や子犬、カピバラをはじめ、さまざまな動物の育て方を学び、珍しい種とともに暮らすことができます。 漁業 ：釣りの専門家に導かれながら、さまざまな水域を探索し、何百種類もの魚を釣り上げることを目指し、そして自分だけの小さな水族館を作ることもできます。 冒険 ：冒険を求めるあなたには、古代の遺跡を探索し、強力な敵と戦い、貴重な宝物を掘り出すことが待っています。​ クラフト ：職人として、製造プロセスを自動化し、資源の収集を効率化するための機械を作りましょう。 職業には制限がありません。複数の職業を同時に選ぶことも、一つの職業に特化することも自由です。 自分の好きな方法で島を巡りましょう。スケートボードに乗ってクルージングしたり、バイクを走らせたり、スピードボートや飛行機を操縦したり――どの乗り物でも、島の探索がもっと楽しくなります。移動の方法を変えることで、風景を新しい視点で楽しむことができます。 ふわふわの（そしてマジカルな）仲間たちに出会いましょう！猫や犬などの定番ペットを飼うこともできますし、珍しい地元の動物たちとも友達になれます。例えば、抱きしめたくなるパンダや、アジアの伝説に登場する九色の鹿（神秘の森の守護者）など、個性豊かな仲間たちがあなたを待っています。 『Starsand Island』の世界では、ペットにエサをあげたり、毛を手入れしたり、さらには毎日の仕事を手伝ってもらえるように訓練することもできます。 農作業の合間にリラックスできるミニゲームを楽しみましょう。地元の住民とクラシックなポーカーを挑戦したり、伝統的な麻雀をプレイしたり、ゲームセンターでレトロなアーケードゲームに挑戦したりできます。 リワーズ KICKSTARTERの理由 初期予算で小さな島の基盤を形にしてきましたが、私たちのビジョンはそこで止まりませんでした。 探索エリアの拡張 、 ゲームプレイの滑らかさ 、 没入感を高める新機能 ——どれもプレイヤーにより豊かな体験を届けるための挑戦です。 既存のゲームにはない革新を追求しています。誰が決めた？「遊園地は陸地限定」なんてルール。『Raft』が海上生活の可能性を開いたなら、『Starsand Island』が海上遊園地を作れない理由があるでしょうか？波間で輝く観覧車、潮風に揺れるメリーゴーランド——こんな前人未到のシミュレーション体験を、私たちは「 オーシャンパーク 構想」と名付けました。 現状の予算は基本システム構築に充てられ、この夢を実現するには皆様の力が必要です。Kickstarterで見てきた数々の奇跡——クリエイターとプレイヤーが共に育むゲームの可能性を、私たちもこの島で証明したいのです。 ご支援いただければ、このプロジェクトは：現実逃避の楽園から 心の居場所 を見つける冒険へと進化します。 1ドルでも、シェアでも、全てが島の未来を照らす灯台になります。完成の日、皆さまと共に潮風を感じられるその時を、私たちは今から胸を躍らせています。 スケジュール 『Starsand Island』のPCバージョン（Steam）は、2025年冬にリリース予定です。 現在、コンシューマへの移植作業も進めていますが、最高の体験を提供できるよう、早期アクセスの導入も検討しています。 コミュニティ

title: Categories
description: Introducing the GC Ultimate My name is Mitch, and I have been working at Hand Held Legend for the last 3 years. Since I joined the HHL team, I have developed the ProGCC line of competitive controller conversion kits. These kits are used by top players world wide and renowned for their analog stick accuracy as well as compatibility with GameCube. This Emerald Blue color is the base option. If we reach stretch goals to unlock more color options , we will send out backer surveys after the campaign ends to allow each backer to select a color. Emerald Blue Painted Prototype Shell Development History Original prototype setup from April, 2022 GC Ultimate runs on a controller firmware we call Hoja. This firmware is designed to work on the Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040), and I've designed it to be versatile and give competitive and casual players a high degree of customization and usability across many playstyles. We've recently expanded this functionality to include Bluetooth support by integrating an ESP32 microcontroller. June 7th, 2022, we had a very hacked together functional prototype It's been our goal to produce an entirely original controller which combines everything we've learned. We are nearing the finish line and it's time to open this project to everyone. Production Ready Everything you see here is production ready. We've tested the board, firmware, 3d shell, injection molded buttons, etc... We only need the appropriate funds to move forward with production. One of the v3 prototype units. We produced 110 of these to better understand the production pipeline. This design process has spanned a little over two years. We developed a competitive option for Smash players which is known as the ProGCC, a drop-in conversion kit for the Pro Controller. This kit reduces input latency and offers an edge in tournaments to players who need more out of their gear. We've taken everything we've learned and implemented it into a GameCube style form-factor. This controller is absolutely jam-packed with features and we can't wait to get it into your hands. Note that these are all features which are working now, not features that are promised for further down the line. Everything you see exists and is functional now. Why GC Ultimate Stands Out Input Accuracy The latest Gulikit TMR technology is included to provide you with high-precision joysticks that never drift because of a pesky bit of dust. Snapback filtering is built in to our software, ensuring you never have a misinput. Gulikit TMR Joysticks Inside Our non-proprietary and totally open-source Split-D-pad design is yours to enjoy. We include this with every kit. Never fight your D-pad again. Platformers feel incredible with this design. Split D-pad Our hardware features dual IMU. This reduces noise for increased accuracy with motion controls. Dual IMU design Hardware Customization Mechanical Trigger Kit Our swappable gateplate allows you to create your perfect controller. Octagon and round shapes are included with each kit. Gateplate installed Gateplate Removed Modern Connectivity USB-C Port ESP32 Inside Simple-Yet-Powerful Configuration App Configuration App - Android, Windows, Mac, Linux Our Configuration app is programmed using WebUSB. This app works offline on Windows, Mac, Linux, and Android devices. Calibrate your sticks, remap buttons, and more. Made For Retro-Enthusiasts Compatible with N64, GameCube, SNES, and NES with appropriate passthrough cables. N64 Cable and GameCube Cable Beautiful Nylon Design Aluminum-shrouded USB-C end Comprehensive Features 1:1 footprint with the original GameCube controller Open source firmware and 3D models (Available on GitHub) Compatible with OEM triggers and buttons Hall effect joysticks (Gulikit TMR with stick-click buttons) HD Rumble (The best in its class for aftermarket controllers) Bluetooth support (Switch/PC/Android) Configuration app (Android/PC/Mac/Linux) RGB stick underlighting Split D-pad design Dual motion control sensors for improved gyro accuracy (Switch/Steam supported) Dual Z buttons Built-in support for mechanical triggers OR analog triggers (for all of you Melee and Sunshine enthusiasts) Swappable gate-plate (Octagon and Circular included) USB-C connectivity and recharging Support for NES, SNES, N64, and GameCube XInput support for PC/Android (1000hz input rate) Native Slippi support (1000hz input rate) Ergonomic trigger shape Injection Molded buttons 100gf tactile Z buttons Included With Each Kit Injection Molded Shell (Emerald Blue is the default) Peripheral buttons (Light Gray Color) Trigger bracket Screw and spring hardware kit Ergonomic triggers and dual Z buttons (Light Gray Color) Analog stick caps (Light Gray Rubber Color) One Main Stick One C-Stick Button set (Bald ABXY) Split D-pad set Li-Po battery Main PCB C-Stick PCB T6 screwdriver T8 screwdriver Stretch Goals $212,000 - Base Goal - This is the minimum required to fulfill the base kits to every backer. This will also allow us to complete required FCC certification for wireless functionality. $250,000 - Flame Red Colorway Flame Red painted prototype shell $300,000 - Spice Orange Colorway Spice orange painted prototype shell $350,000 - Indigo Colorway Indigo painted prototype shell $400,000 - Platinum Colorway Platinum painted prototype shell $450,000 - Symphonic Green (Color Swatch used for example)

title: Categories
description:
Win an iPad Mini Halfling Wars is fully funded with 3 days left ! Thanks for all the support! We couldn't have done it without you! There's still time to meet our stretch goals. If we get $3,000 more in pledges and make it to $10K , then we unlock Android Compatibility. I know there are a lot of Android users out there. Let's make it happen. Plus at $10K we'll add more creatures to battle with. Already pledged, but want a certain item that's not part of your 
reward tier? Add the following extra rewards on to your pledge using the Manage Pledge Button at the top of the Halfling Wars Kickstarter site. Note:
 All Add-Ons require a base pledge of $6 or more first in order to 
activate the Manage Pledge Button and get your Add-Ons. Shipping and 
handling fees are included in the total price of Physical Add-Ons. Everyone who adds an Add-On gets a FREE Halfling Wars STICKER for your iPad, iPhone, Android phone, or iPod. Digital Add-Ons (Require Base Pledge of $6) Digital "The Making of Halfling Wars" Art Book +$5 Downloadable "The Making of Halfling Wars" Video +$5 1 Downloadable Light Power Shrine to Add Buffs to Your Creature +$12 1 Downloadable Dark Power Shrine to Add Buffs to Your Creature +$12 Physical Add-Ons (Require Base Pledge of $6) Halfling Wars Playing Cards +$40 (includes shipping fees) Halfling Wars iPhone Case +$30 (includes shipping fees) Halfling Wars T-Shirt (Choose from 3 Designs) +25 (includes shipping) Halfling Wars Hoodie +$50 (includes shipping) For T-Shirt and Hoodie add-ons, we will ask for the size that you 
want at the end of the Kickstarter campaign in a survey that will be 
sent to you in email. If there's another item you want specifically, please message us here. Here's a game flow diagram to help you understand how Halfling Wars 
works. It's all about battling your creatures online. This 
visual explains how every other part of the game, including growing crops/herbs and designing your city, is built around preparing your creatures for battle. The outcome of the battle is largely dependent on how well you prepare. Any questions? MERCHANDISE ADD-ONS ARE AVAILABLE! WATCH THE 1st GAMEPLAY TRAILER BELOW! NEW LIMITED REWARDS JUST ADDED! UPDATE #1 - A HEARTFELT EARLY THANKS UPDATE #2 - TIMELAPSE DRAWING OF GAME UPDATE #3 - ASK THE GAME DEVELOPERS UPDATE #4 - NEW LIMITED REWARDS JUST ADDED! UPDATE #5 - PRESS AND RADIO SHOW MENTIONS UPDATE #6 - NEW HALFLING WARS BACKER ICON UPDATE #7 - WHAT YOU CAN BUILD IN HALFLING WARS: DARKLING BUILDINGS UPDATE #8 - BETA TESTERS, FORUMS, AND MEET THE DEVELOPERS UPDATE #9 - 1ST HALFLING WARS GAMEPLAY TRAILER OUT NOW! UPDATE #10 - GAMEPLAY TRAILER LINK HERE UPDATE #11 - WE NEED YOUR FEEDBACK UPDATE #12 - NEW SUPPORTER INCENTIVE REWARD UPDATE #13 - ADD-ONS ARE NOW AVAILABLE! UPDATE #14 - 101 BACKERS AND EARLY CROW FULFILLED UPDATE #15 - REFER A FRIEND FOR A CHANCE TO WIN AN IPAD MINI UPDATE #16 - REFERRAL UPDATE UPDATE #17 - CREATURE CHART, NEW PRESS, AND REWARDS UPDATE #18 - NEW HALFLING WARS SCREENSHOT OF BATTLE MENU UPDATE #19 - NEW VIDEO ABOUT BREEDING AND BATTLING UPDATE #20 - VIDEO WALKTHROUGH OF LEVELS 1-3 We’re gamers.  We always have been. We’re not trying to get rich here, our goal is to create an awesome free-to-play gaming experience that combines the best elements of town-building games with online creature battling and questing from role-playing games. And that’s exactly what we’ve created with Halfling Wars. Halfling Wars is a free-to-play fantasy RPG/Simulation game inspired by The Hobbit and similar to Dragonvale, Smurf's Village, Pokemon, Civilization, SimCity, and even A Kingdoms for Keflings. But Halfling Wars is darker, has a more engrossing story, an epic online battling system, a deeper questing system, and several styles of gameplay. This is NOT a Farmville game! And NOT a Facebook game! You can continually play Halfling Wars at the normal gameplay rate without spending a penny! We have created a really cool world that you can build and develop, but that is the smallest part of Halfling Wars. It's all about the Battles! Choose Your Alliance Play as a Halfling or Darkling or both simultaneously. Build Your Realm Build your custom village in the Halfling realm Collect gold as an innkeeper, stable master, blacksmith, tavern master. Defend your village against Orc raids and other deadly enemies. Expand your realm by conquering neighboring enemies. Grow Rare Crops and Herbs Harvest your crops like pipe-weed, mushrooms, turnips, and more. Grow and blend rare herbs to create powerful potions. Feed crops to your creatures to strengthen them. Breed & Morph Creatures Raise magical creatures from the elements. Spawn fel demons to do your bidding. Morph and mutate your creatures into denizens of war. Cross-breed to create elite, elemental creatures. Battle Your Friends & Enemies Pit your creatures against friend and foe for prizes. Gamble your gold or the life of your creature. Invite your friends online to a one-on-one battle for gold and glory. Play Mini-Games Test your potion mixing skills as an Alchemist Quench your patron's thirst at the town's tavern. Enter your prized crops in the local contests. Complete Quests & Unravel The Story of Halfling Wars Learn the history of the Halflings and Darklings. Discover the truth of the impending evil threat. Shape the Halfling's future by completing quests. Halflings have lived in The Crest for as long as anyone can remember.  
It is one of the oldest Halfling communities on Earth.  5 generations 
ago, (nearly 150 years) the eldest of a particularly prominent family in
 The Crest, Bristol Darting, was brought to a community trial on the 
accusations of the use of dark magic.  Whether or not he was guilty, no 
one ever found out as during the course of the trial he was hit on the 
head with a large turnip, and instantly died.  (No one ever found out 
who threw the deadly turnip, but it was widely believed it sprang from 
–and did indeed come from the general direction of- Balbus Widebottom, 
who had recently come in second place in the annual pumpkin growing 
contest to Mr. Darting). Most of the townspeople believed Mr. Darting 
was guilty and that the fortuitous turnip only confirmed such, however 
there were some, including his family and close friends, that fought 
adamantly in his defense to the point of causing much contention and 
even an uprising.  The contentions grew so bad in fact that all the 
“Dartings”, (or “Darklings” as they began to be called), were rumored 
to be involved in dark magic, and were eventually forced out of their 
village, shunned by other villages, and were forced to find refuge 
across the chasm, in the most unfarmable, murkiest land in the nethermost
 parts of the Crest.  They are still living there today, still mostly 
shunned by civilized Crest society, living only amongst themselves, and 
still believing they were cheated out of their lands and reputation. Our main goal was to create something fun and unique - a perfect blend of both light and dark for each player's experience. On one side the player is a gentle, jolly, good-natured Halfling who prefers nothing more than growing anything green, smoking pipe weed, or drinking a nice ale. On the other side the user plays as a Darkling, a bitter mischievous creature who prefers the twilight hours to go about his business. Instead of giving the player the option of which creature to play, we allow them to do both at the same time… after all there is a little Halfling and Darkling in all of us. You’ll come across a variety of characters during your gameplay.  Wizards, Guardians, strange elves and even Balbus Widebottom. Halfling Wars is filled with perils of unsavory nature. Goblins, Trolls, Orc’s oh my… Your characters also grow and train powerful beasts to fight off the enemy, or to take into battle against friends or foe. Halfling Wars has an exceptional team of artists led by Darrin Perry whose talent and vision is beyond comparison. His artwork draws inspiration from other masters of the Fantasy genre like Lord of the Rings, The Hobbit, Dungeons and Dragons, and more. Our goal was to make the artwork compliment the main story of Halfling Wars while telling its own story at the same time. We are very fortunate to have Darrin Perry on our team. The quality of his artwork speaks for itself when you see it. Check out Darrin's Website and Deviant Art page to see more of his brilliant artwork and comic book illustrations unrelated to Halfling Wars. Also we will update this Kickstarter page with more HW artwork as the game progresses. We need help to raise some extra money to improve our users' experience. We would like to add additional levels, more mini games, upgraded sound production, a customized soundtrack, and more play testing. All the little things that add richness to a game and that we know will make players smile (the devil is in the details). We will also use the money to help promote and market Halfling Wars to better get the word out. We already have lots of cool ideas for our V.2., but none of it will exist until V.1. is successful. Your input is very important to our team while we strive to make an awesome gaming experience. We are a small Utah based company who’s sole purpose was to 
accomplish one thing; create a cool game. I guess to sum it up we are a 
bunch of gaming geeks who have spent way too many hours glued to 
everything from the old school apple II or Nintendo 64, to the xbox or 
iPad. When we aren’t actually playing games more likely than not we are 
probably talking about building one. Well the day has finally come to 
make our debut into gaming existence. Rowd Robbins is the Game Co-Designer / Project Manager, and wears just about every other hat to keep the wheel turning. Conor Robbins is the Game Co-Designer / Business Director . All that boring paperwork and stuff. Nate Langston is head nerd. He is Lead Programmer and has eons of IT and programming experience. Darrin Perry is our Lead Artist . He is brilliantly creative and innovative. We are continually amazed by his creative direction. Rohit Shirke is our Concept and Coloring Artist . He has added some stunning visual appeal to our art. Spirit 5 Studios – We have partnered with these guys to tap into their experience with 
Unity 3D and to help accelerate the games overall production. Halfling Wars Official Website Here at ChondroStrike we are extremely honored to develop a game like Halfling Wars that we are sure everyone will enjoy. We really appreciate all the support we can get and for those who spread the word about this Kickstarter campaign. Please make sure to check out the official Halfling Wars website along with our Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube pages listed above for continual updates about the game's progress. For those who do contribute, we promise to ship rewards promptly and we are sure the rewards will meet your satisfaction. Stay tuned for more updates as we get closer to launching Halfling Wars in the Apple store.

title: Categories
description: 💌Meet the Oracle Your heart whispers how to move from love and joy . . . it just gets drowned out along life’s journey. Inspired by the healing power of the Sacred Witness, the Healer within us all , this Oracle offers you three mystical tools for reconnecting with the whispers of your Soul: 🔮 56 hand-painted, soulful oracle cards 📖 An in-depth guidebook with wisdom teachings and daily practices 🌀 A companion book rooted in trauma-informed spiritual awakening Each piece of the Oracle guides you to build an inner Bridge of Connection™ welcoming home: Parts of you that have been lost Dreams that have been overlooked Medicines of the Soul that are seeking you Unbridling your body, mind, heart, and soul —fully moving from love once more! Reach for this Oracle when you are looking to connect with: understanding thoughts and emotions; revealing hidden motivations; and illuminating quick and accurate insights. The wisdom and answers you are seeking are already within you. However, life sometimes tends to cut us off from it. The Oracle calls forward witnessing, understanding, and engaging in a deep healing presence that: Awakens your inner guidance Embraces your innate wholeness Liberates your inner wisdom The Oracle invites you into engaging with support that is always present. Providing direct insights with a card draw. Inviting self-reflection and compassionate inquiry. Guiding deep understanding into why you are feeling blocked or overwhelmed. The Oracle liberates your ability to move into your day aligned with your Soul’s wisdom. ✨  What’s Included The power of an oracle lies within its ability to engage you into deep soulful questions that awaken the wisdom that is already held within you . Features: Heavy-Duty Laminated Art Paper Premium Matte, Scratch-Resistant Smooth Laminate Finish Rounded Corners Large 3.5” x 5” Card Size Five Card Sections Representing Five Core Aspects of You Together, the different Elements of the cards weave a multilayered message of healing invitations and soulful inquiries that the Sacred Witness is calling forward for you to engage. Final product may differ slighty from the prototype in the image. Deluxe Display Box Oversized 6.5 x 9.5 Display Box Upgraded Magnetic Closure Upgraded sturdy foam cradle to nestle the cards & hold the guidebook Attached ribbon for easy lifting the cards and guidebook Smooth satin laminated finish for long lasting use Features: Oversize 6" x 9" Trim Size Premium Spiral Wire-O Lay-Flat Binding In-depth card descriptions that include: Soul-Led invitations, guided practices, and references to go deeper in the companion book, Trauma Informed Enlightenment. The roots of the Oracle to go deeper lie within the companion book, Trauma Informed Enlightenment. The new book helps you step-by-step through how to awaken to your own inner knowing with questions like: What does it feel and look like to be whole and embodied ? How do I create the lasting change I’ve been searching for? How do I release old wounds and give birth to a life that feels connected and truly mine? Chapter by chapter, you will uncover the answer to these questions for yourself, building a Bridge of Connection™ back to your True Self! 🎉Why Back Now? Backing this project creates lasting change for yourself and others ! The wisdom held within this Oracle is shared everyday through the non-profit organization Unbridled Change , founded in 2008 by the Oracle's creator—Michelle Holling-Brooks . For the past seventeen years, Michelle has supported thousands of clients to embrace fully living, loving, and leading their authentic lives. Like Michelle's first Best-Selling book, The Horse Cure , 100% of her different book project proceed s go directly to Unbridled Change’s scholarship and horse funds . *To learn more about Unbridled Change and Michelle's work visit www.UnbridledChange.org . ✨Special Bonus Opportunity for ALL Backers - UNLOCKED!✨ In addition to early bird pricing on the Oracle suite by pre-ordering through this campaign, one of the greatest values and exclusive offers we can give to the amazing Kickstarter backers is to jumpstart your journey with the wisdom teachings of the Oracle through the gift of community, connection, and witnessing! Because you helped us reach our main funding goal in the first hour you have unlocked our first Kickstarter exclusive bonus reward: a bundle of four LIVE Zoom workshop calls with Michelle designed to help awaken the energy of the Sacred Witness Oracle directly with you— available only to Kickstarter backers and held after the campaign ends! Adding a value of $300 to your pledge * Potential 90-minute Group Workshops / Coaching Calls are (backers get to vote on the final four) : Guided Practices and Journey Workshop Create your own Oracle Card Workshop with special guest co-facilitator Kim Ganley Meet the Creators—open Q&A session to ask your burning questions to both Michelle & Kim Card Reading Workshop, where you can request a card draw and mini-reading from Michelle Michelle's 90-minute Group Workshops typically cost $75 to join, this is a value of $300 added to every single Kickstarter pledge as a thank you for helping us bring this Oracle to life! 🎁Pledge Tiers Scroll through the different Reward options to find the one that speaks to you, pledge your support, and help us bring this Oracle fully into form! Remember, in addition to the products listed in each reward set below, they also now include the added bonues like the four live Zoom workshop calls, giving even more value to them 🥰. Please note shipping costs are not included in your Pledge and will be calculated and charged to pledges AFTER the campaign ends via our Pledge Manager through Kickstarter. See our FAQ for estimated additional shipping questions. NEW TO KICKSTARTER? We got you covered, see below for how to make your pledges so that you can claim your rewards. Lite Set: $38 — Includes the 56-Card Deck (banded), eBook version of The Sacred Witness Oracle Guidebook, and companion book, Trauma Informed Enlightenment . Basic Set - $64 —Everything in the Lite Set plus a physical copy of the The Sacred Witness Oracle Guidebook. Standard Set: $88 —All three tools of The Sacred Witness Oracle plus the ebook versions. Display Box Set: $111 —Upgrade your standard set with our beautiful premium Display Box Set. This reward includes everything in the Standard set PLUS a premium display box for the cards and guidebook. The box features an upgraded magnetic closure, sturdy foam cradle (instead of the standard cardstock shelf), and ribbon to help lift the book and cards from their cradle. Patron Suite: $222 —Everything in the Deluxe Box Set signed by Michelle AND a signed copy of Michelle’s first best-selling book, The Horse Cure, to help bring the wisdom of horse medicine into your own inner work. ⭐Add-ons: Looking for multiples of a product? Once you make your main pledge you can add on additional single-wrapped card decks and books at a reduced price within the add-on section. We also have larger bundled numbers of box sets to add on too. If you are a retailer looking to bring the Sacred Witness Oracle Suite to your retail space, reach out for our links to our special early bird pre-order retailer bundles. Thanks to your support we have unlocked: Let’s keep the momentum going and reach for our next funding milestone and unlock every more goodies and value for your pledge! Additional Stretch Goals in the works are: Kickstart a product that creates lasting change—starting with you. Hello! Michelle here, and I’m honored to share this amazing new healing and spiritual awakening tool kit with you that I have developed and cultivated with thousands of clients over the past twenty years, gathering healing and spiritual wisdom from different traditions, modern day methods, and my own initiations from awakening to the healing power of the Sacred Witness. I am no stranger to healing and the spiritual journey. At 23, I was lost—trapped in a cycle of trapped trauma, illness, and self-doubt. I believed true healing was impossible, that love and attuned connections were for others but not for me. I was in pain, hopelessness, and standing at a crossroads, unsure if I even wanted to continue. But something shifted. After a near death experience, I had a moment of awakening, a realization, and heard the whisper from a Sacred Witness that there was something more. That witness came in the form of my beautiful soul companion, Baron, a German Shepherd that saved my life that day in more ways than one. My heart was awakened and I felt a deep yearning to discover if wholeness and embodiment was real, if life could feel different. These heartfelt questions turned into a journey, and that journey turned into a gathering of wisdom that spanned over two decades of both personal exploration and professionally guiding thousands of clients through their own journeys and transformations since I founded Unbridled Change in 2008. When I published my first book, I made the decision to have 100% of my book proceeds go directly toward Unbridled Change's scholarship and horse funds to help clients have access to quality help and support on their journey. These funds allow Unbridled Change to provide sliding fee scales to clients and students without being dependent on the everchanging waters of grant funding. The funds raised through my publishing projects also help provide funds so that I can provide a sanctuary and the highest quality of care for our herd of amazing equine partners. To learn more about Unbridled Change and its mission, visit www.UnbridledChange.org. Backing this project is truly a win-win, blessings to yourself and to others on their awakening journeys too. This project also has the additional support of beautiful, creative souls coming together to give it life! Kimberly Ganely’s journey as a watercolor artist began a few short years ago during her own personal healing journey. It is her belief that art is how she was able to navigate the stress and uncertainty of that journey. During that time, she blended her professional knowledge in the contemplative healing arts with watercolor painting, and discovered her passion of bringing the healing arts and artwork together to promote personal growth, wellness, and a path to a radical acceptance of life. Watercolor painting has been both a creative and emotional outlet for her to express her journey. Designer and Layout Alan Dino Hebel with The Book Designers. BookDesigners.com Under Alan’s direction, this project took shape as a true work of art, bringing image, graphic design, and artist elements to each aspect of the Oracle—the formatting of the cards, cover art, and interior book design. Each element of this oracle has the feel of welcoming and care thanks to him. Printers/Fulfillment I’m happy to say that our products are printed by amazing companions that care and honor their employees and environment ,and no products of this campaign are filled by Amazon. The printer is Friesen, a Forest Steward Council (FSC) certified and employee-owned company based in Canada. They believe in providing high-quality printing that is sustainable and plant-based, with non-toxic printing/ink. Givingstons is our fulfillment delivery company. They are based in the USA and believe in helping brands, big and SMALL, share their products and offerings with the world in sustainable ways—environmentally and financially. Campaign and Kickstarter Launch Support Human Artist and Skills, not AI This project is solely based on the creations of Human Beings channeling and sharing their own wisdom, artistry, and talents. AI was not used in this project writing or editing.  All deck images are hand painted. Formatting and interior design graphics for the books in addition to promotional graphics are crafted by a human designer with computer-based design programs, not generative AI. Every editor and artist agreed to not run any of the manuscripts or images into ANY teaching- or learning-based AI programs. ⏱️ Time Line: Campaign live: Late August - September 2025, Finalize printing: August - October 2025 Fulfillment and Shipping: late October- November 2025 - Ensuring you to the Oracle in hand for holiday gift giving! Stretch Goals: between winter and early spring 2026 😍 Early Love for the Oracle “I love that it helps with ‘Awakening Your Inner Power’ and it feels like it was made just for this moment in my journey. The artwork is so simple, yet vibrantly colorful—each card feels like a doorway into truth, softness, and strength all at once. There’s something about the clean lines and clear imagery that speaks right to the heart without overwhelming the senses. It’s peaceful and empowering, like it’s inviting me to come home to myself. “But what really moved me was the book Trauma Informed Enlightenment . It is so rare and special. It acknowledges the sacredness of our healing journeys, the parts we’ve had to reclaim piece by piece. It doesn’t bypass the pain—it meets it with compassion and awareness. That alone makes me feel seen, understood, and deeply supported.” Mary M “ Trauma Informed Enlightenment is a guide that can help me discover and connect with my own sacred witness within . . . having these beautiful tools that are not just a book or workbook but a beautiful sacred container that can hold all of me in its care—heart, mind, soul and spirit—is giving me food for each of these parts of me and is nourishing all of me . . . so that I can then enlighten the world from where I am . . . I only trust guides that have come through pain . . . so to have these three beautiful resources come through such a trusted guide as Michelle is gift upon gift.” Tracy “It was the book, Trauma Informed Enlightenment , that intrigued me—as I do a lot of shadow work and trauma work with oracle and tarot decks. And I love watercolor decks. There is something so magical about water color in general.” Ronni “The Sacred Witness card reading was everything I needed . . . More than excited for this suite!” Ashley 🤔New to Kickstarter? 📦 Shipping and Taxes Due to the current volatility of shipping costs, tariffs, and taxes, shipping and tax payments will be collected in the Pledge Manager well after the end of the campaign, close to our ship date , and will be based on actual shipping costs incurred at that time . This will allow us to present the most accurate and up-to-date prices to pass savings on to you, our amazing backers. Here's how it will work: 1. You will receive an email from Kickstarter’s Pledge Manager a few weeks after the campaign ends to confirm your pledge and add any additional items you would like. In the Pledge Manager, you will be able to: Confirm your pledge. Add any additional items you would like to get. 2. Later, you will receive an email from Kickstarter’s Pledge Manager a few weeks before fulfillment that we are locking addresses—that will be your last opportunity to update your shipping information. At that time, you will: Pay for shipping costs. Pay for taxes and duties (if due) on the spot as well to avoid delays. Please be aware that the shipping rate estimates provided in the table below are only approximations for our different pledge levels. We also are leaning toward the high side with our estimates. Our hope is that the actual costs are on the lower side or even under our estimates shipping costs and fees. Please be aware too that the prices mentioned do not include any optional items you may select, which could add weight and value, therefore resulting in an increase in shipping cost. Final charges for shipping and sales tax or VAT (where applicable) will be determined based on actual shipping and tax costs incurred . Note that, in compliance with sales tax law, we will be required to charge sales tax in Kickstarter Pledge Manager for backers living within certain US states . Also, in compliance with EU and UK laws, VAT will be charged in the pledge manager as well for EU and UK backers . We cannot provide an accurate estimate of sales tax / VAT total since charges vary by location and are based on the total price of the order plus shipping costs. These rates will be determined accurately by the pledge manager and shipping manager at Givingston . The full sales tax / VAT to be charged on each pledge will be clearly displayed in our pledge manager before final shipping confirmation and charges are made. Unfortunately, import laws, or the lack of reliable and affordable shipping partners prohibit us from shipping the Suite to certain countries. If you are curious if your country falls under those conditions please reach out and we do a quick check to let you know before your pledge. ***Please note that we can only guarantee delivery for pledges that are confirmed through our Kickstarter Pledge Manager within the specified deadlines. Unfortunately, we won't be able to deliver unconfirmed pledges or issue refunds once we lock the addresses.*** So PLEASE fill out the pledge manager requests when we notify backers they are coming to your inbox 🙂.

title: Blue Ridge Hunting
description: WELCOME An online co-op horror game where you investigate, document, and hunt cryptids in the Appalachian Mountains. Based on real sightings, phenomena, and legends from the region. Join the Appalachian Investigation Group, and utilize various tools and items to collect evidence and track down creatures. Get paid for successful hunts, and use your money to invest in new equipment. Creatures are always listening and looking; utilize proximity voice chat and your radio for communication, but be careful not to attract too much attention… FREE DEMO Click the button above to play the FREE demo on Steam! The demo supports singleplayer and online multiplayer, and allows you to hunt down the Dewayo within South Mountain State Park in western Maryland. STRETCH GOALS STORY MODE In 2005, alongside a small group of friends, Levi Chambers established the Appalachia Investigation Group. Their mission was to find concrete proof of the monsters that had haunted Levi, his friends and family, and so many others who called the mountains home. Levi’s ultimate goal? Find and kill the Mothman. Appalachia Investigation Group patch Blue Ridge Hunting contains a five-chapter-long story mode that tells the story of Levi Chambers - a disgruntled West Virginia native who has been haunted by sightings of the infamous Mothman for his entire life. You’ll set off with Levi on a journey across Appalachia to find the fabled cryptid, encountering a wide variety of people, monsters, and stories along the way. Taking inspiration from games such as Silent Hill 2 and Firewatch , Blue Ridge Hunting explores themes of generational trauma, grief, and family through the lens of Appalachian folklore. The game is a love letter to the culture of the region, celebrating the community and resilience found in and around West Virginia, whilst acknowledging the more painful parts of its history. FREEPLAY MODE Challenge yourself and your friends in Freeplay mode - featuring a wide variety of cryptids, locations, and more difficult scenarios not found in story mode. Freeplay mode expands upon the mechanics and gameplay of story mode, letting you explore levels, upgrade your equipment, and hunt down cryptids at your own pace. Extending upon the gameplay mechanics of the story mode, freeplay mode features an extensive crafting and upgrade system to let you build out your arsenal of hunting equipment. What monsters you hunt and where you go are completely up to you! Equipment upgrade workstation (development screenshot) INSPIRATION Blue Ridge Hunting is a love letter to the Appalachian Region . All of the game's levels are based directly on real-world locations, and monsters are pulled straight from the folklore of the area. South Mountain's Pogo Campsite along the A.T., in-game vs in real-life South Mountain's Black Rock Vista, in-game vs in real-life CHARACTERS & CAST Levi Chambers Voiced by Gordon Williams Levi Chambers is the bartender at Jude’s Cabin and founder of the Appalachian Investigation Group. Since he was a child, Levi has been stalked and haunted by the Mothman -- with encounters only becoming more common as he has grown older. Levi is an outdoorsman. He enjoys hunting, fishing, and living off the land. Born and raised in West Virginia, he feels a closeness with the wilderness and a deep connection with his hometown. After his family split when he was young, Levi grew close to his father, John. He often thinks of his brother and mother, whom he hasn’t had contact with in nearly a decade. Levi feels that by finally tracking down the Mothman, he might finally be able to reconcile with the grief and emptiness that is omnipresent in his life. John Chambers Uncasted John Chambers is the father of Levi and Eddy. He worked deep in the coal mines of his home state for his entire life, following in the footsteps of his father and grandfather. The time he spent underground has unfortunately had a significant impact on his health, both physical and mental. When we see him in Blue Ridge Hunting, John is succumbing to the harsh conditions of the mines he worked in. A victim of black lung, his body is slowly rotting away, simultaneously deteriorating his mental state in a vicious cycle of pain and death. Levi does his best to care for his aging father, even if sometimes it feels like the love isn’t reciprocal. John is the only part of his family still present; so even though he can be rude and demeaning, Levi tries to savor every moment the two have remaining. Eddy Chambers Uncasted Eddy Chambers is the oldest son of John, and the long-lost brother of Levi. As a consequence of the two growing up in completely different circumstances, Eddy couldn’t be more different than his brother. After their family split, he followed his mother and joined the growing Appalachian diaspora in Chicago. There, he became the first in his family to attend college and experience life outside of the mountains. You Welcome to the Appalachian Investigation Group! As the player, you will join Levi on his mission to find the Mothman and journey across the Blue Ridge Mountains. Your character is completely open-ended, and you are given the freedom to fill the shoes as a member of the team however you’d like. How will you interact with Levi, John, and Eddy? Who will you meet on your adventure? What cryptids will you come across as you support Levi’s journey? It’s up to you to find out. OUR TEAM "Hello! I’m Jade, and I’ve been a programmer for almost my entire life. In January 2023, I began working on a new project called Blue Ridge Hunting with the idea of creating a co-op horror game about hunting cryptids in Appalachia. Over the almost three years since then, I’ve put together this small team to help see the game through to completion. Blue Ridge Hunting is my ultimate passion project, and I hope the game is as captivating for you as it has been for me." Jade’s socials: BlueSky ↗ "Hey there, my name is Jackson and I serve as the producer, narrative designer, and audio engineer for Blue Ridge Hunting! I am a lifelong storyteller with a background in live theatre and game development. In simple terms, I am essentially the mechanic for BRH, making sure we come in on time, and under budget." Jackson’s socials: Twitter ↗ Previous work: Persisters ↗ "Hi I'm Lily, a generalist game developer working as character/tech artist for Blue Ridge Hunting! I've been hard at work creating stylized retro graphics and specialized shaders to make the game look like it should!" Lily’s Socials: Website ↗ Previous work: Bomb Rush Cyberfunk ↗ Sepira is a 2D, icon and concept artist on Blue Ridge Hunting. She is responsible for the game's logo, the UI icons, various textures, and level/monster concept art. title: Revolution Dice: Customizable 3D Animated Dice
description: A Revolutionary Dice Experience Elevate every roll with a Revolution Die.  Unique styling with ethereal animated 3D displays is equally at home in a sci-fi future or a realm of light and magic. Floating 3D Displays Twin persistence-of-vision displays show your rolls instantly as floating translucent light. No CGI, just real, physical light effects on your table. Still a Real Die Throwing dice is half the fun. Revolution Dice are built to be thrown, rolled, and shared just like the dice you already love. Sensing Techno-magic means your rolls always land right-side up. The Utility With Revolution Dice, one die becomes a complete set. Deep customization lets you make it perfect for you, your group, and your game. Replaces all your dice, needs no app Holds 10 different dice types and can roll up to 10 dice at a time. No phone or app needed so your head can stay in the game. Customize shells Swap the entire shell to make your die feel equally at home in a medieval dungeon or a cyberpunk city. Customize everything else Use our online tools to change graphics, fonts, and animations... or design your own. What's Included Each Revolution Die consists of your choice of a Core and a Shell: The Core and the Shell Any core works with any shell.  Mix and match to your heart's content: Stock up on extra shells so you can reconfigure your die on the fly.  (Note some options aren't available yet while I prepare to focus on Kickstarter orders): I also provide CAD data on my development blog so you can 3D print shells of your own design! Extras Also included is everything you need to get gaming: - USB charger and data cable - Online configuration tool and graphics editor Who Am I? First and foremost, I'm a guy that likes dice! They feel good in the hand, they’re beautiful, they’re fun, and they're consequential. And as an engineer, the impulse to take something already great and push it further is hard to resist. I started trying to design a die that would excite and fascinate players all the way back in 2015. My early experiments focused on mechanical ideas: clockwork mechanisms that could open, spin, extend, or transform during a roll. They were clever, some even worked, but they never quite felt right. When the idea to combine motion with light and persistence-of-vision displays finally came together in 2024, I knew I had a winner. Early Development Prototypes Since then, I’ve built hundreds of prototypes to create something that feels like magic while still fitting seamlessly into real games. The challenge was preserving everything we love about rolling dice: the throw, the weight, the shared moment at the table. Designing a nearly silent drive system small enough to fit on a quarter took weeks, but a die that rattled and whined wasn’t acceptable to me. The Plan Every photo and video you’ve seen on this page shows a real, physical die that I've already built. This campaign isn’t about proving the concept, it's about scaling production and delivering. Here’s what the next phase looks like: Final PCB-design revision and first-article validation Production PCBA run (with the same parts and assembly vendors used to date) Final material selection and vendor lock-in for plastic parts Production-scale rotor balancing, final assembly process design Final code revisions for the online configuration tools Pack and ship I’ve been an electromechanical engineer for nearly 20 years.  I’ve built and shipped complex hardware before (including on Kickstarter), and I know what it takes to turn a working prototype into a finished product at scale.  Some of the risks and how I’m managing them are outlined in Kickstarter’s Risks & Challenges section. Stretch Goals Let's share the success!   If we beat the funding goal I'll throw in some extras - these will be available to all backers once earned: $35,000 - Additional Accent Colors Dice which feature accent colors will be available with multiple color options OR ship with multiple color packs: $40,000 - Expanded Public Font/Sprite Library If we reach this milestone I will hire an artist to create TEN sci-fi/fantasy/other appropriate font or sprite packs.   This is in addition to the default fonts already available in the editor. $50,000 - Additional Launch Shell Choice This shell was the runner-up in the prelaunch dice shell poll on my website.   If we reach this lofty height then I will make it available for selection immediately!   "Atlas" is an Art-Deco themed dice, intended to evoke the roaring 20's or your favorite Utilitarian dystopia.

title: Space Man: The Search For Planet Earth
description: Still Hard At Work! SPACE-MAN: The Search For Planet Earth (Gameplay Video and Demo Coming Soon) What is SPACEMAN: The Search for Planet Earth? SPACE-MAN : THE SEARCH FOR PLANET EARTH is a Run-and-Gun, Story-Based RPG that takes place in a galaxy BEYOND far away! A story-driven game, Space-Man is a 6 part series that follows a robot named LUMN as he searches the galaxies for Planet Earth. This particular game; codenamed " The Pilot" ; will serve as a Demo and display MECHANICS and STORY . "PLAY THE DEMO FREE!" "CLICK THE BANNER BELOW TO DOWNLOAD!" "CLICK THE BANNER ABOVE TO DOWNLOAD THE DEMO AND PLAY FREE!" The DEMO briefly runs through the Level Designs, the look and feel of some of the level enemies, the atmosphere of the environment, how the music and FX sound, and much more! Story Synopsis (Avatar Art Coming Soon) You are LUMN Bot (known in-game as simply LUMN ) and are assigned to overlook the colony on the Burdette Asteroid MARO-00 . While monitoring space, you pick up a distress signal from an incoming shuttle quickly approaching the colony. After arriving at the colony you find that the distress signal came from a crew of people on a mission to find Planet Earth. It is your job to assist the people with their wants and needs while at the colony. Before leaving the colony to return to your Hub, one of the crew members hacks into your system, shutting you down long enough to abscond the area, taking you with them. Inspired By Getting inspiration from games such as Zombies Ate My Neighbors , MegaMan X , Super Metroid , Legend of Zelda , Dead Rising , The Thing , DeadSpace, and Left 4 Dead ; Space-Man: The Search For Planet Earth is a game DESTINED to make a name for itself! There is also a video game called SAR: Search and Rescue that I would say I drew inspiration from but I honestly have never heard of it until a few days ago. Ironically, the game has a lot of similarities to my game in ways so I'm mentioning it. About the Main Character (Artwork Coming Soon) LUMN is the Main Antagonist of Space-Man The Search for Planet Earth! A cybernetic robot created by technology conglomerate, LUMN Corp . the LUMN Bot is created to assist those living or traveling to the colony where the bot is assigned. While not in use the LUMN Bot sits just outside of the colony it is assigned, stored inside of a small building called a LUMN Hub . The LUMN Hub monitors all activity around the colony and instructs the LUMN Bot on what to do. Levels, Stages and Maps Worlds, Levels, Maps, and Stages The journey of Space-Man: The Search for Planet Earth will take us through different biomes called Colonies. These colonies are built on or inside of asteroids spread throughout the galaxies and hold many secrets to uncover! Worlds Within the DEMO: Kulima, The Mining Colony Uchawi, The Enchanted Colony I.S.S. Base Colony Each Colony has a Written Novel that explains everything about that particular colony. (The release date of the novels will be based on how this game turns out) As well, the Official Game's story will take the Player through the colonies, going over the ins and outs of any " Lore " through detailed gameplay. NPCs Space-Man: The Search for Planet Earth will introduce you to Interactable NPCs that occupy the many types of colonies spread throughout the galaxies. The different Colored Icons below represent where a certain NPC is from. (Above is a concept of an NPC you'll meet in the DEMO game) (Below is a screenshot of a giant Mdudu Bui attacking one of the colonies) Enemies and Bosses Every Colony has its threats to be on the lookout for. Below is a list of some enemies you can expect to cross paths with. (Character Artwork Coming Soon) Kuruka Bui: Winged creatures that hunt in packs around areas where fluid is present. They are found only in Jengu, the liquid colony. Mdudu Bui: Bug-like creatures that resemble cockroaches in more ways than looks. These creatures are native to Kiumbe, The Monster Colony but appear in many places. Uyoga Bui: Spider-like creatures that use mushroom tops to hide and ambush prey. These creatures hide in wait on Uchawi, The Mystical Colony. Mtu Bui: Mtu is the weaker of creatures but the most deadly. Like the Uyoga, Mtu is native to Uchawi, The Mystical Colony. Kivuli Bui: Dark creatures that resemble spiders and attack by dropping from high elevations onto their prey. These creatures can be spotted dangling around Hewa, The FreeFall Colony. Ganda Bui: Shelled creatures that are impenetrable inside of their shell and give off an odor that attracts larger predators when killed. These creatures live solely on Potea, the Lost Colony. Chura Bui: Frog-like creatures that use their tongues to capture prey. These creatures reside in Jengu, the Railway Colony. (MORE TO COME!) Notes: Each enemy represents a New Chapter and a New World within Space-Man The Search For Planet Earth! Weapon Attachments Drones come in all shapes and sizes and serve different purposes such as: RECON DRONE (Shows the Positioning of Enemies ) PA DRONE ((Personal Assistant ) Drones Find and Fetch Items. MASH DRONE (Gives Health to the Player) ARTILLERY DRONE ( Gives the Player Ammo ) BODYGUARD DRONE ( Shields the Player from incoming threats) Much More ! Item Chest Item CHEST can be found throughout the game and contains different Items such as Weapons, Ammo, Health, Upgrades, POWs, and More! Weapons and Upgrades (Artwork Coming Soon!) LUMN is equipped with numerous weapons to use at his disposal. His main sidearm is a hand cannon called the ISS Security Arm . The Base Class of this weapon shoots red energy blasts at machine gun speeds. There are numerous Attachments to add to the ISS Security Arm such as an Energy Sword , Exploding Ammo, Freezing Ammo, Vaporizing Ammo, Electrifying Ammo, Burning Ammo, and Much More! LUMN's SUIT can take on attachments as well! Each attachment to the suit gives him a different ability such as Flight , Swimming , Climbing , Teleporting, and More ! Game Modes STORY MODE , ARCADE MODE , VERSUS MODE , & ONLINE MULTIPLAYER ! Story Mode brings the Player into what happened, what's happening, and what's about to happen. (This mode is for those interested in Lore and who like to know what's going on.) Arcade Mode throws the Player into the battle with limited to no story. Each level has a main mission and nothing more. (This mode is for those who just want to see things burn and don't care how they got that way.) Versus Mode also known as Boss Rush Mode , is a sort of Survival Mode where the Player runs through levels similar to how Arcade Mode works but with a Time Limit. (Great for any Player, this mode is good for learning the ropes and also for those who seek a challenge.) Online Multiplayer Mode is a Battle Royal Mode where the Player creates a bot and sends them into a Battlefield to face off against Players Online. (This is a great mode for those who love online multiplayer space shooters) Kickstarter Goals $10K RELEASE THE PILOT GAME ON PC, STEAM ! $25K: RELEASE PREQUEL ON CONSOLES ! ( SWITCH , XBOX , PS , PC, STEAM ) NEW MODE ADDED! UPDATED CUTSCENES AND ART ! ( SPRITE-BASED ANIMATIONS ) $50K ALLY SYSTEM ADDED! CO-OP MULTIPLAYER MODE ADDED! Update and or Add More Game Art ! OPEN  DISCORD COMMUNITY! $75K CUSTOM ALLY CREATOR ADDED! CRAFTING SYSTEM ADDED! LOOT SYSTEM ADDED! NEW WORLD ADDED! NEW MODE ADDED! A NEW STORY ADDED! Updated Dialogue (Mature Content) Added! Multiple Language Support! $100K ONLINE MULTIPLAYER ! CUSTOM CHARACTERS ADDED! MERCHANT SYSTEM ADDED! NEW MODE ADDED! OST RELEASE ! New Story Added! UPDATE CUTSCENES TO A PS1 STYLE ! $250K: VEHICLE SYSTEM ADDED! NEW WORLD ADDED! CUSTOM WEAPONS ! NEW MODE ADDED! RELATIONSHIP SYSTEM ADDED! DELUXE OST RELEASE ! (WITH LYRICS) $500K: CUSTOM VEHICLES Added! ALLY BATTLE SYSTEM ADDED! OPEN WORLD MODE MAP ADDED! (COMBINES ALL WORLDS INTO ONE) $1M: COLONY BUILDER MODE ADDED! NEW MODE ADDED! CREWS ADDED! BATTLE ROYALE ADDED! RELEASE MAGAZINE GUIDE! (BASED ON THE GAME SO FAR) EXPAND TEAM TO WORK ON "THIS" GAME TITLE. VOICE ACTING ADDED! $2M PLUS: RELEASE TO MOBILE! Backer Gifts and Rewards ! 1$ : Name Mentioned in Credits ! 10$ : Digital Copy of "SpaceMan: The Search For Planet Earth!" 25$ : Copy of the OST on USB and a Game -related Apparel Item. (shirt, hat, key chain, etc!) 50$ : "Surprise Box!" 75$: Become Part of the Story ! (An NPC with a Storyline and side Mission (s)) 100$ : Hard Copy of " SpaceMan: The Search For Planet Earth !" 200$ "+" : Special Edition Hard Copy of " SpaceMan: The Search For Planet Earth! ", Also, A Copy of the " Official Game Guide Magazine !" ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- FUN FACT! ( I got the idea for the LUMN Bot from one of the Avengers movies. Tony Starks said at one point that he wanted to put a forcefield around the planet. Then I saw at a point in the movie where he had Iron Suits placed outside of the planet that can be called on remotely. So when you think of LUMN , think more of Iron Man than Mega Man.) (More To Come!) "PLAY THE DEMO FREE!" "CLICK THE BANNER BELOW TO DOWNLOAD!" "CLICK THE BANNER ABOVE TO DOWNLOAD THE DEMO AND PLAY FREE!" The DEMO briefly runs through the Level Designs, the look and feel of some of the level enemies, the atmosphere of the environment, how the music and FX sound, and much more! PLEASE NOTE THAT I HAVE BEEN TRYING TO GET MY DEMO ON STEAM FOR THE PAST MONTH AND AM STILL WAITING TO HEAR SOMETHING FROM THEM EVEN AFTER HAVING HAD PAID $100...IF IT GETS ON THERE I WILL PUBLISH HERE, IF NOT, PLEASE REFER TO THE DOWNLOAD LINK IN THE BANNER ABOVE TO DOWNLOAD THE DEMO STRAIGHT TO YOUR PC. Who Am i My name is Nyako and I am the sole developer of "Spaceman: The Search For Planet Earth!" What I hope to accomplish with this game is to begin a long and fruitful journey into the world of video games as well as video game development. As an American Black Indie Developer, I understand the obstacles that come before me are great, but as long as there's hope, there's a chance.

title: Categories
description: Glad you asked. Chippo is our very own invention: a patent pending, mind-blowing mash-up of golf and traditional backyard games.  We like to call Chippo the glorious lovechild of golf and cornhole (the popular bean bag toss game). We’ve combined the old fashioned, beer-slugging, tailgate-dominating, sunshine-basking goodness of games like cornhole with the gentlemanly, giddiness-inducing, side-betting beauty of golf. Chippo is the only backyard game where you can work over your buddies, while working on your short game. Sound good? Well, we are ready to bring Chippo to beaches, backyards, tailgates, gym classes and golf clubhouses all over these great United States of America...but we need your help! We’ve done a lot so far to get Chippo to this point. We've started a company; done a bunch of research; built and tested countless prototypes; obtained legal protection by filing for patents and trademarks; chosen a trusted manufacturing partner; perfected our prototypes; finalized the awesome design of Chippo; found a trusted, efficient and experienced storage/order fulfillment/shipping partner; and built an in-depth business plan and financial model...to name a few things. Now, we need your help in order to fund our first large order from the manufacturer. Kickstarter offers an amazing platform to connect Chippo with other like-minded and passionate golf enthusiasts and backyard game gurus. By backing Chippo, you’ll be supporting young inventors/entrepreneurs and joining the growing herd of Chippopotamuses...But also: Can you imagine being the first one of your friends to roll up to the beach, backyard, tailgate or clubhouse with Chippo? That’s the stuff legends are made of. Each Chippo set includes two target boards. Each board measures 40" x 24" x 1.4" and weighs just under 10 lbs. Quality artificial turf covers the surface of each board, mimicking the feel of a real green and making for some sick spins and bounces. Each board includes three strategically placed holes for scoring. Netting is attached to each hole to catch scoring shots, leaving no confusion over the tally and preventing fist fights. The legs fold under for easy storage and transportation. There is a compartment to store the mats built into the underside of each board. Each Chippo set includes two chipping mats. Our mats are made of quality artificial turf attached to heavy rubber so it doesn't move when you hit the ball. The mats also enable you to play Chippo on any surface. Here, we name a few surfaces on which one can play Chippo: sand at the beach, grass in a backyard or park, asphalt in a parking lot or driveway, the patio at the clubhouse, carpet at the office, tile in your bathroom, cheese or barbecue spare ribs (not sure which one is true) on the surface of the moon. Each Chippo set includes six balls. The balls are made of high quality, high density foam. They travel 1/3 the distance of a regular golf ball but feel very similar off the club. These balls are dense and balanced for true spin, trajectory and accuracy... And soft enough that they will not dent car doors, break windows or noses, and won't bounce and roll like crazy. Safe to play with anyone, anywhere. Like all great and beautiful things, playing Chippo is pretty simple: Step One: Set up the boards as depicted above. Step Two: Find three friends (or highly skilled pets) and start chipping! Chippo is easy enough for non-golfers, and pros can move the boards back for a more challenging game. Gameplay is reminiscent of cornhole, washers or horseshoes, but with some cool new twists. Flip a coin to start, winners go first from there on out. You take three shots in a row at the target board and tally your total score like-a-this: 1 point: Just hit the board on a fly. 3 points: Drain your shot in the larger center hole. 5 points: Send the ball to its home in either top corner hole. 2x points: If you're a surgeon with a sixty degree wedge, bounce your shot off the chipping mat for double (2, 6 or 10) points. Promptly yell "Mashed Potatoes!" Your opponent standing next to you goes next. The player with the highest total score wins that “hole” for his/her team. The players on the other side then battle it out for "hole" #2, and so on. Play an 18 “hole” match. Settle ties with a sudden death playoff - intense! You can drink beer, heckle your friends and gamble while doing this. Life is good. Keep in mind, these are the standard Chippo Match Play Rules but, like golf, there are many different ways to keep score while playing Chippo such as Stroke Play and Nassau. We’ll have a full list with all the different scoring options soon. History books are strewn with great and prescient inventors. Men who were able to see into the future, beyond the boundaries of their own time and place, toward a version of the world that was better, more perfect, more beautiful. Men like Edison, Franklin, Tesla, Jobs. Brendan and Matt, the co-founders of Chippo Golf LLC, have one thing in common with these men: Brendan and Matt are also men. Other than that, they likely have very little in common with those other men. Brendan and Matt are somewhat intelligent, mediocre looking, washed up athletes, who happened to have a great idea (Chippo - a game that combines golf and cornhole - why doesn’t this already exist!?) and decided to man-up and make it happen! They are both avid golfers, intensely competitive backyard gamers, and both incredibly bad at both golf and backyard games. Brendan is a former collegiate athlete, with an MBA, two kids, a heart of gold, a receding hairline and ten years of experience in finance. Matt is a little older with slightly more hair (though an awkward percentage of it is gray given his age), two dogs with a total of seven legs, one kid on the way and over ten years of experience in marketing and design...and he can still do a kick-flip on his skateboard - whatever that means. Chippo is their first entrepreneurial venture together. They'd love it if you'd consider joining them on their mission to bring golf and backyard game infused fun to the world. As if this baby hippo learning to swim isn't rewarding enough... TODAY : You pre-order Chippo/back us through Kickstarter. END OF FEBRUARY 2017 : Kickstarter campaign completed. Chippo places order with manufacturer. MARCH 2017 : Your Chippo swag (shirts and can coolers) is shipped. APRIL 2017 : Chippo receives first shipment from manufacturer and processes Kickstarter pre-orders. MID/END APRIL 2017 : The moment of truth. Love at first sight ♥. You receive your Chippo and instantly become cooler. APRIL 2017 AND BEYOND : News of Chippo spreads like wildfire and, together, we make golf fun again.

description:
Dear Backers, We appreciate your support on this project.

We have received many encouragements and useful suggestions, in particular on the possibility of having a larger drawer size of combing multiple drawers together.  Your voice is well received and we are in the process of re-designing the Chipeasy to make it more flexible and customizable. Please use the kickstarter "follow a project-creator" function, so that you will be informed when we relaunch this project with a new version. Stay tuned and thanks for your support! Chipseasy Team With the rapid development of electronics technology, there are more types of electronic components than ever before. This leads to problems in electronic components management such as unnecessary repeat purchases, time-consuming storage, poor management of existing parts, and mistakes that could have been avoided. Chipseasy is an integrated, smart electronic components organizer. It allows for the efficient management and storage of your electronic components, and ensures you can access the required components for each project by ejecting the right storage units. Easy to incorporate into your current system, Chipseasy caters to the electric engineering industry for the storage and management of electronic components, the mechanical hardware industry for the storage and management of small parts, and the chemical engineering or medical industry for the storage and management of experimental drugs. Precision mechanisms and user-friendly designs are built directly within the Chipseasy, and all the user needs is a personal computer to organize their projects. Chipseasy provides a fast, simple, and efficient way for users to complete their projects. Owning a Chipseasy will make your studio, office, or lab super-clean and neat. Metallic Body Design Chipseasy is easy to use, compact, and highly efficient. It has a high-end and aesthetically-pleasing metallic design that can be placed anywhere in your lab or studio. The Chipseasy is designed as easy-to-operate desktop equipment with an aluminum cover, as well as 8 drawers with 64 storage units. Up to 512 different electronic components, or other small parts like screws and nuts, can be stocked and monitored in the Chipseasy. The Chipseasy offers 5V and 12V DC power supply, and consists of a control board, LED display panel and switch, etc. It communicates with a back-end management network system through a user interface. Front View of Chipseasy Sectional View of Chipseasy Single Drawer Explosion Drawings Multicolor options are available to make Chipseasy a stylish part of your studio or lab. (This is only available for 100 pledges.) Color Selection of Chipseasy Connected to your computer or smart device via USB cable, the Chipseasy has easy-to-operate software with powerful features. It supports keyboard input and voice input to search the required components. We will introduce 3 application modes: Operation Mode, Storage Mode, and Soldering Mode. Operation Mode is used when users need to get or stock specific components. This mode makes it super-flexible to search and grab the parts you need. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Operation Mode of Chipseasy Storage Mode is used to stock a large number of components simultaneously. This 3-step process is optimized automatically, and allocates storage units to make the process of stocking numerous components simple and easy. Storage Mode of Chipseasy Soldering Mode is designed for PCB assembly jobs or project development. This mode gives users a quick and easy way to finish their design with more than 60% time saved. Soldering Mode of Chipseasy After uploading the components purchase list or project bill of materials, the Chipseasy can automatically check the inventory to match the components in storage with the uploaded BOM and list. For missing parts that are not in stock, the Chipseasy will generate a new list and automatically upload it to multiple online purchasing platforms like Parts-in-Place. The Chipseasy provides an interactive community. You can register online, create an account, discuss designs, and even share your circuit diagram and DIY gadgets to other members of the Chipseasy community. Users can also find and exchange components with one another. Chipseasy Community 1. We finished our research and design, and completed all the required assembly and testing. It’s been a long road, and we are extremely excited to introduce this Smart Electronic Components Organizer to the world. 2. In order to introduce Chipseasy as soon as possible, and to ensure everyone has access to this electronic design and components management solution, we need your funds to ramp up production. 3. We want to meet your needs and solve your current problems. Your support will allow us to introduce the Chipseasy all around the world and give people like you an effective components management solution.
