title: Breast-Vest
description: I am raising funds to help go towards creating the prototype needed to get the product officially to market. The product is patent pending already and has majority of the cost paid in full already. Last thing that is needed is to get a prototype made for testing and packaging. I have reached out to 20+ companies in the baby/breastfeeding market. I was trying to get the product licensed and sold by whoever wanted to pick it up. I was unfortunately unsuccessful in that attempt. But I do not want to give up on this product due to the immense help it can bring to everyone. This product was created in hopes to allow any person to simulate breastfeeding. It allows the LGBTQ+ community to replicate breastfeeding, it allows breast cancer survivors who would not be able to produce milk to simulate breastfeeding. It allows adoptive mothers to replicate breastfeeding. It would even let nurses who work in pediatrics to replicate breastfeeding while giving that baby the feel of skin to skin which we all know to be an important bond for babies. Some of us dads have been in times where our baby needs a bottle but they refuse to take it due to wanting milk from the breast, in this case the breast-vest could assist in transitioning the baby from milk to bottle smoother or just allow a bottle refusing baby to eat while believing they are getting breastfed. Even in unfortunate instances where maybe the mother is no longer around, dad can still have the baby have the feeling of breastfeeding. There are plenty of pros for this product to be on the market and I truly believe it can help a lot of people and babies when it comes to breastfeeding. I have put a lot of my funds into getting this product to where it is at. But without additional help or a company wanting to license it I fear it will not make it to market and a lot of groups of people will still struggle with day to day breastfeeding

title: TESPuino
description: THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT!! Well, we didn't make our goal for funding but we learned a lot and we are going to make these anyway.  If you would like a TESPuino, please go check out our website and order one there.  We have ordered parts for about 200 of each (32 or S3) and will begin assembly soon.  All orders should start to ship by mid June. Thanks for all the support and pledges we received from the amazing Kickstarter community. www.tespuino.com Why the TESPuino? The Last few years we noticed that Arduino UNOs were a bit hard to find, seemed the IC shortage caused some issues. Additionally we have always wanted to have Bluetooth, WIFI, and memory storage on the Arduino UNO without adding a shield.  So we set off to build the TESPuino.  We had hoped to have this available by last November, but we had a bit more work than we could handle to get it ready by then. Well, we're ready now!!   We've gone through 3 revisions and we are finishing the final prototypes as you read this.  Things are looking good for production starting in May and we can't wait till you get one of these in July. What is the TESPuino? The TESPuino is an Arduino UNO form development board based on the Expressive ESP32 modules for learning, quick prototyping, and project creation. It has 14 digital I/O all of which can be used for Pulse Width Modulation (PWM). It also has; 6 analog Input pins, USB C power and programming (because who can find a USB A or B cord these days... haha), Additional Input power range of 7 to 32 VDC, one built in LED, one built in NEO Pixel, TX RX LEDs, SD Card holder, RESET button, BOOT button (can be used as an input as well), USB PHY with JTAG (S3 version only), UART, I2C, SPI, a 32 bit dual core 240MHZ MCU, built in Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n, Built in v4.2 BR/EDR and Bluetooth LE, and a 40MHZ oscillator. Anyone can use it to develop a project thanks to the easy open source Arduino Integrated Development Environment (IDE) and the Expressive ESP32 modules with lots of help out there to get you started with code. It will also allow the seasoned engineers or developers to take their existing Arduino projects and add Bluetooth or WiFi with an added SD card.  All without giving up I/O going to the shield that might already be an important part of the project. Check out the comparison of the two TESPuino versions with the Arduino UNO.  The ESP modules really give the UNO form a boost. TESPuino Comparison TESPuino by Arduion The projects that you can create with the TESPuino are almost limitless, and the TESPuino should be a great partnership of the Arduino shields and the ESP modules. We are looking forward to many blogs and posts of new and improved projects. Hope you enjoy it as much as we have. Check out a quick little getting started video we put together, this just walks you through adding the ESP32 boards to the Arduino IDE so that you can target the TESPuino-S3. We use the ESP dev boards as targets in the Arduino IDE and It works great!  You will also want to check out these tutorials to help you get started with the Arduino IDE and ESP32 modules. Using Arduino IDE ... Using ESP32 with Arduino IDE You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need to copy this into the Arduino IDE additional Boards Manager URLs: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/espressif/arduino-esp32/gh-pages/package_esp32_index.json Some Fun Projects To showcase the functionality of the TESPuino we built two cool projects with it.  An Infinity Mirror that is controlled with a web user interface over Wi-Fi to change colors and a Bluetooth controller (super Nintendo style). Infinity Mirror Infinity Mirror We found a great wood case frame and loaded it with NEO Pixels.  Than we took the TESPuino and used it to control the lights.  we developed a website user interface that can control the pre-set colors and patterns.  It was not difficult with the TESPuino and Arduino IDE, and it turned out so good that we are offering it as a reward for a pledge of $299 or more.  It Certainly would look cool on a coffee table or a work desk and it's fun to play with. Check out this video on using the Infinity mirror. The cool thing about this is that you can change it however you want.  This is how we have it setup now.  If there is interest in this we will improve the user interface to be more friendly.  Also, we will post the source for this for download. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Bluetooth Controller Bluetooth Controller To showcase the Bluetooth of the TESPuino, we built a controller.  It's emulating keyboard input now, so you can really sink it up to anything.  There are other ways to improve the code if you want as well.  But just as it is now, it works great for playing some games on a laptop.  We are hoping that someone will get it working with their Switch soon. Again, this turned out so great that we are also including this as a reward for a pledge of $66 or more.  It comes with a TESPuino-32, a controller board, a LIPO battery, and a 3D printed case.  Lots of fun can be had with this little beauty, and this really shows off what the TESPuino can do with any project. check out a quick video on using the controller. Currently the code that we have running this is using the keyboard input for the controller buttons.  That means that the left button is really received by the Bluetooth at your computer as hitting the "x" key on the keyboard.  This is all configurable in the code or with the game when getting started.  That makes this really fun because you can change it to whatever you want.  If there is interest, we will work on setting it up with XInput or something else.. or you can do it!! Also, we will continue to post useful hints and help, which will make use more fun. We would also like to get the case injection molded so that it is really cool looking. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Looks like I lost.. haha. TESPuino Production We are excited to be assembling and testing the TESPuino here in Layton Utah.  We need more production in the USA. Also, Production is fun and we have been looking for a good project to build.  This is one of the reasons we have built the TESPuino.  So T2E can get our production line humming. Pick and place line for TESPuino However, getting something made costs money and we are on a budget like most of the small businesses in the world. So, here we are with this Kickstarter campaign, we need your help to buy parts so we can get this TESPuino to the masses.  We are hoping that this will help us lower costs and make the TESPuino your go to project development platform for IOT or other creations.  Sleek, elegant, and easy to use. The TESPuino is ready to replace the Arduino in your current project while adding WIFI, Bluetooth, and memory storage. Thanks for checking this out and thanks for your pledges. Keep having fun!

title: Categories
description: YGBverse is where culture meets STEM. We’re creating a story-driven learning app that turns Science, Technology, Engineering and Math into interactive adventures inspired by real cultures and heroes. When kids see themselves in what they learn, their curiosity ignites, their confidence grows, and learning becomes an unforgettable adventure. Join us in making STEM inclusive, playful, and powerful, so every kid, everywhere, can dream big, see themselves in the story, and succeed. “YGB” stands for Young, Gifted, and Beautiful —because we believe every kid is all three. In the YGBverse , our metaverse learning world, kids level up their STEM skills while they play. When students can’t see themselves in STEM , they start to believe they don’t belong there. That gap limits imagination, opportunity, and future careers. YGBverse weaves culture into STEM learning, showing every kid that science belongs to them. Their voices, traditions, and creativity aren’t just part of the story, they shape the future. Because when learning celebrates who you are, the possibilities are endless. YGBverse isn’t just another STEM app, it’s an immersive world of stories, gamification, and culture. Every lesson is an adventure where kids explore, create, and discover how STEM connects to real people, places, and traditions. By blending storytelling with gamification and culture, YGBverse makes learning meaningful, relatable, and unforgettable. Here’s what makes YGBverse special: When you back YGBverse, you’re doing more than funding an app you’re opening doors for classrooms nationwide. Your pledge makes STEM joyful and accessible for every child. Our prototype already sparks real excitement. With your support, YGBverse will grow into a vibrant, game-changing learning world. Together, We’re Building the Future You’re not just backing a project—you’re helping shape a future where every kid can see themselves in STEM and shine.

title: Quebee: Your Own Personal Cameraman
description:
We've loved every moment of this campaign. It has brought us close to a bunch of supportive backers, who believe in our vision for a new type of camera: One that captures our important moments with us in them - and even from multiple angles - without us being stuck behind the camera! We're still flat out on development, and we're taking everything we have learned from this campaign and will be relaunching here on kickstarter in early 2014. JOIN OUR MAILING LIST so that we can keep you informed and up-to-date on launch progress, continuing development, and so that you can be first in line for special early bird pricing when we re-launch! Please tell your friends about Quebee and help us spread the word! Don't forget you can also connect with us on social media ... The way we capture personal video is about to change Are you sick of shaky one dimensional videos taken from your smart phone? Perhaps you are fed up with holding the camera and not being part of what is happening? Ever wish you could just enjoy the moment without worrying about capturing it? Meet Quebee - your own personal camera man, enabling you to be in the moment. No more standing on the sidelines, it's time for you to be part of the action! Quebee frees you up, you can still use your smartphone while Quebee shoots video and you can put Quebee in places that you would never put your smartphone or SLR camera! This enables you to capture videos like never before, and you can be in them too. Quebee is Intuitive and fun to use Quebee offers an unbeatable user experience, it's the camera you place, not hold. Place Quebee anywhere - on a rock, a tree, a shelf, anywhere ... then press the button, and get in the action. Best of All Quebee has FIVE HOURS battery life .  Yes, 5 hours of continuous full HD recording, and up to TWO DAYS of recording in time lapse mode.  No clumsy batteries, no cables, no complexity, just place, and be in your stories! The smartphone app is your Quebee control panel, choose video, time-lapse, or still mode. Frame your scenes and edit settings as needed. When in range of wifi Quebee will upload your videos to the cloud and you'll be alerted when they are ready to edit. Quebee's work together to create great video.. You no longer need a film crew to set up and capture great video from multiple angles. Multiple Quebees can be configured to sync together and be controlled from one smartphone. You can even sync with your smartphone camera to give yet another angle! Using the multi features of the Quebee app you can do the following: View a live feed from each quebee Set up and control quebees independently or all at once sync your smartphone camera with the quebees Start and stop all cameras with one press Video files from synced cameras are linked which makes them easy to edit together Check out this demo video we made using the multi angle kit. See how easy it was to set up and make a great multi angle video! We have put together two kits so you can capture multi angle video MINI ANGLE KIT - Two preconfigured Quebees packaged and ready for you to start capturing awesome multi angle video or just because you want more than one. MULTI ANGLE KIT - Three pre-configured Quebees in a rugged carry case. which is perfect for film makers, event organizers, even amateurs who just want to make great videos. We also took some cool footage down at Serato HQ to show the multi-angle Smartphone control and how it can be used by musicians - check it out! Time-Lapse has never been easier Have you ever wanted to make beautiful time-lapse videos like the pros? but you just didn't have all the expensive gear or software? Perhaps you didn't want to leave your smartphone or camera somewhere outdoors for so long? Quebee solves this problem and makes time-lapse videos really easy. Just put Quebee down, press the button and leave it to do it's thing, it's true set and forget and you can put it places you wouldn't normally put your smartphone or SLR camera. Time-lapse is great because it allows you to make interesting short videos of long 'events' without any complicated editing. Check out this time-lapse footage of a sunset shot from Ben's balcony in Auckland. Using the smartphone app you can set up practically any time interval - of course the longer the time interval the longer the battery lasts. Quebee automatically compiles the time-lapse into a movie for you, then all you need to do is add a soundtrack, and share with your friends, all very easy with the Quebee App. Our engineers are putting a lot of effort into maximising the battery life and making the time-lapse mode really fun and easy to use. As Featured on What are they saying about Quebee? "Quebee frees you up by capturing hands free video, with the press of a button" Jamal Andress - Mashable "We all know at least one person who’s always taking pictures or shooting video, yet is never in any of the content because they’re always behind the camera. Quebee rectifies that problem.
" Dylan Duarte - Megatechnews "The QueBee camera system is a fully mobile wide angle multi-camera system" Tyler Zdenek - OmniGamer "The Quebee is one of the most intuitive cameras that can make your personal show become a reality." Michael Nieto - Trendhunter "The great thing with Quebee is it allows you to get out from behind the camera - when you're holding your smart phone to take the video your not in the footage. You can just pop Quebee anywhere to capture from another angle." Paul Spain - NZ Tech Podcast Where are we in development? We've come a long way since we first set out on our mission. We now have a proven electronics design, a working app, and have built 6 working prototypes which we have been testing furiously. our favourite working prototypes Here is a video demonstrating the current functionality of the working prototypes and app. We are using an iPhone 5s, our prototype app, and our working prototype 'Silver'. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 We have developed and refined the form and mechanical function of quebee and built 4 'looks like' prototypes for the video and photo shoot. We are pleased with how it has evolved and expect only minor changes between now and production. A working prototype on the left and a looks like prototype on the right We have designed a smartphone app and built a working prototype which allows the following basic functions: connect to quebee, view a live feed, change camera settings, remote record, browse and playback videos, and save videos to phone. concept images of the smartphone app What comes next? We have a proven electronics design, along with our prototype firmware, smartphone applications, and cloud service.  The next steps for us are to finalize our mechanical design and PCB layout and work with our manufacturer for volume production.  While the hardware and mechanical engineers are busy the software team will finalize the various software components which include: Firmware - software running on the device itself Apps - software that runs on your Smartphone and Web services - software the runs on the web server (the "backend") It's all pretty exciting, and we're so, however we need your help to get quebee production ready, and pay for tooling and our first manufacturing run. Want to see some prototype footage? We've been having a lot of fun experimenting with the working prototypes, and have learned so much from it which we are feeding back into the product development. If you want to check out some footage visit our vimeo page or youtube channel . Also like our facebook page and we can keep you updated through there. Product Specs Quebee is a powerful little device packed tight with the right combination of high quality lens, durability, and stunning battery life. Check the specs below. and for the techies ... Please note: Standard storage is 16GB, backers will have the option to upgrade to the 32GB and 64GB models for an additional cost after the campaign is funded. Quebee is a sealed unit, with built in internal storage so you don't have to worry about fiddly cards or anything like that, it also allows us to make it durable and water resistant. Videos can be copied off quebee wirelessly to the cloud or to your smartphone so you don't even need a cable. However you can also load videos onto your computer or other capable devices via USB cable. Stretch Goals Let us know what added features you'd like, give us your ideas to form the basis of stretch goals at various funding levels. Extra Accessories We have some awesome ideas for Quebee accessories in the pipeline. below is a sneak preview. If you have any ideas or requests please let us know. If there is enough demand for something we'll make it, we love to please. Reward Tiers Here's a run down of the rewards on offer. Choose wisely and choose quickly, some have limited numbers. Colors These are the stunning anodized aluminium colors you can choose from. if you want to choose a color other than standard silver Aluminium please add $20 to your pledge per quebee. You will be able to pick your colour immediately after the project is funded. Note: final colors may vary slightly from this image Shipping Info Shipping in the United States and New Zealand is free. Everywhere else there will be a small charge to make sure your parcel gets there safely and on time - please add this to your pledge. The Quebee Story A lot of fun has been had, a lot of challenges overcome, and a lot of moments captured and we want to share some of the story. Over 300 sketches were generated to develop Quebee! ...countless co-creation brainstorm sessions took place ...we created the Quebee brand .... we love it! ...a lot of time was spent in solidworks (3D CAD) ... lots of prototypes were 3D printed ... lots of soldering and tinkering ... did we mention LOTS OF PROTOTYPES? Meet the team We are a strong team of experienced and talented designers, engineers, and software specialists. We collaborate closely with industry experts, and a loyal group of users/testers who have helped us to shape Quebee into what it is. Our specialist electronics and software engineers have been designing miniature cameras for international manufacture since 2007 and have established direct partnerships with manufacturers in Asia and have won numerous awards for video products including Honoree at the 2011 CES Premier Consumer Electronics show. Our industrial designers and mechanical engineers have been designing and developing user friendly products since 2006 and work closely with several Chinese manufacturers. They have won numerous NZ design awards for their innovative work. Interact with the team on facebook - facebook.com/quebeecam Special Thanks A special thanks must go to the people and companies listed below, we couldn't have done this without your help and tremendous effort.

title: THE HOA: Comedy Pilot
description: The HOA is a celebration of Black/POC/Queer joy, legendary friendship comedies, and the reaching of a mountaintop that seems impossible these days: homeownership. Think Insecure meets Living Single, where every character and condo brings a laugh-out-loud adventure of its own. When Jayce moves in with his rich boyfriend, Brian, he joins the building’s Homeowner’s Association (HOA). The tight knit group has everything from content creators, a trust fund baby and a stubborn woman who's been living there since, well…forever. Did Jayce just move into a 90's sitcom? A fresh spin on sitcoms, The HOA will be a character-and-comedy-driven story, rooted in creator Ben F. Locke’s love for shows like A Different World and Living Single . No matter how many of our stories it seems like we’ve lost, we’ll drum up that same representation, fun and nostalgia. The Inspiration The HOA creator, Ben, was inspired by their own experience living in a condo building with their partner, who became HOA president. The crazy stories and situations were fascinating. That interest, along with the realization that today’s adults no longer subscribe to the same traditional means of gaining wealth and ownership, turning to roles like influencing and digital money-making. The journey of adulting, and learning hard lessons like money doesn’t equal maturity. What would it look like to be an adult, but feel like you’re faking the to-do list? All the while, bills, responsibilities and decisions don’t stop for anyone. Meet the Cast Our cast is packed with national and local talent who’ve made waves on your stages, screens, and social feeds. We’re grateful to have them in the building! Jayce (Jaylon Muchison) is an artist who invests in his work, but not himself. He doesn’t come from money, but his fiancé, Brian (Joseph Anthony Byrd) , knows his way around wealth, and lives as a successful lawyer. While they love each other, their backgrounds get in the way of them seeing eye to eye. Mateo and Kenny are an untraditional, chronically online couple. Making their livings with content, Mateo works as an OF model, and Kenny, a streamer. They’re minds and streams of income aren’t the only thing that are open in their relationship, as the growing pains of fame come knocking. Candace has been living off of generational wealth, entitlement, and vibes. Over the course of the series, she attempts to find her own path. She she finds her footing, she steps over pretty much everyone who is in her way to get there. She struggles to find real connection, community and belonging. Ms. Mabel has lived in the building for over 30 years, and doesn't plan on leaving. She isn't a fan of these new, young residents, and is less of a fan of the culture, technology and change they bring. Our supporting cast for the pilot episode, Dean Hastings (a potential boss) and Spenser (a potential spark) give us a clear-eyed view of life outside the four walls of our cast. Meet the Team Creator, Writer & Director: Ben F. Locke Ben F. Locke (all pronouns) is a Black, Queer and Nonbinary Chicago Writer, Actor, Director, Casting Director and Producer. They have a double degree in Theatre and Human Services from Millikin University, graduated from the School at Steppenwolf and Boston University's Graduate Program for TV/Film Writing. They have worked with theatres such as Steppenwolf, Oregon Shakespeare Festival, Court Theatre, Drury Lane, Bramble Theatre and more. Their work focuses on Black/Queer experiences and tries to focus on joy rather than trauma, as a way to expand how this industry sees us and what stories we're allowed to be part of. More stories for us, by us. Executive Producer: Allie Morgan Allie (she/her) is a writer, director, and producer from Madison, WI. She studied Entertainment Business at Los Angeles Film School and Screenwriting at New York Film Academy. She has written and directed several award-winning short films since beginning her journey as a filmmaker in 2020. She created Muffy Film Productions because she is passionate about telling stories for marginalized communities and she is excited to keep creating her own stories as well as helping other people tell theirs. Executive Producer: Sydney Hart Sydney V. Hart (she/her) is a Creative Director, Writer, Producer and Impact Strategist meshing her love for social change and storytelling. She’s led dozens of creatives across multiple states, and her work has been screened at the Chicago Cultural Center, in collaboration with Open Television (OTV) and the Filmmaker’s Mixtape Initiative. She dedicates her projects to re-imagining how stories can take shape, pointing a lens towards the nuances of communities of color. Sydney has been trusted as a consultant and digital strategist for companies like Monkeypaw Productions, Bad Robot Productions, Neon, Spotify, and PBS. Her work garnered a Webby nomination and several Anthem Award wins, for campaigns and initiatives on the highest wave of culture change. Sydney lived in a condo building early in her life with her mother, right next door to her aunt, so she's got stories for days. The community, hilarity and memories drive her eagerness to support the world of HOA coming to life. Muffy Film Productions Muffy Film Productions is a Chicago-based, queer, and people of color led creative production company with a mission to focus it lens on marginalized communities. Our teams are as diverse as our stories, featuring women, Black folks, people of color, queer humanity and more. Where Your Support Leads Your support champions the film and creative industries across the Chicagoland area, and the Midwest at large. Any donation provided lifts up energized trailblazing creatives who searched for themselves on screen, and decided to build their own representation. Most of our budget is dedicated to our hard-working cast and crew, for their time and dedication. The rest goes towards feeing them, the gear used to make the pilot, as well as post-production. We're looking forward to being in community with creatives of all kind, and ensuring they're taken care of. Questions If you'd like to know more about this project regarding sponsorship, press or partnership, please email muffyfilmproductions@gmail.com

title: Categories
description: A MIDSUMMER NIGHT'S DREAM is one of Shakespeare’s most beloved creations. The frolicking tale of lovesick young aristocrats, energetic but inept rustics, and mischievous woodland spirits is a staple of stage and screen. In the past, filmed adaptations have emphasized the play’s traditional, Elizabethan qualities. This project however is a fresh and stylish reinvention that takes an entirely different approach. Our story takes place in present day Hollywood - a place where glamorous stars, commanding moguls, starving artists and vaulting pretenders all vie to get ahead. Hollywood is sometimes called “The Dream Factory,” and like the world of Shakespeare’s Dream, it’s a place where fantasy and reality collide. In the tradition of Baz Luhrmann’s rapturous 1996 reimagining of Romeo + Juliet, this modern vision breathes new life into a classic tale. Combined with a cast of established and emerging stars, and a pulsing contemporary soundtrack, the film will appeal to ardent fans of the Bard as well as audiences discovering Shakespeare for the first time. A MIDSUMMER NIGHT'S DREAM wrapped principal photography in December of 2015. It was a challenging and ambitious shoot, but we ended up with the makings of something special. We have been furiously cutting away since January and expect to have the film ready just in time for the Fall festival season. This film has been, for everyone involved, a labor of love. Fran, Josh and I were fortunate in bringing together a remarkable group of talented and passionate artists to make this DREAM into a reality. Movies are shot in production, but they are MADE in post-production. Editing, music, color, sound... these are the things that will make a good picture great. Every member of this cast and crew believes that we have created something truly dazzling, something that deserves extra care and support in this crucial phase of the filmmaking process. But we need your help to finish strong! We are turning to you, our friends and family, as well as the fantastic community of backers Kickstarter has assembled, to help us give this film the last push it needs. OUR AMAZING CAST! Help us make this DREAM come true! Please see below for a presentation of the awesome rewards we have put together for our backers. This has been a D-I-Y effort from the beginning, so if you decide to join us, we want you to feel like part of the production. We've designed our rewards with that in mind. We've also included a simple breakdown of what your contribution will be supporting. It might be easy to think that since we're through production the movie is finished. Not so! Movies live and die in the cutting room. AND, we are very fortunate to have acclaimed LA singer-songwriter Mia Doi Todd working with a selection of other accomplished musical artists on a killer original soundtrack.

title: Annulus Keepers
description: Annulus Keepers is a Dystopian Fantasy set in the year 2135. A time where the rise of Keepers cause a separation of Provences like never before. Keepers hold a genetic power that rises them to the top with power and respect. Teaser Trailer The Provences Tanori - The Tanorian's are a group of women from all over that secluded themselves from practices of other social societies. These women are very skilled tactically and are coordinated in everything that they do. Wyvern Side - Wyvern Side; A very poor overpopulated community. The Watchmen’s camp is on the outskirts of Wyvern, they have multiple hide outs in the area. The Watchmen are a group of Men from Wyvern Side a community for all. The Watchmen protect their Provence away from home like military of the woods. Raden - Raden is a community of scrapers that collect and trade across all platforms. Chadmar - Chadmar is home to the Families of the Trees. Napa - Napa is the home of the Roiders, a group of Mechanically advanced poeple. Vernin - Vernin’s are a very violent group of mutiples (twins, triplets, etc.) that will kill without questions. A young group of fighters in their 15-25s that were left behind by their parents. They are constantly on the move and live in small huts/grassy structures in the woods and hide in plaine sight. The Team Director/Producer/Writer - Stephanie Pons Stephanie Pons is a Florida Based Director/Producer. Film has been her whole world since she was a child. She has worn many different hats in both film and television and uses all the skills she has acquired towards being an all around supportive and efficient Producer. She has worked both on and behind the camera. Diving head first into her work is something she loves. She always finds a connection to each project, no matter the size it will get the full Pons treatment. Featured Talent - Lisa Lisa McBee is a vivacious and high-spirited Deaf woman who brings a "pure and simple" philosophy to life. Her remarkable talents shine through soulful performances in American Sign Language (ASL) and Visual Vernacular (VV), where she takes her audience on a captivating journey through the unique perspective of a Deaf individual. Lisa is a true ambassador of Deaf culture, embracing it with deep passion. ASL Specialist - Joel Ortiz Joel is a talented and passionate ASL performer who was born in Puerto Rico. He attended the Florida School for the Deaf and later transferred to Lyman High school. After high school he attended Valencia College in Orlando, Florida. He developed his skills as an ASL performer at a young age, performing at church and school talent shows. As he got older he started making ASL short films and ASL poetry on social media. In 2021 he was involved in a project from RIT/NTID to coach deaf and hearing actors for their “In The Heights” theater production. He continues working on creating  ASL storytelling and poetry on social media and is part of a Visual Vernacular group called “VV Underground” ( a new online community of streamed poetry, storytelling, humor, music, and rhythms videos). He is currently traveling around the country teaching Visual Vernacular and being an ASL Coach. Featured Talent - Benny Bernard Benny Bernard Jr. is an Actor|Producer| Acting Coach. He has had over a decade of Acting experience. As well as certifications in Meisner Acting techniques, on top of producing several independent projects. Based out of Atlanta, Georgia working as an Actor and freelance acting coach for half a decade. Talent Director - Lexi Goldi Lexi Goldi is a writer, director, and social advocate. Through her films she strives to show true human reflection within stories of adversity. Her production company, Goldi Films, is set to produce her debut feature film, Baby, in 2023.  Lexi values herself in finding compassion within the adverse human experience. Finding perspective in unthinkable realities allows her to ground her characters. Navigating her creative voice has led her to build a strong female based artistic community. She has consistently made empowering others the foundation of her success, emphasizing the crucial importance of equality. Featured Talent - E.J. Bernard E.J. is a multi-hyphenated actor, dancer, and photographer. Her love for the arts drives her passion to learn and perfect her craft while exploring new talents. E.J.’s experience behind the camera allows a smooth transition for her work in front of the camera. She speaks two languages fluently and has the look and ability to play younger roles. Co-Writer/Producer - Michael Grise “Many hats are worn at once" (to cover my bald head mainly) however I thrive in a creative environment. A horror obsessive with the tendacy to add Gore to every script. I accept alchohol as a form of payment.

title: Murder House: Tampa's Scariest Haunt
description:
Murder House / Cuban Club Ybor is Haunted at Murder House Please Support Small Business and Pledge for Murder House in Ybor City this year! This is my last chance to run Murder House this year!!! I am ready to make this Historical Ybor City Fire Station into Tampa's Scariest Haunt!!! I am born and raised right here in Tampa and Ybor is the Holy Grail for Murder House!!! Ybor is Haunted at Murder House! Murder House belongs in Ybor City for Adult Horror Entertainment! Spread the Word to your friends, because I need all of Tampa's Support. The Brand New MURDER HOUSE STORE:                                         MENS & WOMENS MURDER HOUSE SHIRTS To launch,  Murder House as a professional Haunt, we need your support this year!          Keep the Killers Alive! When is Murder House open? 

OPEN:Thursday's Friday's & Saturday's  

**Thursdays are now reserved for  SCARY PHOTO OPPORTUNITIES WITH THE KILLERS, CONTESTS, BLOOD BUCKET CHALLENGES, DONATIONS AND  MORE…

SCAREFAN Thursdays 2016

Fridays and Saturdays will be what you know best, the Scare Show: Murder House

Experience a Hyper Scare Haunt for yourself! Normal operations on Fridays and Saturdays

ALL THROUGH OCTOBER & HALLOWEEN NIGHT Where is Parking for the Murder House?

Murder House is Searching for a NEW LOCATION!!! Contact me at:  murderhousetampa@gmail.com

Current Location: Murder House (9048 Hickory Circle) Do the Murder House Scare Actors/Actresses touch you?

No, we don’t have to touch you in order to scare you! You may feel an accidental bump or bumping walls during the haunt. If you fall, then our actors will help you up if you can deal with the wicked mask of a killer. Is Murder House too scary for kids?

We require you to be 18 years or older unless accompanied by an adult and younger children are discouraged due to the frightful nature of the attraction. Is Murder House  OPEN Year Round? 

Murder House is currently a Halloween Event! 

Thank You For One Hell Of A Season!

Sign the Petition for RedRum to show investors that you want Murder House open year round on “Select Nights” Warnings:      DO NOT ENTER IF YOU SUFFER FROM:   -ASTHMA-  -HEART CONDITIONS-                                    -SEIZURES-  OR ANY OTHER TYPE OF MENTAL, RESPIRATORY OR OTHER                                    MEDICAL CONDITIONS.

DUE TO THE OUTDOOR NATURE OF OUR EVENTS PLEASE DRESS APPROPRIATELY, WEAR CLOTHES THAT YOU CAN RUN IN. NO OPEN TOED SHOES OR FLIP FLOPS! PLEASE WEAR OLD SHOES OR BOOTS ESPECIALLY IN THE RAIN OR AFTER A RAIN STORM.

THERE ARE NO REFUNDS!                                                                      ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK!

title: Guyver: Genesis
description: What is the Guyver? Bio-Booster Armor Guyver is a sci-fi shonen Manga/Anime written and illustrated by Yoshiki Takaya. A couple of friends, Sho & Tetsuro come across a powerful alien artifact called ‘The Guyver Unit.’ When accidentally activated, Sho becomes an alien bio-weapon known as ‘Guyver.’ Little did they know that this event would change the course of their lives forever. A secret alien organization called ‘The Chronos Corporation’ now targets them in order to retrieve the alien device. Guyver: Midnight success After launching " Guyver: Midnight " and reaching over 100,000+ viewers in the first 3 weeks we knew there was both interest and an audience that wanted this type of film! The countless stories, memories, and experiences shared through the comments and interactions after the film's release was a beautiful wave of support/fulfillment. We want to continue bringing this manga/anime/character/story to life in our own way while honoring the source material and incredibly high standard that was set before us. The cast & crew of " Guyver: Midnight " (left to right) Corey Hour, Sherwin Kuo, Jeremy Brookover, Maya McGowan, Forest Lin, Cameron Rankin, Macky James, Julien York, Skyler Leming, John Vogt, Kaughlin Caver, Donavon Thompson, Nick Choi, Franklin Whitlatch, Eric Yang, Isaak Whitworth . Fanmade, Not for profit! By fans, for fans. Not for profit. Our goal is to create a series of films that revolve around the universe of The Guyver and are heavily inspired by the manga, anime, and live-action films. This first installment will be 30-minutes in length and start off a series of episodic films . We want to expand our reach so that people everywhere can view it for free and have access to this amazing lore. We are not profiting, this is just a dedication to the series; all pledges will go directly towards production expenses . Not only is our team committed to raising the bar we are extremely passionate about this series and the impact it's had on millions. Please help us to continue this legacy of "THE GUYVER" and honor Yoshiki Takaya's masterpiece! " Guyver: Genesis " is an incredibly ambitious project that will require a group of highly-skilled professionals to bring it to life. This project will include the work of many talented filmmakers, actors, stunt coordinators, costume designers, post-production team, and passionate supporters contributing to it's success. That includes all of the support we've received from the community, you truly motivate us to continue this epic journey. Production Timeline From Pre-Production to Film Release - We plan to do our absolute best to hit every target on our timeline. Before with no budget and multiple people donating their time + talent we had a few snags in bringing "Guyver: Midnight" to release as we had planned. With your support and proper funding we can commit more time and workforce towards making all of these goals achievable! Here is our plan going into production of "Guyver: Genesis" and how we will tackle the process. Our mission is to to also keep the community and backers updated throughout the production. LIVE ACTION - with heavy emphasis on the action part!! We want to incorporate awesome stunt sequences, fight choreography, and special effects . More importantly we are aiming to bring multiple Zoanoids and a Guyver (or two) onto the screen. How do you ask? We've teamed up with Asao Goto , Evil Ted , & Unsupervised Dork to create custom suits, props, and various other practical components for us to use in production. Check out their work when you can, they are incredibly talented artists and worked on the previous live-action films before ( Asao/Ted ). Asao Goto on" Guyver "and " Guyver: Dark Hero "as the creature effects supervisor and miniature unit model builder (1991-1994) Kickstarter Rewards REWARDS for our Kickstarter Backers ( limited quantities, while supplies last ) DIGITAL Movie ( Guyver: Genesis + Guyver: Midnight) Behind-the-scenes Photos + Videos Storyboard & Shot list Look book and other Production Assets Thank You in the END CREDITS Associate Producer Credit Executive Producer Credit PHYSICAL Blu-ray (Guyver: Genesis + Guyver: Midnight) Stickers + Postcards Signed Postcards + Photos Guyver Unit Guyver Helmet Guyver Units and Helmets created by Unsupervised Dork Partnered and Sponsored by ATLAS LENS CO. - to bring the stunning visuals of the Guyver series to life we had to find the perfect optics. We used the Atlas Lens Co. Mercury series of lenses for the cinematography of " Guyver: Midnight ". They've been the choice of great films and shows such as 28 Years Later (2025), Anora (2024), The Creator (2023), & The Boys (TV series) just to name a few. It's an honor for our team to have the full support and collaborative relationship that Dan Kanes and the rest of the team at Atlas Lens Co. has provided. Their customer service, educational content, and the strong community they built is a haven for filmmakers and creators worldwide. Atlas Lens Co. Atlas Lens Co. Mercury Series optics used on " Guyver: Midnight " & " Guyver: Genesis " Meeting Steve Wang Steve Wang (Director of " Guyver: Dark Hero ") & Corey Hour (Director of " Guyver: Midnigh t") Meeting at Onyx Forge Studio (2025) to share our experiences on filmmaking and the process of creating our respective films. A huge thank you to Steve and the staff for the warm welcome and allowing me to get a glimpse into their creative process. Forever grateful for the advice and guidance you've given us—your impact on this industry has and continues to inspire multiple generations . Yoshiki Takaya the Creator & Illustrator of Guyver.

title: Grinder the Movie
description: Synopsis Grinder is a Gay Thriller set in New York City. It is a coming of age story about a young man seduced into leaving his suburban life and an older man returning to a forbidden lifestyle. This is a film about discovering sexual identity and running from it. Grinder asks the question "is there really gay for pay?" The Director - Joe Gallant You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Emmy winning film director Joe Gallant will helm the project. Joe is a well regarded art film director with work in the permanent collection at NYU. Richard Samalot will be behind the camera and Barney Oldfield (Too Much Sleep, Zero Day) will Produce. concept photo by Brandon Ruckdashel Cast and Crew The film stars Brandon Ruckdashel , who was a star of the hit HBO/Cinemax series Co-ed Confidential and off-Broadway's Ascension, as well as newcomers Vincent Riley and Richard Biglia . Vincent Riley - Tim You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 concept photo by Brandon Ruckdashel Our Goal - 15k This is a modest starting point and we will be supplementing Kickstarter with investors, which we are actively courting. Our Kickstarter goal will allow us to start production on Grinder this August. The pre-sale of streaming copies (to be available upon completion) is a relatively new way of financing a project. Traditionally pre-sales have only been available regionally and not to the end audience member. Stretch Goals at $50,000 we will be able to increase the number of International Film Festival submissions we do and hopefully bring Grinder to a big screen near you. at $100,000 we will be able to release the film in two major cities for a week (markets to be announced). concept photo by Brandon Ruckdashel

title: Paradigm Shift: Chinatown - A New Animated Short
description: UPDATE: BIG NEWS! We now have a voice cast! Kate McAllister may be one of the best detectives in Chicago, but when she arrives in Chinatown looking for a dangerous suspect, her search goes sideways and unleashes a monster under her skin. Her world is about to change forever! Modern police thriller collides with the paranormal in Paradigm Shift: Chinatown , a thrilling new animated short film based on the cult comic Paradigm Shift . Chinatown adapts an exciting, pivotal scene from the comic into animated, technicolor glory. Featuring all the elements for a great action film—action-packed kung fu fights, chase scenes, a beautiful Chicago setting, a brand new soundtrack, and best of all— a full voice cast! Concept render for the film. Original comic panel used as storyboard. The first PARADIGM SHIFT film, RESTLESS SLEEP , by original series creator Dirk I. Tiede was released in summer of 2023 on YouTube and was wildly successful there, with over 600K views to date. Animated and rendered in Blender and finished in Adobe After Effects as a solo effort, it proved that creating an independent film with a minimal budget and the work of a single creator was possible! Like the original, Chinatown will be animated in Blender and feature an original soundtrack. Unlike the original, this time there will be a full voice cast, and we’re putting a small team together make the project happen! MEET THE TEAM Dirk I. Tiede —Director and Lead Animator. Creator of the Paradigm Shift graphic novel series. He previously ran a Kickstarter to print a 20th Anniversary Edition of the comic. This will be his fourth fully animated project, including two projects for the Storiaverse App — This House and Character Assassin . Dirk will also be the composer of the music. He wrote the soundtrack for Restless Sleep, as well as worked as one of the lead musicians for the podcast Greater Boston . Alexander Danner —Sound Designer. Provided sound for Restless Sleep , This House , and Character Assassin . Also co-creator of the podcast Greater Boston , writer for ElfQuest: The Audio Movie and sound designer for a number of other podcast series, including The Amelia Project . James Oliva —Casting/Voice Director. Provided voice direction for all three seasons of The Land Whale Murders , as well as creating the critically acclaimed experimental psychedelic noir podcast What's The Frequency? . Nina Nichols —Assistant Animator & Compositor. Assistant Compositor on Character Assassin . Owen Serre —Assistant Rigger and Modeler. Adrianna Palleschi —Production Assistant & Social Media Manager Danielle Beckmann —Associate Producer. Actress and producer known for Tiki Bar Funeral Home (2023), Sam & Kiki (2022), and Liza Anonymous (2021). (NEW!) MEET THE CAST: Dayeanne Hutton will play Detective Kate McAllister. Dayeanne's a veteran video game voice actor from the Life is Strange series, and starred in the Emmy Award-winning show, Emma Approved . Zach Valenti will play Detective Mike Stuart. Zach's a veteran from the podcast fiction world who got his start on the award-winning science fiction comedy series Wolf 359 .  He's been featured in numerous podcasts including the Bright Sessions , Our Fair City , The Once And Future Nerd , Taking Initiative , Under Pressure , and Greater Boston . He’s also a member of Long Story Short , the creative team behind Time:Bombs , Unseen , and Zero Hours . Peter Hu will play a number of roles in the supporting cast. Peter is also a podcast fiction veteran. Gloria Tsai will play the  Hostess and provide some additional background voices for film. MAKING IT HAPPEN The script is complete. Pre-production has already begun, including creating the main characters, modeling the sets, and rendering concept artwork. James and Danielle are on the case to cast our voice talent, so we can record the dialogue before timing the animation begins. However, most importantly, the animated proof of concept trailer is already done! The project will be animated and rendered entirely in Blender , with final compositing and finish work in Adobe After Effects. While some of the budget will go towards the purchase of 3D assets such as props and sets, there will be NO generative A.I. used in the production of this film. It will be entirely done with the blood, sweat, and tears of the artists themselves. Owen and Nina are currently assisting Dirk in creating props and sets in pre-production, and Adrianna is working behind the scenes to help organize, create promotional artwork and social media content with Dirk, and provide general assistance for the production. Kate's character rig in Blender. Test render of a Chinatown street set. Like Restless Sleep , the soundtrack will be composed and recorded mostly by Dirk, though he may bring in a few musical guests to help contribute as well. James will lead the recording sessions with the actors, with technical assistance by Alexander as needed. Once all are satisfied with the performances, tracks will be passed to Dirk to start animating. Alexander will work concurrently with Dirk to provide foley and ambient sound for each scene as we go. Main production of the animation will proceed after the close of this campaign, proceeding through the winter. Dirk will be doing the vast majority of the animation work (this is his happy place!), with Nina stepping in to help composite the final shots. We will be posting our progress behind the scenes here in the Kickstarter updates, as well as on social media, and possibly some YouTube tutorials along the way. The process of making an animated film is very complex, but also really fun and interesting, and we want to share it with you as we go. The runtime for the film will be about 8-10 minutes. We estimate about 8 months production time total wrapping up in the spring of 2025 for the with an eye towards a summer release. We plan for a live local premiere in the Boston area, a live streamed online premiere, and will take the film on the festival circuit afterwards. WHERE YOUR MONEY WILL GO: Dirk Tiede is putting up the first $6000 of the budget out of his own pocket to fund the film, which will cover about two thirds of the cost of voice talent, sound design, casting, animation and production assistance. We’re asking for an additional $6000 to help cover the remainder of the film budget, as well as the expenses of the Kickstarter itself—taxes, fees, and the production of the rewards. If we exceed that goal, it will mean more budget for our production and animation assistants, and bonuses for cast and crew if we meet our stretch goal targets. Here’s the breakdown of the budget: 10% Bonus to Cast & Crew! (And Dirk breathes a sigh of relief as the budget is fully funded!) We’ll rent out a local movie theater for a full theatrical premiere! We’ll animate a new post-credits scene! Plus an additional 20% bonus to Cast & Crew! CONCLUSION Paradigm Shift: Chinatown is by far the biggest, most complex animated project we’ve done to date, but based on our experiences with Restless Sleep , This House , and Character Assassin , as well as Dirk, James, and Alexander’s experiences with previous Kickstarters, we know this one is entirely within reach. And we’re really excited to bring the world of Paradigm Shift to the big screen. All we need is you! REVIEWS & TESTIMONIALS FOR PARADIGM SHIFT TESTIMONIALS FOR RESTLESS SLEEP Production Gallery: Concept render for the film. Original comic panel used as a storyboard. Just a quick look behind the scenes to see what we've already accomplished! Setting up Kate's character rig in Blender. Turnaround test render of Kate's model. Test run cycle Test renders of the pool hall set. Here's a few more comparisons between the comic and the film: Restaurant interior in the original comic vs test render

title: 2023 Woori Show Chuseok Special
description: Woori Show Needs YOU! Yes, you! We are creating an extra special episode to celebrate Chuseok this year.  We want to honor this traditional holiday with a brand new music video to share with our family and friends. 2023 has been a pivotal year for us: we premiered two amazing videos on YouTubeKids that have been viewed 3.7 million times all over the world AND grew our community of collaborators, viewers and supporters 5x over the past 6 months! Help us keep the Woori Show love going! We need your support to keep creating fun, joyful educational content. Please donate so we can share our Chuseok traditions and memories with the world. With your help, we can have our BIGGEST premiere yet! Once we reach our goal budget of $15,000, we can create a special episode that includes the following videos: It’s Chuseok, It’s Chuseok, Time To Celebrate: Song & Dance Songpyeon Making Recipe Video Traditional Korean Folktale: Chuseok’s Moon Rabbit Sharing Our Grandparents’ Stories: Preserving Korean American History Thank you for your support - we can't wait to celebrate with you!

title: Categories
description: Introducing Gingham and Gazebo Travel Line Introduction Why Back Now Gazebo Gazebo: How to Play Rulebooks are not final. Gazebo: Components Gazebo: Upgrades Gazebo: Why You'll Love It The Best Domino Game, Ever : Dominos are such a satisfying game piece — the way they feel in your hand and nestle together on the board — but few games do them justice. We set out to publish the greatest domino game ever created … and boy howdy is Gazebo a worthy contender. The game is dead simple — play a domino from your hand next to any other on the board — but the strategic depth is oh so satisfying to uncover. Play with Anyone, Anywhere : Gazebo is our most approachable strategy game yet. It can easily be played with your partner, your parents, your co-workers, or your friends whether they are casual or hobbyist gamers. Thanks to the compact size and travel case, you can take Gazebo on the go and play on any nearly flat surface in roughly 30 minutes. A Masterful Remaster: Our team has played over 200 Reiner Knizia designs and researched even more. Qin was one of the absolute strongest hidden gems that we uncovered, but it clearly needed a careful and loving makeover. We did a deep analysis on the strengths and weaknesses of the design and then worked closely with Reiner Knizia to help it reach its full potential. Most notably, we concocted a more appealing theme, made the production more compact and portable, minimized the swingy luck of the draw, increased the variety of gameplay features across new maps, and introduced a new partnership mode. Gazebo is yet another Crown Jewel worthy to stand alongside the titans in its remastered game line (Zoo Vadis, Cat Blues: The Big Gig, SILOS, and EGO). There’s a reason Reiner Knizia rates this game as one of his “Top 10 designs ever.” We can’t wait for you to enjoy it. An Inviting Garden Vibe: Thanks to the incredible talent of Alisha Giroux, Gazebo presents a beautiful botanical sensation across four unique garden boards. This game looks as classy as it plays. With stackable gazebo figures surrounded by lush garden terrain, you’ll find it criminally easy to get people interested in playing Gazebo. Gingham Gingham: How to Play Rulebooks are not final. Gingham: Components Gingham: Upgrades Gingham: Why You'll Love It Tile Placement Ant-ics Inspired by Trick Taking: The creation of Gingham was inspired by trick taking card games, and this has resulted in a wonderfully unique strategy game. The lead player determines which side of the board that all players must play on each round. In other words, all players must follow the led “suit.” Whoever places their queen closest to the star (in the most valuable position of the led side) becomes the leader of the next round. The catch is that you cannot deploy your ant beyond the stitch, and the rows that are closer to the star offer less options. Do you opt for a better turn order position for next round, or more flexibility for this round? A Highly Interactive Game of Confection Connections: Players are racing to connect matching sweets to score big points. Can your ant colony snatch up that valuable cupcake before your rivals assemble their chain? By fully surrounding a sweet token or stack, you can claim it as your own stockpile for major scoring. But it’s possible for another player to steal your stockpile if they can surround your stockpile, and that’s even easier to accomplish if they can carry your stockpile away with a clever connection of ants. Jockeying for turn order can become painfully crucial when it means the difference between triumph and defeat. You can even bump rival ants from their spaces, but be careful: a bumped ant can be placed on any open space on the board! Hatch Clever Schemes via Chocolate Abilities: It’s important to snatch up as many sugar cubes as you can because these can be spent on powerful abilities on the chocolate board. These rule-breaking effects allow you to execute brilliant maneuvers and make thrilling comebacks. A Genuine Ant Game Played on a Picnic Blanket: What happens when you abandon a bunch of sweets on a gingham blanket outside? It attracts a swarm of ants, of course! Gingham is both charming and engaging for any group of 2-4 players by providing a thematic experience of stockpiling sweets. Bundle and Save Shipping USA : At the time of the pledge manager (late Q3/early Q4 2025), a portion of the current tariffs will be added to shipping costs (if today's tariffs — 145% — remain unchanged, that equates to roughly $4 per game). While we hope to keep the $4 US shipping rate, the tariff situation may make that impossible. But if we have to increase the shipping rate a bit for backers, then that means we'll also have to increase the retail prices of the games when they release, so you are still getting the best deal by backing now instead of paying higher prices later. In the case of tariffs being added to shipping, we still believe $8 shipping for one game or $12 shipping for the bundle is competitive and below industry average for shipping. During the pledge manager, we will also be collecting sales tax in these states: AZ, CA, CO,  GA, IL, IN, KS, KY, MD, MI, MN, MO, NC, NJ, OH, TN, PA, UT, VA, WA, and WI. EU : VAT will be collected additionally in the pledge manager. Your games will ship from Germany. No taxes are charged at the time of delivery. UK: VAT will be collected additionally in the pledge manager. Your games will ship from the UK. No taxes are charged at the time of delivery. Canada : GST will be collected additionally in the pledge manager. Your games will freight directly to Canada from China (no USA tariffs) and then ship from within Canada. No taxes are charged at the time of delivery. Australia and New Zealand : No GST will be collected. Your games will ship from Australia. No taxes are charged at the time of delivery. Rest of the World : No taxes will be collected in the pledge manager. Taxes may be due when your games are delivered. Your games will ship from China or USA. We realize the shipping price is high, but that reflects our costs. Timeline Delivery date will vary by country. The Team

title: Categories
description: Rome, 150 AD—a world of danger, faith, and untold discoveries. As a scribe entrusted with preserving the sacred Letters of the New Testament, your mission is clear: navigate the empire, gather these fragile parchments, and ensure their survival. But this journey is not just about collecting texts—it’s about endurance, strategy, and the choices you make along the way. With no predetermined path, you carve your own destiny across an open-world map. Will you seek refuge in secret safe houses? Work the bustling markets to replenish your supplies? Outmaneuver Roman soldiers who threaten to silence the Word? Every decision alters your course, shaping a unique experience each time you play. Your provisions are sparse—a satchel with parchment, ink, and enough bread and fish for the road. Yet their faith burns brightly. As one of these scribes, you must navigate the empire, planning your journey carefully. Your supplies will run low, requiring you to work in markets, like the Apostle Paul, to replenish them. In the game, you'll be carrying essential supplies for your journey. Each letter has varying costs, making strategic planning crucial. Supply limits are in place, and each market offers unique opportunities—so choose wisely where to trade and stock up for your travels. Forge your own Journey There are multiple starting points each at a Gospel location and countless paths to choose to take. Each game presents a fresh opportunity to devise strategies that can lead to victory or a new setback. After playing this game countless times, we continually discover new routes and tactics to enhance our gameplay. Will You Survive? Beware—the roads are treacherous, and danger lurks at every turn! Robbers prowl the pathways, ready to strike, while lions lie in wait, their roar echoing across the empire. Each time you cross their path, the roll of the die will determine your fate. Will you outmaneuver the cunning thieves or escape the jaws of the mighty beasts? Divine Favor on Your Journey Every step of your journey is shaped by faith, strategy, and the choices you make—but when blessings come your way, they can turn the tide in unexpected ways! Each time you collect a Gospel, you receive a powerful Blessing Card, handpicked by you, to aid your mission. Will your blessing shield you from danger, doubling your market earnings, or grant you quick travel? The right card at the right moment can be the key to survival, offering divine protection, resources, or a much-needed advantage when trials arise. Choose wisely, use them strategically, and let your blessings guide you. In Letters of the Word , every card matters—and the path to victory is paved with faith and careful planning! The Wildcard in Your Journey! Every great adventure thrives on the unknown—without an element of chance, a game becomes predictable, a straight path to victory. That’s why we’ve introduced Manna Cards , inspired by the Hebrew phrase "What is this?" —because every draw is a surprise! These powerful cards can bless your journey or test your resolve , adding twists that demand quick thinking and adaptability. Will fortune favor you, or will a challenge reshape your strategy? In Letters of the Word , every card holds the potential to shift the tides of fate. Are you ready to embrace the unexpected? Tom G 1820 is thrilled to partner with retailers of all sizes! We believe that games have the power to bring people together, spark imagination, and create unforgettable moments. That’s why we’re excited to work with both small independent shops and large retail chains to make our games accessible to players everywhere. Whether you’re a local game store passionate about community or a major retailer looking for unique and engaging products , we’re ready to collaborate and bring something special to your shelves. Let’s make great gaming experiences happen— together. Reach out to us and let’s explore how we can work together! Help us with the final piece! We're passionate about designing and selling board games that inspire joy and family bonding. Our goal is to create innovative games that are not only fun but imbued with Christian values. Our first game takes players on a journey with scribes in the Roman Empire as they work to make copies and spread the Bible. Joel, the main founder of The Letters of the Word, embarked on a profound journey rooted in prayer and divine inspiration. As he sought God's guidance, a revelation unfolded, illuminating not just the game itself but also the vision for a company dedicated to spreading faith and joy through play. Together with his wife, Kara, they laid the groundwork for what would eventually flourish into the game we see today. Recognizing the need for collaboration, God placed it on Joel's heart to invite Bubby and Amber to join this exciting venture. United by their shared passion for faith and family, they set out to create a game that would inspire and bring people closer to God, fostering connections through each roll of the dice and draw of a card. The Game evolved and the families spent many late nights in development, but each time they met, God pressed the game further and further to completion. Now with the game at completion we invite you to join us and experience the fun and excitement of The Letters of the Word. Our Manufacturer Hero Time is making shipping faster and smoother than ever. Most packages will go straight from the factory to our incredible backers, ensuring fast and direct delivery! And for those in central Kentucky, we’re offering free local pickup at our home church in Taylor County once we receive our first shipment. Whether near or far, our commitment is getting this game straight to you! To ensure you get the most reliable and cost-effective shipping solutions, we are partnered with PrimeShip , a logistics provider trusted by major clients, including Walmart buyers. Their expertise in global freight logistics helps ensure smooth and timely delivery of your games worldwide. During this campaign we can only offer this game in the US, Canada, UK, and EU. As our business expands we will be bringing this game to the rest of the world and in many languages. Shipping costs are based on 2025 estimates provided by our shipping partners. We have subsidized these estimated costs partly when calculating the above pricing. Naturally, we’ll work with our partners to make the shipping as low as possible but prices may still increase slightly due to market fluctuations. Transparency, Commitment, and Your Support - We know that tariffs on goods manufactured in China are unpredictable right now. If tariffs don’t settle at a reasonable level, we’re committed to keeping the cost as low as possible with our U.S. backers. Tariff charges will be calculated in the pledge manager when shipping is finalized, and you’ll have the option to proceed or receive a refund (minus platform costs). Refund Policy During Crowdfunding: Adjust or cancel your pledge anytime—you’re only charged at the end of a successful campaign. 48 Hour Window After Shipping Cost Notification: Need to cancel? No problem. Full refunds are available for up to 48 hours post-shipping cost notification, no questions asked. Pledge Management & Fulfillment Pledge Management Begins a few weeks after the campaign—this is when you’ll provide your shipping address and pay for shipping and taxes. Watch for reminders. Game Production & Fulfillment: Once production begins, refunds will no longer be available. Make sure your pledge is finalized so we can get your game to you. Post-Fulfillment Support: You must follow updates and track your shipment. If you don’t contact us within 6 months of our fulfillment announcement, you agree that we’ve completed our obligations. Terms & Conditions By pledging, you agree to the following: The final look and materials of the rewards may differ from what was shown during the campaign. You are responsible for confirming your correct address, pledge and submitting payment, shipping, VAT/taxes, and any other applicable costs. Shipping title and risk passes to you once your reward is delivered to a carrier. If shipping outside friendly regions, you are responsible for import duties and correct address information. We truly appreciate your support—if you have any questions, reach out to us anytime. Let’s bring this game to life together. We are staged to production We’ve partnered with Hero Time, a powerhouse in game manufacturing, known for their state-of-the-art machines, premium raw materials, and cutting-edge processes. This means Letters of the Word will be crafted with precision, durability, and the highest quality standards—just as we envisioned. Want a glimpse into their expertise? Check out their web page https://herotime1.com/ and see why they’re the perfect fit for bringing this game to life! The journey from concept to reality is almost complete—are you ready to play? More Information For more information and to look at the game in full or read the rule book please visit our website at https://www.tomg1820.com/the-letters-of-the-word/

title: ⭐ STAR RUNE ⭐
description: The game is also available as a Steam Demo here ! :D Hi, I'm Quinlan and I'm on a mission to make learning fun. In 2017 I became a father and a few years later I was inspired when I saw a kids math show (Numberblocks) teach my kids to do square roots before they were in kindergarten. Since then, I've found I have a knack for teaching things in fun ways. Serious Games are games that are designed to teach, and I'm on a mission to see how far we can push this concept. Star Rune is a Serious Game that teaches typing , chemistry , and more ! It's good for the whole family and is fun to play at all levels; even if you've never typed before in your life! ⭐ GAMEPLAY In Star Rune, you're The Last Star in Cyberspace ! Type and slash through hordes of Evil Letters to save the galaxy! Wield 12 Legendary Swords and you unlock new Heroes. Collect all 118 Elements and use them to craft Runes (Chemcials / Alloys) which will upgrade your stats! . . . . . Much, Much, More! Use [Space], [Tab], [Caps], [Shift], [F1-12] to perform even more techniques, Slow Fall, Fast Fall, Meteor, Ground Pound, Ceiling Charge, Shift, Shift Spin, Quick Switch, etc... There will also be EPIC Boss Fights , Rune Crafting , Cookie Power-Ups, and some other special goodies . But those features are currently under construction. ⭐ PLAY & LEARN Learn Typing 1. Every stroke is rewarding. Every time the player presses a key, they move through the level a little bit further. There’s an explosion. There are letters falling apart. Rewards being counted up. 2. No Rush. Your character auto-deflects enemy lasers and is invincible. The challenge is not seeing IF you will make it through but HOW FAST can you make it through. 3. Natural Typing. Most other games require you to hold WASD or arrow keys down for the majority of the game. Not only is this bad ergonomics, but it’s horrible for learning proper typing technique. In Star Rune, you do real typing to move. And the spacebar is well integrated into gameplay in a frequency that matches typical typing scenarios in real life. 4. Keyboard Layout Awareness Drilled In With "Battle Zones". During battles, letters will spawn in the exact position they appear on the keyboard. This will drill over and over the keyboard layout and letter/character positions through repeated playthroughs. 5. Typing Tips/Instruction. For early levels, before a level loads, the player will be shown a brief typing tip related to characters they are working on. 6. Color Coded Letters to Match Keyboard Layout. Each finger is assigned a color (you’ll be able to change these in the settings menu). Characters that are able to be typed get highlighted. Those highlight colors match each character’s corresponding finger color. 7. On Screen Keyboard Guide. The player can toggle an on-screen keyboard guide (that shows the proper finger placement for the next highlighted key) by pressing CAPS or by selecting this in the settings menu. 8. Custom Keyboard Layouts. Players can create a 10 x 4 keyboard grid. With the furthest left and right columns being used for the pinkies. These options will change 9. Stat Tracking. You’ll be able to track your WPM, errors, total characters typed, and many other stats. 10. Grow Into It. I wanted to make sure Star Rune felt fun to play for my daughter who didn’t know how to type at all. But as someone who can type over 100wpm, I made sure the game would feel fun for me as well. Because of this, there is no point where you feel like you’ve “outgrown” the game. It just gets more exciting and motivating to play as you improve. Learn Chemistry 1. Levels = Elements. Each level is named after an element. Level 1 is Hydro Dungeon (Hydrogen with a "dun" sound in the middle haha) and work your way through the entire periodic table. My favorite level name is " Level 35: The Bro Mine" hahaha 2. Bosses = Elementals. The Bosses at the end of each level are all giant Elementals... but not earth, wind, fire elementals like in most games.... no no no no no... They're REAL elementals, represented by their respective Element Symbols; each of them is branded with their atomic number for extra association. 3. Collect All 118 Elements. In most games, you just collect copper, silver, and gold. That's great, but why stop at just 3 elements!? In Star Rune, you'll get the chance to collect all 118 discovered elements. (we can add more we they discover the next ones). 4. Craft Chemicals + Alloys. Kids love crafting systems in games. Well Chemistry is perfect for crafting! You'll use the elements you collect to craft chemicals and alloys (which you can equip to upgrade your stats) 5. Color Coded Environments. Each family of the periodic table gets their own recurring environment and color scheme. i.e. the first column / Alkali metals are all red with volcanic environments. Alkali Earth is all orange with desert environments, etc.. Right now, they're strictly based on family/column, but I could modify it later to represent classification instead. 6. Names = Mnemonic Devices. There will be legendary swords and heroes in the game, and their names will help teach element positions on the periodic table. Sword names, like LiNaK or BrIAtTs, are all vertical mnemonics and Hero names, like TaWReOs or Al "SiPS" ClArK, are all horizontal mnemonics. I also have some diagonal up/down mnemonics, like SiAsTe AtOg, which are reserved for names of spells and wizards. You can combine these mnemonic devices in a modular way (starting anywhere at all) to complete the entire Periodic Table like a jigsaw puzzle. 7. Type Out Facts! Science/Chemistry Facts will be typed throughout the levels as you play them! I'm really excited about this because there's so much that can be taught this way. With everything else I mentioned, it's amazing repetition and reinforcement, but through typing, there are so many cool facts and scientific ideas which can be introduced to the player. More Learning 1. Morse Code. In the game’s lore, there is an ancient language called “Old Morse” which is really just Morse Code. Lots of relics and artifacts in the game will have this “Old Morse” inscription around them. Also, there will be an alternate skin for the letter enemies which will display them in morse code. And there will be secret Morse Code messages in the game, like the twinkling stars in the background, that unlock bonus levels. 2. Foreign Language. There are 7 worlds in the game; one for each periodic of the periodic table. Each world will have a foreign language attached to it, but these languages will real languages like Japanese, Arabic, Korean, etc.. the game won’t actively be teaching you these, but it will be a fun opportunity to practice some of your linguistic skills! Also, the game will be localized to many different languages so you can practice your typing in different languages. 3. Reading / Literacy. Typing helps with literacy. There won’t be a heavy focus on this in the first version of the game, but in the second version, we plan to have a very strong focus on teaching reading through typing. More info on that later! 4. More! If we get enough funding, we’d like to create a custom level editor and a community levels menu where you can make and share your own levels. This opens the door to tons of levels where you’re typing out facts about all sorts of subjects. And because the game has high replay value, players can get these facts drilled into their heads without even realizing it. The sky is the limit. ⭐ UNIVERSE Star Rune has a lore-rich universe and a character-driven story! You'll journey across 7 worlds (the 7 periods of the periodic table) and battle on 118 Levels , defeating 118 Elemental Bosses ! As you go, you'll unlock 12 heroes , each wielding a unique Legendary Sword . You'll collect 118 elements and forge over 360 magic Runes (chemicals / alloys). THE ENEMIES: ⭐ MISSION Look at the stars in the sky. It’s a sea of tiny, arbitrary dots. But at some point we assigned these dots to characters and put those characters into stories. These stories made reading the stars fun, and by reading the stars, we could journey across the entire world. Today's entertainment is filled with brain rot, meant only to addict you and only useful for passing time. But I believe entertainment can be so much more. One day, my daughter embarked on a new journey: Learning To Type. But she found it to be incredibly BOOOORING. 'Typing programs' just made it more boring. So I sought out all the typing games I could find. But they all disappointed her… Too complicated, too stressful, bad graphics, no story, unnatural typing, etc..  Some of them were outright inappropriate. So she stopped playing and gave up on her journey. I'm creating Star Rune to keep that journey alive. I wanted to make something with grit. Something with emotion. Something with soul. Something timeless. Something I can be proud to leave behind when I'm gone. My mission is to make every journey fun, no matter how long or hard it may be. Whether you're just starting your own typing journey or you've been at it for a while, I hope Star Rune makes it a lot more fun. ⭐ FUNDING The Star Rune prototype has a lot of fun mechanics, but it's just the start. There's still so much to do. The following features haven't been implemented at all yet: Boss Fights. Full Story (+including cutscenes).
