Custom Dialogue System (type anything; your input will be referenced in the game) Rune Crafting. Additional Playable Heroes. The following features are 'sort of' there but need a lot more work still: The In-game ART!! (this is a big one) Equip Elements (Elements will give stat boosts, not just Runes) Power Cookies Ultimate Attacks Saving / Loading Full / Final Level Designs ...much more! And the following are wish-list features we'd LOVE to implement if we can get enough funding: Custom Level Editor + Community Levels Menu Multiplayer Races Multiplayer Co-Op Multiplayer Versus Big Cash-Prize Tournament(s) This is how we plan to allocate the Kickstarter funds: 50% -> Graphics / Art. 30% -> Marketing + Misc. 20% -> Fund Existing Development The number one goal of this Kickstarter is to fund the creation of in-game art assets. The second priority is to fund the systems development so we can finalize all the features listed above. The rest of the money will go towa r d marketing. (+ a small amount for legal, tax, etc..). For timeline, the goal is to have the full game finished by Fall of 2026. It will be released on Steam, and development will begin immediately after on a web version that can be played on all devices. ⭐ REWARDS *Higher tiers inherit all rewards from lower tiers. *All tiers will appear in the credits but each tier will appear more prominently than the previous tiers. *All names, words, and custom messages must be E-rated and not contain any offensive language. All custom content is subject to developer approval, light editing if necessary, and placement at the developer’s discretion. *If you opt into a tier with a physical reward (Table of Elementals Poster), shipping will be charged after the campaign. $10 - NEON • Neon Credits. • The Full Game You'll receive a Steam download key to get Star Rune on Steam on Launch. $29 - COPPER • Copper Credits • Discord VIP You'll be given a Discord VIP Role. VIP Discord members will have access to a VIP-only Discord channel. VIP members will largely shape the future of the game, with special VIP Polls and other discussions / input from VIP members. • The Full Original Soundtrack The final soundtrack will likely have 50 to 70 songs; each will be provided both as mp3 and WAV files. $47 - SILVER • Silver Credits • Early Access Further updates to the Star Rune prototype will only be made available to Silver Members and above. At this tier, you'll have access to alpha and beta testing along with the official Early Access on Steam. • MIDI Files You'll get MIDI Files for each of Star Rune's main themes/motifs, including the chord progressions and leads. • Sheet Music The MIDI files for each theme will also be made available as a digital copy of the sheet music which you can download and/or print. $79 - GOLD • Gold Credits. • Unreleased Music. Over the last 3 years, I've made a lot of music for Star Rune which didn't quite match the vibe or fit in exactly how I hoped. There are many songs which simply don't fit the pacing of the game. There are over 100 of these and it may grow larger before final release. Some of these songs are more finished and some are ideas that ended up getting scrapped. As a Gold backer, you'll get access to all of these. • Gold Skins. You'll get special skins for each of the 12 playable Heroes in the game along with a special GUI. You'll be able to toggle these on/off in the settings and they'll only be available to Gold Backers (and higher). These skins are not yet designed, but we'll take input and inspiration from Gold Backers (and higher) on the Discord server and make them look super cool for you. $150 - DIAMOND • Diamond Credits. • Table of Elementals Poster This is a Periodic Table of Elements poster, but where all the elements have been replaced by their corresponding Elemental Boss from the game. This is a 36" x 24" poster... a super fun way to learn the elements and probably hilarious to show off to school teachers and chemists. $200 - EMERALD • Emerald Credits. • Poster Signature / Message You'll receive a special version of the Table of Elementals poster from the diamond tier, with a special section where I (the creator) will sign it! This is not a second poster; just an upgrade of the previous poster. If you'd like an included message, you can tell me a little about yourself or what you'd like me to say and I'll make it happen! :D $250 - SAPPHIRE • Sapphire Credits. • Custom name/word in a level. You can provide a single name or word (no more than 20 characters long) which will be spelled out by Azki in one of the official levels in the game; most likely in a bonus route in a level. $300 - RUBY • Ruby Credits. • Custom message in a level You can provide any message you want to be included in the game (120 max characters) which will be spelled out by Azki in one of the official levels in the game; most likely in a bonus route in a level. This is an upgrade/replacement for the "Custom name/word in a level" reward. $1500 - LEGENDARY (Limit: 3) • Legendary Credits • Full Trackouts + Remix Rights You'll receive the trackouts for the Star Rune Main Theme (which you will hear on the Title Menu). The final version will likely have between 50 - 100 tracks (stems). You won't own the rights to the song, but you'll be able to remix the song and you'll be given the rights to any works you may produce as a result. (you can think of this as a sound lease/license from Splice or similar services). Have fun remixing, or just have fun studying how each song was made. Your choice! • Extended Custom Message Your "custom message in a level" reward will be upgraded from 120 characters to 300 total characters, to be spelled out by Azki in an official level. • Custom Rune. You'll be able to name a custom Mythic Rune which will appear in the game. Most Runes are chemicals / minerals / alloys, but you can come up with whatever name you want (as long as it's not offensive and doesn't break any IP laws). I'll also take your input on how you'd like the Rune to affect player mechanics. • Morse Code Message on Title Screen You create a message (500 character limit), which will appear on the Title Screen as a coded message in Morse Code. This message may be written out like this .-.. .. -.- .   - .... .. ... or it may use a special custom morse code font for the game or it might be blinked out by the stars in the background. ⭐ COMMUNITY Over the last few years, we've had the privilege of taking Star Rune out into the community to do lots of playtesting, and the response has been better than we hoped for. We also would love to grow our online community as well, so please join us! If you need to message us directly, our email is: StarRuneCompany@gmail.com and our website is https://StarRune.net ⭐ TEAM Special Thanks Typovrak - Web Development for StarRune.net Miguel Junieles - Coloring Assistant Neira Mantis - Promo / Concept Artist Kizupoko - Logo Sketch Joana Materek - Character Sketches

title: Project_Basement_Dating: THE OekakiPunk Maidcore VisualNovel
description: PROJECT_BASEMENT_DATING:-: THE Oekaki-Punk Maidcore Visual Novel / Adventure Game You'll Live , Breathe and Struggle as just another child named Toshikai. Affected by the tradition "Nexos Utlience" , an unwritten law of kicking children out of home to fend for themselves in the northern closed city of L22. Under L22's eternal nightsky , t he Moon talks to some , cats teleport , and after stumbling across a cold shriveling purple haired drug addict you are kidnapped on catback to the underground orphanage called THE BASEMENT Within this place you'll mix Drinks for maids, Drugs for the sick and. . . not so sick , Do autopsies on demons and L22 residents alike, Investigate murder scenes , Solve the internal Struggles and conspiracies of the Moss Kingdom , Fix the old internet , Manage demon controlled territories , take a deep dive into someone else's memories , ----------------------------------------------------------------- Psst! You! Yeahh you!! Thanks for reading between the lines :) give the DEMO a spin eh? :D ----------------------------------------------------- " It's Va11-hall-a on drugs mixed with monkey island " - quote from the Sukeban Games interview: https://sukeban.moe/index.php/2023/03/04/creative-blood-project- basement-dating/ " Stretch Goals:-: THE WORLD OF PROJECT BASEMENT DATING:-: Project_Basement_Dating Highlights:-: 1.) Pure unapologetic FUCKIN' Maidcore! * 10 Maidcore artists will be featured within the full release of the game , each of them with 20-30 different songs on the radio. You'll be able to find extra tracks here and there in the world which you'll be able to collect and mail to the in-game radio station. The artists included: 2.) Huge explorable world- You'll be able to explore around 200-300 different places within the full release of the game. From forests and abandoned temples to nuclear power plants, sunk submarines, mossball kingdoms, slaughterhouses, memorials, statues etc. 3.) Vast amount of minigames Project_Basement_Dating Demo in game footage of the implemented mixing system. *You'll be able to roll, pour , MIX 25-25 different Drugs and Drinks . Some for medicine, some for. . . other things. PBD Autopsy Mechanic !!!CONCEPT!!! a lot of details are missing from this from the details of the organs to mechanical stuff * You'll do Life saving surgeries some nights and on others. . . it will be to find out what ended it. PBD Magic Casting Mechanic !!!CONCEPT!!! a lot of details are missing from this from the details of the sigils to lists, proper effects, etc. * You'll cast different types of magick, for different places and unto different faces. Sometimes as medicine , Sometimes as a curse , Sometimes as to alter something to be useful again. But do remember. To get something. . . you'll need to give something. * You'll puzzle together crime scenes based off on corpses, blood samples, and other clues * You'll re-start radio stations , do a bit of cable management, install an OS the old DOS way And many MANY more stuff. 4.) Extremely detailed and dynamic emotions and reactions Yakui The Maid Full Release Mouth Only Expression Testing (10 out of 25 mouths) *From a rough start to a very pleasant one, each characters all express themselves vastly. Non-verbal communication is a big part of the game. They each have 25x30x6 different expressions 4.) Extremely detailed relationship dynamics. *The maids, the children, the hollows, the moss, even the demons will react really differently depending on your deeds. Be it something you have done to them personally, or something that you wouldn't even have thought would affect others. 5.) The environment changes with your decisions. . . *and so will time, but if i said anything more about that, it would spoil your initial ( Around 10 hours in ) reactions hehehe >:) Decisions, Decisions, Decisions. . . Project_Basement_Dating Demo's possibilities, paths, decisions (For a proper resolution image please look for it in the discord) The Demo featured 312 different choices . Some of which were decided by previously made decisions. [ * That was only 1 and a half night In L22.*] The FULL RELEASE will feature  15x7 days so around 105 days altogether which would result around  21 840 different available decisions. I'm aware * quite ambitious*. Thankfuly i found a way to make writing this easier, while keeping it's complexity. So don't worry, this is not something impossible to pull off, just a bit time consuming. Please do remember though: Quality over Quantity is the goal. Languages N' Platforms!?:-: We intend to translate the game into as many languages as possible, however our current focus are on the following languages: *English *Russian *Spanish *Simplified Chinese *Japanese *Korean More funds will obviously result in more languages being added, such as:-: *Portuguese *Indian *German *Arabic On the matter of platforms in the case the project reaches it's funding goal: Steam,Gog,Epic Games,Playstore Which would mean a launch on both PC and Mobile for Windows,Linux and Android. However. . . In the event we reach the stretch goal of 70k dollars , we intend to port the game to: Playstation Nintendo Xbox iOS Places to follow us on !!!here!!!:-: 1,) Twitter 2,) Discord (18+ only) 3,) /r/Project_Basement_Maid/ 4,) VK WHY_KICKSTARTER!?! Because i'm not an only developer, it's not just me and a programmer. The last 3 years the community has helped IMMENSLY with support. Be it just a quick review of the game, a nice comment on discord or someplace, or making me laugh on darker nights. I want you all to be part of the game in some way! Be it an eye donation, be it monetary support, fanart, videos. i want to make sure every bit of Project_Basement_Dating bleeds and screams COMMUNITY. Instead of just another game that people will forget about in the next few weeks.

title: The Shechinah Oracle Deck
description: I am a Rabbi, Kohenet/Hebrew Priestess, Eshet Hazon/Woman of Vision and have been studying and following the path of Divine Feminine for years. I've lead congregations, made awarding-winning CD recordings, taught about angels and dreams -but nothing has held my fascination as long as Shechinah. Shechinah, the feminine Divine in Jewish tradition, is my guide, my muse, my companion and my Sister-in-the-Wind. Her stories long to be told - and brought into the light. The Shechinah Oracle Deck is my first foray into creating Oracle cards accompanying my various other projects such as two published books & six CDs released thus far. The Journey This 54-card oracle deck was inspired by the Kabbalistic concept of the Divine Feminine. The project has its roots in the legacy of female oracles in Jewish tradition, and in the long and rich history of women's rituals and traditions in Judaism. In Jewish tradition, the Shechinah is the Feminine Divine that we can experience here and now. We get glimpses of Her in action throughout the Bible. She is the indwelling presence of the Tabernacle in the desert, the presence of God that appeared over the Tent of Meeting. She is the cloud that leads the Israelites by day and the pillar of fire by night, the Flame of the burning bush, and many other physical manifestations of the Divine. The 54 cards in this deck can be used similarly to a Tarot deck. There are several different methods for interpreting the cards, which are explained in the accompanying book. The images on the cards are a wonderful tool to unlock the inner world of the psyche and make the wisdom of our ancestors available to use today. The explanation for each card contains references and sources from Jewish tradition; description  of the symbols; reflections and meditations for singular use or multi-card spreads; and upright and reversed interpretations. These cards were the result of a deep and rich journey. In the summer of 2009, Rabbi Shechinah Leah Mazaltov, friend and soul sister, invited me to teach at her congregation in Phoenix, Arizona. She invited me to “lead whatever I wanted.” I have rarely heard that message from the universe before! Most of my life people have told me what not to do. I found this the most liberating invitation I had ever received. It resonated so deeply in my soul that it called forth this project. It was really the voice of the Divine speaking to — and through — me. I had been entertaining thoughts of making oracle cards of some kind since. For years, I have loved tarot cards, angel cards, meditation cards, and oracle cards. One of my favorite spiritual practices, which I do every morning, is draw a few cards from various decks and pray over what they reveal. I had an intuitive idea to make some Kabbalah cards, not knowing fully what that even meant at the time. I made twenty cards within three months and now have made 54! Along the way I have discovered myself as an artist. I had never done any paper cutting before this project and also started painting them myself. After I painted the deck about half way through, I discovered paper and texture and wanted to restart the project from the beginning! Most of the cards have been redone at least once or twice as I improved my art. I spent a whole year just tracing & cutting the Hebrew letters and am now taking the plunge on Kickstarter. The cards have been touched up by my graphic artists, Iden Rosenthal and Scott Fray.  I've also written a book to accompany the deck involving my editors who helped me get this project to where it is today..almost ready to be released!  My husband Simcha Raphael and my children Yigdal and Hallel have been very supportive as I've often burned the midnight oil - using the magic hour. The deck is composed of 54 gold-embossed cards. Schedule What’s your plan, and what’s your schedule? December finish the final touches on editing and graphics January Production and printing Late spring in the mail! Budget What’s your budget? This project's total budget is $18,000 $5,000 for printing $ 4,000 for editing and production of the book production $2,000 Marketing $2,000 for graphic art $2,000 for final packaging & related shipping costs Stretch Goals The main stretch goal is to raise $4,000 for the production of the Shechinah Oracle Book, which is mentioned in the rewards tier. **For more information about me, please visit www.shechinah.com.

title: Red Clover Case Files: Séance Soirée
description: Red Clover Case FIles Welcome to the Red Clover Case Files: Séance Soirée, the first chapter of an episodic 2D visual novel series where you will be tasked with navigating a murder mystery , investigating crime scenes and haunted locales , interrogating a collection of bizarre but intriguing characters, and evaluating all you learn to name the real killer . Or killers . Story Freshly minted occult auditor John Tsukimori receives a strange invitation to where his like isn’t wanted: the Seance Soirée, an event hosting the biggest stars in spiritualism. Surely it's some kind of mistake, but John's free, and his sister, Julia, is out of school for the summer. Who knows? Might be fun... ...Until a real murder disrupts the morbid circus! John must now push past the smoke and mirrors of professional psychics to prove the killer is among them, and not the great beyond. Time to get to work, Detective. Play the demo Demo is available here on itch.io: Red Clover , and here on GameJolt: RCCF ! Meet the Guests Get to know our roster of strange and spectacular characters, stunningly illustrated by the incredible Denaseey ! Set the Scene Explore the gorgeous digitally painted backgrounds of the Grand Òrail , a haunted hotel in the idyllic countryside! Find Clues and Solve Puzzles Collect items and clues, question suspects and witnesses, and piece together all you know to solve the mystery! Rewards and Tiers You know a good thing when you see it, even if you don't have the dough for it just yet. Get lovely HD Wallpapers and the chance to upgrade to another tier at a later date. Limited Quantity ! As a thank you for showing up bright and early, receive Séance Soirée at 30% off , as well as all previous rewards. You made it right on time! Ready for a good mystery, receive your invite to the Séance Soirée , as well as all previous rewards. You're a part of this too, you know! It's only fair your name appears in the credits . Includes all previous rewards. It wouldn't be a video game if fashion wasn't the final boss. Play through the game with new outfits for the Siblings. Includes all previous rewards. What is a visual novel without the visuals? A dense collection of concept and final art packed together with some notes from multiple artists on this team. Includes all previous rewards. We cannot forget the gorgeous accompaniment of our original score . Includes all previous rewards. The Grand Órail is an esteemed retreat for the rich and famous. As a precaution, no one uses their real names. The guest book is filled with pseudonyms and borrowed titles -- one of which will be yours to find in the hotel registry . Includes all previous rewards. A name so nice it shows up twice! You'll additionally be featured in a special section of the credits , carved out for your executive support! Includes all previous rewards. You (or your OC!) will be found in-game as a stylized portrait with a brief missive by Adelaide herself within her hefty address book ! You can request to be a wealthy customer or psychic client. Or you can leave it up to us, if you prefer! You'll just need to provide a brief description or reference photo. Includes all previous rewards. By request: add the Digital Art Book to any tier for $15. 50+ pages of concepts, WIPs and final art, as well as unique advert edits, comics, and more! Stretch Goals Accessibility Gaming for all! We sincerely care about inclusivity and adaptability. As a global team with members in Korea, Italy and the US, we intend to have our game available in English, Korean and Italian at launch, with more localizations to follow. We're developing the bulk of our game in Ren'Py, which has a built in screenreader for the visually impaired. We're developing a color blind and dark mode option, as well as included a dyslexic-friendly font to help players continue to participate in the story! And we're committed to patching in more accessibility options for free as we become able to implement them. Meet the Team Hello! We're here to work hard, please regard us kindly! Mazzie Zumbiel (director, executive producer, line producer, financial planner, head writer, creative lead) Shannon Hay (assistant director, concept artist, CG artist, revisionist) Jonas Tintenseher (co-writer, editor, programmer) Denaseey (sprite character artist) Tess Richards (background artist) Mark Knapp Jr (composer) Jennifer Bertaggia (UI/UX artist, assets developer, accessibility consultant) We're spread out across the globe and were still able to find each other to work on this incredible project. We hope to share our individual voices with you through the dev blogs as we work!

title: Elemental Dragons Bestiary, Crafting, Lairs, Quests, & More!
description: Elemental Dragons is a collection of hardcover books and PDFs that introduce new and exciting dragons to 5E D&D. This set includes a Bestiary & Crafting Guide with over 300 new elemental dragons, detailed lore, and rules for harvesting and crafting from their remains; a rich Campaign Setting filled with dragon-dominated realms, factions, and political intrigue; a Quests & Lairs book featuring epic adventures and fully mapped lairs ready to drop into any game; and last but not least Treasure Hoard is packed with brand-new magic items tied to elemental themes. Whether you want to run an entire dragon-focused campaign, seek out powerful artifacts, or add unforgettable encounters to your game sessions, Elemental Dragons has it all! The Books Dragon Types Pledge Levels Add-Ons Stretch Goals Fulfillment

title: Favored Dice Displays
description: Hello fellow Adventurers! Welcome to Wyvern Trading Company's maiden voyage Kickstarter! We have been hopping in anticipation for months to finally reveal our new line of... "Nova" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) Favored Dice Displays focus on keeping the optimism at the table by exalting the successful dice, not punishing the bad. All of us have those bad roll nights. This display is a constant reminder that we can lift up just as much as we can put down. With other dice displays, there are few options out there. None of them look as good as your character's special dice need them to. Most are cut out of cheap wood and the burn marks from laser manufacturing aren't even sanded off. That's where we come in. "Andromeda" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) Stop letting your favorite shiny math rocks bang together in a sack with the unbecoming dice that have hurt you too many times. Their untoward demeanor may infect the few dice you still hold dear... NOT TODAY THARIZDUN. Show off your dice. Raise them up. "Aurora" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) In the "Celestial" Favored Dice Display series, we have 8 different theme options: Aurora Luna Nova Atlas Percival Andromeda Calypso Orion You will be able to select the option of which theme you want after the campaign. A  Pledge Manager will reach out to you to get this information from you. "Atlas" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) These Favored Dice Displays are something to behold... "Percival" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) Yet they only get more beautiful should you choose to upgrade it with your or your character's name in the front middle of the base plate. Personalization On Base Plate Extra Details: You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Our products are made with custom high grade acrylics, rubber grips for stability, and some Favored Dice Displays have engravings that are hand filled with color. Each Favored Dice Display comes with its own packing box insulated with crinkle paper and stamped with the Wyvern Trading Company logo. Anyone who invests $35 and up will receive a complimentary Wyvern Trading Company Sticker. On top of that, everyone who invests $75 or more will also receive a Limited Edition Wyvern Trading Company Keychain made from metallic gold acrylic with their pledge too! "Calypso" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) Stretch Goals 15k: If we reach this stretch goal, we will release 3 Fae Dice Displays available for all backers to choose to add. These will be designed and an image uploaded closer to reaching the Stretch Goal. Image Coming Soon! 20k: Unlock 3 Dwarven Dice Displays! All the Deco Style Art, Axes, Beards and short sprints you could hope for are spirited into 3 regal, powerful, and greedy designs. These will be designed and an image uploaded after reaching the 15k Stretch Goal. Image Coming Soon! 25k: If we reach the summit of 25k, you guys will unlock the darkest dice display series yet. It will be comprised of 1 of 3 themes: Cryptid - Theme based on animals that have been claimed to exist, but never proven to exist. Demonic - Even Darker, Fiery, and Hellish. Raise them up? More like RAZE your foes. Abyssal - Move over Cthulhu, we're MAD DARK now. The theme will chosen by vote on social media. So make sure to find Wyvern Trading Company on Facebook so you can be notified when you can place your vote! Image Coming Soon! Purpose of the Kickstarter: Our goal with this Kickstarter is to expand our fabrication capabilities. The funds will help our small company grow by procuring tools used for printing our own apparel, labels, bumper stickers, and static cling decals(for our next Kickstarter, shhh!), as well as help our company transition from local sales to the online frontier. "Orion" Dice Display (Dice Not Included) Shipping: While we have tried our best to estimate how much it will cost to deliver these Rewards, there is no exact shipping price for everyone. If we charged an average price, it would help some, and hurt some at the same time. With that in mind, listed  below is our best approximation for what it will take to deliver your gifts. Exact shipping costs will depend on your address and the quantity that was ordered. Final shipping costs will be calculated in BackerKit at the end of the Kickstarter and charged at that time. "Luna" Dice Display (Dice Not Included)

title: Miracle Ticket
description: Hey now! I'm Owen (aka SkeletO) and I've been a working artist for many years, working in a variety of media. I've also been a jam band fan for many years. Few things are as exciting as the energy of a jam band parking lot and Miracle Ticket brings that energy to you! Those of you familiar with my artwork are probably thinking that Miracle Ticket looks strikingly different. That's because I hired my good friend and fabric wizard Michelle Lyon (aka Haha Bonbon ) to do the art! I've been a huge fan of her hilarious felt creations for many years and it was fantastic to get to collaborate on Miracle Ticket! I designed the theme and game mechanics, and Michelle did all of the graphics. All of the graphics were hand cut and hand sewn by Michelle - the cards, the board, and the wooks themselves! Each piece is a one-off felt masterpiece. The warmth of the felt and stitching were exactly what Miracle Ticket needed. The details in these pieces is staggering! See more of Michelle's creations here : https://www.michellelyon.com/ . . Miracle Ticket includes the box, 1 cotton fabric 13"x15" game board, 4 crystals, and 54 poker sized cards. (prototype components shown above) Miracle Ticket is a U.S. only Kickstarter campaign. Shipping outside of the U.S. with a tracking number and insurance is prohibitively expensive. Anyone with a U.S. address will receive the game shipped for free! There are also 8 of Michelle's original handmade felt designs up for grabs. Once they're gone, they're gone. . . Miracle Ticket is a strategic racing game with a handful of unusual quirks. The biggest being that players can choose to move themselves OR move another player. Players immerse themselves as wooks, ravenously devouring anything and everything on their quest to find the holy grail of all jam band parking lots - a free ticket! In the realm of the jam band parking lot a free ticket is called a "miracle". . . I've always learned how to play tabletop games by playing a practice game first to see how the mechanics work. These demo game videos are animated recreations of two actual games that took place. The animations allow for a faster demonstration with much greater clarity. Demo Game 01 shows a standard race to the finish. . Demo Game 02 shows a race where Bad Vibes reverse the game! . . Miracle Ticket ships FREE to all U.S. addresses via USPS Priority Mail, tracked and insured! My goal is to have all rewards shipped by December 2026. Why not ship to other countries? Shipping with a tracking number and insurance, even to Canada is savagely expensive - 4x the cost to ship to U.S. addresses, and it goes up from there - way up. When you're paying more for shipping than the cost of the actual item being shipped, that's just silly. Shipping without a tracking number and insurance is cheaper but then there's no way to recover anything from a lost package. I take risks with my designs, not with shipping logistics.

title: Categories
description: Your board game travel and storage solution! Our most classic bag - perfect for game night! Our classic bag - perfect for the largest variety of board/piece sizes! We like to play board games. You probably do too if you’re reading this. Whip out a board game and you have an instant way to connect with people, use your mind or imagination, have some friendly competition, good conversation, or lots of laughter. It’s just plain - not boring - fun! Have you ever tried to take board games anywhere? We have! More times than we can count. Our precious board games have been through the wringer on road trips, tiny living in a camper for a while, going to a friend’s for game night, or even just when the kids get into them on the shelf. Our boxes are dented or held together with tape, some of the manuals are ripped or wrinkled, and occasionally we find ourselves missing a piece. But that’s the price you pay to actually use your games, right? We always found ourselves caught in this tension: keep our games pristine like the collection they are, or take them everywhere to maximize our fun and play them more often. “Why couldn’t we have both?” we thought. So we decided to do something about it! Choosing both meant we needed some objectives to keep us on track. After one and a half years, we are pleased to introduce the Explorer Series Board Game Bags which accomplish all three objectives! How'd we do it? Save Space. Downsizing is key; by removing games from their boxes, the space savings is enormous! Protect. Ballistic Nylon, EVA, the bag's internal frame, and rubber bumpers, all contribute to a top of the line protection status for your games. Organize. There are three compartments, each having its' own pockets, dividers, elastic, and labels. Additionally, smaller Organizer Bags with labels are included to help neatly store even the most complex array of games. Save space. Protect. Organize. THE BOULDER The Boulder front and inside views THE FOOTHILLS The Foothills front and inside views Two great styles! Q: How many games do they really hold?? A: So many games! This has to be the main thing we love about the Explorer Series Board Game Bags! They hold a ridiculous number of games! How many exactly? Games vary greatly in terms of the sq. in. of used space, and it varies even more depending on how you prefer to pack it. Take a close look at these photos below to get a good idea. We packed the bags how we would comfortably pack our games. We did not cram it full for good looks - we promise. It’s approximately 5-10 games in the Boulder and 10-20 games in the Foothills. Example: the Boulder holds 6 Ticket-to-Ride games and the Foothills holds 12. WATER RESISTANT BALLISTIC NYLON The Explorer Series is made for just that, exploring - actually putting the bags to use. We have sourced the highest quality materials to put behind our brand. 1680D Ballistic Nylon has been specifically engineered for unrivaled tear and abrasion resistance. It was created during WWII for use in military uniforms and is now found in many applications where the demand is tough. Also, it’s the material used in protective chainsaw chaps, which should speak for itself. It’s tough stuff! THREE COMPARTMENTS Each tiered bag has three compartments to maximize the organization and storage. Each compartment is approx. 1.5” H to have enough space for bigger game pieces (think the Mechs in Scythe, or the Treasures in Forbidden Island). MOVEABLE DIVIDERS When you open a compartment of an Explorer Series Board Game Bag, you have a blank canvas to customize your game storage to your specific wants. These dividers are unique because they are lined with velcro that perfectly attaches to the bottom and sides of each compartment. Meaning that the pieces you put in each section won’t slide around or move to another because the velcro ensures they are completely enclosed. It's also cool because you can attach the divider anywhere within the bag that you want. The layouts are endless! In the Foothills bag, we like to layer multiple boards on one side and make 2-3 sections on the other side to organize the corresponding pieces. LABEL SLOTS The front of each bag is equipped with label slots to help you keep track of which games are where. You want to play Carcassonne? Oh, the label says it’s in the second compartment! Once you open the bag, each Organizer Bag has its' own label slots, so you can easily see and grab everything you need to play. Stay organized with this awesome feature! ORGANIZER BAGS Take your games out of the box and pack all the pieces safely into these reusable Organizer Bags. Each one has a label slot on the front, so you can easily stay organized and ready to play. The bags are made of PVC and are leak proof, zero waste, and food grade (just in case you need a snack, right?) The frosted black color and the Beartooth Games bear in the bottom right corner make them look awesome too! There are four different dimensions - 10.5” x 7.5”, 10.5” x 4”, 5” x 7.5”, and 4” x 4.5” - so you can always find the right size to fit your needs. We like to pack cards, meeples, or tokens into the smaller ones and then put all of those inside one a little larger. This way you only have one Organizer Bag to grab when it’s time to play, and all the pieces are neatly protected inside. On Kickstarter, a variety pack of the Organizer Bags is included with the purchase of the Boulder or the Foothills. MESH POCKETS To further assist in your game organization, the inside cover of each compartment has mesh pockets (4 on the Boulder, and 8 on the Foothills). These are perfect for the small catch-all items at the end: decks of cards, dice, or smaller game pieces. ELASTIC BANDS The bottom of each compartment also has elastic bands to help secure your games. The Boulder has one in the middle and the Foothills has three spaced across the bag. These are great for keeping your boards in place or adding an extra layer of security to the pieces. RUBBER BUMPERS Each bag has rubber bumpers on the bottom that provide shock absorption, durability, and protection for your games. Your bag will have less wear-and-tear while the bumpers do the grunt work. CARRYING STRAP AND HANDLE The selected handle is large, comfortable, and flexible. It is bolted to the top of the bag for sturdy carrying of your games. Once your games are safely packed and organized inside, you can carry them around with the conveniently included carrying strap. There are so many ways you can use these bags to make your life easier and more organized, save space everywhere, and have more fun playing games wherever you go! Honestly, we know you’ll love it as much as we do. We currently keep several packed on the shelves so our games are ready to go when we are. It's also given us more space for other things (more games, anyone??) on our shelves and in the closet. Why are we launching on Kickstarter? This is a chance to start Beartooth Games with support, feedback, and enthusiasm only mustered through the rallying of a community. We want to give YOU the chance to help bring the Explorer Series Board Game Bags to life! Here are a few things you should know about Kickstarter: Our funding goal is $10,000. Which means that if we can raise $10,000 we can make this project happen! Funding on Kickstarter is all-or-nothing. You won't be charged for a pledge to our project unless we reach our funding goal by the deadline. This ensures that we will be able to deliver as promised. So how can you support our project? Here are four easy steps! United States: Flat rate shipping of $15 for any delivery in the United States. All Other Countries: For all shipping addresses outside of the United States, all other additional shipping charges, tariffs, duties, fees, etc ("Shipping Costs") will be passed on and charged after the campaign. We want to be as transparent as possible in the order fulfillment of these explorer series board game bags. Due to the current fluctuating shipping market, supply chain issues, and the product dimensions, we have decided to set the shipping charges at the United States prices ($15 for the Boulder and $25 for the Foothills). Upon the successful campaign end, we will be reaching out to collect any additional information needed in the order fulfillment. Closer to the product delivery date, when final Shipping Costs can be determined, we will be reaching out to collect these, as applicable. Please note, the amounts of these Shipping Costs will be at our own cost, with no additional mark-up included. These Shipping Costs will be the responsibility of the backer. We will take this process very seriously. Multiple communication attempts will be used, as applicable, to help ensure the swift and safe delivery of your explorer series board game bags! **Country Restrictions: Due to fulfillment restrictions we are not able to ship the rewards to any address in Ukraine, Russia, and South Africa. Any additional countries will be added here when we find out. When COVID hit, Joseph’s job went remote. We took the chance and sold our house to travel full-time in an RV with a baby and two dogs (crazy, I know.) Downsizing was hard, as you can imagine, especially when it came to our board game collection. We had such a small amount of space to keep our games in, and way more than would possibly fit. So we decided to make our own storage bag to solve the problem. We started out with a basic idea: a tiered bag that has layers of compartments to maximize the organization and storage. We also wanted the bag to be sturdy to keep everything safe, but with a little give so you didn’t have to pack everything perfectly level in order to close the bag. We wrote out a description of what we wanted and Joseph drew a basic sketch to help us explain the idea. Then we hired an artist to turn that into a to-scale sketch and a 3D mock-up. Joseph's original sketch to carry a LOT of games! Once we had this sketch,  we set out to find the right company to help us with making the details a reality. After much research, we finally opted for an EVA manufacturing company, as we wanted something which would protect all the games. Next came the long process of selecting and engineering all the details. We went through several rounds of prototypes, edits, and tweaks before we decided on the current features and sizes of the Boulder and Foothills. We have tested, packed, re-packed, and packed again to determine the best system to save space while protecting and organizing your games. We have so many more ideas and can’t wait to make them available later! Joseph and Megan We are a family of four who are passionate about engaging other people in meaningful ways. Some of our favorite gaming memories are when we were at the campsite, in a hotel, on the picnic blanket, or on the floor in the airport. We like to play board games (duh), travel, run, hike, disc golf, dance, and spend time with our family. We live in Billings, MT, next to the Beartooth Mountains (hence the name). Joseph works full-time as a special projects manager and process automator. Megan used to work in development at various non-profits, but now is a full-time Mom. Inventing a board game bag and starting a small business with full-time jobs and small children was a crazy idea. A year-and-a-half later, it’s still crazy, but it's no longer just an idea. Our Kickstarter is live, and you could be the proud owner of a Beartooth Games Explorer Series Board Game Bag! These bags are meant to help people enjoy more quality time with friends and family by enabling you to take your games with you wherever you go. Our hope is that you can connect with others, use your mind and imagination, have some friendly competition, or lots of laughter in all sorts of places! Get your bag today and start making your own favorite gaming memories away from home! Our awesome video was created by Graphic Finesse - a boutique branding and creative agency based in Billings, MT. Powered by a husband and wife team, Aaron and Genia, Graphic Finesse provides the visuals, language, and strategy you need to launch or grow your business. https://graphicfinesse.com Thanks to all our family and friends who have put up with us falling off the grid the last bit while we spent every spare second working on Beartooth Games. We couldn’t have done it without your support and encouragement! Thanks to Clark and Allen who helped us engineer the details of the bag and made everything we wanted happen. Thanks to ALL OF YOU, Kickstarter, for backing our project!

title: Azuxena - Gemini: Limited Collector’s Boxes
description: My name is Azuxena , and Gemini is my debut album. Built around duality, Gemini blends English and Spanish, movement and emotion, into a high-energy, dance-forward experience that feels powerful and modern. The album features 17 tracks with production from Scott Storch, Bankroll Got It , and more, making it the most ambitious project I’ve created so far. This Kickstarter exists to finish Gemini the right way — completing final production, select features, visuals, and two limited collector editions inspired by the Gemini twins Castor and Pollux . Only 1,000 Collector Boxes will ever be made, exclusively available on Kickstarter. Each box is a full physical album experience, including the complete album and all music videos on a dual-connector USB, plus tarot cards, a lyric book, a signed photo, and Gemini birthstones. Gemini releases June 11, 2026 . Thank you for supporting independent music.

title: Categories
description:
Listen To House Of Cards Below Hey its Chris, aka Manafest. After my career-changing accident back in 1998 that crushed my dream of becoming a professional skateboarder, I picked up a pen and began to write songs.  I discovered that my music had the ability to create hope and inspiration for other people in their own dark places, and that became my mission. It's a
hurting world out there, and we all need a boost of encouragement from time to
time. I'm working on my 10th studio album entitled "Stones", which will be my 2nd independent release without a record label and my first full-on Rock album in 5 years. While I have been fortunate enough to reach hundreds of thousands of
people with my music, it’s my goal to inspire more people than ever before with
this album in order to spread that hope even further. It's been essential that I find new ways to fund, record and release new music. My fans have been the ones who have always supported and appreciated my vision, so using Kickstarter and giving my fans the opportunity to be a part of the process with me makes the most sense. If you haven't had a chance to watch the video above, please do so! Why I'm doing this album: I haven't done a full on rock record since Fighter and The Chase.  It's time to bring a new spin on what I'm best known for and I know my fans love. Stones is a window into the struggle we all face when obstacles, rejection and the unexpected is thrown in our path. I have been so blessed to play music as a full time career for over 10 years and it’s because I have such amazing fans. The plan: To make the best rock record I've ever done and bring hope and inspiration to as many people around the globe as possible. To create this record I've teamed up with Trevor McNevan from TFK, Adam Messinger (No Plan B, Magic!, Pitbull), Seth Mosley (Grammy Award Winner), Joe Rickard (In Flames, RED), Lenny Skolnik & Sean Bowe (Howard Benson's team who produced P.O.D, Papa Roach & Three Days Grace.  Last but not least the beautiful and talented Melanie Greenwood my wife is rocking the artwork. The money: I've already invested over $100,000 in creating this album, setting 
up the forthcoming marketing campaign for it, and making the first music
 video. My fans have always been so supportive and that's why I 
wanted to reach out so you can help me inspire even more people with 
this music and message of hope. Goal #1 is to raise $25,000 - This will help me created a 2nd music video and promote it so we can inspire as many people as possible. Goal #2 is to raise $50,000 so we can create and promote a 3rd music video, and also inspire people via radio as well. Goal #3 is to raise $75,000 so we can create and promote a 4th music video, and launch an international campaign to take this message to inspire people around the world. The mission: I've always wanted my music to be inspiring even when I'm writing about heavy topics or sharing a personal story of struggle.  I know when fans listen to this new album the songs will speak to everyone a different way and tears will be shed. I went dark on this record, but always come back to the light. I think this is a reflection of a journey many of us share. Please help me bring this message of hope and inspiration to people that need it! Thanks for your support by contributing to this campaign today! Chris/ Manafest Rewards for contributing: Meet The Team: Trevor McNevan - Trevor is 
the lead singer of Thousand Foot Krutch and a close friend.  He came up 
with the song idea for Fire Starter and will be helping me frame the 
rest of these songs as well as write. Fun Fact - Trevor and I met
 at his CD Release party for Set It Off in Hamilton.  We both wore pants
 that were a few sizes to big for us :) Adam Messinger - Adam
 has helped build the Manafest brand since 2001 with Misled Youth.  He's
 worked with the biggest names in the music biz from Bieber, 
Magic!, Pitbull, Christina Aguilera, and many more. Fun Fact - Adam sings a lot of the harmonies and background vocals on our tracks to give that signature Manafest sound. Seth Mosley - Seth
 is a multi Grammy Award winning songwriter and producer who is 
responsible for my hit songs "Fighter" "Pushover" & "Pray".  He just
 finished crushing 6 new songs on the Skillet record and I've hired him 
to help produce and song write on this album. Fun Fact - I met Seth on tour in Sweden the same festival where he met his wife and I had my 30th birthday party. Joe Rickard - Joe
 used to play drums for the band RED and is now killing it on the road 
with In Flames.  Joe produced & co-wrote a few tracks on this album 
and is playing drums on a bunch of tracks too. Killing it! Fun Fact - I met Joe many, many years ago when he was in the band The Wedding and I was touring with an iPod. Melanie Greenwood - My wife, best friend and killer graphic designer!   Melanie has 
designed all my album covers except for Reborn & The Moment.  So 
stoked to have her back. Fun Fact - We met at camp, dated for 5 
years and been traveling the world ever since. We have a 3 year old 
daughter named London Grace. Lenny Skolnik & Sean Bowe - Joe
 was working at Howard Bensons studio and suggested I write with Lenny 
& Sean.  After an incrediblwriting session and killer songs 
produced I knew I made some life long friends. Fun Fact - Freaking Fred Durst (Limp Bizkit) came in the next day after we wrote together.

title: Draw Near: Breathing New Life into Ancient, Sacred Tradition
description: The Providential Beginning of DRAW NEAR In November 2023, my wife and I traveled to Hawaii to sponsor friends who were being baptized into the Greek Orthodox Church. While there, we had a providential encounter with the Artistic Director of Apollo5 and a board member of the VOCES8 Foundation - leaders in the global choral world. We visited about music, and I shared an idea that had long been on my heart: To create a new Orthodox setting of the Divine Liturgy of St. John Chrysostom. One that is musically expressive of the beauty of the text, rooted in tradition, and singable by everyday parish choirs. A couple of months later, in January 2024, I sent a formal proposal for the Draw Near Project . It felt like a pipe dream, and a month had passed with no response. On February 13th, a dear friend passed away. I felt this strong conviction to compose a Trisagion for him, and I did so on the night of February 14th. I wanted to capture the angelic greeting I imagined he heard as his would entered into the Kingdom of Heaven. That same night, as I was finishing composing, I received a response from a member of the VOCES8 Foundation - they were interested in pursuing my project. In April, I hosted Apollo5 in Colorado, while they were in the US on tour, for a dinner and sight-reading session. They sang through five of my pieces, and that solidified in my mind that they were the right group to help bring this music to life. By the end of May 2024, we had agreed to: Record an album of excerpts from the Liturgy Film instructional videos for choirs through the VOCES8 Digital Academy Tour Orthodox churches in concert and worship Why DRAW NEAR Matters This project is not about replacing tradition - it's about adding to it with reverence and creativity. Orthodox music is deeply sacred, but often inaccessible to modern choirs. DRAW NEAR bridges that gap with: Fresh, faithful choral writing Liturgical clarity and beauty Practical tools to support parish choirs and directors With over $60,000 already raised , this campaign helps finish the work: publishing the score, producing rehearsal materials, and sharing the music with the Church and choral communities around the world. By pledging to back this project, you’re not just funding a recording - you’re helping bring the Liturgy into the ears and hearts of listeners who may have never heard these prayers, and you're helping bring new music into the life of the Church, while honoring tradition and drawing the faithful into deeper worship. Let’s finish strong - together.

title: Categories
description: This KS campaign ends tonight - Thursday Nov 6th at 10pm Central! Let's hit 100k!!! The Choir appreciates your support and generosity, not just for this campaign, but for the past 40 years! ~Derri, Steve & Dan 11/05 Update If you’ve made it this far, thank you. Whether you’ve already pledged or are just discovering this campaign, we’re glad you’re here. Dragonfly and Flap Your Wings 25 will be our most ambitious creative effort to date (over 40 songs), and as we reach the home stretch, closing Thursday, Nov. 6 at 10 p.m. Central , we’d love your help pushing it across the finish line. If you’ve already backed, maybe take another look at the add-ons or upgrades. Every little bump helps us make these albums the way they deserve to be made. Beyond the music itself, you’ll find a wide range of extras: art prints, T-shirts, stickers, magnets, coasters, Zoom hangs, your name in the credits, Executive & Associate Producer tiers, a Choir live show, handwritten lyrics, and more. Thank you for believing in this band and the songs that keep us flying for 40 years! Derri, Steve & Dan 11/01/25 Stretch Goal Update / 80k level met / Free bonus album download / Second Stringers & Benchwarmers! 40 + Tracks Offered Through The Choir's Dragonfly/Flap Your Wings 25 Kickstarter 20 songs on Dragonfly (Double Album) 10 remastered Flap Your Wings + 2 cover songs (Adam Again & Mike Knott) 10 or more songs on Second Stringers & Benchwarmers We're moving towards the final days on The Choir's Kickstarter! 👉 Click HERE to view We just counted them up and we're offering more than 40 tracks with this Kickstarter campaign! You can support Dragonfly and Flap Your Wings 25 for as little as $15 or you can scoop up the exclusive Executive Producer package or even book a live show! Every pledge matters. If you haven’t backed the Kickstarter yet, we’re grateful for your consideration. Any pledge of $25 or more will get a free download of our stretch goal bonus album, Second Stringers & Benchwarmers. These are songs The Choir has recorded over the past 5 years that were not selected for the Dragonfly double album. If you would like a CD of Second Stringers and Benchwarmers it's available as an optional add-on. Just add it on after your initial pledge. 👉 Click HERE to view The Dragonfly Kickstarter! FUNDING MET • STRETCH GOAL #1 ANNOUNCED Make Dragonfly a collector's edition with an expanded and enhanced packaging experience. 20-page booklet. Lyrics, stories, photos, long-form essay liner notes. PDF for digital. Band commentary audio for all. Goal: 70k Dragonfly Campaign The Choir’s first album, Voices in Shadows, was released in 1985 . Forty years ago! Can you believe it? And now we are intent on making another. It will be our 20th. So… it feels poetic and apropos to offer 20 more new songs! Dragonfly will be our most ambitious project to date: a double CD and double vinyl. Dragonflies symbolize transformation and self discovery as they emerge from water to air. As a band and as seekers we are still evolving, still adapting, still chasing beauty and authenticity. As friends and co-creators we enjoy making music together as truly as ever while extending each other the grace to explore alone. We’ve learned that it is important to honor each other’s individuality, which sometimes means existing in adjacent zones. Derri, Steve and Dan. Like “a dragonfly on the water, another on a sunny rock, and another on a flower stalk,” there comes a time to dance on the wind again, as a musical team and as brothers. So here we go! As Derri often says, “You have become so much more than fans over all these years. You have become our friends.” We want to take to the sky once again. Thank you for giving our music wings! Derri, Steve & Dan | The Choir Flap Your Wings 25 To mark this moment, we are also excited to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Flap Your Wings with a limited deluxe edition on CD, vinyl and download. The audio has been newly remastered for clarity and depth from the original DAT of the final mixes. We are making this extra special (deluxe) by adding two new tracks. We will cover a classic song from Adam Again and another from Michael Knott . It feels appropriate to honor both of these artists on this project. Our tribute song, “Hey Gene,” is on Flap Your Wings and it’s been 25 years since our dear friend, Gene, left this world. Also our friend Michael Knott, who recently departed, painted the iconic cover art. Packaging will reflect the original spirit with thoughtful modifications. The Flap Your Wings 25 Year Anniversary Deluxe Remaster is bundled in select reward tiers or simply as an “add on” when you back Dragonfly. Supporting The Campaign & The Choir Only your support will make this double album and FYW 25 Years a reality . The funds raised will provide for recording, mixing, mastering, vinyl and CD production, cover art, packaging, marketing and shipping. Exceeding the budget will keep us afloat. Your generosity has had a direct personal impact on each of us. Thank you for carrying our songs in your hearts for four decades! While we have been working out of our humble home studio base, your backing lets us book the top studios, bring in the right players, guest artist features, and work with engineers and mixers who will help us meet the creative and sonic standard you expect from The Choir. Dragonfly will feature new tracks alongside cherry-picked favorites from our Patreon years. We are rebuilding those songs with fresh performances, added parts, and proper mixing and mastering. We have always treated those versions as works in progress, not finals. Your support helps us reach them and sustains us during the process of creating the music. Thank you for pushing with us. Additional Instructions Key notes. title: "Relentless"
description: I'm  so excited to be recording my first new CD in 7 years!  The new music will make you dance, pat your feet, bob your head, and sway to sweet, melodic compositions unlike anything you've heard from me before. If you're not familiar with my music, please feel free to watch my live performance video at www.youtube.com/watch?v=pVZ2ns132TI .  Also, visit me by stopping by www.reverbnation.com/darrylevanjones and www.fluteman.com Why Kickstarter?  Kickstarter is the perfect outlet for new and upcoming artists who want to step outside the traditional boundaries of presenting their music.  Think of pre-sales - you are basically ordering the new CD ahead of the commercial market release, with some additional incentives.  As an artist, I'm pouring myself into this project, giving you best of me.  I can't wait to make it for you.  It would go a long way to me making a splash in the industry for you to buy it first.  I assure you it will keep your finger on the repeat button! Why so much money?  The cost of producing a CD is expensive as an independent aritst, yet feasible where the focus of the financial support will be production and other aspects involving getting it to the public.  There are a myriad of costs including producers, musicians, licenses, mixing and mastering engineers, graphic artists, and, CD manufacturing.  (This doesn't even include marketing and promotion.)  I sincerely hope you'll agree to be a part of my Kickstarter campaign, in exchange for some really cool rewards - not to mention my deepest thanks and appreciation. The new CD, "Relentless", is unlike anything I've done before.  I have been on a "Relentless" mission to bring my music to the forefront, a place where listeners are able to see and hear how the flute transcends perceived boundaries.  Not only is the background music done with live musicians (instead of programmed keyboards), but there's a more energentic sound showing my growth as an artist.

title: Categories
description: Today is Earth Day and we are launching our campaign to fund a professional recording of White Raven, Black Dove, a sci-fi fantasy work of music theater imagining life after the Sixth Extinction, an apocalyptic warning about the consequences of ignoring the cries of help from Mother Earth. On the very first Earth Day, April 22, 1970, Joseph Lelyveld said, “If the environment had any enemies, they did not make themselves known.” Today, the environment’s enemies have made themselves known, loud and clear. As Lee Zeldin, the new administrator of the EPA, rolled back the environment's hard won gains, he proclaimed: “[W]e are driving a dagger through the heart of climate-change religion.” We cannot stand by and do nothing. Who Are We? We are White Snake Projects, An Activist Opera Company . We are blazing the way for opera-based activism to open public discourse on the pressing issues facing us in today’s conflict-ridden world. CLIMATE is at the top of our list. Here’s a short clip illustrating some of the issues we’ve explored: Unlike many performing arts companies that shy away from dealing with climate, DEI or other “improper ideologies” targeted by the current administration, we are leaning into our core beliefs. Two of these beliefs: Climate and DEI are facing existential threats that we, as stewards of our society, must address. We turn mission into practice through our programming that has explored Voting Rights, Immigration, The Pandemic, Colonization, Mass Incarceration, MultiCulturalism, Anti-Asian Hate and Intimate Partner Violence. Read more about our mission here . What Is RAVEN? Imagine a dystopian earth after human-accelerated climate change brought on by the Sixth Extinction; Imagine a war of the worlds between two factions over scarce resources Imagine the Raven and the Dove, two mythical birds, whose heroism resurrects the earth; Imagine world building in the game engine - Unreal - to realize this sci-fi fantasy live onstage; And you have White Raven, Black Dove, a sci-fi fantasy work of music theater exploring the impacts of climate on our planet. The Story RAVEN opens in a post-apocalyptic world rendered uninhabitable by climate change. A war for scarce resources has left two groups: Ambers (white people) and Onyxs (non-white people). The Onyxs have been driven underground and have adapted to their new environment of darkness. The Ambers who live on the surface, have adapted to a new Earth with no ozone layer. The key to survival for both sides is the invention of a body suit - a “second skin” - attached to each newborn to protect them from deadly radiation both underground and on the surface. Led by the opera's protagonist, Raven, the Onyxs’ reach the Earth’s surface. Fierce fighting erupts and many are killed. Raven rips off the body suits/second skins of the slain individuals revealing that the Ambers have dark, even black skin, an evolutionary adaptation to deal with the merciless sun; the Onyxs have light, even white skin, an adaptation to the darkness underground. Raven and Dove heal the Earth and for the first time in centuries, sweet rain falls… When is White Raven, Black Dove premiering? September 26, 27 and 28 at the Strand Theater in Boston, MA What Inspired RAVEN? Creator Cerise Lim Jacobs – Opera Maker + Founding Artistic Director, White Snake Projects I am a storyteller inspired by myth and current events. I grew up in Singapore under British colonial rule and absorbed the disparate influences of Chinese, Malay, Indian and Western cultures, their religions, mythologies and stories. I love our planet and sometimes despair as to how to help heal our racial schisms, inequities and the Earth. RAVEN came to me as a way to tell the story of the consequences of climate change and its differential impacts on communities of color: Climate justice is at the heart of this story. I try to avoid propaganda and didacticism by leaning into entertainment and storytelling so audiences can immerse themselves in the piece without feeling lectured to. Perhaps this will inspire others to work towards a better world. Concept Art for White Raven, Black Dove RAVEN uses the myth of the raven, much beloved in world mythology, including those of the Norse, Asian and Native American, as a metaphor to illustrate the arbitrariness of racial classifications. According to myth, Raven was originally white. He saw humans struggling without fire and stole it from the gods to give to them. As he escaped with a flaming stick, the smoke turned him black - his “blackness” a sign of his heroism. Hence, all ravens are black now. Dove is also a mythical bird featured prominently in Christian mythology. As told in Genesis, when the rain stopped, Noah opened the door of the Ark and released a raven who came back almost immediately. This told him that the floodwaters had not yet subsided. Noah subsequently released a dove who came back with a green leaf in her beak, signifying that the waters had receded and the Earth was renewed. RAVEN follows this dramatic arc - we encounter an Earth devastated by climate change and then experience its resurrection. How Are We Making RAVEN? RAVEN is a transmedia work which is made across various platforms: Computer generated imagery, animation and live performance. The CGI and animation is made in Unreal Engine by our interns at Lesley Art + Design. How Will We Use Your Money? We are raising money to make a professionally produced video by Ball Square Films of the live staged performance which we will send to each one of our Kickstarter backers. Stretch Goals If we exceed our target of $8,000, we will use the money to rent a jib to increase the production value of the filming. We will also use the money to pay our student interns to run Unreal Engine and make modifications requested by our stage director during tech rehearsals.

title: The Modern Rock Quartet - Live @ Moravian College
description: This recording was done live almost 10 years ago and I want to put it out as a documentation of what I, Tony Miceli, Kevin MacConnell, & Butch Reed created that evening.  It was our last performance as The Modern Rock Quartet after playing out for over a year in the Philadelphia area.  I want to press enough copies for DJ's, critics/press, additional recording fees for the musicians listed above (this was and is my project and although they were paid for the concert they need to be compensated for the release of the recording), and some sales.  I also want to do the mechanical and digital licensing to put it into as many ears as possible.  Artwork, liner notes by a notable writer/musician, and money for some publicity and guerrilla marketing are also budgeted into this amount.  I will be covering the costs that will come above that.  I get many questions from people about what I consider my best work to be.  I believe it was this and I look forward to finally putting it out for more people to hear.

title: Categories
description: Desert Stars Festival is a truly independent volunteer driven music festival. We feel that reaching out to our community is the best way to keep that spirit alive. We have no corporate sponsors and no guys in suits with money telling us what to do! We come armed only with the love of putting on a great event that we can all share. The purpose of our Kickstarter campaign is to raise funds to cover our infrastructure costs such as sound, stage, lights, crew, transportation, headliner & support costs and everything essential to putting on a first class music festival event. With three stages, three separate crews and 35 bands taking part, your pledges directly impact our ability to bring this event forward each year. This year we continue the spirit of our festival which began in 2007 by remaining independent, true to our community and forever faithful to our desire of bringing people together in a positive way through music and art. Thank you for sharing this pledge drive with friends, family and all who you wish to invite into our magical little family. We have some great rewards for your donations and we thank you for your support ! Don't miss out on an opportunity to grab weekend passes with camping and hotel accommodations, festival posters, recording studio packages & more!
