description: Veosport set out to make quality wireless earphones with sound how it should be, custom. Configure your EQ settings through our mobile app and listen to your music or podcast with your own preferred sound settings. In addition the V1's are packed with all the features you want in bluetooth earphones, including IPX7 Waterproof, Passive Noise Cancelling, 8 Hour Battery life and much more. The V1's were built with comfort in mind, with 3 ear tip options and 8 sizes included. The Veosport V1's will be the best pair of earphones you'll ever own . Check it out below! TECH HIGHLIGHTS Veosport EQ Mobile App Bluetooth 4.1 IPX7 Sweatproof Rating CVC 6.0 Passive Noise Cancelling Multi-Point Function 8 Hour Battery Life Braided USB Cable 8 Ear Tips Options Carrying Case and Accessories Included HOW WE STARTED As bluetooth technology was increasing, I kept an eye on wireless bluetooth earphones. As a customer I was tired of looking for the perfect wireless earphones and decided to create feature-rich earbuds that combine the latest technologies with comfortable and attractive design. The goal was to create affordable bluetooth earphones without compromising on sound. That's why we paired our earphones with a Veosport mobile app. The Veosport EQ app allows you the change the EQ (equalizer) settings of some of your favorite apps.  For example, if you listen to music through Spotify, our headphones can adjust the bass and treble you are hearing. Starting at $49 "After buying over five different bluetooth earphones in just 1 year, I noticed that each one was missing certain key features.  It was then I decided to create an affordable, wireless earphone with mass appeal." - Veosport creator Garrett Marchesano . We carefully designed and tested prototypes for a pair of extremely comfortable earphones while maintaining truly custom sound . Thank you for your support! Custom EQ Settings The Veosport V1's come with a powerful mobile app. The Veosport EQ mobile app allows you to create a custom EQ sound. You can also choose from the list of stock EQ sounds. EQ Dashboard Have you ever wanted more bass, more treble, or just wondered what the setting is for your genre? Right now you are stuck with the EQ settings you are given, not anymore! Right now our custom EQ app works with Itunes and Spotify . We will test and integrate more apps into our system as we grow. Choose service and set EQ settings It all starts with a comfortable fit. If your earphones aren't comfortable, you're not going to want to wear them. Many competitors only offer a few ear tip options. Veosport has decided to include 8 fit options including : 3 sizes of silicone ear tips 3 sizes of comply foam ear tips 2 sizes of triple flange ear tips FIND YOUR PERFECT FIT. 8 Ear Tip Options We've designed our earphones to be extremely lightweight with no in-line volume control. The volume and multi-function button are located on the right earphone. Tune out the world with 6.0 Noise Canceling technology. With the controls on your earphone you can rest assured you won't feel the extra weight of the in-line volume control dangling on your neck. Don't forget to use your cord shortener to manage your cord length. You can also use your cable clip to keep the cord off a sweaty neck. These earphones are also IPX7 sweatproof and can handle your most extreme workouts. *THANK YOU FOR BACKING OUR PROJECT. Help spread the word! SHARE this project! Are you a fan of what we are doing? Share Veosport with your friends, family, and co-workers! Click the buttons below to share on Facebook and twitter. SHARE VEOSPORT ON FACEBOOK SHARE VEOSPORT ON TWITTER

title: AI Stock Predictions with Cuanto+
description: Meet Cuanto : The Prediction Platform of the Future. How many times have you tried to start your investment journey, only to find yourself in a storm of information, memes and social media hype leaving you surprised, and your hard earned money, stuck in a loss? There are proven investment strategies that work - but it can take years of learning and practice to master those skills and strategies. Even then, there are no guarantees in the markets. We wanted a better investment journey, one with less surprises and more predictions. So we started working on a platform... What if you had an app, that easily explains how a stock has performed, and predicts how it could perform in the future ? What if, this app had the best trading strategies, and showed you Signals of when you should buy or sell based on Multiple Strategies ? ... We designed and developed multiple demos and shared them with our amazing friends and family to get feedback. Now, we're ready to share Simas with you. Simas Stock simulation made simple. With Simas, you'll see more stock performances, comparisons and signals. Simas, is made to be a simple, but unique view into the stock market. But, there's more... We're on Kickstarter , to share what what's next and raise Funds to bring you Premium Features for Simas, using Artificial Intelligence . Introducing... Cuanto+ with Simas & AI Cuanto+ is a platform that empowers individual investors by using AI to predict stock market movements. Performance+ Signals+ Positive Habits Weekly, Monthly and Yearly Predictions. Our AI will continue to learn and predict even better over time. Check the latest predicted price of your favorite stocks, with just 1 click . See the buy and sell Signals, automatically, using multiple strategies! . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . Designed Simple The power of intentional design. Simas is designed to be a simple and repeatable process. Our users gain wisdom with every click . This is just the start for our Simas and AI. With our stretch goals, we can bring even more access, features and products. Stretch 🙆 Simas Basic Past Performance, S&P 500 and Signals What is " Performance" ? Users want to see performances of stocks. Of course, you'll want to see how a stock has performed up to this point, before you invest your money. To make the Past Performance of stocks easy to understand and easily repeatable, Simas uses only 2 metrics to explain the Past Performance. 1 Year Performance In this example, we've selected to see the 1 Year Performance of a stock. We see that the stock has increased by 21% over the 1 Year. $1,000 Would be We saw that social media users prefer to see how much an investment would be worth, if they had invested. Simas automatically calculate what a $1,000 investment Would be worth, if you had invested. In this example: A $1,000 investment, 1 Year ago , in the selected stock, Would be worth $1,208 . That was easy! What is "S&P 500"? We created the "S&P" Simas Feature, to show users a comparison of the performance of a selected stock, against the benchmark of the US, which is the S&P 500 Index. The S&P 500 is a weighted index or blend of the stocks for the 500 largest companies in the United States. With this feature, we show 1 metric, which is a calculated value that shows how much the selected stock has either " Outperformed " or " Underperformed " against the S&P 500 on average. Here is a breakdown of how the S&P 500 feature works... What is "Signals"? There are a lot of different ways to invest. One of the most popular methods is for investors to use pattern strategies to trade stocks. Now, there are plenty of professionals that have mastered a combination of patterns they favor, to trade stocks. One of the most common trading strategy is the, " 20 and 50 Moving Average Crossover ". The problem: This is just 1 trading strategy, and even if you were to master this strategy, it can be extremely time consuming to wait and watch a stock, hoping for a buy or sell Signal to appear. Even then, you're not sure how accurate the signals are in general, or how accurate they can be for the specific stock you're watching. Simas does this for you, automatically! Here is a breakdown of how Simas uses the, " 20 and 50 Moving Average Crossover " pattern trading Strategy to identify Buy and Sell Signals. With Simas, we've made it easy for you to find more stocks faster, understand their performance, see how it compares to the market standard and see automatic buy and sell signals. All you have to do, is click to see more performances. With Cuanto+ we're making your experience even more meaningful, without any additional effort to you. We're extremely excited to start using these features, and we hope you are just as excited about a future with Less Surprise, and More Predictions ! Rewards 🏆

title: Categories
description: Sence: The Evolution of Mindfulness and Productivity Sence contains an unbelievable technological breakthrough that is capable of giving you more emotional insight than ever before so you can be your most productive, caring and happy. But, how the heck can a wearable be used to track emotions? Sence can track emotions by very closely listening to your heart beat. Every emotion causes your heart to beat in a slightly different way. Think about how differently your heart beats when you are in a rage versus when you are in a calm state of serene happiness. These, tiny changes in the heart rate are untraceable with traditional wearables. Sence uses revolutionary technology that allows it to track these differences using ECG (aka EKG) signals. ECG analysis is 250 times more precise that existing fitness trackers and smart watches and Sence is the first to release a technology that can measure ECG from one wrist. With this unprecedented level of accuracy it is not surprising people are calling Sence a “breakthrough”. Sence’s insights can give you more data about your wellbeing than ever before. Sence can track precisely when and where you experience: By applying this data, Sence can help you: Sence can recognize the minute variations in between your heart’s contractions. Using ECG (also known as EKG) tracking technology. Sence is the first wearable to be able to track ECG from one wrist which allows it to take readings all day and collect the data it needs to train you on how to maximize your happiness and reduce your sadness. SenceHub’s powerful algorithms turn the raw data provided by SenceBand into actionable analytics. Using SenceHub you’ll be able to: 1. Track your stress, vitality and emotions so you can adjust your daily routine to maximize happiness and productivity. 2. Track your daily physical activity, steps, heart rate and vitality levels. Now you'll finally know what time of day is YOUR best to pump iron or go for a run by understanding how your vitality naturally ebbs and flows. 3. Get notifications when something interesting recently happened with your own emotional states or to those of someone in your network. This will help you understand the kind of support you can offer whether it be giving them their space, going to cheer them up or anywhere in between. Sence can be used in different ways and it will bring many benefits depending on your goals: Help decide a part of SenceBand's fate by voting for your favorite color in the public comments. You can vote for one of our suggestions above or come up with your own. But remember, only votes posted in the public comment section will be tallied so let's get the conversation going! SenceHub: Your Beacon for Self-Mastery With each ECG scan, SenceHub syncs up with your calendar and takes a snapshot of your location so you know exactly when and where the scan was taken. This gives you maximum insight into the origins of each emotion so you can identify patterns and course correct. With SenceBand’s unprecedented precision and accuracy it has the functionality to extract some of your body’s most valuable information. Use it to best understand your body and mind in ways you never thought possible. You can also share it with your friends and family to stay in tune and connected to the well being of those you love. SenceBand: With its R-peak tracking technology, SenceBand collects high-resolution data from your heart. SenceBand has: Sence’s mobile app, SenceHub, contains sophisticated algorithms that analyze the data provided by SenceBand and presents them to you in exquisite detail. SenceHub features: Although ALL the SenceHub features described in this campaign are free, we will provide each backer with a free 1-month premium plan subscription as well. This unlocks access to even more features that we are currently developing to give you even deeper insight into your life. Consider this just one way of us saying "thank you" for supporting us on our journey. The amount of premium features unlocked will depend on the amount we raise so don't forget to share this campaign to help unlock even more premium features! Customer Service Specialist 1 Customer Service Specialist 2 Few people realize, but many traditional fitness tracking wearables use outdated technologies such as optical sensors that end up only being about 70% accuracy in measuring your heart’s activities. The bottom line is that these sensors track pulse waves, which are phenomena caused by the heart beat but which also have many other, unrelated factors that effect their frequency. Besides, you can track your pulse with your own finger! Why pick a device that tracks a phenomenon you can track yourself? Sence tracks something fundamentally different and dramatically more precise: electrocardiography (ECG) Now you can see why Sence is able to track data that is so much more accurate than what's out there. Curious about how Sence can track ECG from just one wrist or how it uses that data to tell you what emotions you've experienced? Keep on reading! There are two main pillars to understanding how the science behind Sence works: 1. How SenceBand can accurately measure ECG signals from one wrist 2. How SenceHub can turn those raw ECG signals into emotional insights Once you understand both these concepts you'll really grasp why Sence is so revolutionary! Let's take a look at both these pillars individually. SenceBand's ECG Tracking from One Wrist SenceBand measures ECG using a patent-pending technology that allows it to cancel out the electromagnetic "noise" from your body. This mechanism filters out things like electrical signals from muscle contractions and leaves only the electromagnetic feed from your heart (ECG) . This filtering method is completely novel and makes SenceBand the only smart bracelet capable of measure ECG from one wrist. How accurate is Sence? Below is the result of a test that was done that compared Sence to a standard, medical-grade ECG device. You'll see that the R-peaks (the critical phenomena to understanding true heart-rate and emotions) match up perfectly with the medical grade control. But don't take our word for it! Check out our SenceBand prototype in action for yourself in the uncut demo videos below. We made them to show SenceBand's current prototype functionality so there are no doubts we are well on our way to a final product: Video 1: Sence's ECG Signal Video 2: Sence Tracking Emotions Feel free to skip to 3:25 for the test results if you wish! Getting Emotions from ECG Analysis Okay, so now you understand how SenceBand tracks ECG signals from just one wrist, but how can this help to infer anything about emotions? Aren't emotions all about what is going on in your brain? What does the heart have to do with emotions? Actually, there is an intimate link between the brain and heart. In fact, the heart's nervous system even contains 40,000 neurons! Your heart rate is determined by the two competing systems in the body: The sympathetic and the parasympathetic nervous systems. The sympathetic nervous system is known as the "fight or flight" pathway and it tries to pull your heart in a direction of excitement. The parasympathetic nervous system is known as the "rest and digest" pathway and tries to mellow your heart out and slow down its beats. All our emotions leave a unique footprint in this constant battle between sympathetic and parasympathetic control. These footprints can be read using heart rate variability (HRV) analysis of ECG data. Since Sence accurately tracks R-peaks it can identify the unique signals associated with each emotion. How Many Emotions can Sence Track? With Sence's unique ability to analyze heart rate variability, it can track 64 different emotions and bodily states in you and your loved ones. Specifically, Sence can track 2 flavours (intensity levels) of each of the 32 emotions found below in Plutchik's Wheel of Emotions , a standard emotional reference tool in medicine and psychology: Don't get overwhelmed with all these emotions! Sence lets you pick the emotions to track that matter most to you and your lifestyle. The insight you glean from Sence can be as specific or broad as you want it to be. Further Scientific Reading: Want to dig deeper into the Science behind Sence? Click on any of the topics below to be linked to a peer-reviewed scientific article that covers it in detail: Capturing Emotions in Real Time using Heart Rate The Connection Between the Brain and Heart for Emotions HRV Analysis for Stress Tracking Vitality Using HRV How Tracking the Heart can Pinpoint Emotions The Heart’s Connection to the Nervous System Testing Emotional Responses to Social Situations with HRV HRV’s Ability to Differentiate Similar Emotions Customer Service Specialist 1 Customer Service Specialist 2 Sence allows people to share their analytics with others, at a level of privacy they see fit. You'll be able to let people know if you had a generally good or bad day or even show them exactly what emotions you felt and where. This allows people using Sence become connected in ways never before possible, without even needing to be in the same room (or even country)! Sence for Couples Sence allows you understand not only your own emotions but those of that special someone. Know when to give them space or when they need a little pick me up! Be the best partner you can be with these revolutionary emotional insights. Sence for Families Track the health and emotional wellbeing of the more sensitive members of your family such as children so you can keep them safe and sound. With Sence you can get the insight you need to be the best parent or caregiver you can be. Sence for Friends With Sence you can get way more insight into your peer group than with a social media post. Are The Boys feeling a bit down lately as a group? Maybe it’s time to go out for a night on the town! Sence connects you to your friends in ways that go way beyond words, pictures or even videos to make you feel more connected then ever before. The Sence story features a long and winding journey with an unlikely origin. Originally, the Sence team assembled not to build a revolutionary hardware device but to collect high quality ECG screening data. With this data, they build a huge database that they hoped to sell to others. In order to acquire this data the Sence team set out with the monumental goal of screening 20,000 patients in rural Ukraine with a mobile hospital made up of 24 doctors, 24 nurses and modern ECG equipment. They planned to provide free check-ups and health guidance to these individuals who had little access to healthcare in exchange for their anonymous ECG data. Sound like an impossible task? The Sence team actually exceeded expectations and comprehensively screened 22,433 patients in 52 days. This unprecedented study got Planexta (the makers of Sence) many adulations worldwide from cardiac societies and the like. Planexta Inc. is officially recognized to have performed the largest cardio screening ever to test for 260 parameters in under 52 days by a National records society. With the massive amount data Planexta now had, they set out to find the right wearable technology company to sell it to. Unfortunately, they didn’t find a good fit! All the current devices either didn’t use rigorous enough ECG measurements to make use of the data or they measured ECG in such an impractical way that users would never take enough readings for the data to be useable. What a waste! So much data was now available but there was no wearable sophisticated enough to use it. Instead of giving up, the Sence team decided to take it upon themselves to create (from scratch) an ECG measuring wearable that was both accurate and extremely practical for consumers to use. They created a lab dedicated to this task called Platform20k (as a memento of the monumental screening tour) and hired 13 top experimental physicists and engineers, the begin work on SenceBand. It took the team over a year to succeed, but SenceBand became a reality due to the discovery and implementation of a whole new method of measuring ECG. Now, Sence has the hardware and the software foundations to do something truly revolutionary. However, Sence is still a scrappy little company and genuinely needs YOUR help to actualize the immense potential Sence technology has to improve people's lives. The Sence team thanks you for every last dollar of support! SenceBand’s design was created by the famous Red Dot Award winner, Donn Koh and his Singaporean team at Stuck Design. Before helping to create SenceBand he worked on multiple projects for Microsoft, Dell, Samsung, HTC and T-Mobile. Our engineers and physicists worked closely with Donn Koh’s team to ensure technological prowess and aesthetics could co-exist in SenceBand’s unmistakable appearance. Check out Sence's visual journey below: This project was developed and is being managed by BeyondNature , a company specializing in launching innovative products through crowdfunding and transitioning them into mass-market powerhouses. Customer Service Specialist 1 Customer Service Specialist 2

title: The RollPack
description: Stop Dragging Your Bike Box Through the Airport. If you’ve flown with your bike, you know the drill. You find an epic route to ride. You pack up your bike in a free cardboard box. You get to the airport. And then you drag it. Across tile. Across carpet. Lifting it across parking lots. Meanwhile, your friends glide by with $500+ hard-shell travel cases. This idea started on a bikepacking trip to Catalina Island in California. I was hauling my bike through LAX in a cardboard box while everyone else had expensive travel cases. And I thought: There is nothing wrong with cardboard. Why not make the box roll? The Solution RollPack is a patent pending modular caster system that bolts directly to a standard cardboard bike box (Or any box!). It includes: 1-2x front swivel caster(s) 2x fixed rear wheels 3D printed mounting components Removable wheel design Travel storage bag Simple installation How it works Bolt wheel mounts to the box. Snap the wheels in for travel. Remove wheels when you check your box. Pack wheels safely inside your carryon. After travel, throw away the box and store the wheels for the next trip. RollPack System The RollPack system transforms an ordinary bike cardboard box into a smooth‑rolling, airport‑ready travel companion. Patent pending. Its modular design gives riders the freedom to configure, adapt, and even reinvent how they move their gear—because every trip, every bike, and every traveler is different. A Modular System Built for Creative Use RollPack is made of three lightweight, 3D‑printed components that work together to turn a standard bike box into a mobile hauler: Inner Mounting Plate — A secure interior anchor that distributes load and keeps the wheel mounts firmly attached. Final product includes wingnuts to secure the plate to the box paired with a hex bolt that fits into the Outer Mounting Plate which allows for a tool-free installation. Outer Mounting Plate — The exterior interface where the wheels snap in. These plates stay on the box when in transit. Quick‑Release Caster Wheels — Wheel mounts slide into the vertical slot on the outer mounting plate and are held in by an internal clip. Remove the wheels with a slight tug on the wheel. Inner Mounting Plate Outer Mounting Plate Quick‑Release Caster Wheels Multiple Wheel Configurations for Any Trip RollPack isn’t locked into one setup. Mix and match wheel layouts depending on your load or personal preference. Travelers can choose the configuration that fits their journey: Three‑Wheel Mode — Two fixed wheels in the rear and one swivel wheel up front. Ideal for race weekends, short trips, or lighter bikepacking loads. This wheel assembly weighs around 2.4lbs. Recommended for loads under 70lbs. Four‑Wheel Mode — A swivel wheel at each end with two fixed wheels centered between them. This creates stability, a tight turning radius, and the ability to steer from either side of the box—perfect for heavier gear or long airport transfers. This wheel assembly weighs around 2.4lbs. Recommended for loads of +70lbs. Users can experiment with layouts, swap wheels on the fly, or even create their own custom rolling behavior. The system is intentionally open‑ended. Three Wheel RollPack Built‑In Flexibility for DIY Travelers The outer mounting plate is designed to work not only with the included 3D‑printed inner plate, but also with a simple wooden support like a 2x4 for those longer trips. This makes the system adaptable for travelers who like to reinforce and customize their set up. Accessories That Solve Real Travel Problems Because most riders recycle their cardboard box at the airport, RollPack ships with a small storage bag for the wheel system. It disappears into your kit, making it easy to carry on one‑way trips and pick up a new box from a local shop when you’re ready to fly home. It’s a tool, not extra weight. Anyone who has flown with a cardboard bike box knows the pain of ripped handles. Future RollPack systems will include an option for an add-on handle reinforcement accessory that installs in seconds and dramatically improves durability when lifting or moving the box. Support the project with the Builder Support tier to get early access to this accessory! RollPack is designed for bikepackers by a bikepacker. Community Driven This isn’t just a product. It’s a community of bike travelers who: Modify their gear Share travel hacks Improve systems Help evolve design Backers will: Have access to an exclusive Discord Server along with other supporters Vote on the final product name Influence accessory upgrades Share creative travel setups Your support helps us fund an additional printer, materials, and the first manufacturing run. While the core idea is complete, we’re excited to collaborate with our backers on how Rollpack gets used in the real world (and evolve with your ideas). Your ideas, stories, and feedback will help shape tutorials, future accessories, and the growing Rollpack community. You’re not just buying a product—you’re helping launch it. This is version 1. We build version 2 together.

title: Shargeek 300: The Next Gen Power Beast
description: Back in 2021, SHARGE didn't just launch a power bank - we sparked a movement with Shargeek 100 (originally Storm²) , fusing bold transparency , smart displays , and DC charging into a 3421 backers and $520,000 sensation on Kickstarter in just 30 days, and a new chapter of power innovation was born. Now, meet its heir after 4 years - Shargeek 300 . Not just an upgrade, but a masterpiece. Sculpted over 40 months of relentless engineering and obsessive refinement, it's the next-gen ultimate blend of raw power and premium elegance. Welcome to the era of the 300W Power . Shargeek 300 rewrites what portable energy can be, while yesterday's power banks stumble and clunky power stations hold you back. Scroll down and see how Shargeek 300 raises the bar. Just look at Shargeek 300. Matte Silver CNC aluminum body , accented by flowing curves, and crowned with our signature transparent design that dares to reveal the beauty within. A statement piece of functional art with elegance and sophistication. Wherever you place it, it doesn't just sit - it elevates. We are talking about max 300W total output this time. Results? You can fuel two 16" MacBook Pros at 2×140W simultaneously, while still fast-charging up your smartphone at max 20W. All from just one Shargeek 300. The story doesn't stop at dual USB-C ports and one USB-A ports . True to the legacy of the Shargeek 100, Shargeek 300 retains the adjustable DC port and upgrades to max 140W charging, unlocking a world of compatibility beyond the ordinary: from high-performance drones to projectors and other specialized gear. Shargeek 300 does what others can – and what they can’t . Max 140W input. Get recharged from 0% to 100% in only 75 minutes. Pair Shargeek 300 with our SHARGE Pixel 140W PD 3.1 Charger for a lightning-fast recharge — 0% to full in just 75 minutes — while powering up to 5 devices simultaneously with pass-through charging. Stop risking your small gadgets on other chargers or batteries that weren't built for them. Most power banks mishandle low-power devices such as earbuds, smartwatches, and fitness bands because they fail to meet the minimum current threshold, causing overcharging that may stress or even fry the batteries and circuits . Shargeek300 masters both the highs and lows. With Low-current Mode , it delivers safe, optimized charging for your low-power gadgets to full capacity. The massive 24,000mAh/86.4Wh capacity keeps devices on at any time, anywhere. So long, battery anxiety. The Shargeek 300 is roughly the same size as a 330ml can of cola . For those on the go, it's simply a matter of carrying a can of cola with you. Oh, and no sweat at the airport: Shargeek 300 is totally airline-approved . "Let there be light." Audi R8 dazzles with its iconic headlights, and Shargeek 300 shines with RGB. The dual RGB light bars are designed to sync with your style, mood, and personal space. Adjust brightness , change colors, switch RGB effects - Yes we are still talking about a power bank, not a gaming keyboard. "That's a bit gimmicky." But hey, why not power your devices with more fun and style? Never settle for boredom. Shargeek 100 made history as the first power bank with a full-color interactive display. Now, Shargeek 300 takes a step forward, coming with the most advanced smart display on a power bank. The 1.9" IPS display - 60% larger than Shargeek 100's - provides clear, concise, and joyful interation of charging. It's no longer just charging/recharging speed readouts, but here's more: Monitor charging cycles and battery temperature. Set up the recharging battery level. Adjust the DC output voltage. Personalize the power-on welcome message. And, of course, customize RGB to match your vibe. Dive into the smart display control of Shargeek 300 here: Details matter. Shargeek 300 is built with the finest components, materials, and finishes, delivering sophistication, safety, and enduring performance. To harness the beast-like power of the SHARGEEK 300, only the most advanced, next-generation cell technology will do. As the world's first power bank featuring the same revolutionary Full-Tab Battery Cell technology pioneered by Tesla, the Shargeek 300 fundamentally redefines performance. Featuring a Full-Tab Battery Cell design that achieves significantly lower internal resistance compared to conventional battery cells , the Shargeek 300 unlocks unprecedented fast charging, higher output power, superior heat dissipation, and greater long-term reliability —putting truly next-generation power in your hands. Inside, a compact, ultra-low-power PCB combines unique Shargeek aesthetics with serious practicality. With standby consumption under 500μA , Shargeek 300 holds over 90% charge even after 15 days — always ready when you are. High-power charging generates heat. That's why Shargeek 300 integrates a full aluminum alloy frame, an outer aluminum shell, and thermal silicone pads to whisk away heat efficiently. The result? Safer, more stable, and longer-lasting performance, even under demanding use. Each 180-grit sandblasted, anodized aluminum casing is crafted for a premium look and a silky-smooth grip. “ Every Shargeek 300 aluminum casing is first pressed to my left cheek, and an iPhone on my right cheek - to ensure they feel equally premium ,” says Kailen, Head of Production at SHARGE. The signature transparent casing isn't just for show —it’s about safety. Made from V0 flame-retardant, UL94-certified PC , Shargeek 300 resists scratches and heat, ensuring both beauty and protection in every scenario. Scroll down to watch the combustion test — we've got nothing to hide. Comprehensive protection system ensures Shargeek 300 connected with devices safe and sound. You may view the all test video in Shargeek 300 Testing . Using POWER-Z a third-party charging testing tool and , we verified Shargeek 300's screen readings - nearly identical to lab instruments. Note: Actual power may vary based on device protocols and cable loss. With a 140W charger and PD load tester, Shargeek 300’s screen shows a max input of 138.2W, factoring in cable loss. The transparent casing is crafted from Bayer's V0-rated flame-retardant acrylic, passing UL 94 's toughest standards: Burning Time Requirements: Single-flame application: Combustion must extinguish within 10 seconds. Total flaming time for two flame applications: Must not exceed 50 seconds across five test samples. No Flaming Drips: The material must not produce flaming droplets that ignite cotton placed beneath the test specimen. No Sustained Smoke Combustion: The material must not generate continuous smoke during combustion. Vertical Burning Restriction: When vertically oriented, the burned area must not extend beyond 127mm (5 inches) from the base of the sample. Abouts Us Creating stuff is easy by following the same old patterns. But at SHARGE, we believe in starting from scratch. No preconceived notions. No boundaries. We unleash the perfect blend of trendy lifestyle, unique design, and leading tech. Tech with swag is a way of life. Founded in 2020, SHARGE (formerly Shargeek) is a leading innovator in the power supply industry. Products including Shargeek 100, SHARGE Disk, and Retro 67 enjoy widespread acclaim for their cutting-edge design. With global user satisfaction over 98%, SHARGE has become the #1 selling brand in the $200 price range for power supply products on Amazon US. Going forward, SHARGE will keep dedicated to personal & outdoor power solutions, high-power fast charging technology, and other premium & advanced tech products, aiming to be a pioneer on the path to carbon neutrality and sustainable future.

title: Nimbus: The Smartest Amp Ever Made.
description: The Problem: Too Much Gear 😵‍💫 Being a musician today requires too much gear . Pedals, amps, loopers, audio interfaces, mixers, and power supplies all add up to a complicated , expensive , and bulky setup. Practice at home? You need Bluetooth speakers or an aux-in amp. Recording? You need an interface, cables, and software. Gigging? You’re dragging amps, pedals, and more gear than you’d like. Competitors like Spark , Katana , and Mustang tried to simplify things, but they lock you into factory sounds and closed systems that can’t evolve with you. In some cases, like Lava Studio , they charge you twice as much for basic features like a single quarter-inch input and limited power. The Solution: Nimbus! Nimbus is a music studio in a box . It's your amp, interface, speaker, interface, looper, pedalboard, cabinet, mixer, and more . A powerful 70W stereo amp. Two combo XLR + quarter inch instrument inputs. A USB audio interface for your DAW. A looper for building songs live. Stereo Bluetooth audio streaming. Dual quarter-inch line-outs for larger gigs. Full MIDI support for live control. A full plugin host with Chaos Audio, 3rd party, and even user-made effects. 1/4"-20 threaded hole on the bottom for mounting onto speaker stands. And it all fits into a lightweight amp you can carry with one hand . A Smarter Core 🧠 Inside Nimbus is a 1GHz ARM Cortex processor running on a real-time Linux OS. 5x more powerful than Spark’s DSP chip. Handles multiple effects and amp models at once . Sub-3ms latency means no noticeable delay when playing. 64GB storage for amp models, IRs, and plugin data. Nimbus is the first instrument amp built with the power of a computer inside . Built with PowerBass 🔈 We partnered with PowerBass , a respected speaker manufacturer, to equip Nimbus with dual 4" S-4002 speakers and dedicated tweeters . 70W RMS stereo output (105W peak). 20Hz–20kHz frequency range for full clarity. Louder, cleaner, and more balanced than Spark, Katana, or Mustang. The result? Nimbus sounds like a premium studio monitor system built directly into your amp. Easy Mobile Control 📱 Nimbus comes alive when paired with the Chaos Audio mobile app. Whether you’re dialing in tones at home or tweaking presets on stage, the app makes it fast and intuitive. Fully customizable pedalboard: Build your signal chain in seconds. Add, remove, or reorder effects as if you’re wiring a real board. Tone Shop integration: Download new Chaos Audio, third-party, and user-created plugins directly from the in-app marketplace. Cross-device sync: Any plugin you buy works instantly on Nimbus, Stratus, and your desktop DAW. Preset management: Save, name, and organize your favorite tones. Assign them to footswitches or MIDI controllers. Bluetooth control: Adjust settings wirelessly while sitting across the room, no cables required. The First Open Platform 🌎🧑‍💻 Closed systems limit creativity. Nimbus is open by design. Chaos Audio plugins included at launch. 3rd party plugins from developers like ChowDSP, Shnobel Tone, and Manic FX. User-contributed plugins you can create yourself with FAUST or C++. Impulse Response loading: Store up to 10 IRs (256, 512, or 1024 sample lengths). Neural amp model support: Load your own AIDA-X captures. NAM compatibility is in the works. Nimbus doesn’t just keep up with the future, it lets the community shape it. All the I/O You Need 🔌 Nimbus is equipped with more I/O than any competitor . 2 x XLR + 1/4” combo inputs (mic + guitar simultaneously). 2 x TS line outs (L/R or dual mono). Headphone out (stereo) + AUX in (stereo). USB-C 2-in/2-out audio interface for Mac & PC. USB-A for MIDI controllers or device charging. Second USB-C port for software updates. Bluetooth 5.0 audio streaming + BLE control. Wi-Fi , included and unlocked post-launch via OTA. Simple and Powerful 🔥 Nimbus balances hands-on control with full app integration. Multiknob for fast scrolling and adjustments. 7 RGB LEDs to indicate presets and signal status. Mobile app (Bluetooth) for full control of effects chains. Web app (nimbus.local) for desktop editing. MIDI input support for live switching and looping. Built-in 5-minute looper for practice and songwriting. AI Amp Models 🎸 Nimbus is the only smart amp with built-in, open-source machine learning amp modeling . Use AIDA-X , a free AI amp model loader, to capture real amps and play them inside Nimbus. Save your own tones or download others shared by the community. NAM support (Neural Amp Modeler) is being looked into for even more compatibility. Effects and Amps Included 🎛️ Out of the box, Nimbus will come loaded with a full suite of Chaos Audio effects and amps at no extra cost: 20+ distortions, delays, reverbs, modulation, compressors, EQs. 25+ Chaos Audio amp models with matching cabinet sims. 45+ free effects and amps to cover every genre and style. So Many Use Cases 🎤🎸 Practice: Stream backing tracks via Bluetooth, loop, jam, and experiment. Perform: Mic + guitar simultaneously, controlled by MIDI footswitches. Record: Use Nimbus as a 2-in/2-out USB-C audio interface with zero extra gear. Experiment: Load new plugins, IRs, and amp models. @_jake_dickinson_on Instagram, pictured upper right Hear Nimbus In Action 🎧 Don’t just take our word for it — listen to Nimbus in real-world demos. From crunchy rhythm guitar to lush ambient tones, acoustic instruments, and even vocals with effects, Nimbus makes every sound feel alive . All the tones you hear below come directly from Nimbus. @ebarry_ on Instagram @_jake_dickinson_ on Instagram @ebarry_ onInstagram @_jake_dickinson_ on Instagram @_jake_dickinson_ on Instagram Back Now, Pay Later 🔁 Stretch Goals 🥅 $100K: Official Nimbus carrying case with shoulder strap. - UNLOCKED! $500K: Custom PowerBass speakers angled 15º outward for wider stereo spread. $1M: External battery pack add-on for outlet-free gigs. Roadmap 🏎️ September : Kickstarter launch! December: Public beta testing, testers selected from VIP group Q1 2026: Mass production commences Q2 2026: Nimbus begins shipping to all backers! Proven Kickstarter Success 🏆 We’ve done this before. In 2022, our first project Stratus raised $130K+ on Kickstarter and shipped 1,500+ units worldwide. Nimbus is built on everything we learned, and on feedback from our earliest customers. Refer a Friend, Get 10% 💰 Back Nimbus, then share it . If your friends back through your link, you’ll get 10% of their pledge . It’s our way of saying thank you for spreading the word! Estimated Shipping 📦 $25 flat rate for USA deliveries. $80 flat rate for international deliveries. International backers are responsible for duties and taxes on delivery. Shipping will be charged post-campaign, and if we find cheaper shipping options, we will pass those savings onto you! Warranty 🛠️ Nimbus includes a 1-year warranty covering manufacturing defects starting from delivery. Normal wear and tear, damage from misuse, or unauthorized modification are not covered under the standard warranty. FAQ ❓ Can I pay for Nimbus in installments? Yes! You can use Kickstarter's new Pledge Over Time feature to split the total price into 3 equal payments. The first payment occurs the last day of the campaign, the second payment occurs 1 month later, and the third payment occurs 2 months later. There are no credit checks , 0% interest , and no third-party providers ! When will Nimbus ship? We aim to begin shipping in Q1 2026, Q2 2026 at the latest. How much is shipping for Nimbus? $25 anywhere in the USA. International shipping is a flat $80 (duties/taxes not included). What kind of speakers does Nimbus have? Two 4" PowerBass S-4002 speakers with dedicated tweeters for maximum clarity and deep bass. What is the wattage of Nimbus? 70W stereo. Does Nimbus have a built-in battery? No, Nimbus is AC-powered. We are working on an external rechargeable battery pack as a future add-on! Does Nimbus function as an audio interface? Yes! Nimbus works as a 2-in / 2-out 44.1kHz USB-C audio interface for Mac and Windows. Does Nimbus work with MIDI controllers? Yes! Nimbus has full MIDI support over USB-A and works with any standard MIDI controller. Does Nimbus work well with different instruments? Yes! Nimbus is designed for electric, acoustic, and bass guitars, keyboards, and vocals. How many effects and amps does Nimbus come with? Nimbus comes with 20+ effects and 25+ amp models (with cabs included) at no extra cost! Does Nimbus support IR loading and amp modelers like AIDA-X? Yes! Nimbus will support up to 10 IRs and allows you to load AIDA-X models for maximum versatility. How do I develop for Nimbus? Visit our Developer Portal for resources on building plugins for Nimbus: https://chaosaudio.com/pages/developer-portal How does Nimbus compare to Lava Studio? Nimbus is 70W instead of 40W, has 20% more processing power, larger 4" speakers with tweeters, two combo XLR + 1/4" inputs, full MIDI support, and an open platform for third-party effects. It’s more gig-ready and nearly half the price. What is Nimbus' warranty? Nimbus includes a 1-year warranty covering manufacturing defects (does not cover accidental or unauthorized damage). What is the Nimbus (and other add-ons) return policy? Because of the significant discount we’re offering backers on Kickstarter, we do not accept returns from customers who simply decide they no longer want the product. That said, every Nimbus is guaranteed to arrive in perfect, fully functional condition. If there is ever an issue with your unit, we will make it right—you can be confident we’re not in the business of scamming anyone. Can I get a refund after pledging? Kickstarter pledges fund production and become final once the campaign ends. Because funds go directly toward manufacturing and fulfillment, we cannot offer refunds after the campaign closes. If your reward arrives damaged or defective, we’ll repair or replace it under our warranty. Refunds are not available for changes of mind or personal circumstances. What is Kickstarter? Kickstarter is a launchpad for creators to raise funds for the initial production of their invention. Backers (that's you!) can support creators (that's us!) by pre-ordering their product(s) at a discounted price. When is my money collected? Your money will be collected only after the project ends on Wednesday, October 29, 2025 . If the project is cancelled for any reason, you won't be charged. What payment methods can I use? You can use any debit or credit card associated with Visa, Mastercard or American Express, as well as Discover and JCB cards. Kickstarter does not accept payments with PayPal. Why Chaos Audio? We are a repeat and trusted Kickstarter creator. We've raised over $130k and have more than 1,500 happy customers to show for it! New to Kickstarter? Full Specifications 🔢 Core Specs Processor: ARM Cortex @ 1GHz Operating System: Xenomai Linux OS Memory & Storage: 512MB RAM, 64GB onboard storage Plugin Format Support: Chaos Audio native format (cross-compatible with Stratus and desktop) Audio System Power Output: 70W RMS stereo (105W peak) Speakers: Dual 4" full-range PowerBass S-4002 speakers with dedicated tweeters Frequency Response: 20Hz–20kHz Looper: Built-in, 5-minute recording time Audio Interface: 2-in / 2-out USB-C, 24-bit / 44.1kHz, Mac & PC compatible Latency: Sub-3ms audio processing (real-time plugin engine) Impulse Response Support: Yes, load custom IRs directly into device Neural Amp Modeling Support: Yes, load AIDA DSP models (nano NAM models are a work in progress) Inputs & Outputs Top Input: XLR + 1/4" combo input (mic, synth, guitar, etc.) Rear Input: XLR + 1/4" combo input (mic, synth, second guitar, etc.) Line Outputs: Dual 1/4" TS line outs (L/R or dual mono) Headphone Output: 3.5mm (1/8") stereo Aux Input: 3.5mm (1/8") stereo Pedal Power Output: 9V center-negative, 2A, for powering external pedals USB-C: Audio interface + power/data USB-A: MIDI control, storage, or charging connected devices Second USB-C: Device port (for software updates or file transfer) Wireless Connectivity Bluetooth 5.0 Bluetooth Low Energy for control Bluetooth Audio for streaming Wi-Fi Included (disabled by default, enabled post-launch via OTA update) Control & Integration Mobile App: Full effect chain control via Bluetooth Web App: Access via nimbus.local on local network MIDI: Full MIDI input support over USB-A for live performance, switching, looping Developer Support: Build and load plugins in FAUST, C++, and other supported formats AI Amp Loading: Create and load your own amp models with machine learning thanks to the free AIDA-X integration. We are also looking into NAM support for Nimbus and will have more information soon. Impulse Response Loading: Load your own IR files onto Nimbus and select between 256, 512, or 1024 sample lengths. You can store up to 10 IR files directly on Nimbus for use in presets. Chassis & Design Construction: Durable, acoustically-tuned MDF shell (wrapped in Tolex) Speakers Mounted: Front-facing stereo output Display & Interface: Multiknob, Music Volume, Instrument Volume, and 7 addressable RGB LEDs Carrying Handle: Side-mounted, recessed black plastic handles Footprint: Approx. 14" W × 8.5" H × 7" D (35cm W x 22cm H x 18cm D). Subject to final enclosure tuning. Weight: Targeting ~12lbs (5.4kg). Light enough to carry easily! @bitemarkstheband on Instagram @ebarry_ onInstagram Special Thanks to: Jacob Dickinson - Pro Guitarist and Guitarist at Bethlehem Church in GA - Kickstarter Video and Demos - @_jake_dickinson_ on Instagram Bite Marks - All Girl/Enby Rock Band based in North Florida - Kickstarter Video - @bitemarkstheband on Instagram Emerson Barry - FSU Alum and Pro Guitarist - Kickstarter Video - @ebarry_ onInstagram Supported by: This project is promoted by Jellop, the ad tech power behind the best Kickstarters with 3,500+ successful Kickstarter projects with over $1B raised between them. This project is boosted by BackerCrew

title: Beer Free Being
description: Beer Free Being is an all-online social wellness  challenge interested in helping people take back their lives from habitual, mindless drinking. How many of your passions or health goals have been put in the back burner to serve that dulling pick-up, put-down drinking act after work each day? What’s a real ‘weekend warrior’? What sort of shining being could you become if you went alcohol-free? Choose a 30-, 90-, or 180-day challenge commitment. Set goals: learn to meditate, practice yoga, journal creatively—not a drop of experience needed. We’ve got your back: you’ll receive daily support e-mails, videos, mindfulness exercises, access to a private Facebook community, and loads of resources. You’ll wonder why it’s been so hard to take a break from booze in the first place. Where will Beer Free Being take you? complete, long-term sobriety? a more thoughtful approach to casual boozing? realizing goals that outweigh that glass of chardonnay? here’s how you’ll do it: Support the Kickstarter by donating at the 30-, 90-, or 180-day challenge tier; Be welcomed into a private community of searching, like-minded individuals; Learn from experts how to kick the booze and create healthy rituals; ‘Regain power over alcohol CHALLENGE’ starts January 2020. meet your experts: Chase Alexander Hiffernan won UNO's business plan competition in Omaha—Soul Case Movement, his first yoga studio, was the result. He’s a proud pilgrim and backpacker, 500-RYT certified, and the creator of Beer Free Being. @intentional.chase Sarah Kucera is educated as chiropractor, teacher, and auryvedic practitioner. She’s also a studio owner, a cat mom, and author of The Ayurvedic Self-Care Handbook. @sarah_kucera / sarahkucera.com Joseph Spece took an MFA in writing from Columbia University. He’s a Ruth Lilly Fellow, has authored two volumes of poetry, and is founding editor at Fathom Books. Also: charismatic af. @mr_spece / fathombooks.org Abbe Ciulla is a world-traveling 500-RYT yogi and fitness guru. She’s also a studio owner, creator of a 200-hour yoga training, and feel-good motivator. @mightyyogini / mightyyogini.com Lora McCarville is a 500-RYT yogi on a mission to make mindfulness more accessible. She’s a lead yogi for 200- + 300-hour trainings, a mother, and a somatic movement & trauma recovery teacher. @loramccarville why we need you: Communities aren’t built alone—obviously. While we’ve already begun to reap the benefits of being beer-free on our own, we wonder: could buddies take us to the zenith? what sort of fun could 500 BfB-ers have on the road? what bike trails could possibly hold us? could mushroom tacos and mint iced tea survive our onslaught? We need you for friendship and community, yes. But also, we need your support to build a robust web presence, pay our experts, and set aside time to plan what’s next for all of us as beings exploring a life less dominated by drink.

title: AMS-Automated marine services
description: I have become very excited and passionate about bringing an Autonomous solar powered vessel to market. I have been inspired by my love of the wonders hidden under the oceans and by family and friends in their successful business adventures working on large environmental cleanup projects. I would like to combine environmental cleanup with environmental equipment. This project is to spring board the development of larger autonomous solar vessels including the potential future of automated vessels serving in a small tugboat capacity. Helping to eliminating fuel cost from transportation enabling small producers to easily, cheaply and reliably get their products to market along inland waterways. By supporting this project you can have your choice of 8" desk model, super fast R/C or AMS automated App controlled Tri-hull boat. Each one is hand crafted..

title: Attack on Space: Live Action
description: 1,000 years ago, humanity faced extinction. Since then, they have been traveling through space, trying to find a safe haven. The black vacuum of space has taken its toll, and hope for finding a new home wears thin. Recent years have been neither kind nor gentle: monsters of all kinds threaten the survival of the remaining population. Titans, the very creatures that destroyed Ark Maria and most of its passengers, have resurfaced. Perhaps more terrifying, though, are the monsters that lurk in the very structure of Ark Rose—corruption and dirty politics dominate the ship. Once again, humanity’s existence has been thrown into peril. As their chances dwindle, they put the last of their hope into one boy: Eren Jaeger. Set in a futuristic universe with characters and a storyline that is inspired by Hajime Isayama’s Attack on Titan , and based on the popular audio drama created by Aaron and Reuben Lack, AoS:LA does not claim any association with, endorsement by, or partnership with the Attack on Titan franchise or its respective copyright holders. Attack on Space: The Fall of Ark Maria Promotional Short Film For our voyage into the depths of space, we have enlisted a specialist. Rowan Glenn has joined the Attack on Space: Live Action team as our VFX and CG Artist, bringing the world of AoS:LA to life. Known for his work on multiple projects for the band Muse and title such as $lowdown, Starving in Suburbia, and Kristin's Christmas Past , we are excited to have him on our crew. Our six minute promotional short film required many weeks of work on his part, and just a few samples of the animation process is sampled below. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Above: Animation Pass/Final Result of opening title sequence. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Above: Animation Pass/Texturing/Final Result of the fall of Ark Maria Rowan has served as the master creator for all of the elements that make AoS:LA a true piece of science fiction, constructing and animating Titans, spacecrafts, and more. You can learn more about Rowan Glenn and his works at http://www.rowanglenn.com/ AoS:LA is not possible without your support! As our thanks to all of our backers for their incredible support, all backers will be given a special thank you on our blog and in the credits of the film. In addition to this, though, we have many rewards that we hope our backers will enjoy: ACCESS GRANTED: Download of Attack on Space: The Audio Drama's Episode, The Missing Year , exclusive to Kickstarter backers. Listen to the preview here: NEW RECRUIT: DRM free digital download of Attack on Space: Live Action . (Does not include "ACCESS GRANTED" level rewards.) CITIZEN: Receive both downloads of The Missing Year and Attack on Space: Live Action. WELCOME ABOARD: Receive Attack on Space: Live Action on DVD, in addition to a digital download of AoS:LA's OST, composed by Nathaniel Platier (feat. Tav Lyn and Jonah Scott) . A.R.M.I.N.: Digital Ringtone Download of A.R.M.I.N., voiced by Adoxographist! TRAINING BEGINS TODAY: Receive a limited-edition Attack on Space: Live Action T-Shirt! CLASSIFIED DOCUMENTS: Receive a digital download of the script of Attack on Space: Live Action , alongside downloads of the mini-webcomics based on Attack on Space , created by Kelli Bort, Sierra Rush, and Mona Kenway. "Elias" — A Sample Webcomic Panel Further rewards are listed in the sidebar, including customized ringtones, opportunities to meet the cast and crew, signed props, and more! We are a short film production by an entirely student crew coming from Loyola Marymount University, the University of Southern California, Columbia College Chicago, Columbia College Hollywood, and Emerson College. We are aiming to produce a work by fans, for fans. Lauren Conn and Marco Bottiligeri Lauren Conn (Executive Producer) , is a 21 year old screenwriting major at Loyola Marymount University, with an emphasis in writing and production for television. Lauren has won multiple competitions for both screenwriting, playwriting, and her short stories. Beyond film and television, she has a love for anime, video games, and voice acting. The live-action adaptation of the parody Attack on Space is an endeavor that will allow Lauren to combine all mediums of the entertainment industry she loves. Marco Bottiligeri (Director) is a nationally acclaimed, young director who began filming when he was five. With experience and determination beyond his years, Marco’s films and music videos have been screened and televised internationally. “An actor’s director,” as some have called him, Marco values the relationships he builds with his actors on set to bring out the very best in their performances. The founder of Happy Tree Films, he continues to expand and improve upon his company, with “Hollywood Professionalism” at the heart of its focus. Julian Curtis, Jonah Scott, and Jessie Pridemore Julian Curtis' (Administrator Caleb) credits include SPOOKED (Prod. Bryan Singer & Felicia Day), LEGEND OF THE SEEKER, EAST WEST 101, RESCUE SPECIAL OPS, TWISTER WARNING, DANCE ACADEMY 2 amongst many others. He will next appear in THE BRITISHES pilot (DirectTV) and a Lionsgate UK feature film opposite the biggest names in music. Jonah Scott (Jean Kirschtein) joins Attack on Space: Live Action reprising his role in the audio drama as Jean Kirschtein. Professionally trained to act on the stage and in the booth, his passion extends to the screen— featured in many student films, including the recently released "A Story Without Words." Jessie Pridemore (Helena Acacius) has been acting from the age of seventeen. In 2006, she starred in an award winning independent feature that was featured on Apple.com. In early 2014, she starred in a Windows Phone commercial. Jessie is also an award winning seamstress, with her works featured on Machinima and Nerdist, and created for many companies, including Obsidian Entertainment. Reuben Lack, Nathanael Platier, and Aaron Lack Additionally, the AoS:LA team is joined by members of the 104th Voice Squad; creators of the original, Attack on Space audioplay. Reuben Lack is the creator and co-writer of Attack on Space , where he also voiced the character of Marco Bodt. He is a student at Emory University who currently runs the audio post-production startup company, Cylight Studios. Aaron Lack is one of the writers for Attack on Space: Live Action. He spends his time mostly sitting in chairs, which he thinks is pretty fun. He thinks this whole Attack on Space thing is pretty neat, and is quite honored to be working with the people involved with the project. Nathanael Platier is a musician focusing primarily on Orchestral arrangements and compositions. Composing for audio projects such as Attack on Space and featured in VSauce, Nathanael joined our team to produce a high quality, original soundtrack for Attack on Space: Live Action. Creating a short film is not an inexpensive process. While AoS:LA is a non-profit project which will be accessible online for free, the genre of science-fiction is not an inexpensive realm to produce in. While we have reduced the costs associated with the production of this film primarily through having crew members donate their time, there is still a great deal that is left for us to cover. The current budget for a ten to fifteen minute short film adaptation of Attack on Space is $35,000. A rough breakdown of our budget is as follows:

title: Categories
description:
Nicolas Jaar in Conversation with Lydia Lunch Lydia Lunch has defined the underground music and art scene for over thirty years. Predictable only in her unpredictability, she has exploited every creative outlet at her disposal, from film to books, photography to poetry. —San Francisco Weekly Lydia Lunch traffics in the reality behind the reality. Think of the Situationists, or Henry Miller, or Duchamp’s final masterpiece, Etant Donné….Like Duchamp, Lunch has created that secret, eroto-violent universe spied through the keyhole to which she alone holds the key. — Jerry Stahl HOW IT BEGAN I've known and worked with Lydia Lunch since she was 19 and I was 23.  We grew up in the late '70s New York music/film/art scene and brought our radical visions to the underground where we broke boundaries, both shocking and enticing our audiences with our uncensored music and films.  Fast forward to several months ago, as I watched the ever brash and luminous Lydia Lunch performing with her extraordinary band, RETROVIRUS, I realized that I needed to make the definitive documentary, LYDIA LUNCH The War is Never Over . Lydia Lunch performing at HOWL! Happening (Photo: Bob Krasner) No Wave legend, and confrontationist, Lydia has changed and influenced the world around her and continues to be at the forefront of psycho-sexual transgressive music and spoken word performance.  I hope you will join me on this journey that will take us into the conscious and unconscious depths of her wide ranging issues from patriarchy to sexuality and the brutality of war with rare emotional honesty and intimacy. Lydia Lunch (1978) ABOUT THE FILM The feature documentary, LYDIA LUNCH The War is Never Over , will voice and visualize the extraordinary, outrageous work and life of spoken word artist and singer, Lydia Lunch. We will follow her on the road back to her hometown of Rochester, on tour, backstage, and in interviews revealing the radical mind, the visceral music, and the edgy, philosophical, and humorous personality of Lunch. Interview at the Roxy Hotel (Photo: Aom Pinyopusarerk) We have already filmed a major interview with Lydia at the Roxy Hotel as well as with 26-year-old Nicolas Jaar, music producer and DJ. Influenced by Lydia's music at age 10, Nico went on to collaborate with her on a new mix of Lunch's seminal spoken word piece, Conspiracy of Women. We also interviewed Bibbe Hansen of Warhol fame who, with the encouragement of Lydia, has now written hundreds of pages of her memoirs from her wild child times. Not only is this film about Lydia Lunch, but the scene that she continues to grow and influence; creative people throughout the world who join Lydia to break the rules with purpose and vision. ABOUT LYDIA A little background for the uninitiated! In 1976 at age sixteen, teenage runaway and autodidact Lydia Lunch arrived in
 New York inspired by the ravings of Lester Bangs in Creem Magazine, the Velvet
 Underground ’s sarcastic wit, the glamour of the New York Dolls , and the poetic
 scat of Patti Smith’s Piss Factory .  In 1977, she founded the hugely influential No Wave band, Teenage Jesus and 
the Jerks . Photo & Design by Julia Gorton This is when I first witnessed Lydia onstage and she has been an inspiration to me ever since. She was singing/screaming poetry in the most menacing and brutal style, inhabiting a new way of envisioning "woman."  She awakened the angst and alienation of that time. I got up my nerve and asked her to act in the cult classic, Black Box . Clad in black leather mini-skirt, spiked heels, and screaming, "Shut up and Suffer," Lydia made cinematic history. Teenage Jesus and the Jerks (1978) In early 1978, artist and producer Brian Eno attended a series of
 shows at Artist's Space and produced No New York , an anthology LP featuring
the four strongest bands— Teenage Jesus and the Jerks , The Contortions , Mars and DNA .  The recording remains as one of the most influential—and 
extraordinarily bold—debuts of the time. No New York Album Lunch has released more than 30 albums and played with countless influential
 bands. Teenage Jesus and the Jerks 13.13 8-Eyed Spy Shotgun 
Wedding RETROVIRUS Big Sexy Noise Cypress Grove Medusa’s Bed Throughout her career Lunch has defied categorization and actively conquered 
new territories—gaining international recognition for the innovative quality of 
her work. 8 Eyed Spy LIVE (1981) Queen of Siam HOW WE WILL USE YOUR MONEY LYDIA LUNCH The War is Never Over has begun production.  We have shot in-depth interviews with Lydia Lunch, musician Nicolas Jaar, and writer Bibbe Hansen.  We have filmed some live performances.  A truly extraordinary one was just this past weekend, March 4, 2017, at HOWL! Happening.  Lydia was on fire and she lit up the audience with the fierce and insightful words that emanated from her entire being.  Very inspiring! Photo: Jasmine Hirst Right now, we need to raise at least $50,000 to film Lydia on tour with her band, RETROVIRUS, performing her spoken word as well as interviewing pivotal people in Lydia’s life. Weasel Walter Thurston Moore Ron Athey Jim Sclavunos Donita Sparks JG Thirlwell Jerry Stahl These interviews will provide an audio bed of stories in a fast-cutting After Effects timeline of Lydia’s life with the architectural landscape of New York City circa 1977 to the present.  This will not only be wildly entertaining, but for the first time, give viewers an insider's look at the scene Lydia hails from. Ultimately, the film will frame Lunch’s music and performance through the lens of the various philosophical themes that have obsessed her for years: sex, violence, drugs, deviance, porn, feminism, misogyny, lust and love...a rule breaker not easily defined and never constrained! Give what you can and be part of the reemergence of underground filmmaking! A SENSE OF URGENCY We need every one of you to help make this a reality. No contribution is too small. And the rewards are great!  But, the biggest reward is the impact we all will have on the culture.  We hope LYDIA LUNCH The War is Never Over , with its wit, honesty, balls out, mouth open attitude, will help us all to kick the ball forward, toward a future in which we truly have liberation of the mind and body and a new sense of healing from trauma. SPREAD THE WORD Word of mouth is how we’re going to build our audience.  Please email, Facebook , Instagram , Tweet …even pick up the phone! WHY KICKSTARTER I grew up in the New York underground film scene before indie filmmaking was even a phrase. We were idealists who were going to buck the system by making DIY confrontational films, uncensored and uncompromising.  I've been doing it for 40 years and my approach to this film continues the rebel independent tradition.  I'm working with Kickstarter because it is truly a platform that put the power back into the hands of the creator and the audience.  This film needs to be made and as an idealist, I know there are those like-minded people out there who want to see it as well.  There is an urgency to tell these stories!  We aren't getting any younger! xox Beth B Beth B & Lydia Lunch (Photo: Curt Hoppe) REWARDS *** NEW REWARDS FOR THE FINAL DAYS OF THE CAMPAIGN *** PLEDGE $700 -
