title: The Gray Dwarf Stars
description: The short film attempts to evoke the resonance of a part of the audience with two protagonists with completely different backgrounds, races, and circumstances. We hope this film can provide courage to those who are struggling or used to struggling in their own elevator to move on to a better tomorrow. We aim to create a stage for two struggling characters, mentally and physically,  it's going to be a comedy/drama that's easy and fun to watch. Our goal is to maintain a humorous atmosphere between the two leads, at the same time have a discussion about the predicament/nihilism that many of us are facing. Although $20,000 sounds like a lot. But that's what truly makes the magic happen! We are working as hard as we can on all aspects of the production, from crews to location, from the broken elevator to the star in the sky. With your help we can all together make this meaningful trip to the moon happen. Enough money will help us to ensure the high quality of this short film, which will not waste your money and betray your trust. All money we raised will go directly to the project. Although it sucks, 20% of the money will be paid to Kickstarter including the payment processing fees. If we do somehow exceed our budget, finger cross if this ever happens,  we will use the additional funds to cover up the expenses for post production, which includes, hiring an editor, festivals, promotion and shipping all the rewards. 在最后的最后，作为导演，我想用我最熟悉的语言给你们写一些众筹之外的东西，灰矮星这部电影本质上是一部对虚无主义进行对抗，以及对生活态度进行探讨的一部电影，它并没有像我的上一部短篇一样，晦涩难懂。灰矮星既是一部喜剧，也是一部悲剧，这和我们的人生又何尝的不慎相似，我们在名为喜剧的路上寻找，名为悲剧的结局，但是这条路很长，长到我们会忘记了，这条路最终都会走向悲剧，这条路又很短，短到我们会把悲剧挂在嘴边忘记了活着的意义。所以才有了这么一个电梯，属于我的电梯，在这个电梯里，长短交融，悲喜交加，可我不能永远呆在这里，因为这不过是一时的困境，即使说我享受这样的瞬间，我亦或者任何人都不能一直待在这里。为此我创造力灰矮星，或许说陈宇或者达利都不完美，他们都不存在一个准确的方向，但正因为他们既没有白的透彻，与此同时也没有黑的彻底，才能看透世界的本质。所以前进吧，灰矮星。 PLEASE FOLLOW US: Instagram:  @ thegraydwarfstars  @paradox.films Twitter:  @graydwarfstars Facebook:   @PARADOX FILMS TikTok:  @PARADOX FILMS

title: Categories
description: This film is inspired by a true story and follows the journey of Amir and his mother from Iran to Vancouver following the death of his father. Amir follows his best friend Gio into a life of crime in order to support his mother. Amir has a dilemma. He is leading a double life. One is of a talented actor, a dream that is supported by Paul (his acting teacher and mentor) and his girlfriend Bella who wants him to leave his life of crime behind. Amir's internal struggle between following his dreams and leaving "the life" has reached a turning point. What will he do? As Amir grapples with his demons the story of his father unfolds in flashbacks showing his own struggles in Iran. Amir, like his father is conflicted between ethics and survival. A Reflection Of You is a deeply personal story about family, love, friendship and morality. A Reflection Of You is a film that started getting made when I was 15 years old. I moved from the Middle East to Vancouver, Canada in 1996. My family had moved around quite a few times due to the Gulf War so packing up and moving wasn't new but this time it was different. Vancouver was a massive culture shock. Very different from the middle east and it was a tough adjustment. I was bullied almost immediately when I walked through the doors of my school.  I had to fight to  protect myself. It wasn't until an Italian boy took a liking to me and started protecting me that I started to find my place there. Although not fully biographical this film is an exploration of that time. It is deeply personal and will resonate with anyone who has experienced struggle, hardships and feelings of not belonging.  I am lucky to have made it out and proud to be able to use my art to tell this story. Many people I grew up with weren't so lucky. While you personally may not have an immigrant story, we have all grappled with experiences that were unique. We have all had struggles to find our voices and figure out who we really are. This story is for all of us. Mershad Torabi is an Iranian-Canadian actor based in New York City, recognized for his dynamic performances across film, television, and theater. In 2024, Mershad played  Farhad in the acclaimed TV mini-series The Penguin , a spin-off from the Batman universe. The show was a massive hit and is one of the highest rated shows on HBO. Additionally, he appeared as Bijan in Season 2 of T he Night Agent. He also played Mohammed in the 2024 film Step Back, Doors Closing , a poignant love story set in Washington, D.C. The film was featured at the Dances With Films festival, highlighting his ability to engage audiences in emotionally charged narratives. Emily Alatalo is a Canadian actress born in Sudbury, Ontario. She is best known for her role as Ginnie McMillan on " Workin' Moms " (Netflix/CBC) and as Cara Martin in " Christmas Plus One " (Lifetime). Emily's athleticism has landed her roles in action-packed projects, including " Spare Parts " (2020), " The Breach " (2022), and " Purgatory Jack " (2023). Emily has since made a name for herself as a romantic leading lady, starring in " A Perfect Match " (2021), " The Princess and the Bodyguard " (2022), and " Christmas in Maple Hills " (2023). Look for her in action comedy " Sunset Superman " alongside Billy Zane (Titanic), Michael Jai White (The Dark Knight) and Evan Stern (Letterkenny), to be released summer 2024. You can see Franco in the " Chucky " the TV series as Hicks. In 2022, Franco starred in several television movies, including " 14 Love Letters " as Jackson and " Well Suited for Christmas " as Brett Stone. He also appeared in " The Story of Love " as Woody. In 2023, he featured in " Christmas Time Capsule " as James, a film that holds personal significance as it stars his real-life partner, Emily Alatalo. When not acting, Lo Presti enjoys his time with family and friends, writing poetry and music, playing the guitar, traveling the world, and juggling a soccer ball from time to time. Enrico Natale is an Independent Spirit/NAACP Image Award nominated filmmaker, with decades of professional experience as a writer, director, producer, actor, and editor. He has produced over twenty two feature films and countless other projects with his work being seen on Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV, Sony, NBC, Warner Bros and more. He prides himself on being a jack of all trades. His recent film, The Killing of Kenneth Chamberlain , executive produced by Academy Award winner Morgan Freeman, which Enrico produced, edited, and played one of the starring roles, can be seen now on HBO Max . Enrico received an Independent Spirit Award nomination for his work as an editor. Enrico's latest film, The Ritual , tells the true story of one of the most infamous paranormal events in American history. The film stars Academy Award winner Al Pacino and Dan Stevens , and is set to be released in theaters worldwide next year. Enrico's credits for the film include: producer, story writer, editor, and actor. Making a movie is very expensive and even though we are putting in our own money we still need some help to get fully fund it! This story has been years in the making and we are finally close to getting it made. So reach into your generous hearts and help our a creative dream come true! Help us make one of the greatest films ever!What will we use the money for The Man Who Rose From Concrete symbolizes the formidable journey Amir undertakes, embodying his resilience and transformation. Rising from adversity and shaped by his challenging surroundings, he grows from humble beginnings into a product of his environment. As Amir finally makes the courageous choice to leave his life of crime behind and start anew, an unforeseen tidal wave of events crashes into his world. Was this his destined path, or could he have altered his fate?

title: Legacy of Valor - Medieval RPG - Build, Conquer, Rule
description: Don’t forget to add the game to your Steam Wishlist - it helps us more than you think! Click the image below or copy the link. https://store.steampowered.com/app/3504490/Legacy_of_Valor/ Join our Discord and stay up to date with all the latest news, announcements and exclusive updates! Click the image below or copy the link. https://discord.com/invite/legacyofvalor Stretch Goals We’ve set our base funding goal to bring Legacy of Valor to life with all core features. But why stop there? With your help, we aim to expand the game’s scope and content even further. Here are our Kickstarter Stretch Goals , each adding something special at increasing funding milestones (all backers get these additions if unlocked!): Every stretch goal reached means Legacy of Valor becomes bigger and better for everyone. We’re incredibly excited at the possibility of unlocking these features and we promise to keep the community involved every step of the way. Let’s dream big and make Legacy of Valor the ultimate medieval RPG experience! About the Game Legacy of Valor Build your kingdom, fight for glory, and forge your legend. Legacy of Valor is a grand single-player/co-op medieval RPG that blends castle building, territory management, large scale battles , and a sweeping narrative into one unforgettable experience. Set in a realistic Middle Ages realm torn by ambition and conflict, you rise from nothing, only to risk it all. Will you rebuild your ancestral castle and protect your people as a beloved lord, or burn the world as a dreaded warlord? The choice is yours. And when the story’s final chapter is written, a limitless sandbox mode opens, letting you continue to expand your domain and shape the world long after the main quest is over. Features Legacy of Valor combines deep strategy, role playing, and open world exploration. Here’s how you will forge your path: Build & Manage Your Stronghold: Start from the ashes of your ancestral castle and rebuild it into a mighty fortress. Expand your village into a thriving town, construct workshops and farms, and manage resources to sustain your growing realm. Every building you place, from blacksmiths to barracks, isn’t just cosmetic, but vital to your domain’s prosperity. Can you create a castle town that will withstand the test of time (and attack)? Lead Armies & Epic Battles: Command your own forces in massive battles against bandit hordes, rival lords, or even armies of the crown. Train knights and footmen, equip them with weapons you’ve crafted, and devise clever tactics. Whether you’re defending your castle walls in a siege or leading a cavalry charge on an open field, combat in Legacy of Valor is visceral and intense. Prove your valor on the battlefield and watch your banner soar over hard-won victories. Shape Your Story: Legacy of Valor is driven by a strong, choice-rich narrative . You are the author of your character’s fate. Will you be a just ruler loved by your people, or a ruthless tyrant feared across the land? Key story decisions lead to branching paths and consequences. Decide how to deal with scheming nobles, how to respond to the challenges to your honor, and whether to seek revenge or redemption. Your reputation will precede you: NPCs will react to your deeds, and the world’s state will change based on your actions. Every choice writes a new chapter in your legacy. Craft, Trade & Thrive: Experience the authentic medieval life, beyond combat and castles. Craft your own weapons, armor, and provisions from raw materials. Then trade surplus goods with neighboring villages and towns to earn coin or favor. Manage your settlement’s economy: hold feasts to improve morale, hire craftsmen, and balance the needs of peasants and nobles. A thriving domain will attract settlers…and perhaps envious rivals. Can you keep your people fed, your coffers filled, and your enemies at bay? Endless Sandbox Adventure: After the main storyline reaches its climax, the journey is far from over. Sandbox Mode lets you continue playing Legacy of Valor with no restraints. Continue expanding your territory, undertake randomly generated quests, hunt legendary bandits, or wage war on neighboring provinces. Become the architect of your own medieval saga: forge alliances, conquer lands, or simply wander the open world righting wrongs. In sandbox mode, the world remains dynamic, new challenges and opportunities will keep emerging. Write your own endless chapter in the annals of Valor . Whether you prefer focusing on city-building, engaging in strategic warfare, or living out a personal story (good or evil), Legacy of Valor offers a rich gameplay experience for every kind of RPG fan. Core Pillars Legacy of Valor is shaped by four core pillars, systems that intertwine to give players not just a story to follow, but a world to truly shape. Meaningful Combat Combat is grounded, skill-based, and brutal. Master timing, spacing, and stamina to survive gritty duels or command large scale battles. Every choice in combat matters, retreat, rally, or risk it all. Kingdoms You Shape Your lands evolve through your actions. Build and manage villages, fortresses, and entire regions. Enact laws, levy taxes, and defend your people. Every structure placed, every decision made, leaves a lasting mark. Story Meets Sandbox Legacy of Valor blends a branching, reactive narrative with sandbox freedom. Choose your path, become a merciful ruler, a ruthless conqueror, or a wandering exile. Explore, trade, build, or destroy. The world responds and remembers. A Living Legacy The consequences of your actions echo across generations. Create your family line, pass down lands and heirlooms, or leave behind a broken realm. Your legacy lives on through what you build, or what you leave in ashes. The World of Valor Welcome to a realm torn between fading honor and rising ambition, a grounded feudal world where blood, politics, and power intertwine. In Legacy of Valor , you won’t find ancient prophecies or glowing crystals. Instead, you’ll step into a land shaped by the weight of steel and the will of those who dare to lead. It’s a world of decaying kingdoms, border wars, and fractured loyalties. Trust is rare. Betrayal is common. And legends are earned, not foretold. Every region has its own history, its own scars. From frost covered highlands to war torn borderlands, each territory feels distinct, shaped by the lords who ruled it, and the people who survived them. As you rise from a wandering exile to a lord with land of your own, you’ll discover ancient ruins, lost dynasties, and forgotten truths buried in the mud of the past. But you’re not just a visitor here. This world reacts. It remembers. And it reshapes itself around your decisions. Will your name be whispered with reverence, or spit with hatred? The Story So Far You are twenty-three years old. A young nobleman raised in the shadow of courtly intrigues and battlefield tales, tutored in swordplay and honor by the loyal knight Edran, your surrogate father. But everything changed the night you crossed a line. A forbidden affair with the lady of the castle. A duel demanded by the lord himself. You never got the chance. Instead, you fled under cover of darkness, branded a dishonor to the house that raised you. Now, hunted and disgraced, you uncover a truth long buried, your bloodline is not only noble, but royal. By ancestral right, lands and titles belong to you. Lands now left in ruin. A realm forgotten, waiting to be reclaimed. To restore what is yours, you must rally allies, rebuild your estate, and rise in a world where loyalty is bought, power is taken, and legacy is forged in fire. This is not just a tale of survival. It is a story of restoration . Of vengeance . Of claiming your birthright and shaping the fate of a kingdom. Gameplay Breakdown Legacy of Valor blends deep role-playing with strategic domain management and epic-scale warfare. Lead your personal warband, rebuild your ancestral lands, and make choices that shape a living, reactive world. Rebuild Your Legacy After fleeing your noble home, you’re left with nothing but a claim and ruins. Step by step, you’ll reclaim your birthright by rebuilding your estate: construct a village, restore your castle, raise defenses, and manage production buildings. Your decisions affect prosperity, loyalty, and morale. Govern wisely, or risk losing the people who follow you. Lead Your Warband & Command Armies At the heart of your strength lies your personal warband a handpicked group of companions with unique skills, personalities, and backstories. Train them, gear them up, and take them on missions and into battle. But your influence doesn't end there. As a rightful noble, you’ll also be able to command large scale armies, recruit peasants, knights, and mercenaries to lead into open war. During major battles, you’ll seamlessly shift between fighting on the front lines and issuing tactical orders from above. Your warband will stand by your side in these legendary clashes. Deep Roleplaying & Moral Choices, it all shapes the world around you. Every decision matters. Whether you show mercy or cruelty, diplomacy or domination Dialogue choices, political alliances, and moral dilemmas will affect the story, your companions, and the fate of entire regions. Develop your character as a warrior, strategist, ruler, or diplomat. Unlock unique traits and carve out your own legend or infamy. Combat That Evolves With You Combat is fluid, reactive, and skill based. Whether you’re dueling with blades or leading a siege with hundreds of troops, each encounter demands a different approach. Master your preferred weapons - swords, polearms, bows and adapt your tactics as enemies grow smarter. Improve your gear, refine your warband’s roles, and use the terrain to your advantage. Sandbox Beyond the Story When the main campaign ends, the world doesn’t. Legacy of Valor becomes a fully open sandbox where your story continues. Expand your holdings, go on new adventures, dominate trade, or wage war across new territories. No credits roll. No limits. Your realm, your rules. Why Back Now? Legacy of Valor isn’t just a game, it’s a passion project years in the making by a small independent team (led by a solo developer with a grand vision). By backing now on Kickstarter, you become more than a customer; you become a crucial part of the journey . Here’s why pledging your support today makes a difference: Bring an Epic Vision to Life: Legacy of Valor is an ambitious indie project, your backing provides the resources needed to complete development at the quality it deserves. You’re essentially a co-creator, enabling features and content that might otherwise remain only dreams. Exclusive Rewards & Early Access: Many of the rewards we’re offering, from the Collector’s Edition goodies to in-game items like the Backer’s Crown, or having your name immortalized in the credits - won’t be available after the campaign . Backing now is the only way to secure these exclusive items. Plus, select tiers grant early Alpha/Beta playtest access , letting you play Legacy of Valor before anyone else and see the game evolve in real-time Shape the Game’s Development: We believe great games are made with their community. Backers will get behind the scenes updates, access to private backer forums/Discord channels, and the opportunity to give feedback directly to the developers during production. Your ideas and input can influence design elements, balancing, even quest ideas. You’re not just buying a game, you’re helping craft it. Join a Community of Adventurers: By pledging, you join the ranks of fellow RPG lovers and Kickstarter veterans rallying behind Legacy of Valor . From sharing strategies on building the perfect castle to debating story choices (no spoilers, of course!), our community is already coming together. You’ll get to interact with the dev team and other backers, share your excitement, and maybe make a friend or two on our journey to release day and beyond. Confidence & Transparency: We know backing a game is an act of trust. Our team is committed to full transparency, with regular progress updates, budget breakdowns, and realistic timelines. Legacy of Valor is already in active development (a playable prototype and early demo exist), and with your support, we can hit our targeted release. We’re not starting from scratch; we’re accelerating and expanding an existing foundation. And if challenges arise, you’ll be the first to know what we’re doing to overcome them. In short, backing now is the best way to experience everything Legacy of Valor has to offer, and to ensure the final game reaches its maximum potential. We can’t do this without you, and we wouldn’t want to - together, let’s forge a legend! Community & Events Legacy of Valor - Beyond the Screen Legacy of Valor is more than a game. It’s already bringing people together through real world events and unforgettable medieval experiences. Gamescom 2025 We showcased Legacy of Valor to the international gaming community at Gamescom 2025, sharing our vision and connecting with players, publishers, and fans from around the world. Castle Event 2025 - Brandýs nad Labem In October 2025, we hosted our own medieval event at the Brandýs nad Labem castle in the Czech Republic, bringing Legacy of Valor to life like never before. Live orchestral recording of the Legacy of Valor soundtrack Playable prototype demo zone inside the castle Knight tournament & sword fighting shows Fire performances and medieval music Authentic food & crafts (including leather items with the Legacy of Valor emblem) Overnight medieval experience in the castle More than 2,000 attendees This event proved that Legacy of Valor is not only a game - it’s a living world and a growing community. Game City Vienna (Austria) – October 10–12, 2025 Poznań Game Arena (Poland) – October 24–26, 2025 Comic Con Brno (Czech Republic) – November 1–2, 2025 What we’ve built with the community so far is only the beginning. With your support on Kickstarter, we will take Legacy of Valor to the next level - from castles in the real world to castles you can build in-game. Upcoming Shows During the Kickstarter You’ll be able to meet us in person and try out Legacy of Valor at several events during the campaign: Comic Con Prague (Czech Republic) – March 13–15, 2026 Roadmap to Valor Legacy of Valor is already well underway. A playable prototype is complete, featuring the core systems: early quests, foundational combat, building mechanics, and narrative setup. This version has been internally tested and shown to partners, but it’s still a rough diamond, your support will shape its final form. With your help, we’ll take this prototype and transform it into a fully realized, expansive RPG that lives up to the vision we’ve built over the past years. Q4 2025: Kickstarter Campaign & Production Kickoff Kickstarter launch + backer community activation Finalizing development roadmap based on funding Scaling the development team (design, art, tech) Continued work on core gameplay systems Early alpha testing begins for eligible backers Pre-production of physical rewards (artbook, CE items) Q1–Q4 2026: Full Production Year One Major content creation: storyline, side quests, regions Advanced settlement building mechanics Warband management and large-scale battle implementation Combat refinement, expanded weapon variety Visual polish and optimization Closed beta testing with community feedback loops Localization work begins (multi-language support) First marketing beats and dev updates Q1–Q3 2027: Final Production & Polishing Voice acting and cinematic cutscene creation Multiplayer infrastructure & server expansion (based on stretch goals) Full world population (NPCs, dynamic world systems) Final pass on UI/UX, performance optimization Final playtests & quality assurance Press previews, influencer campaign, final trailers Q4 2027: Release Digital release of Legacy of Valor on Steam (PC) Physical editions shipping to backers Launch-day patches and server support Community events and modding support preparations Post-Launch (2028+) DLCs and expansions (e.g. Crusader campaign, naval combat) Full modding toolkit release Console versions based on funding and demand Long-term support & additional languages Live multiplayer events and seasonal updates Reward Tiers We’ve crafted a range of pledge tiers to fit every budget and level of enthusiasm. Here’s an overview of the Reward Tiers and what each includes. (All amounts in USD. Higher tiers include all rewards from lower tiers, unless noted otherwise.): $5 - Supporter of the Realm Your Name in Game Credits ( Special Thanks ) Shoutout in Backer-Only Updates Exclusive Digital Wallpaper (Supporter Edition) Special Discord Flair (Supporter Role) $15 - Hero of Legend (Extremely Limited: 20) All previous rewards Personalized Statue or Bust of Your Character (shipped) Co-Design a Major Questline / Story Arc with the Dev Team Executive Producer Credit 15 Steam Keys VIP Discord Role Hero of Legend $10,000 - Immortalized Legend (Ultimate Tier: 15) All previous rewards Become a Major Character in the game (face + voice acting) Lifetime Invitations to Select Dev Meetings VIP Launch Event Treatment (accommodation incl., travel excl.) Custom Painting of Your In-Game Character (by concept artist) Official “Patron of Legacy” Credit (prominent placement) 25 Steam Keys VIP Discord Role Immortal Legend "Some heroes are remembered. Others are immortalized. This is your moment to stand among the legends, in steel, in stone, and in the hearts of all who enter the realm of Valor." No matter what tier you choose, every backer is a hero in our book. We’ve carefully considered pricing to offer great value at each level, and we’re humbled by any contribution, big or small. Every pledge brings us one step closer to making Legacy of Valor the best it can be. Digital Rewards Digital Rewards Every backer tier from $25 and above includes carefully crafted digital rewards designed to immerse you deeper into the world of Legacy of Valor . These aren't just addons, they’re an extension of the game’s lore, atmosphere, and your personal legacy in the realm. Here’s what awaits you in the digital realm: Digital Copy of the Game A full copy of Legacy of Valor for PC (Steam key or DRM-free). This is your gateway to a richly detailed medieval world of conflict, survival, and legacy. Exclusive Digital Artbook A beautifully illustrated PDF packed with concept art, lore notes, sketches, behind-the-scenes commentary, and insight into the creative process. Learn how the world of Valor came to life. Original Soundtrack A fully orchestrated digital soundtrack, composed to bring emotion to every battle, every quiet moment, and every triumph. Downloadable in high-quality formats. Backer Exclusive Artifact Set A unique in-game cosmetic bundle available only to Kickstarter backers. Includes: A majestic warhorse skin A noble armor set A ceremonial sword Decorative in-game banners and emblems These are cosmetic only and do not affect gameplay balance. In-Game Recognition Your name will be listed in the game’s credits, immortalized as one of our earliest and most loyal supporters. Higher tiers receive additional honorific placement, such as “Special Thanks,” “Elite Backer,” or “Founding Patron.” Unique In-Game Banner Backers from the Champion Tier and above will receive a customizable in-game banner bearing a unique crest, to fly over their castle and strike fear into their enemies. Beta Access (from Champion Tier up): Be among the first to explore the game in its late development phase, help shape its final form with your feedback. Alpha Playtest (from Noble of Valor Tier up): Access a very early build and become part of our inner testing circle. Help mold the core systems. Lifetime Content Pass (select tiers only) All future paid DLCs and expansions will be yours, no need to pay again. Reserved for high-tier backers as a mark of lasting commitment and support. Physical Rewards For those who love to hold history in their hands, our physical rewards are handcrafted tokens of your legacy. Designed with care and authenticity, these items aren’t just collectibles. They are heirlooms from the world of Legacy of Valor. Backers from select tiers will receive physical rewards that bring the world of Valor into your home. Collector’s Edition Box A beautifully crafted premium box, packed with exclusive treasures: A hardcover artbook A cloth map of the realm A collectible coin A leather armguard A unique packaging design only for backers Available from the $400 Collector’s Edition Tier and above. Wall-Mountable Shield A decorative full-scale shield featuring your personal crest or a royal emblem of Valor. Designed to hang on your wall. Crafted for durability and medieval authenticity. Included in Lord of the Citadel Tier ($1500). Decorative Collector’s Sword Legacy of Valor Receive a hand forged decorative sword, created exclusively for Legacy of Valor backers. This sword is a collector’s display piece only - it is completely blunt, non-functional, and not sharpened. Intended purely for decoration (e.g. wall mounting, display in a showcase). Crafted by professional blacksmiths with attention to historical detail. Features an engraved inscription “Legatum Virtutis” (Latin for Legacy of Valor). Each piece is unique and made to order. Included in Legendary Patron Tier ($3000). Legacy Pendant A forged metal pendant or talisman bearing the crest of Valor or a symbol of your choosing. A subtle, wearable reminder of the world you helped create. Included in Knight of the Order Tier ($650) and higher. Printed Lore Scroll An exclusive parchment-style scroll with backstory or world history from the game’s lore, aged and sealed. A piece of the in-game world delivered to your door. Available in special mid to high tiers. Custom NPC Box Set (Optional for $10,000 Tier) An elite reward package including everything above, plus: A framed certificate of in-game legacy A premium box with statue, signature, or display pieces Personalized letter from the developer The Team Legacy of Valor is led by a developer Filip Husák , who’s poured thousands of hours into the game’s creation. From writing the narrative and building the world, to designing mechanics and managing the business side, Filip has been crafting every detail with unwavering passion and discipline. This is not a hobby. This is a full-time, all-in mission. About Filip Hi, I’m Filip, the solo developer behind Legacy of Valor. My journey into game development began almost two decades ago, when my passion for World of Warcraft pushed me to start tinkering with servers, learning PHP, SQL, and C++. I ran a private WoW server where a few hundred players adventured together, and that experience taught me the fundamentals of design, coding, and how to build a world that others could enjoy. From there, I moved into level design, client modifications, and creating my own mods and patches. Looking back, those experiments sparked my passion for world building and gave me the confidence to create something original. I studied Information Technology, specializing in Java, PHP, SQL, hardware, and networking, which gave me a strong technical foundation. I’ve been active in IT and development for over 16 years, combining my education with hands-on experience. Over the years, I’ve also gained skills in leading small teams, organizing workflows, and time management, abilities I plan to put into practice as Legacy of Valor grows into a 10 person team. I’m from the Czech Republic, and I’ve always had a deep passion for the medieval period. Games like Mount & Blade, Kingdom Come: Deliverance, and Manor Lords inspired me, but also made me realize that there’s still room for a new kind of medieval RPG. That’s why I started Legacy of Valor: a game made by the community, for the community. What I enjoy most is that I genuinely love every part of development, coding, design, world building, all of it. Right now, I don’t really have time for anything else outside of development, family, and work, but that’s fine: this project is my dream. And the biggest driving force behind it is the community. I’m endlessly grateful to everyone who supports me, gives feedback, and helps shape the game. In five years, my vision is clear: Legacy of Valor will be released, loved by players, and supported by a fully functioning studio that continues to build new worlds together with the community. That’s what drives me forward every single day. “ I’ve never been this locked in. I work 16 hours a day, 7 days a week, and the deeper I go, the more committed I become .” - Filip Husák, Creator of Legacy of Valor Indie Power with Real-World Support While the core team is currently solo, the project is backed by real partners: Alza.cz (Largest electronic retailer in Czech Republic) - Hardware and infrastructure support RCORE (RCORE is a Czech development studio specializing in advanced scripts and solutions for multiplayer game servers, especially FiveM) GGBOOSTER (GGBOOSTER.cz is a Czech energy drink brand created by gamers, for gamers, offering functional, sugar free energy drinks with powerful ingredients to boost focus, performance and the gaming experience) NEOM Music (NEOM Music is a creative audio studio producing original soundtracks, sound effects, and immersive music tailored for video games) 4BOARS (4BOARS is a creative studio focused on video production and trailers for video games) Dozens of testers and early supporters already playing the prototype on Steam Strong community of over 11000 members on Discord, Instagram and Steam. Over 34 000 Wishlists on Steam. Over 10 000 PlayTest applications on Steam. What Happens After a Successful Kickstarter? If the campaign is funded, the team will expand immediately. “What started as a solo passion project is ready to grow. The foundation is built, now it’s time to bring the right people on board.” A 10 person core development team (programming, art, animation, writing) External contributors for voice acting, localization, and QA Dedicated community management and support The groundwork is laid. The passion is real. And with your help, we’re ready to build something unforgettable. Use of Funds Legacy of Valor is an ambitious RPG, and building it right takes time, resources, and a skilled team. Your support will help turn this dream into a finished, polished game worthy of the genre. Here’s where your pledges will go: Team Expansion: As a solo developer, I’ve built the foundation, including a working demo and prototype systems. With your help, I’ll bring on experienced developers, artists, and designers to push the game forward. Art, Music & Audio: A medieval world deserves an epic soundtrack, immersive sound design, and rich visuals. Funds will help commission original music, high quality animations, visual effects, and voice work. Physical Rewards: From hand forged shields to collector’s boxes and medallions, a portion of the funds will go toward producing and shipping these premium backer rewards. Playtesting & Polish: Thorough testing and community feedback are critical. Funds will support ongoing QA and allow time for proper iteration, bug fixing, and balance improvements. Administrative Costs: A smaller part of the budget will be used for operational needs, including Kickstarter fees, payment processing, company maintenance, and legal/accounting services. Beyond the Base Goal If we raise more than our funding goal, we can expand the game even further, adding advanced features like naval combat, multiplayer servers, full voice acting, and more. Higher funding also makes it easier to secure a long-term publisher or investor, ensuring the project reaches its full potential across platforms. Social Links & Community The journey of Legacy of Valor is already being shaped by an incredible and passionate community and we’d love for you to be part of it. Join the Realm on Discord Our official Discord server is where development meets community. Chat with other backers, share your ideas, get behind the scenes insights, and speak directly with the developer. It’s also where you'll get early news, community polls, and access to exclusive roles based on your support tier. Discord Follow the Adventure Stay updated, share your excitement, and see new visuals and teasers across our channels: Instagram YouTube Steam Page Facebook X TikTok Bluesky Reddit Be Part of the Legacy This world is being built with its players in mind. Your feedback, your presence, and your support shape how Legacy of Valor evolves. Whether you're a casual follower or a devoted Warden of the Realm, you're part of this story. Wishlist on Steam, join our Discord, and help us make Legacy of Valor a legend forged by its community. Closing Message Legacy of Valor is more than just a game, it's a vision forged from years of passion, hard work, and an unwavering belief in storytelling, strategy, and immersive worldbuilding. As a solo developer, I’ve poured everything into building the foundation of this world, but to bring it to life in full, I need you. Your support is the difference between a dream and a living, breathing adventure shared by thousands. Every pledge, every share, every word of encouragement helps carry this project forward. Whether you're here to back us, join the community, or simply cheer from afar I’m deeply grateful you're a part of this journey. Let’s build a realm worth remembering. Let’s forge a legacy together. With all my heart Filip Husák Creator of Legacy of Valor Thank You! Thank you for taking the time to explore our campaign and for believing in Legacy of Valor . This journey means the world to us and with your support, we’re building more than just a game. We’re building a living world, a realm forged by passion, dedication, and a growing community of legends like you. Together, we will shape kingdoms, fight for honor, and carve out stories that will echo across the land. From the bottom of my heart: thank you for backing Legacy of Valor . See you on the battlefield and may your legacy never be forgotten.

title: Categories
description: Patriot Airsoft fans, we need your help!  We have had our building leased out from under us. We know how passionate you are about keeping us in business and have been asked to start a fundraising campaign....so here it is! Because our permits are all building specific, they do not transfer to another building.  This process is like starting over. Our hopes is to raise enough money to cover all new permits and everything related to that in acquiring a new building.  We have started with $20000 in hopes of achieving that goal.  This is a all or nothing campaign so if we don't hit that goal, then you will not be charged for your donation. We have created so many memories with all of you between all the school fundraisers, team parties, birthday parties, summer camps, corporate events and just open play and we are so thankful to be such a big part of this community.

title: COSMICWARS: Build, Command and Conquer the Universe
description: COSMICWARS NEEDS YOUR HELP! We are the CosmicOwls, a team of night owls crazy for making games at night over and over. Perhaps, our nocturnal habits had us longing for the unknown universe and greatly influenced us to make space battle game. Creating a game is very exciting but takes endless efforts and sweats to complete it. Nevertheless,  we, night owls made a big first step in domestic market and our COSMICWARS was honorably listed on Top 3 of GOOGLE PLAY INDIE GAMES FESTIVAL 2018. WHY LAUNCHING ON KICKSTARTER? Although we made a meaningful step in the domestic game market, we cannot share our game with friends in other world, just like you. This is because of the barriers for languages and localization of the game.  We know this task is not easy and requires a tremendous amount of time and efforts to present our game at the global market. But we have the faith we can make it if you help us to do so. The funds generated from Kickstarter will help us do followings. Localize the game for English Version Build local servers for North America and Europe Create additional contents such as equipment system, captain switch system and guild system Add quests, rumors and sound track About The Game Introduction CosmicWars is a strategic-spacecraft-simulation mobile game heavily influenced by the Japanese Animation, ‘Howl's Moving Castle.’ We really loved this animation and especially junky scrap castle walking around with the four legs. As a result, we transformed this castle into our spacecraft building model. Cores of this game are customizing and combing the parts to become competitively offensive or defensive spaceship against enemies’  battleships. Game Story The universe is no longer a mysterious world where various creatures live in a knotty state. One day it was totally and completely destroyed by the greedy men and their destruction of the planets. No exception for the place where Tyler was being. However, the remains must carry on in order to survive in the deteriorated universe. “Bibob-ho, where I was born, here, I am the only useless among others. It is so obvious that I am not holding any fortune from the heaven and it is so dangerous world for giving the jobs to someone like me. Maybe I shouldn’t be born at all.” Than one day crisis has come to Bibob-ho where he was born. A gigantic spaceship, Calipso attacked Bibob-ho. Chase after chase, he woke up from the coma and was left alone at the wrecked hometown. At his sight, DonDon, a captain of construction-service-ship, mockingly asks him. “Bibob-ho is finally ended. Are u the only survivor? Congratulation on your promotion to captain. Oh! and your vanished home, too. LOL.” You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 12 Selectors CosmicWars offers 12 sectors in the Universe. Each sector has been taken by 8 greatest powers of darkness. From the “BANA”, first stage for beginners, to the “PALLAS” where most sacred map of the game, gamers can experience the excitement of space battles and acquire the resources to rebuild and update the spaceships. Currently, 8 out of 12 galaxies are opened for the plays. Rest of 4 will be developed and open upon the success from KICKSTARTER campaign. Characters Choose the character to fit to your style. They will be your captain to lead to the vast and evil universe. 8 Greatest Powers of Enemies(NPCs) Among the long journey to finding your home planet, gamer will meet the 8 greatest powers in the universe. Wicked and outrageous forces will destroy you and your spaceships if you stay dopey. Figure out the characteristics of each powers and their spaceships and customize your own to defend yourself and rigorously attack them. Game Economy Parts Combination Customize your spaceship to build your strategy and tactics fighting for the enemies you will encounter. Acquire the resources as much as you can by destroying the hostile starships, obtain the essential information from the blackmarket and become a bounty hunter to get some rewards.  As soon as your stocks are piled up, equip with new parts and weapons. Combination and location of your parts and arms will bring you to the next level of capability to defend and attack. Here are the sample of the parts combination. title: TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game
description: TAVERS Core Rulebook Standard Edition, Quantum Parabox Boxset, Kickstarter Exclusive Limited Edition Core Rulebook, Oversized Nimseskaiju Mini, Original Soundtrack LP Vinyl, Mem Maker Kit with Source Tokens and Eight sided Ossahedral dice, Toolkit Refill, and TAVERS logo Patch! What is a Taver and what is Meow Wolf? How to Play Players take on the role of TAVERS, beings with a connection to SOURCE, the raw creative energy flowing through everything. By harnessing that energy they are able to do some really cool stuff—far more than just opening portals. They dare to manifest impossible ideas that defy logic, shift perception, and reshape reality itself. The core book includes five main story arcs, each of which will deliver hours of gaming delight. Among the hyper-colored pages you will find a bevy of new and original Meow Wolf characters, along with a huge assortment of locations getting the same lavish treatment The original system was crafted specifically for exploring the strange and unknown universe of the multiple worlds of Meow Wolf. Check out the How to Play Video: Download the FREE Gameplay Preview PDF: If you’re the type of person who likes to immediately dive into portals headfirst, then a) we’re probably already friends on a timeline somewhere and b) you’re gonna love this colorful Tavers Gameplay Primer ! We stayed up all night making it so it’s deliriously PACKED with core rules, examples of play, and a walkthrough of how to build your Taver one memory at a time. Available at exaltedfuneral.com for those that want to add it to their PDF library on their EF account as well as direct download here . The TAVERS game mechanics include: Collaborative storytelling - Players and storytellers work together to build an experience that integrates each participant and varied play styles. Everyone takes notes and doodles on a shared sheet that keeps the whole group engaged in the gameplay. Tactile inventory management - Every item you acquire comes in a variety of fun shapes and must fit on your character sheet like a puzzle mini-game Backstory fueled skills - Group-created memories or dreams, called MEMs, provide an ever fluctuating skill system based on the words used in a round table tale-weaving. Goal oriented character progression - Every character has individual goals to scheme towards. Accomplishing them unlocks future potential. Key action types help guide character choices, and award story progression when utilized. Dice lite / art forward - TAVERS uses 2d8 (we call them Ossahedrals) for determining the outcome of searching for clues, events, and anomalies. The outcome of the story, however, is always in the hands, paws, claws, or whatever of the players. Is This Game for Me? Yes. TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game is for you. Hold up smooth talker, I’ve been to Meow Wolf exhibits, but never really played D&D or anything like whatever this is. Are you sure this is for me? Still yes! TAVERS is designed to get both veteran roleplayers and those new to the hobby started quickly with plenty of examples of play, optional pregenerated characters, and a set of rules that anyone can slip into comfortably, like a cozy cave made of flannel and fleece jackets If you’ve been out there playing RPGs already, but aren’t familiar with Meow Wolf, you’ll appreciate TAVERS for its open storytelling style and lightweight rules systems. It emphasizes worldbuilding, character building and story building without demanding that you absorb large lore dumps. If you’ve never played an RPG or visited a Meow Wolf location, we’ve prepared for you a wonderful whimsical introduction to both! Campaign Rewards There’s nothing theoretical about this deluxe, component rich box set. We’ve collected everything you need to play TAVERS in one beautifully designed container. Within this wondrous sturdy cardstock shell you will find plenty of opportunities for superposition, cosmic entanglements and of course Ossahedrals (dice)! Each mastercrafted item is allocated to its logical place within. (There are little compartments for the bits after you pop them out.) Truly localized! We guarantee no particles encased will become entangled! Even if you shake the box around a bit. Don’t be cast in the role of the observer! Jump into the world of TAVERS with the Quantum Parabox! No cats (alive or dead) included in the box. Here’s what IS included in the box Specs: Sturdy nesting box 12.5 x 9 x 2.4” (230 x 317 x 60 mm)  🐹  Full color exterior design The Core Rulebook - Standard Edition The core of humanity cannot be contained within the lavishly-colored, glossy pages of a portal-hopping, tabletop roleplaying game book. The core of a planet, juicy with hefty solid metals, cannot be divided into chapters or split with fancy ribbons. An apple’s core cannot be flipped through, generating a slight breeze and a jaw-dropping spectacle as flurries of otherworldly art fly past. The core rules of TAVERS can do all of that and more! And more?? What more are you talking about? Tons of locations lovingly sourced from Meow Wolf exhibits, and reimagined for TAVERS! Including: Cowboix Heavvven, The Tave, Glowquarium, Convergence Station, The Forked Earth, Omega Mart, Plasmaplex Arcade, The Gyre and, you guessed it, more places than just those! What’s that? More of the more? We’ve got a bevy of beings for you to interact with. Characters created specifically for the game alongside a host of familiar faces from the many worlds of Meow Wolf! Wanna sneaky peepy of some of these beings?? OK! BEHOLD A LIST: Mama Larva, Tracking Error, The YAWLP, Aaron Cohen, Ariel Sting, Batsy, Dilly, High Priestess Araceli & Pavel, and of course we’ll have Plotzo! Oh, yeah… plus more! That’s not all. There’s even more of the ”and more” to talk about! The book comes pre-loaded with 5 Episoda story arcs, ready for you and your friends to explore and dive into! We've got one that digs into the Gyre and slimes! What about those Space Truckers?? Yeah, and I guess we've kinda already spilled the beans about the giant hamster kaiju... That's in there too! Like an unattended emergency exit-only door, this book begs to be opened. Chock full of unearthly artwork from these incredible artists Tradd Moore - Jesse Jacobs - Jordan Speer - Jamiyla Lowe - Sam McKenzie - Tristan Wright - Sam Mameli - Pol-Edouard - Luckasz Kowalczuk - Luke Dorman - Caitlin LeMoine - Brandon Schmidt - Caleb Ortega - Marley Prudeaux - Andrew Tellez NO AI. All human work here. Here’s what’s included in the book: Rules for character creation and play Comprehensive Storyteller guide with lots of examples 14 Unique Meow Wolf locations 14 Wild Non-player Characters 5 Episodas (Episodas are unique story arc launch-points, each delivering hours of play) Specs: A4 size hardcover book (8.27 x 11.69”)  🐹  Approx 150 pages  🐹  Full color cover and interior  🐹  2 Ribbons  🐹  Acetate slipcover Stretch Goal - UNLOCKED! 🐹 2 Additional Locations Stretch Goal - UNLOCKED! 🐹 Printed edges Stretch Goal - LOCKED Psych-O-Dynamic Disc (P.O.D.D.) Quickly refresh your players with all the cool things available to TAVERS during the game. Pass this Psych-O-Dynamic Disc around the table, or hurl it across the abyss like a frisbee. Printed with cosmic dust gathered from the collapsing solar rift. Specs: Thick gameboard weight circular reference wheel  🐹  Full color printing  🐹  8.5” in diameter (216mm) Eight Sided Ossahedral Dice Most dice are all about flat surfaces, and hard lines. We’re breaking the mold… By making our own dice mold! These Ossahedral dice don’t wanna play straight! Wavy, bright, weird and full of delight. These custom clicker clackers roll wonderfully on tables and laser grids alike! Dice Specs: 3 x Custom oversized d8 Ossahedral dice  🐹  22 x 30 mm  🐹  Wavy center bar bisects 2 colors inspired by the Meow Wolf logo Tactile Game Components These Itemtronical sheets are packing a serious punch! Of the perforated punch-out type! Tactile customizable items that fit right onto your character sheet creating a micro-management game. Plus these Source Tokens can spin, flip, be used as a slammer and are heavy-duty tooti fruity! Token Specs: 5 x Poker chip size tokens  🐹  1.5” diameter x 0.14” thick (39mm diameter x 3.5mm thick)  🐹  White base with custom full color printed design Itemtronical Sheet Specs: 3 x 8.5x11" (216 x 279mm) heavy cardstock perforated sheets  🐹  Grid of 100+ different shaped Itemtronicals  🐹  Printed in full color with erasable matte surface TAVERS: Character Sheets, Pregens TAVERS: Character Sheets, Episoda Sheets, and Sticker Sheets All the paperwork you forgot to turn in to your boss before leaving for vacation, has been neatly stacked and filled out perfectly by a group of howling menial task ghosts. Now you can focus on these papers. The fun kind. All full color, and ready for your crayons, colored pencils or paint rollers. If the ghosts made your homework look boring, slap one of these bright stickers on top. Your boss will give you a raise for sure! Specs: 5 x Tavers Character sheets, 8.5 x 11" (216 x 279mm), full color printing  🐹  8 x Pregen Tavers Character Sheets, 8.5 x 11" (216 x 279mm), full color printing  🐹  5 x Episoda sheets, 8.5 x 11" (216 x 279mm), full color printing  🐹  3 x kiss cut sticker sheets, 8.5 x 11" (216 x 279mm), approx. 100 small unique gloss stickers TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook LE COVER - KICKSTARTER EXCLUSIVE! Soar through space and time with NIM and friends on this exclusive Limited Edition version of the cover by legendary artist Jesse Jacobs . Blasted with Holographic Foil and bonus spot glosses that won’t blink at the opportunity to blind you with vibrant rays of magnificence. Specs: A4 size hardcover book (8.27 x 11.69 inches)  🐹  Approx 150 pages  🐹  Full color interior and Foiled + Spot gloss cover  🐹  2 Ribbons  🐹  2 Additional Locations Stretch Goal - UNLOCKED!! 🐹 Metallic printed edges Stretch Goal - LOCKED Roll Ossahedrals to uncover your clues! Spend, trade and use the Source fearlessly with this pack of extra Dice and Tokens! Specs: Custom deluxe nesting box with clear viewing window, 3.75 x 4.5  x 1.5" (95.25 x 114.3 x 38mm)   🐹  8 x Custom 8-sided Ossahedrals (dice)  🐹  8 x Source Tokens Dip your toes into the undulating vibes of the multiverse. Two sides of glorious sound composed by Meow Wolf's audio designers, featuring music from across the exhibitions and packaged with an entire extra adventure for your table to explore. Listen here: What’s included: Original soundtrack created exclusively for TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game Vinyl record Includes micro Episoda for even more TAVERS gaming content Specs: Single pocket album jacket  🐹  Black vinyl record  🐹  Gamable content printed on record sleeve Oversized 80mm Kaiju hamster sculpted by the fantastic David-Lee Whitaker . Crushes chips, snacks, city buses and stuffs them in those cute chubby cheeks. Specs: Custom miniature  🐹  80mm high 50mm base  🐹  Unpainted injection molded pvc (Note, if you were an early campaign follower please see the FAQ section for more information about your Nimseskaiju Mini Reward!) Sew this thing on your cape, backpack, bumper of your pickup truck, or directly onto your forehead. Wait, maybe not that last one. Do you have any head-thread? What’s included: 30 x TAVERS Character sheets 8 x Pregen TAVERS Character Sheets 10 x Episoda sheets 6 x Itemtronical Sheets 6 x kiss cut sticker sheets Exclusive Preview-Week Tickets to the Meow Wolf L.A. Exhibit - SOLD OUT! That's right! Super limited, very rare. How cool! ONLY available in the limited Big Dippper Pledge Tier. (Update - Big Dippper Pledge Tier SOLD OUT.) Pledge Tiers Stretch Goals Add-ons What are people saying about TAVERS? Videos: TAVERS Launch Party Join TAVERS writer Tiger Wizard and friends for the TAVERS: The Meow Wolf RPG launch party! To celebrate we are chatting with guests from Meow Wolf, the Gaming Industry, and perhaps a few beings from other worlds. Michael J. Wilson (Meow Wolf Lore keeper) , Ariel Rubin (Wild Optimists), Benji Geary (Meow Wolf Co-Founder), Chris P. (Titmouse). We chat about peppers, finding the inspiration faucet and black light posters! Articles: Meow Wolf doubled the crowdfunding goal for its surreal TTRPG in less than 24 hours Tavers: The Meow Wolf RPG’ Is Kickstarting Now Meow Wolf is officially rolling dice. TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game Kickstarter Live Through April 3 Tavers: The Meow Wolf RPG Expands Minds On Kickstarter TAVERS: the Meow wolf RPG now live on Kickstarter The TAVERS: The Meow Wolf Roleplaying Game Kickstarter Funds in Minutes MEOW WOLF RPG FROM EXALTED FUNERAL ON KICKSTARTER Meow Wolf The Blob Articles: Building TAVERS: The Meow Wolf RPG 7 Secrets Behind the Making of TAVERS, a Meow Wolf TTRPG Polygon Article: Surreal immersive-art collective Meow Wolf is launching a surreal mystery TTRPG About the Team TAVERS is a team effort between the creative forces of Meow Wolf and Exalted Funeral . Joined together like butter and toast by Joe LeFavi of Genuine Entertainment . The game is written by Exalted Funeral’s very own Tiger Wizard, with additional writing from Meow Wolf’s Michael J. Wilson MEOW WOLF is an immersive location based arts company known for bold, maximalist worlds like House of Eternal Return in Santa Fe, Omega Mart in Las Vegas, Convergence Station in Denver, The Real Unreal in the Dallas Fort Worth area, and Radio Tave in Houston, with locations in Los Angeles and New York City on the way. Recognized by Time Out, Fast Company, and USA Today. Check out more at meowwolf.com . EXALTED FUNERAL is an award-winning publisher and online store of unique roleplaying games, zines, horror, and fantastic adventure. They have raised millions of dollars across many successful crowdfunding campaigns and brought a wide variety of unforgettable RPGs to game night such as Dolmenwood Tabletop RPG , Old-School Essentials Fantasy RPG Box Sets , Monty Python's Cocurricular Mediaeval Reenactment Programme , Land of Eem , Our Golden Age , Herbalist's Primer , and many more! Pick up a rad game at exaltedfuneral.com . GENUINE is a leading producer, brand manager, and licensing luck dragon across all corners of pop culture, bringing best-in-class partners together to make best-selling, award-winning labors of love for the latest & greatest brands and fandoms such as Alien , Apex Legends , Batman , Blade Runner , Call of Duty , Diablo , The Dragon Prince , Dune , Hello Neighbor , Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy , Meow Wolf , Vampire:The Masquerade , The Walking Dead , and The Wheel of Time (among others). Come play at genuineent.com . Writers Tiger Wizard (he/him), aka Andrew Bellury is an Ennie award nominated game designer & illustrator for indie TTRPG's. He's the senior game design wizard and press/media manager at Exalted Funeral , and co-host of Exalted Funeral’s Coffee & Coffins, as well as the Mad Dungeon Podcast . His musical group Epic Levels makes fantasy adventure game related hip-hop. Tiger Wizard’s artwork and cartography can be found in a plethora of indie games and magazines, plus he regularly releases postcard micro dungeons over on Patreon . Tiger is also a pretty nice guy that loves Coors Banquet, Heavy Metal magazines from the 90’s, receiving mail, his cat Yara, his wonderful wife Becky, and daughter Willow. Michael J. Wilson (he/they) is a writer of poems and fictions. He’s the Lore Keeper at Meow Wolf and is also a Production Director. His most recent novel, A Labyrinth , is a retelling of the myth of Daedalus. He lives in Santa Fe with two cats named Henry and Simon. Artists Tradd Moore - Jesse Jacobs - Jordan Speer - Jamiyla Lowe - Sam McKenzie - Tristan Wright - Sam Mameli - Pol-Edouard - Luckasz Kowalczuk Meow Wolf Artists Luke Dorman - Caitlin LeMoine - Brandon Schmidt - Caleb Ortega - Marley Prudeaux - Andrew Tellez AND MORE!!! description: Welcome to Santae: Where Magic Meets Adventure Welcome to the world of Santae, a browser-based, ever-expanding virtual RPG world teeming with magic, mystery, and endless possibilities. As you embark on your enchanting journey, you'll step into the role of an adventurer surrounded by mystical creatures, forging your own path in a realm where magic reigns supreme. Choose Your Story with Our Rich Class System Choose your destiny by selecting your class—whether you become a powerful Lycan , resilient Human , ethereal Fairy , or wise Elf . But your journey doesn’t stop there. You’ll also decide under which birthsign you were born, whether it's the Archmage , Lady , Lord , Lover , Monk , Wizard , Ritualist , or Shadow . Each birthsign uniquely shapes your game experience, determining your abilities and the challenges you’ll face. Your birthsign sets you on a personal quest to gain favor from the deity tied to your sign. This favor unlocks special abilities for your avatar, such as enhanced persuasion , luck , or strength —all depending on your chosen path. As you earn more favor, your skill tree expands, allowing you to access new powers that enhance your gameplay and make your adventure truly unique. In Santae, every choice you make influences your journey. Will you rise to the challenge and claim the favor of the gods? Don't Just Play a Game, Live an Adventure. Features Dynamic Battle System Prepare for thrilling encounters as you engage in our upcoming battle system. Train and lead your creatures in strategic battles against formidable foes, utilizing unique skills and powerful combo moves to secure victory. Whether you prefer direct confrontations in the Colosseum or tactical defenses, our system caters to various fighting styles and provides a challenging yet rewarding experience. Animated Wardrobe System Our expansive and dynamic collection allows adventurers of all identities, including nonbinary characters, to create unique looks. Designed with inclusivity at its core, the system features expandable clothing layers, allowing for a mix of static and animated items—such as flowing cloaks and subtly glowing garments. This ensures that every player can express their personal style effectively, whether through subtle static details or eye-catching animations, making each outfit as representative and unique as the vibrant world of Santae itself. Immersive Questing Experience Our questing system in Santae is a narrative-rich journey where every choice you make significantly impacts your story, relationships, and achievements. As you interact with a diverse cast of characters and navigate through decisions, your path in Santae unfolds uniquely for each player. From epic quests that dive deep into the lore of our world to daily tasks designed to enhance your experience, every adventure is rewarding. Additionally, engaging in quests earns you SanDust, a valuable currency like activity points, which you can use to purchase exclusive items from our cash shop and more. This system not only enriches your journey but also ensures that your efforts have tangible benefits throughout the game. Community and More Stay connected with a vibrant community through forums, community driven events, and cooperative missions. Trade items, share tips, and compete in minigames that enrich your Santae experience. As our world grows, so do the opportunities to explore new content, meet fellow adventurers, and make lasting friendships. Innovative Pet Features At the heart of Santae are the pets—your loyal companions within the realm. Engage in our unique pet system where you can collect, and train a diverse array of creatures, each boasting distinct traits and abilities that enhance your gameplay and provide companionship on your quests. Our special feature, "shimmer dusts," allows you to customize the color and theme of each pet, offering the flexibility to transform their appearance to match your style, whether you want your companion to embody the playful charm of a cute Pipsqueak or the dignified elegance of a Regal theme. From the mystical Drava to the enchanting Wispyr, discover pets that resonate with your playstyle and personalize them to become truly yours! Click here to view all of our upcoming features and updates to Santae! The Regal Shimmer Dust is a magical color in Santae's pet system that lets you infuse your loyal companions with an air of majesty. This unique shimmer dust allows you to transform your pet's appearance with a dignified and sophisticated palette, imbuing them with rich, opulent colors and elegant patterns that evoke a sense of nobility. Reward Tiers Welcome to Santae's Kickstarter Campaign! Join us on an enchanted journey and help bring the mystical world of Santae to life! By backing our project, you can choose from a variety of reward tiers designed to suit every adventurer's needs. Whether you're a novice explorer or a seasoned veteran, your support is invaluable in shaping the future of Santae. Below are the tiers available for backers. Disclaimer: The Supporter Trophy, Supporter Forum Border Set and Supporter Forum avatar and Design Tiers are our ONLY Kickstarter Exclusive items. For more information on this, please click here . Standard Beta Access Keys for Santae, you not only get access to play anytime during our beta testing phase, but you also receive exclusive supporter rewards. These include a special supporter trophy, a unique supporter avatar, a Divine Natural Kyree Figurine, and a distinctive supporter forum border, all designed to distinguish you as a key contributor in our community. This package ensures that your support is both celebrated and visually acknowledged across Santae, enriching your involvement and interaction within the Santae community. The Standard Beta Invite Key allows you to sign up at your convenience during our Beta Testing phase starting October 19, 2024!  (Click here to view this tier.)
