Help us reach this stretch goal to unlock Santae's Mystic Adventure , an exhilarating new game mode inspired by the fun and competition of classic board games and party-style challenges . In this exciting feature, players will navigate magical game boards , racing to collect items and complete quests while engaging in mini-games that test their skills, strategy, and luck. Compete with friends or team up to overcome tricky challenges, with each turn bringing new surprises, power-ups, and obstacles. Reaching this milestone will introduce a lively and interactive experience to Santae, blending the thrill of competitive play with the joy of cooperative adventure. Let's work together to bring this dynamic and engaging new game mode to life in Santae! Help us reach this stretch goal to enhance Santae's Animated Battle System by introducing a thrilling Multiplayer Battle feature! This expansion will allow parties of up to 50 players to join forces and take on monumental bosses in dynamic, animated combat. Experience the excitement and strategy of large-scale battles as you and your allies coordinate attacks, manage roles, and leverage unique abilities to defeat these formidable foes. Unlocking this goal will bring a new level of depth and community engagement to Santae, offering epic challenges and memorable victories . Join us in achieving this milestone to elevate your battle experience and enjoy the camaraderie of fighting alongside friends against the ultimate adversaries! Help us achieve this ambitious stretch goal, and we will be able to create and release a diverse collection of twenty (20) HTML5 mini-games in Santae! This extensive suite of games will include a wide range of genres and challenges, from intricate puzzles and fast-paced action to immersive adventures and strategic gameplay. Reaching this goal will significantly expand Santae's interactive offerings, providing all backers with numerous new ways to engage with the game world, earn rewards, and connect with other players. Help us unlock this milestone to enhance your Santae experience with a wealth of fun and diverse gaming options! Achieve this stretch goal, and we will launch a special line of real-life plushies modeled after the cherished pets from Santae, including the beloved Goopper minimal! Each plushie will be meticulously crafted, capturing the unique charm of our digital creatures. As an added bonus, backers who pledge $100 or more will receive three (3) plushies as a thank you for achieving this milestone*. This stretch goal not only brings a piece of Santae into your home but also offers a playful, customizable connection to the game. Help us unlock this milestone to receive these adorable and dynamic plushies, enhancing your tangible collection of Santae memorabilia! The three (3) species selected for the first real life plushies will be chosen via Discord and voted on by the community. *Plus Shipping & Handling. These will be delivered upon completion from the manufacturer. You will submit a form post Kickstarter, providing your address to where you would like this shipped to, should we achieve this stretch goal. Animated Web Series Help us achieve this stretch goal and we will create an Animated Web Series that vividly brings to life the rich lore and thrilling adventures of Vespera and the rest of the Adventurers . This series will explore the captivating stories and characters of Santae's magical realm, featuring animations that highlight its enchanting essence. From epic quests to the detailed histories of diverse inhabitants, the series will expand the universe beyond the game , offering a new and exciting way for fans to engage with the world of Santae. Help us reach this milestone to transform the tales of Vespera into a visually stunning series, enhancing the lore and providing an immersive new experience for all viewers. Meet The Santae Team We’re thrilled to introduce the amazing team behind Santae! At the helm are CJ (Charles) and Karl (Ember) , business partners who share a united vision in bringing Santae to life. Together, they guide the overall direction and strategy of the game as well as lead development. Sky , our Director of Staff Management , ensures everything runs smoothly behind the scenes, fostering a supportive and efficient environment for the entire team. On the creative side, we have Whixy , our Artistic Director , whose talent and vision shape the stunning visuals of Santae, while Endo , our Lead Animator , brings characters and the game world to life with dynamic animations. Ruu , our Lead Animated Clothing Artist , leads the charge in designing the fantastic wardrobe system that Santae is known for. These are just a few of the many talented individuals working together with our front-end staff and artists, all dedicated to delivering the best possible experience for you. We’re proud to share this journey with such a fantastic team and can’t wait to bring more of Santae’s magic to life! Click here to view the rest of our amazing team of 40! Future Merch Coming Soon Exciting news, Santae fans—official merch is coming soon! Get ready to show off your love for the game with our collection of enamel pins, stickers, hats, and shirts, all designed with care and crafted from sustainable materials. With your support, we’re also working to bring adorable plushies to life! Each item reflects the vibrant world of Santae while supporting our commitment to environmental responsibility. Stay tuned for exclusive previews and be among the first to grab these eco-friendly goodies!

title: ESOLYRIC© the fun card game of music lyrics and linguistics
description: Esolyric Card Game ESOLYRIC© takes the main hooks from popular songs throughout the decades and rewrites them with a literary spin that will have you confused, amused and guessing. Do you know music and English well enough to solve these twisted tunes? Then, you may be a mix master – and the winner! Grab some friends and go for a spin! SEE MORE GAME CARDS ON INSTAGRAM @esolyricgame THE PROJECT: The first addition of Esolyric is planned for release in the Fall of 2023. Funds raised will directly go toward production and printing of the game as well as roll out launch support.  Esolyric Band Members will get first access to their own copy of the game,  merchandise, future expansion packs and special digital bonus Esolyrics to solve. OVERVIEW: I grew up writing and playing music in bands. As my son's grew up, they became involved with music as well. Anyone that has ever written a song knows the challenges of getting that perfect message wrapped into a clever hook. The great ones make it seem so easy. One day while working together trying to find the right words, we stumbled onto some funny phrases that made us think – how would some of our favorite songs sound if we rewrote them in more literary or esoteric (secret) meanings.  After a few days of joking around, we started to realize we had an amazingly fun idea. And not only was it hilarious as we explored the idea, we all improved our vocabulary as well. MUSIC: we love the idea that the game is based around music. Music is loved by almost everyone, and there are so many styles and personalities that can be enjoyed. Esolyric brings the connection and sharing of music with friends. Each time we tested each other with a new Esolyric we wrote, everyone broke out into song together. From soul to rock to country and pop, it's a game that will get you humming. THE GAME: Esolyric comes with 240 Esolyrics  (30 each of eight music categories: ALT/NEW WAVE, COUNTRY, DISCO/DANCE, ENTERTAINMENT, HIP HOP/RAP, POP, ROCK&ROLL and SOUL/MOTOWN).  The box also includes 58 Record Cards (Platinum, Gold and Silver) that players collect as they solve the Esolyric and earn points to win. Each Esolyric card has three clues on the back (one is the band name) to help the game along. EXPANSION: The first addition of the game spans eight decades and varieties of music genres. For the next releases, Esolyric will have expansion packs with more focused themes (examples: Decades,  Genres, One-Hit-Wonders). Esolyric will also invite fans to submit their own Esolyric for a chance to be included in future versions of the game.  We also believe that Esolyric is perfect for a TV gameshow stage – so if anyone loves it and has contacts, we're open for discussion.

title: The Dawn's Circle: Dynamic RPG Adventure
description: Story The Dawn's Circle is an fantasy RPG epic inspired by Final Fantasy X, Mana Khemia: alchemists of Al-Revis ,and Pyre . The Dawn’s Circle has intense strategic combat, impactful crafting and progression systems, and an in-depth character-driven narrative. The story is set in a fractured world divided between gods and their cloisters, where a fledgling god must find her place amidst the world’s deeply entrenched traditions. The search for belonging will take her and her newfound friends all across the land, all the while uncovering the truth about a bloody war, and an ancient secret that could tear the world apart at its seams. Every step of the journey is told with bold and expressive artwork as you explore a meticulously crafted world full of colorful characters and intriguing secrets.The Dawn's Circle is a rich and multifaceted story about belonging, responsibility, intimacy, and dehumanization. It doesn't shy away from confronting the darker aspects of its world, but we don't believe levity, fun, and joy should be sacrificed to do so. Even in a broken world, there is still beauty. No matter how long the night, the dawn still arrives… Coming to PC and consoles spring 2027 Gameplay Alongside the narrative, we wanted the player to experience a unique gameplay package that was a personal love letter to our favorite aspects of the genre, and with more than a few extra twists to keep things fresh. Combat The Dawn’s Circle strives to fully realize the tactical potential of a turn-based combat engine by including a wealth of innovative mechanics such as a dynamic, reactive timeline-based turn order, sculpted area-of-effect attacks, and even abilities which can reposition enemies. We set out to make sure every party member has a defined and valuable role to play in combat. To this end, each of their toolkits are filled with unique gimmicks and specialized skills, designed to synergize with each other in a wide variety of ways. This depth adds whole new layers of planning, teamwork, and creativity to the classic formulas of turn-based combat. We also sought to do away with some of the most common pain points which have plagued the genre since its inception. No more mashing the “Attack” command through pitifully weak random encounters, hoarding dozens of items that you’ll never use or equipping new gear only to get a new one with 0.5% greener numbers in the next room. Our focus with combat was to create something truly unique, as such, it will be covered more in-depth in its own section further down. Character Progression As you battle powerful foes, you will eventually grow stronger and will be able to upgrade your party’s Circle . Each of the six party members has a skill tree called their Circle , where their passive and active abilities can be augmented, alongside their base stats. Each character has an elaborate and specialized toolkit, with even more new skills and game-changing upgrades available through their Circle to keep your options exciting and expressive throughout the whole journey. Equipment We want players to spend as much of their time as possible in the world of Gaia exploring, battling, and generally having a good time. To facilitate this, characters in The Dawn’s Circle have only 3 equipment slots: a weapon and two accessories. Accessories provide simple and straightforward bonuses that can be mixed and matched to optimize your preferred strategy. Weapons on the other hand are where things get interesting. Each of a character’s weapons provides them with a completely unique passive ability designed to push an aspect of their toolkit to the extreme. Similarly to the Circles, weapons can be upgraded as well to provide new bonuses and keep your arsenal growing. Exploration You visit many different locations on your journey through Gaia. Brought to life by colorful and detailed pixel art, every inch of each region is colored by its history and its residents. New enemies, treasure and secrets are found throughout the maps that you explore as you unravel the histories which permeate the world. Runesmithing In the Dawn’s Circle, there are no long lists of items and curatives for the player to sort through, instead we have the rune system. These are powerful single use items that can turn the tides in battle. Runes can be created utilizing ingredients found in the world, though only a small number can be carried at once. This makes the choice of which runes to keep on-hand and when to deploy them interesting and impactful. Cooking We wanted to create many systems where the player felt like they made meaningful choices about their approach to battle. Through cooking, the player can grant their party unique buffs and benefits that last a certain number of encounters. This is done through collecting recipes and ingredients throughout your journey. Each recipe has a default effect that your party will receive when it’s made. Ingredients that you use to make that recipe also have their own unique passive effects, the final product gaining all of them when it's finished! Cutscenes Throughout the game there will be many intense story moments. These moments will feature large cinematic spreads of art that breathe life into these major moments. Dialogue We would be remiss if we didn’t mention one of our favorite features of the RPG genre, heaps of flavor text! Throughout the game when the player approaches an object or point of interest there will be prompts that show when the characters have something to say. They frequently comment and interact with each other as they experience the story, coloring the evolving dynamics within the party as they grow closer in their travels. To this end, you will also have support conversations between party members after pivotal moments. These can unlock new recipes, trinkets, or even new sections of the Circle trees! These moments are an essential part of fleshing out the main characters, their relationships with each other, and the world they inhabit, so be sure to keep an eye out! World The world of Gaia, where the story of The Dawn’s Circle takes place, is filled to the brim with magic, monsters, and gods. Each of these elements has been refined over time to deliver a world we believe is truly unique in the realms of high fantasy. It’s a world where people can talk to a god like an old neighbor, children are brought into the world through divine rituals, and even the lowest beasts can command primal elemental magic, just to name a few examples of what you can expect to see as you explore. The gods of Gaia are an integral force in both the story and the world itself, using their power and immortality to shepherd their cultures across centuries. The gods also each possess a unique conceptual core, that is at the heart of their very identity, heavily shaping both themselves and the people who follow them. The gods, their histories, and their flaws, will play a large role in the story, and their influence will be felt in every stone, every breath, and every blade of grass. Characters Zorja A taciturn wanderer, Zorja is an enigmatic figure. Seemingly guided by strange pangs of indescribable feelings, she rarely stays in one place for long. Though slight and sickly, her stature belies the vast sorcerous power of a newborn god roiling within her. In combat, Zorja decimates the battlefield with massive, highly damaging magical attacks. Boasting some of the single most damaging skills in the game, the catch is that she begins each battle without the mana necessary to actually cast them, and must spend time increasing her pool with her basic skill: Charge . This skill allows her to greatly exceed the mana caps every other character is stuck with, making her a true force to be reckoned with after a little patience and planning Roran A stalwart leader, almost as wise as he is bullheaded, Roran is nothing if not a force to be reckoned with. Once a storied militia captain, a bloody encounter with a mysterious marauder left him the only survivor of his men. Now all that’s left to do is pick up the pieces and start over. In combat, Roran boasts the best defenses in the game by a landslide. To complement this, he keeps enemies in their place and protects his allies using his unique mechanic: Interception . Many of Roran’s skills grant him charges of Sentinel . With Sentinel, Roran can choose to intercept an enemy attack that would normally target a more fragile ally, making himself the target instead. With each attack intercepted, Roran’s other skills become more and more powerful, allowing him to unleash deadly counterattacks. Astreius A withdrawn type, Astreius carries himself with light steps and careful words. He moves with the grace of a ballerina and everything seems to come naturally to him, from cooking to sewing to martial combat. He speaks very little of himself though, and a palpable sadness follows his every step. In combat, Astreius’s grace reveals itself to command the force of an atomic bomb. With incredible damage output and surprising versatility, he wields an assortment of devastatingly powerful skills. Such power requires finesse however, represented by his unique mechanic: Stances . Astreius rotates between three stances as he uses his skills, with many of his skills only accessible in certain stances. As a bonus, Astreius is the only character with a passive chance to deal critical damage when attacking, and his chance to do so increases every time his stance changes. Salvador Loose and easygoing, Salvador slides through life with a smile and witty comment always at the ready. Versatile and experienced, he's a medic, sharpshooter, gambler, and information broker all in one. He does prefer not to get his hands dirty though, and there’s always a certain sharpness lurking in his eyes. In combat, Salvador mostly fills the role of a healer, keeping everyone hale and hearty enough to take their sweet time. When it’s time to go to work though, Salvador has a trick up his sleeve in the form of his unique mechanic: Mode Shift . With the press of a button, Salvador can swap between two “modes”, Bolt Mode and Blood Mode. In Bolt Mode, his skills all consume mana as normal. In Blood Mode however, many of his skills become significantly more powerful, at the cost of consuming his health instead of mana, so choose wisely when to take it easy and when to hold nothing back. Toni A punk with a heart of gold, Toni is a rough-and-tumble bruiser who rolls with the punches. Despite her brash demeanor, she seems to have quite an eye for the finer things in life. In combat, Toni specializes in disrupting enemies and enabling her allies to pull off game-changing maneuvers. She also sports above-average durability, bolstered by her unique mechanic: Flurry . Several of Toni's skills hit multiple times, and each hit is stored in her Flurry counter. When the Flurry counter is full, the hit that filled it up is enhanced, dealing additional damage and triggering an extra effect which can include granting herself a large barrier or moving her allies up in the turn order. Some of her skills can also delay enemy turns, allowing her to dictate the pace of battle like no other. Ishi Prickly, eccentric, and inventive, Ishi is an unparalleled savant of rune magic. Like most geniuses, he is unappreciated in his time and barely scraping by, with rune magic considered by many to be merely an unwieldy and rudimentary trade skill. In combat, Ishi turns his greatest weakness into a game-changing strength, represented by his unique mechanic: Bits . Ishi's stats as a whole are nothing to write home about, and he has a pitifully small mana pool, represented by distinct charges called Bits. Normally this would be quite the irritating drawback, but Ishi happens to specialize in breaking the rules. Sporting a huge array of esoteric and unusual skills, creativity and ingenuity will be rewarded handsomely by Ishi's toolkit. To facilitate this even further is his most standout feature: many of his skills which consume Bits do not immediately end his turn. This allows him to completely warp the state of any battle in the blink of an eye. Combat The Dawn's Circle features a unique take on turn-based combat, where skills have variable speeds, allowing for strategic maneuvering around enemy turns, or even taking multiple turns in a row in the right situations! On her turn, Zorja uses a fast skill with a speed of 24, placing her next turn on that position, allowing her to go twice before the others at positions 31 and 42 even get to act! On top of that, enemies can be dynamically targeted by specially sculpted area of effect attacks, adding tactile satisfaction to the act of casting explosive fireballs or lining up skewering spear thrusts. Enemies too far apart though? The game also boasts the ability to move enemies around the battlefield with certain skills! Line up the perfect shot and knock them all down! Roran's Seismic Stomp skill moves two enemies to be close enough to both be torched by Zorja's Flare. If you start to find yourself running low on resources, swapping out characters with backline members is a must. Swapping happens immediately and doesn’t end the current turn, so keeping the momentum up is easy. Resources regain over time in the backline so they’ll soon be ready for action again! When things get dicey you might need an extra push to the finish line. Instead of a laundry list of items, in combat you are limited to a series of bottled spells called runes. These can have powerful effects that can turn the tide and even revive characters! Lost health and mana will be fully restored at the end of combat, so every battle will seek to engage and challenge you, so manage runes carefully to make sure you always have an ace up your sleeve! Over time, your attacks and damage taken build up Super Meter. This is a resource that you can spend on powerful attacks and skills! If you spend enough super meter you enter a mode called Ultimate Mode! In this state you have a limited amount of time to build up to a huge attack called an Ultimate. Ultimate skills deal immense damage and revive all KO’d party members when used, making them perfect for both pressing the advantage or making a last second comeback. ENEMIES Last but not least, you have our foes. Since resources are regained at the end of battle, every fight is designed to be deadly. Enemies are sturdy and can always threaten high damage, debilitating status effects, often both, as well as unique gimmicks and skillsets that synergize together. Enemies also have access to their own super meter, and the threat of these powerful skills will often require changes in your own tactics to prepare for or recover from. Boss fights take everything about this to the extreme, and sport a unique gimmick called an Enrage. When a boss hits certain health percentages they enter this unique state. This can bring about powerful effects and changes to the landscape of the fight to keep you on your toes and create memorable climactic encounters. Themes Disability, identity, isolation and mental illness haunted us from our youth, and it was only with love and support that we were able to grow into artists. Every step a new way we could show each other where hope could be found. Those struggles, that story is present here in The Dawn's Circle. It has grown with us as we overcame adversity and became who we wanted to be. The story is one that reflects personal rebirth and change wrapped in a detailed world. The world is vibrant and colorful, but also tells a mature narrative that deals with sensitive topics that we shape with respect towards each other and our community. Rewards Stretch Goals Tempo Tempest My husband and I met at a technical school offering a unique game design program. Studying here was impactful, but nothing compared to meeting each other and beginning our journey together to create. The characters in this story are deeply personal. They have pieces of our experiences, but more than anything they became living figures, something that grew until their identity became a vibrant force in our lives. We have worked tirelessly to find individuals with the talent and vision to make this world a reality. Now that the team is ready we want to bring this dream to you! Our artists are from all over the world, and all of them do brilliant amazing work. We hope to show you all the ways they can shine in our game! Risks This project is one we have been working on for more than ten years. We are dedicated totally to seeing it succeed. As first time developers we have done as much research and preparation as possible to estimate the time and development costs. That said, delays and hiccups are possible. We will be as transparent and forthcoming about the future of the project as humanly possible. Finishing it and publishing is our number one goal. Environmental Commitments This is a digital product, as such it has a minimal impact. We have no intent to distribute physical copies at this time and want to continue to make the project something people can enjoy for many years. Our biggest concern is longevity, and we will be committed to updating and keeping the game accessible. In a similar vein, we will not be using factories, distributing a product or discussing shipping routes. Everything will be in the cleanest and easiest to access format as possible.

title: Categories
description: Hello and Welcome to New Friends and Old! We're Gabe from Six Wing Studios and Krish for Vismaya , and we're delighted to announce a collaboration between our two titles, Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet and PLAYNE! 🎨 Here for the Fan Art Contest? 🎨 Finalists have been announced, and voting is under way! Cast your vote here and join the conversation in the 〖fan-art-contest〗channel of the Amaru Discord! 😻 Stretch Goals Revealed! 🦊 We've got great additional rewards for everyone if we cross $10k and beyond! Check them out here! What is Amaru? Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet is a mobile game for iOS and Android that combines the best features of pet games and self-care apps to help you form habits that promote focus and resilience to anxiety and depression. Feed, care for, and customize Amaru, deepening your Bond over time. Create custom self-care goals and feel rewarded for completing them. Engage with breathing, mindfulness, and journaling exercises to boost well-being. Play minigames and explore the World of Enso to unlock Amaru's story. Amaru has received a 4.8/5.0 rating after nearly 1 million downloads and 10k reviews. It was nominated for Best Social Impact Project at the 2024 Unity Game Awards and was found to reduce anxiety and depression at clinically meaningful levels in an independent academic study. Learn more about Amaru from its original Kickstarter or download it here . What is PLAYNE? PLAYNE is an immersive mobile game for iOS and Android that makes daily meditation a captivating journey. Guided by Fox, you'll turn an empty clearing into a vibrant sanctuary and uncover PLAYNE's story, while building a daily habit of meditation. Transform an empty clearing into a beautiful sanctuary thriving with life As you play, you'll build a daily habit of meditation and mindfulness Fox is a companion who guides you through your journey of self-discovery Create beautiful and immersive environments and soundscapes for your meditations Meditations that promote self-discovery, emotional resilience, and deep relaxation Available for iOS and Android PLAYNE has routinely topped charts and has captured attention and awards for its impact in helping players form meditation habits and its visual style. You can check out over 1000 reviews on its Steam Page and learn more at their recently funded Kickstarter page. What is this campaign about? Work in Progress: Amaru gets extradimensional! Amaru and PLAYNE are aligned in spirit, having helped tens of thousands of players improve their mental health over the past five years. Both games support the development of habits like mindfulness meditation and journaling that have been scientifically shown to benefit player's focus and resilience to anxiety and depression. Playne recently celebrated a successful Kickstarter, raising £44,280 from 436 backers to port PLAYNE from Steam to Mobile and creating a wonderful opportunity for collaboration between our two studios. Today, we're coming together to open a portal between the two worlds and invite Amaru to join Fox in PLAYNE Mobile! By backing this campaign, you will support our artist Lexie Flock in converting Amaru from his classic, 2D hand-drawn animation to an animated 3D model that can fit seamlessly into the world of PLAYNE! Your support will also help us promote these two wonderful games at a time of great need. How does it work? New to Kickstarter? Here's a great FAQ on how it works! By backing this campaign, you'll choose to back a tier of support and earn the cool, often exclusive , rewards included in your chosen tier. Some of you may be finding this campaign having already backed the PLAYNE Mobile campaign, while others of you may be completely new to PLAYNE. We've got excellent rewards planned for you in either scenario! If you want to support us but don't need any rewards, select the Just here to help! tier for $10 or the Peace Provider tier for $25. These tiers will donate copies of Amaru to players with financial need, and you can choose to up your contribution at checkout! If you already backed the PLAYNE Mobile Campaign: You have the opportunity welcome Amaru onto your island in PLAYNE Mobile! By selecting one of the three "Adopt an Amaru!" tiers below, you will be able to unlock Amaru avatars and features in addition to the PLAYNE content you unlocked by backing the PLAYNE Mobile campaign (i.e., Lifetime access, Snow Fox avatar, etc.). As an additional thank you, we'll also unlock FREE CONTENT inside the Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet App for iOS/Android! Adopt an Amaru (Classic Edition!) - $12 This tier lets you select Amaru (he'll be 3D!) in his Classic Colors as an avatar in PLAYNE Mobile! You're also earn an exclusive in-game Amaru Badge to thank you for supporting the campaign. Adopt an Amaru (Shiny Edition!) - $25 You'll earn everything in the Classic Edition + a Rare, Shiny 3D Amaru Avatar in PLAYNE Mobile! As an extra thank you, you'll be able to explore Amaru's origin story with a FREE code to unlock the base game of the Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet App on iOS/Android! Adopt an Amaru (Aura Edition!) - $49 This tier contains everything in the Classic and Shiny Editions + our Amaru Achievement Auras ! These auras are activated when you achieve 30-day, 90-day, and 365-day streaks in PLAYNE and make your avatars shine brighter and brighter to celebrate your achievements. Finally, as a final thank you for your top-tier support, you'll earn a FREE code to unlock all bonus content in Amaru beyond the base game! This pack includes hundreds of skins for Amaru, seasonal backgrounds and treats, a fun puzzles to solve in the Amaru app! Summary Table (Existing PLAYNE Backer Tiers) *If you already own a Golden Key in Amaru, we will give you a The Enso Portal Pack instead (see Add Ons). If you're new to PLAYNE: By choosing one of the rewards below, you'll unlock One-year or Lifetime Access to PLAYNE: Mobile , additional exclusive crowdfund rewards including our Amaru x PLAYNE crossover content, and free content unlocks for Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet! Summary Table (New to PLAYNE Tiers) *There is a limit of 10 Co-publisher and 1 Visionary Tier Rewards***If you already own a Golden Key in Amaru, we will give you The Enso Portal Pack instead (see Add Ons). Eary-Bird Tiers A limited number of discounted tiers will be made available, so be sure to get your backing in as soon as we launch. Once they're gone, they're gone! This campaign also allows you to snag some additional Add-ons at checkout. These are perks that you can Add-on to any tier at check out! Featured Add-On This exciting pack celebrates Amaru visiting worlds beyond Enso and is full of exclusive content for the Amaru App! The Amaru App contains guided meditations called Echo Stones, a Pet Spa to customize your pet, and a minigame called Puzzle Parlor where you can reassemble scrambled works of art. The Enso Portal Pack - $10 5 Exclusive "Amaru + Fox" Puzzles for Puzzle Parlor featuring the winners of our "Amaru + Fox Fan Art Contest" (More details soon!) Exclusive Digital Wallpapers featuring Fox and Amaru! An exclusive in-app Fox Badge to forever commemorate your support. A New Echo Stone containing a guided exercise to help you ground through your senses into the present moment. 7 Crowdfund-exclusive Globetrotter Skins for your Pet Spa featuring patterns from France, Germany, Russian, Mexico, Ukraine, China, and the Netherlands! 5 Crowdfund-exclusive Globetrotter Puzzles for Puzzle Parlor featuring Amaru traveling to Kyoto, Bavaria, Paris, Machu Picchu, and the Brazilian Amazon! Additional Add-Ons Bring home additional copies of games by Six Wing Studios and Vismaya for you or to share with friends! Playne: The Meditation Game - $15 - A key for the original Steam version of Playne! Available in VR! Playne: Mobile - $60 - Lifetime access to Playne: Mobile on iOS/Android! Emerge - $13 - Krish's latest title invites you to "Uncover a beautiful story through a different kind of jigsaw puzzle where you piece together Maya's lost memories." Available on Steam! Amaru: Golden Key - $10 - Unlock the base game for Amaru (iOS/Android)! Amaru: Everything Pack - $35 - Unlock the base game + all bonus content in Amaru (iOS/Android)! With this $12 Add-on, enjoy downloadable PDF versions of "The Art of Amaru", a beautifully crafted artbook detailing the process for creating Amaru and the world of Enso as well as the "Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet" Storybook where we've bundled together the in-game story chapters unlocked as players bond with Amaru. This $12 Add-on contains downloads for all the mindfulness and guided breathing tracks from Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet at all instruction levels, as well as the music track, “Take Your Time”, by Austin Dillon. 36 Tracks in total. In our effort to keep Amaru financially accessible, we created the Keys for Those in Need Program.  Donate Keys to be distributed first-come first-serve to players with financial need! We've donated over 15,000 keys so far! Donate more for up to 50% off at checkout! 8" Classic Color "Chonkmaru" Plushies (Limited Quantity) - $25 + $10 for USA, +$25 International We have a limited number of adorable Amaru Plushies available for purchase! Grab them before they're gone! Amaru allows players to discover over 500 affirming and uplifting messages submitted by our original crowdfund backers. Add $5 to submit your own message to be included in the game! Fulfillment Timeline and Responsibilities Amaru: The Self-care Virtual Pet is available today, so you'll get to enjoy your Amaru rewards while you wait for Playne to reach completion! Six Wing Studios is responsible for and commits to: fulfilling all Amaru App content to you (i.e, Base Game and Full Game Unlocks, Enso Portal Pack, Digital Books and Echo Stones, Keys for Those in Need). Six Wing Studios additionally commits to providing to Vismaya all the 3D models, badges and any other assets necessary to support making Amaru content possible inside Playne: Mobile. Finally, they are responsible for shipping to you any Amaru plushies. Six Wing will ship to you all digital content and Amaru plushies within 30 days of the end of the campaign. *A note re: Shipping. Six Wing will gather shipping addresses for Plushies after the campaign has concluded.  Six Wing is not responsible for reimbursing you for any plushies that do not arrive due to incomplete or incorrectly provided shipping information. If you are ordering outside the USA, you are responsible for any tariffs which are not included in the price. Please be aware of any tariffs prior to ordering a plushie. Vismaya is responsible for delivering all Playne: Mobile content to you. Krish is currently shooting to release by November 2025. Amaru rewards will be made available shortly thereafter. Why Kickstarter? Now more than ever, people around the world could use the benefits to mental well-being that PLAYNE and Amaru have shared with tens of thousands of players over the past five years. The Kickstarter community has stepped up to support both PLAYNE and Amaru in the past, and it is our hope that this collaboration will allow us to boost the impact of both of these wonderful titles even further going into the future. Terms and Conditions By pledging to this project, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. Kickstarter is a funding platform and not a traditional online store and your backing cannot be considered a 'sale of goods'. When you back this project, you're supporting our vision and helping us bring the project to life. As a backer, you understand that you are not ordering a finished product. The rewards offered are a token of our appreciation for your support and are not equivalent to buying an item from a shop. While we have put a great deal of effort into creating the visuals and descriptions showcased on our Kickstarter page, please keep in mind that the final product may differ from what is presented. We will do our best to stay true to our vision, but some changes may be necessary during the development process to ensure the best possible outcome. We are committed to keeping you informed about the progress of our project. However, due to the nature of game development, we cannot guarantee that the project will be completed exactly on schedule. Rest assured, we will work diligently to minimize any delays and keep you updated along the way. We are passionate about this project and will put our hearts into making it a success. If the project reaches its funding goal, we pledge to do everything in our power to bring it to fruition and deliver the rewards as described. Your trust and support mean the world to us, and we will work tirelessly to ensure that your faith in us is well-placed.

description: Introduce Thorns Tavern Why We Made This Hello everyone, we're the Thorns Tavern team—die-hard fans of tabletop games, especially Dungeons & Dragons. D&D isn’t just a game for us; it’s a weekly epic adventure. One game night, as dice flew off the table, we had a eureka moment. What if we could create a product that not only organizes all our D&D gear but also integrates a dice tower? Fast forward through endless designing and testing, fueled by insights from fellow gamers, and here we are! After countless hours of designing and testing, influenced by feedback from fellow adventurers, we’re excited to unveil our creation: the ALL-IN-ONE dice tower. Elegant Design for TTRPG Essentials Our All-in-one dice tower is a marvel of design that combines a dice tower with storage capabilities for dice, miniatures, and gaming essentials. Mimicking the robust elegance of a hardwood book . This versatile piece can hold up to four sets of dice, notebooks, and pencils. More than just a storage solution, it serves as a fully operational dice tower, ensuring every roll is both fair and dramatic. Perfect for gamers who appreciate efficiency and style, it embodies the spirit of adventure found in every D&D campaign. Review by BoardGame Stories Book-shaped Design Right from the initial design phase, we engaged with numerous Dungeons & Dragons players who showed immense enthusiasm for a book-shaped design. Our goal was to create a product that not only disguises itself on your bookshelf but also, each time you retrieve and open it, it feels like you're unveiling a magical tome, ready to transport you into a world of adventure. Handcrafted Hardwoods Our materials are meticulously handcrafted from hardwoods, including beech, sapele, and black walnut . Each piece of wood is distinguished by its natural grain, making every product uniquely its own—a true gift from nature. These trees mature over decades, a testament to the resilience and timeless beauty they offer. Our selection criteria are rigorously based on hardness, color, texture, and particularly durability , ensuring that each creation is not only beautiful but built to last. Built to Endure In our product design, durability and strength are crucial. Each item is crafted from tough hardwood and reinforced with metal hinges and clasps that are central to our design. These elements are not just components—they are the foundation of our equipment. Rigorously tested through thousands of uses, they have proven to withstand the most epic of adventures. Our meticulous attention to structural integrity ensures that our products consistently perform time and again, much like the legendary artifacts found in the deepest dungeons. Fairness in Dice Rolls The internal design features two baffles, creating a three-stage journey for each die as it cascades into the collection box. This setup ensures fairness in every roll. In the realm of Dungeons & Dragons, dice rolling is an essential ritual, imbuing fate into every adventure. Considering the needs for portability and modularity in tabletop gaming, our dice tower is ingeniously crafted from two symmetrical wooden structures. These are securely united by powerful N35 magnets, renowned for their strong magnetic pull. This design not only ensures a firm and stable construction during game play but also offers effortless assembly and disassembly, enhancing the gaming experience for Dungeons & Dragons players. The magnetic connections allow for quick setup and breakdown, making it an ideal choice for gamers on the go or those with limited space, ensuring that you can bring the full thrill of D&D adventures anywhere, anytime. Safeguarding Your Precious Rolls As a Dungeons & Dragons enthusiast, I believe every player cherishes a set of lucky dice, some of which may be exquisitely crafted from gemstones, adding a touch of luxury to the roll. Recognizing the value and sentimental attachment players have to these gems, we've thoughtfully designed our dice box with a soft, cushioned interior . Additionally, the baffles of our dice tower are also padded to protect your precious gemstone dice. Personalized Covers Elevate Your D&D Experience with Customizable Options. For this Kickstarter campaign, we're thrilled to offer four distinctive cover options to cater to the diverse tastes of Dungeons & Dragons enthusiasts. Understanding the unique spirit of D&D players who strive to stand out, we also provide personalized customization options. By supporting us through add-ons, you can choose your favorite designs which we will discuss via email after the campaign concludes, ensuring your product is exclusively yours— crafted just for you , to bring your unique gaming style to life. Immersive Gameplay Stand As your adventure unfolds, seamlessly dock yoursmartphone or iPad with our product, enhancing your journey with seamless connectivity. Our stand is more than just a tool; it's your gateway to deeper immersion. During your gameplay sessions, you can effortlessly dock your smartphone or iPad on our product. Size and Wood Material What's in the Box Reward Add-Ons Design Story About Us Hey, just wanted to share a bit about where we've come from with our company. Back in 2012, we started off small, just three of us diving into the tabletop gaming world, handling some behind-the-scenes work for bigger names. It's been a ride, and now, we've grown into a passionate team that’s really focused on the gaming industry. We've just kicked off our own brand, which is super exciting! The first product we're launching is something we've developed on our own, and we're really proud of it. Looking ahead, we're all in on bringing more innovative and fun gaming stuff to the table. Contact Us About Shipping

title: Categories
description: Three powerful sacred works. One unifying vision. The Trinity is a trilogy of large-scale compositions for choir and orchestra: Baptism , Nuptials , and Requiem . These half-hour Latin masses each explore a pivotal human passage, birth, union, and death, through a contemporary musical lens that fuses classical and popular influences, including hip-hop, gospel, ambient, and cinematic textures. I'm raising funds to professionally record all three works for the first time, sharing this sacred cycle with listeners, collaborators, and performers around the world. My name is Philippe Treuille , and I’m a composer whose work bridges tradition and innovation. Over the past decade, I’ve composed and premiered major works for orchestra, choir, and interdisciplinary performance, always driven by the belief that music can offer spiritual and emotional resonance in our lives today. With The Trinity trilogy, I aim to create a new kind of sacred music, rooted in the rich ritual of the Latin mass, but updated for today’s ears. Each piece stands on its own but together forms a sweeping arc of human experience. Baptism is a joyful and at times chaotic celebration of birth and transformation. Nuptials captures the ecstatic vulnerability and sacred bond of union. Requiem offers a contemplative, emotional farewell, both mournful and luminous. I’ve had the honor of hearing these works performed live in pieces, but now I want to bring them to life in their entirety, with full choir and orchestra, in studio-quality recordings.

title: Categories
description: Every community needs a festival. The Zihuatanejo International Guitar Festival (“The most amazing gig of my career” / “a priceless recharge for my passion to make music” / “a damn fine time”) is a community funded, musician supported festival that puts on a world class show with a tiny budget, every year in March in beautiful Zihuatanejo, Mexico and we are raising money to buy airline tickets for international artists to attend our 2014 event, March 2-9, 2014. Zihuatanejo Bay www.zihuafest.info , www.facebook.com/zguitarfest , @ADIPMexico Zee-wah-tan-ae-HO --you may recognize the name from the movie, The Shawshank Redemption --is a little beach town on a beautiful bay on the pacific coast of Mexico, where for a week every March rock / pop / jazz / blues / flamenco / classical guitarists from across the globe converge for a week of camaraderie, collaboration and live music in paradise. ZIGF 2013, Photos by Margaret Reid The ZIGF is a small community festival.  We are not one of those monster summer festivals that attract 100,000 people, and we don´t want to be.  We host 10-15 acts for ten days, with 4 concerts, 5 gala dinners and 10 bar shows.  Our bar venues and gala dinner venues hold 100-200 people, the concert venues about 500-700, our entire week attendance is about 3,000 people. The ZIGF is put on every year by a small group of dedicated volunteers.  The festival celebrates guitar music in all of its incarnations. We have a tiny budget, around $30,000 US a year, and no corporate sponsors. Despite this, we have put on an annual music festival for ten years and have brought over 100 international musicians to Zihua, from places like Spain, Brazil, Japan, South Africa, Poland, Russia, England, Ireland, Germany, Turkey, Canada, the US, and Mexico. Closing Concert 2013, photos by Margaret Reid We invite guitarists only: solos, duos or trios in any genre.  Musicians love our festival because we treat them well, give them a wonderful vacation and throw them together for a week with talented guitarists from all over the world. They hang out at the beach, they jam by the pool, they discuss music and often collaborate.  They perform all week in front of appreciative audiences (including a free children´s concert for up to 1000 kids), and then the closing concert is a Jam.  It is a phenomenal night where they perform the music they have created together all week.  Flamenco players perform with blues singers, country singer-songwriters with indie pop singers, Canadian folk singers with Turkish folk singers, and all points in between. A night of encores, it is live music magic. The musical camaraderie of the ZIGF has inspired tours, recordings, and lifelong friendships. Community festivals support communities and they create communities. What the artists say Children´s Concert, Photos by Margaret Reid We have big ambitions.  We want to grow the festival.  Our future plans include year-round programming. a songwriter´s conference and a children´s guitar orchestra. But right now, we just want to keep it going , and to do that we need to buy airline tickets for invited artists for our 2014 event. Airline tickets to Mexico are our biggest expense every year, usually accounting for $10,000 - $15,000 dollars of our $30,000 dollar budget, and that is what we are raising money for now. We have brought some amazing talent to Zihuatanejo over the years, renowned artists in every possible genre and our past participating artists have included winners of some of the industry´s highest honors, Grammys, Country Music Awards, MTV awards, and many others. We love the musicians, we try to treat them well, and over the years many have become like family. They tell us Zihua is one of their favorite festivals of all time, and they all want to come back every year. We receive submissions from artists all over the world, but because of the cost of the airline tickets to Zihuatanejo, our festival is mainly North American artists (Mexican, US and Canadian guitarists).  This year, we have received some amazing submissions from artists from the Philippines, Pakistan, India, Japan, Poland, Belgium, Spain, Argentina, Brazil, Italy, as well as numerous artists from Mexico, the US and Canada. An airline ticket from Europe, Asia or South America, to Zihuatanejo, Mexico, costs a minimum of $1,500 dollars each, usually closer to  $2,000, and often as much as $2,500 each.  From the US or Canada it is less than $1,000 dollars per artist and for this reason our invited musicians are usually North American. With $10,000 dollars we can bring 8 North American acts and 2 International acts, with $15,000 we could bring 8 North American acts and 4 international acts. Click here to see some of the amazing artists that want to come play for us in Zihua: http://www.zihuafest.info/2013/12/for-your-consideration/ We have less than 3 months before our event and less than one month to buy airline tickets, and we are looking for backers to help us with our revolutionary vision. Music festival as cultural revolution? We are musicians and music lovers and want to create a world class festival that celebrates music and benefits communities.  We think music can be a powerful force for positive change. We believe that small community festivals can be a big part of the music industry of the future: a way to use tourism to fund arts and cultural initiatives, to combine an incredible music event in a beautiful place and use it to promote something good in the neighborhood. And for all of the joy that they bring to others, we think musicians deserve a beautiful vacation in an inspiring environment. If you are interested in finding out more about us (seeing our plans, our music education projects, our financial statements, our past participating artists ...) you can go to our website, it`s all there, www.zihuafest.info We hope you´ll join us in Zihuatanejo in March, for a week of live music in paradise (and a damn fine time), but even if you can´t make it to Mexico, we hope you are inspired to support music festivals in your own community. Every community needs a festival, this is ours : www.zihuafest.info

title: Categories
description:
Hello
Everyone! Scott and Christine Dente here. ...........................................................NEWS FLASH!!!........................................................... Well, it HAPPENED, folks! We reached our Kickstarter goal of $35K in LESS THAN 35 days and we are officially embarking on a new Out of the Grey album! It happened in record time (thanks to YOU) – so we've come up with some new ways (and new goals) to continue to reward all of you for helping to make it a reality. But before we dive in to the new goals, you may be wondering what additional funds be used for. Great question! Our initial $35K goal was the MINIMUM to be able to produce an Out of the Grey CD – anything additional will give us the ability to produce a higher quality recording for everyone. Beyond that?  Well…how would you like to hear the new music on the radio ? Or maybe have the chance to see us in concert ?? Those are just a couple of the ideas we’ve been exploring – so keep spreading the word and let’s see where this can take us! NEW GOALS (as of May 14, 2014): $40,000 – if we reach $40K before the end of the campaign, every backer will receive a Limited Edition Out of the Grey T-shirt designed just for this campaign $50,000 – if we reach $50K by May 21, we’re planning an Out of the Grey concert for ALL backers! The concert will be in Nashville featuring musicians that have played on our recordings through the years. And if you can't make it to our town? Don't worry – we'll stream the event live to you via the internet! ................................................................................................................................................. If
you've found your way here, you probably know that Kickstarter is a great
platform for teaming up with friends, fans, and supporters to make music happen
and connect in the creative process. Through Kickstarter, you can
pre-order our new music—and more—while helping to fund the project. However, we only have 35 days to reach our goal of $35,000 in
order to fund our new recording. If we don’t meet the goal, your
credit card will not be charged for any of the reward packages we're offering -
but we won’t be able to make the album (or fulfill the packages) either. SO, if
you’re IN, check out our reward packages (listed both below and to the right). Then scroll down and keep reading, if you want to hear a little more! REWARD PACKAGES (Organized by Category Below, Organized by Price to the Right) _________________________________________________________ We
thought we’d do a little Q&A to tell you what we are hoping to accomplish
with this Kickstarter campaign: 1. Why
Kickstarter? We’re
working on a new Out of the Grey album for the first time without the financial backing of a record label. Kickstarting the project with $35,000 will allow us to make a high-quality recording and kick it on out to you all (and everyone else) ASAP. Here is what that $35,000 will cover: Production, engineering, studio time The best studio musicians Mixing the record Mastering the record Album artwork and photo shoot CD duplication/manufacturing Marketing & promotion Any unforeseen costs (that always seem show to up) *** If we exceed our $35,000 goal , we plan to invest in more promotion of the new CD—and will offer some additional perks for those who have helped us to reach that goal by supporting the new project. If that happens, we'll post more details on what those perks might entail. (So, even if we hit the goal, keep sharing this with your friends!!)*** 2. What
will the new album be like? Well—we can guarantee that this new album will be like nothing you've ever heard before ! Because...well...it'll be all new songs...that you've never heard before...so... But
seriously, the songs we've been writing for this project are about us, about our journey together for the last 28 years and what we've been learning and experiencing. We have both spent time over the last several years seeking to recover parts of our hearts that had gotten lost along the way, and building upon the healing and grace that God has given. As always, we're trying to write from an honest place as we work out what it looks like to follow Jesus and live well in this day and age. So that's a little of what you can expect along with our long-established Out of the Grey sound. (Here's an example of that!) 3. How
can you be a part? First, we have put together a list of
unique reward packages that are only available for a limited time. Each one is named after an Out of the Grey song.
Check them out and choose one that makes you happy! Second,
please help us spread the word to your friends, your family, co-fans, church
members and other music-lovers–anyone you think would be interested. How can
you do that? Share this page on Facebook! Tweet the link! Post a pic of the page on Instagram! Text your friends!
Knock on doors! Any way you can help us get the word out is great, and will
help us get to make the album and fulfill all of our reward packages. And—if we exceed the $35,000 goal, we'll be able to do more and give more perks! (Actually, don’t knock on doors, though. That could be awkward.) BONUS
QUESTION: What have you all been doing since the last Out of the Grey album? Some of
you are probably wondering what we've been up to over the last several years: Scott – April: 2014. After our last recording in 2001, I was cryogenically frozen and stored in our cluttered garage until I was to be needed again for the purposes of an Out Of The Grey record project. But earlier this year, in an effort to defrost an organic chicken and a surplus spinach quiche, Christine accidentally left the freezer open. Destiny? Foolishness? Only time will tell. Once I finished reeling from the news about the Red Sox and the iPhone, I upgraded my hardware and got to work. On this, the new Out Of The Grey project. It is my Primary Function. I hope I can still play guitar. I can’t feel my hands. Meanwhile, in an alternate universe, Scott continued working in music and played on hundreds of recordings for other artists and started a thriving TV Music production company with a longtime friend. He also explored life from many angles; father, friend, broken vessel, youth group leader, and handyman. Not to mention, husband of 25 years. Then he woke up. Christine – Well, since our 6.1 record, I've recorded two solo projects that Scott produced—Becoming and Voyage ( see the reward packages! )—as well as singing on some other artists' projects. In the past few years, I've also started working with voice students and doing songwriting coaching as well. But certainly the biggest job I've had has been raising and teaching our three
children. Julian is 22 now and working on his own musical journey. We think he's a really good musician and songwriter (if I do say so myself).
Carina is a sophomore in college studying Social Work. She really loves working
with and helping children and she’s great at it. Chloe is 17 and graduating
from high school this year. She’s excited to be heading to college next year to study
marine biology and to get to work with the animals that she loves. So, this time in our lives really feels like a good place for Scott and me to start something new. All of us at Christmas this year! (Scott, Chloe, Julian, Carina and me) _________________________________________________________ We
can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve already shown us over all these
years since we released our first CD in 1991. It is our privilege to be a part
of your lives and receive the love and encouragement you’ve given us along the
road. As we continue with new music and musings, we’re excited to see what this
next part of the journey brings. $35K in 35 Days - Together, we can do this! Scott and Christine

title: KPIQ: The First Step, New Album 2015
description: What are we? We're a salsa movement! Our goal is to take our rhythm, dance and music to every corner in the world. We love to sing and we want to share our music with you. Our project is created for everyone, for the young and the old, the dancer, the singer, urban and R&B lovers or the salseros /cocolos! Our goal is to maintain our genre alive in every generation. It's a new and original sound that was created by our grammy award winning producer and mentor, Oscar Serrano. We believe in our project and we invite you to be a part of it!!!! Legends and  Big Stars of the salsa industry showing support to our movement. OUR FIRST MUSIC VIDEO A brief about us! We grew up very close to the music industry, since our dad is a grammy winning producer and singer.  Being so near to renown artists presentations triggered our interest for music, which has now become our life. At a very young age we used to imitate other artists in front of our mirrors and sing into the hairbrush, what later on lead us to talent shows and competitions and has now evolved into us performing our own songs and music. This is how KPIQ was born! The name comes from the game of dominos,"Capicú"; It's very well known winning move that implies a player has the winning move from both sides of the game! That's exactly what KPIQ is aiming for! We want you to enjoy our music, our live shows and eveything you see about us. Always being ourselves, the concept fusions salsa with jazz, R&B and urban music which represents everything about us. We mixed our culture with our likes and interests and created something new and fun for anyone who enjoys music! We grew up in Cupey Puerto Rico and are now one of the young upcoming groups of salsa in the music industry. " We have the urban touch without losing the clave of salsa This has been on the works since we were little. We just didn't know better. Why kickstarter? Throughout these years, many people, artists, producers, friends, family or even total strangers have come to us to tell us about how much they like what we do and how they expect big things for us, so here's the chance to help us make those big things come true!!!!! The opportunity is there, we just need a little push!!!!   We are almost done with our first album and we've been able to go on media tour and participated in many presentations in Puerto Rico, yet still, our project is something we want to take even further, take our music to every corner in the world!!!! On the set of our first music video We have spent almost all resources and savings developing the creative part of our project. All of our songs requires a full salsa orchestra recording of 15 musicians (which gets expensive for a whole album) plus the touch of our urban producer.  Our producer which is also our dad has helped us throughout this journey and has given us a mentoring hand and has handed us many of his connections. The music industry keeps changing and independent artists like us have more freedom and the opportunity to grow, develop and give fans sincere and honest music, so you can decide. We want to expand and have the opportunity of going on tour in the (east coast) US and  Dominican Republic and some other places in Latin America BUT.... We need a way bigger budget but, with  $20,000 we can finish recording our production, mixing, mastering, videos and cover at least radio and promotion in the US! And this is why we're here! Plan - We have a plan structured! We have had many meetings with people in the music industry which have helped us develop a strategy and constructed a budgeted plan for what we want to accomplish. Once we receive the budget we need, we will be able to finish the album and KICKSTART this journey!!!!  Our projected plan starts in the US (east coast) and later we go on to RD not forgetting we have had extended invitations to visit some countries in Latin America and even Spain!!! The job is being done, and we will finally make it happen!! Oh, and of course, once we get our help, our backers finally receive their perks! Goals : As we mentioned before our nearest goals are finishing and releasing our Album "The First Step", as well as our single and going on tour; but the job continues after that!!!!! We still need to decide the single for the end of the year, and begin working on our second album! Also, we aim to be a part of next years award nominees!!! And we will work for it!!!! We believe in this!!!! All the backers will get an immediate download of our newest song "No te equivoques" that will be on the album and will get the whole album before anyone else. Our Team We wouldn't be here without you guys!!!! Dad , president of the company!!! Boss, brain of this master plan! You're our greatest gift on this earth!!!! Thanks for believing in us before we even started, for the lessons and for everyyyything! We love you and we're blessed to have you as our producer. Mom, Aunt, Mrs. Boss ..... We guess that it's your strength, knowledge and your security what has pulled us all together to create this little monster! Ha! Thanks!!! Your roll is irreplaceable! Lio Gomez , our 6'4 ft tall Largie!!!! Sir Music Engineer, thanks for your dedication to us and Flame Music!!! It's a pleasure to work with you, your multiple skills and your desire to see this happen!!!! You inspire us each moment we see the time and nights you've spent working with us! You're amazing, brother! We love you!!!! Cindy & Alejandro or shall we say Marketing Supremacy!!!! Woooooow! You guys have been Godsend!!!! From the very first time you laid eyes on us, you saw the potential and believed in the idea! Today, it's a reality and you have certainly made us grow and learn much more than what we ever dreamt! Thanks for all these years of hard work!!!! We're just a few pennies away for the next step!!!!! Let's do this!!!!! Get to know us a little more Hii!  I'm Coral! Graduated last year from the music department in the University of Puerto Rico!! I love listening to and singing jazz, dancing salsa or dancing to Beyoncé's music as I jog at the gym and I appreciate nature more than anything!! I'm inspired by the moon. I've been dancing salsa for over 15 years and was born into a family of musicians, and artists in every campus! I'm really excited about our project and can't wait for the tours and everything to show you what we have! I love sports! My favorite are basketball and boxing, both which I practice on my free time. Music is part of my life! I love Urban Music and therefore, that's the genre and style I bring into salsa with our orchestra, KPIQ! Hello! Camille here! Last year I graduated with a bachelor's in Music and another one in Acting from the University of Puerto Rico!! I am obssesed with jazz, but also listen to country music, ballads and latin genres. I am also a dancer and  teach salsa dancing. But my dance prep was in modern dance!  I am a songwriter and for the very first time I recorded 3 of my own songs!!!! Wanna hear them??? Just help us out and will send you a copy of our album. Thanks in advance!! God bless! ✌️

title: Categories
description:
-50% of all Royalties will go toward missionaries and mission projects.- Finding Hope Through One Pastor's Doubt. “Well this sucks! I know, preachers aren't supposed to talk that way. But maybe they should. You know, from time to time when churchy words just don’t seem to convey what’s truly going on in the soul. I've never really been a fan of religious verbiage anyway. I especially hate it when people call me Pastor Steve. God doesn't call me that . . .” Those are the opening words in this book that shares the personal journey of a preacher struggling with his faith. Through humor and real life stories of pain, STEVE HINTON, carries the reader along the path of honestly looking at tough questions about God, self, and life. In the end, people will walk away from this journey with new hope for their lives. This is a book for : -Those that have honest doubts about God’s goodness and love. -Those seeking to know their true identity in a world of mixed messages about humanity, God, and themselves. -Those that have faced years of unanswered prayer. -Those trying to make sense of a broken life and feelings of an absent God. This journey builds from a preacher who is just a regular guy. Just Steve. A man who bleeds and struggles like everyone else. Just a guy who loves Jesus the best he knows how and more importantly is loved by Jesus. It is his hope that by walking through these pages you’ll discover that Jesus loves you too. "I have had the pleasure of knowing Steve since our college days. His integrity, wit, and passion are as clear today as they were back then. And his vulnerability and wisdom are so welcomed in this book. What may seem like a window into the heart of a pastor will quickly become one into your own soul. " Rusty George- Lead Pastor Real Life Church.   Author of Better Together. The Specs with LUCID. The goal of $6,000.00 will provide editing services, production, and basic distribution - marketing. Further Stretch Goal. Further promotional services with Lucid can be reached with an additional $2,000 or more. This will get the book into the hands of experts and other key influences as well as provide additional media openings. Additional Early Reviews! “Few Pastors have so eloquently written about the questions borne from the trials and tribulations of ministry like my friend Steve Hinton. Confessions of a Preacher brings out into the open what the rest of us would prefer to keep behind closed doors . Thank goodness. Read this book and be strengthened by Steve’s counsel and encouraged by his kindness.” Brian Jones- Senior Pastor Christ’s Church of the Valley.  Philadelphia.  Author of Finding Favor: God’s Blessing Beyond Health, Wealth and Happiness. “There have been as many days in ministry that I wanted to throw in the towel as there have been days of victorious knockouts.  My friend and fellow minister, Steve Hinton gets that and more. Writing with raw honesty, Hinton has thrown down the questions we all ask from inside the helmet, and in the journey has found the answers we all need .” Tim Harlow- Senior Pastor of Parkview Christian Church. Chicago. Author. "We need answers from God beyond the entrancement of social media. Steve has given us those answers." Max Goins- Executive Director of We-Go Mission Coalition. “If the word ‘confession’ means to ‘to speak the same,’ then anyone who reads this pilgrimage will say, ‘Me too.’  Former student and friend, Steve Hinton, walks every preacher through the struggle between person and profession in this self-disclosing book.  Serving Christ in a fallen world is filled with ups and downs and groans. Steve has experienced them all, and his testimony gives the rest of us permission to experience them too.  At the end of the day, he resolves to be governed by the bigger things that exist at the primal level .” Dr. Mark Scott- Preaching and New Testament/Director of Preaching Department
Ozark Christian College "In his excellent book, “Confessions of a Preacher” Steve writes with uncommon candor about the struggles so common to his calling.  A calling so rarely understood by most, including many other preachers! Once you start reading this book you will be immediately captivated both by Steve’s honesty and insights . I happily recommend this book to all who seek a better understanding of just why and how ministry is getting harder and why we need more determined leaders and preachers like Steve!" Dr. Alan Ahlgrim- Director of Fraternity Covenant Groups
The Center for Church Leadership. "Preachers are translators. It is why we so often use a good story to communicate Biblical truth into everyday speech. Jesus did it routinely. One of the most engaging qualities of Steve Hinton's story and story-telling ability is his capacity for using everyday talk to communicate grand truths. Words like reconciliation, redemption, and justification are on the fringe of Steve's unfolding story, but he never leverages them to make himself appear more than he really is. When he does venture into the deep waters of sanctification, Steve wraps the word in the blanket of his own story with simplicity and grace. His story is not simply the confessions of a preacher, but his story is our story ." Dr. JK Jones- Director of Spiritual Formation. Lincoln Christian Seminary.
Eastview Christian Church. Normal, Ill.  Author. Check out further info in the Updates!

title: Categories
description: Every single time I give a talk about the Endangered Alphabets project, one question comes up: What about cursive? Is handwriting still important? And what is its future? This is more than nostalgia: it touches on a fascinating and paradoxical phenomenon taking place all over the world. Just when we in the West are abandoning the art of handwriting or delegating writing altogether to AI, a number of minority cultures around the world are doing exactly the opposite--reconnecting with their pasts and their identities by teaching calligraphy in their traditional scripts. In Nepal, in the Philippines, in Bali, in China, in Mongolia, people are relearning the art of writing by hand. The book I'm hoping you will make possible, Endangered Alphabet Calligraphy: Saving Culture Through the Art of Writing , will introduce these remarkable calligraphies--some on paper, yes, but some on palm leaf, some in bamboo. The results are more than elegant and beautiful; they are a way of reviving traditional practices, awakening muscle memory, reconnecting present with past through an art form that brings grace and respect to their culture and giving it a voice. Which prompts the question, "Are they finding something important we are losing?" Is it possible the art of writing by hand will be saved not by the technologies of the world's digital powerhouses but by those who have had their own writing marginalized, suppressed, or even banned? Those who know at first hand how deeply it speaks to, and shows, who they are? Many of you know my work. Two years ago I asked for support, via Kickstarter , to write a book that pulled together all my Endangered Alphabets thinking. That’s all I said about it; that’s all I knew at the time. It’s a sign of your trust that the Kickstarter met its goal of nearly $20,000, and that trust was not misplaced: the book became Writing Beyond Writing , which has been hailed as “a game-changer,” “unprecedented,” “a magical journey” and “a sustained love song to one of humanity’s most remarkable achievements.”   It has nothing but 5-star reviews on Amazon, has been used in college classes in the US and abroad, and has been discussed at conferences in America, Europe, Africa and Asia. Trust me again, and I promise to deliver a book that is fascinating, visually stunning, and an adventure both in ideas and among some of the world's most imperiled cultures.

title: The Nude Balloon Calendar
description: I've been making calendars and giving them away to friends and family for almost 10 years. They're always a hit, but I've always wanted to reach a wider audience. I'm not a professional balloon twister. I've worked a couple of parties and entertained some friends' children, but my main interest is this particular kind of elaborate maquette that parodies something recognizable—I like to recreate images that are indelibly burned into our collective memory. There's something really amusing to me about the combination of enduring and temporary, serious and comical, mature and childish at the same time. Each year has a different theme. Some of my favorites have been sculptures, album covers, movie posters, and postmodern art. 2023 will celebrate the nude human form, from fine art to pop culture. From Botticelli to Helmut Newton to "Kim Kardashian: Break the Internet." Each source image will be meticulously replicated in bloopy balloon form, cleanly lit, and beautifully photographed. Each month will bring a new delight to your wall: something at which to chuckle daily, something instantly recognizable but slightly off, something that will make visitors double-take ("Wait, is that... is that balloons!?") A few highlights from previous years [top to bottom, left to right]: Isadora Duncan (based on an Arnold Genthe portrait), Lunch Atop a Skyscraper (Charles Clyde Ebbets photograph), Clockwork Orange movie poster, The Hindenburg Disaster (Sam Shere photograph), Pulp Fiction movie poster, René Magritte's "The Treachery of Images," Nirvana's "Nevermind" album cover, Benvenuto Cellini's "Perseus with the Head of Medusa," Herb Alpert's "Whipped Cream and Other Delights" album cover Historically, these calendars have taken me 1-3 months to fully assemble. When it's just been for family & friends, I start in November or December and usually wrap up Christmas Eve. This year, I'm starting earlier in hopes that I can presell a few hundred, raise funds for a larger print run, print mid-October, package, label, and get ready to ship by the end of November. Balloon twisting has already begun— if this doesn't fund, I'm still moving ahead with a small run for friends & family. If this does fund, I'd like to evolve it into a whole online store for next year: calendars, prints, enamel pins, apparel. All featuring offbeat and non-traditional balloon, er... "animals." If this Kickstarter turns out to be way more successful than I anticipate, I'll turn some of those 'someday' plans into stretch goals for the current project.
