description: Greetings Kickstarter! My name is Lawrence and I am the Founder of FanFare Music. Let's talk about how I became annoyed with Pandora and other music apps: During the pandemic, I was streaming music on Twitch as often as I could. If I was doing an hour a day and wanted to assign a theme to each stream -maybe a genre or a mood- I found myself struggling to find new, fresh music if I was pursuing a niche theme. My friends would always suggest trying Pandora. I found that Pandora barely understood the differences between dubstep and drum and bass or rock and punk. It would normally take about three songs into a Pandora playlist before I was listening to some off-genre, off-theme song and back to square one of my hunt… and that’s not to mention the constant ad interruptions. I also miss the early days of Spotify when you could see what your friends were listening to when you signed on. After scouring the internet for other options, I wondered: wouldn’t it be nice if one program could do exactly what I want? FanFare was born. On day one, we are calling users to make songs their own, and to tell us what those songs mean to them through four unique features: Tags: Themes, tempos, keys… any item that makes a song unique. Take Bohemian Rhapsody, the first song I tagged in FanFare. I added four tags: #karaokehit, #141bpm, #Ckey, #bandaid and the genres Progressive Rock and SingALong. What would you add to Bohemian Rhapsody? Both tags and genres can be liked by other users so you can see what other users agree with, and what other users maybe gloss over. Love this song? Comment and let me know how you feel about it. Can’t think about this song without thinking about We are the champions? Link it. The link feature was designed to make and traverse a spider web of songs quickly. FanFare can interact with your Spotify and Apple music. You can add any song to your existing playlists, in one simple click. This feature was a dream for me to be able to pull off. Now we get to the social aspect of fanfare. For all of the songs, tags, and genres you follow, your news feed and notifications will keep you up to date on your friends and other users activity. This will help you find new music, but also be able to go deeper into your favorite niches by following friends and tags that suit your style. This is music’s social media. Every user can maintain a profile. This was important for me so that if I track another user’s activity and love their taste in music, I can now follow that user so they can feed me with all the new songs I could ever ask for. By following a user, I can see their tag, genre, link, and comment activity on songs that I don’t follow yet. If you’re simply looking to be inspired, our Explore section will give you the most popular and interested music based on your activity, but can also show you songs without tags, for example, so you can help build the network. We are happy to announce that all of the features above are fully developed and coded into the first release of FanFare, for iOS. If you want to be one of the first users to access this brand new music discovery and social music app, KickStarter will be the exclusive place to gain that access. FanFare is a small entry into the tech world. Most of our employees are dogs: Chip, Pepper, and Bob (Robert Francis). We had to bootstrap and raise our funds to hire development partners to build the app. Luckily, we were able to convince others of this vision to help motivate our efforts over the last three years! In 2020 I initially set my target on funding myself through KickStarter, but every campaign manager told me apps were a hard niche, so I didn’t launch seeking the full cost of an app. I am now launching on KickStarter because I want to access the community of product testers and innovators on the website, but also to build FanFare’s first user base. I invite you to check out our features below so you can be the first in the world to access the app. We had a few backers ask, 'why $9,000 campaign goal? It seems too small to fund an app. ' You are a 100% correct, development for our app is already fully funded, as you can see in our campaign video. The $9,000 goal will help us fund back end costs (servers), and help us market the app to grow our userbase. Any stretch goal beyond that will fund cool new features. Lawrence and Devin want to break from the distrust in big tech. We are small music, here to make a platform for fans and artists. We want to stay in touch, hear what you think, and build a global community for music. Following the last day of our Kickstarter campaign, the app will go live to our Kickstarter supporters only. There will be a beta-like intro period before we go public. This is your chance to spearhead the best tags and genres onto popular songs before others can. Design has already been complete on quality of life improvements and new features for Fanfare. With stretch funding we plan to release this by the end of 2023. User community groups, artist hubs, and musicians unique profile options are among these new features planned. $25,000 - Community feature - Think Facebook Groups $100,000 - Musician Hub - Host music if you're up and coming $250,000 - Android Release Use of Funds: If we raise between 7,500 and 15,000; 100% will go towards back-end user costs to support app operation. Anything more than 15,000: 100% will go towards developing expanded features for the app! We've Been Featured on Gadget Flow Check out Gadget Flow's platform here.

description: Meet K3 HE & K3 Ultra At Keychron, we believe your tools should be as refined as the work you do with them. Introducing the all-new K3 HE and K3 Ultra 8K. A compact 75% layout. Natural rosewood accents paired with a precision-machined metal frame — balancing organic warmth with industrial rigor. *K3 HE features magnetic switches and additional ESC and Enter keys. Designed with a noticeably slimmer profile than traditional mechanical keyboards, K3 HE & K3 Ultra feel light on the desk and effortless to carry. *K3 Ultra features low-profile mechanical switches and a clean, uniform key design. Durable low-profile double-shot PBT keycaps resist oil and wear, delivering lasting texture with a refined RGB glow. Hands-on Review ｜K3 HE A refined low-profile keyboard shaped by magnetic precision. Beneath its clean, minimal exterior lies Hall Effect sensing —each keystroke defined by distance, not contact, delivering fluid control, lasting consistency, and intentional response. Every press feels deliberate. Every reset happens exactly when you release. Smooth, precise, and fully yours. K3 HE Keychron Ultra-Fast Lime Low-Profile Magnetic Switches Fully customizable low-profile magnetic switches with Hall Effect sensing. Delivering unmatched accuracy and extreme sensitivity for near-instant keystroke detection, thanks to their higher sensitivity to magnetic field changes. K3 HE Adjustable Actuation Depth Not every key is used the same way. So why have them engage at the same depth? With K3 HE, you get to customize each key individually with 0.1 mm precision and set actuation points in a wide range from 0.2 to 2.9 mm . Fine-tune for maximum performance. Total control. K3 HE Dynamic Rapid Trigger In gaming, every millisecond matters. That’s why K3 HE’s magnetic switches let you go beyond fixed actuation points . Activate and deactivate keys based on travel distance to gain a consistent edge over your opponents with dynamic rapid trigger technology — which can reset your key the instant you release it with 0.1 mm precision. K3 HE LAST KEY PRIORITY (LKP) & SNAP CLICK When multiple keys are pressed, K3 HE always registers the last one. Even with two keys down, your final press is the command that comes through. K3 HE will also feature Snap Click. Unlike LKP, which prioritizes the last keypress, Snap Click prioritizes the deeper keypress when two keys are pressed at the same time, and resets the shallower key. Now, your commands register clean every time, exactly as you intended. *Note: Features like Snap Click(SOCD) may be restricted in certain competitive titles(e.g.,CS2,Valorant). We recommend verifying tournament rules or disabling this feature during ranked play. K3 HE ONE KEY. MULTIPLE ACTIONS K3 HE senses exactly how far you press each key, allowing you to assign a different action to every depth level. Apply light pressure for a walk and a full press to run. Or set a key to perform one function with a soft touch and a completely different command when bottomed out. You can assign up to 4 actions to each key. K3 HE Analog Mode Experience the power of Analog Mode on your K3 HE, bringing game controller-like precision to your keyboard. This mode enables variable inputs instead of the usual on/off signals, letting you achieve more fluid and dynamic control. With each keypress, the K3 HE detects how far you press, translating it into different speeds and intensities. Enjoy nuanced control and heightened responsiveness in racing games, sports simulations, and more. Customize Every Part Elevate your typing with the K3 HE, featuring advanced sound-absorbing foam for satisfying keystrokes and enhanced comfort. Combined with resilient latex foam for superior switch support, responsiveness, and durability, it redefines the standard for a quiet and tactile typing experience. ｜K3 Ultra 8K Built for players who demand speed —and for anyone who expects their keyboard to always keep up. A slim, portable form meets sustained high-performance engineering. Every input feels immediate, controlled, and consistent — whether you’re gaming, working, or switching between devices. K3 Ultra 8K Polling Rate With an 8000 Hz polling rate, Latency matches the 0.125 ms polling interval. That’s 1000x faster than human reaction time. Latency is effectively non-existent. K3 Ultra 550 Hours Of Battery Life Despite that 8K performance, we didn't sacrifice the battery. K3 Ultra, powered by efficient ZMK open-source firmware , achieves up to 550 hours of battery life (with backlight turned off) in 8K wireless mode —over three months of use on a single charge. K3 Ultra Pre-Lubed Keychron Milk POM Low-Profile Mechanical Switches Keychron Milk POM Switch is engineered with cutting-edge POM and POK materials, which deliver a deeper, resonant thock sound in low-profile designs. Pre-lubed for a precise and smooth feel, they offer a dependable fingertip experience, whether you prefer the linear (red) or tactile (brown, banana) switch options. Engineered for disassembly. Customize every component with ease. Therefore, you can customize and adjust each component as you wish. Shared Foundation Customize With Keychron Online Launcher Keychron Launcher is a web-based configuration tool that runs directly in your browser. No software installation required. Whether you switch computers, move between home and office, or set up a new device, you can access the same configuration anytime. From adjusting actuation points and configuring HE features to creating macros and controlling RGB lighting — everything is done right in the browser. Designed to move effortlessly between environments, it adapts just as easily to focused work as it does to gaming — flexible, intuitive, and always ready. *Please use the latest version of Chrome / Opera / Edge browser to open the Launcher. Universal Compatibility K3 HE & Ultra are compatible with macOS, Windows, and Linux . A built-in physical switch lets you toggle between operating systems instantly, so there’s no need to worry about settings or key layouts. Each system is optimized to deliver a familiar, comfortable experience. LSA double-shot PBT keycaps LSA double-shot PBT keycaps ensure legends never fade and surfaces resist shine, even after long-term use. Because this is something you interact with every day, the design balances durability with visual refinement. Even with heavy daily use, it maintains its original look and feel over time. Hot-Swappable by Design The K3 HE and Ultra are built to endure. But if you do want to change your switches, simply swap them out in seconds, without soldering or technical skills. Dynamic Backlit Control Keychron K3 HE & Ultra come with a north-facing backlight for superior RGB shine-through. Go beyond standard presets with 22+ RGB backlight settings — including a static white option. Our advanced lighting engine includes two powerful features to fuel your creativity: Per-key RGB and Mix RGB . You can further fine-tune and remap keys with ease, crafting your unique style with vivid, dynamic RGB control. You can light only the keys you need, highlighting keycap texture without visual distraction. The result is lighting that strikes a thoughtful balance between aesthetics and usability. ISO Version The ISO version (UK, German, Nordic) will also be available (Black Color Only)! Please note: The ISO version will require a little more time. Shipping for ISO versions will start in July. In the post-campaign survey, you’ll be able to choose whether you’d like the ANSI or ISO layout. title: Cubi - The Star Trek-like Communicator for Smart Kids
description:
Star Trek- like? We adore science fictions and technology, and Star Trek is undoubtedly one of our favorite series of all time. As a kid, we long dreamed of having a telecommunication device like the one in Star Trek, too bad the technology in real-life is a little bit behind at the time. But now, we finally have the enough resource on presenting something similar to what we truly loved and be proud to let our next generation experience the unparalleled charisma of technology. Cubi is a communicator for kids. The fundamental idea is to build-up and strengthen the connection within family. Allows children to express their feeling freely with people they love. More so, communicating between peers has been a huge part of our daily life. We adults gets to stay informed with people we know and people we love at any given time. As for children, especially when they are not allow to carry a phone yet, it’s not as easy as they wish it would be. Thus, we’ve created Cubi. That is easy to use, comfortable to wear and packed with all the necessary tools to serve their everyday needs. Last but not least, Cubi comes equipped with various protecting functions to ease parents worries. Plus it also comes with several marvelous features made especially for children. Cubi is designed to be a wearable voice messenger for children from age 3 ~ 10. Power consumption on stand-by will be 24-hours and continuous using is estimated at around 5-hours. We can not always be with our children, oftentimes we all wish there was some ways to stay connected with them. Thus leads to rather or not getting a phone for our youth. However all the mainstream smartphones are way too complicate for young children nor it’s really necessary for them to have access on so many functions at young age. With that mindset, we’ve created Cubi. That can send and receive voice messages. Allows children to safely venture on their own but have the ability to report back any obstacles or finding on their young journey. And the beauty of voice messages is that children can choose their desire timing when sending or receiving to avoid interruption. Both parents and children can also repeatedly listen to any voice messages on their Cubi and smartphone. We understand parents will always prioritize children's safety much more than having the ability to communicate and or interact with them. Therefore, we've installed Cubi with the GPS tracking. Parents can monitor kid's whereabout at all time, keeping their greatest fear from happening to a minimum. There will be a safety zone feature available on parent's smartphone for custom, one can choose to set alert when children leaving or arriving at set location. More so, when situation do occur, children can press and hold the Emergency Alert button for 3 seconds, and parent’s phone will receive the emergency message with the current location of the children. We've covered the communicating method and the safety concern, time for the fun part! The design language for Cubi is essentially a children's robotic pal. A friend who will always share their travel together and conquer the journey as a team and share their every finding right on the spot. The face of Cubi has an adorable blinking eyes that can shows various emotions.
Imaging the following daily scenarios. Children can let their parents know what they wish to see in their lunchbox next day or share their happiness or struggles in school instantly. And between friends, kids can share their daily finding from big to small, things like jokes, ups and downs or even special codes within their circle and so on. Cubi also allows children to building their own friends network using NFC technology. To add friends on their Cubi’s contact list, children can simply bump each other’s Cubi together then wait for parent’s approval. Want to have a voice changer effects with our own recording? Cubi can also make it happen! We've installed a wide range of voice changer that would totally impress their friends and family. Here at BeLuvv, our ultimate goal as a brand is to introduce smart living across generation. With our existing product - Guardian. A bluetooth enabled bracelet for children to wear and making sure parents is always on the watch for our little ones. Since then, we wanted to extend our reach to a even greater distance. With Cubi, we have strong faith that the foreseeable future is within reach. Children can adapt and grown the habit on wearing a smart device when they are active. Of course, we are well aware that not everyone can wear something on their wrist, even adults. Therefore, we’ve designed Cubi with a removable watch head for add-on usage later on. Like a buckle set so kids can attach Cubi easily to their bags or on their belts, or a watch stand so children can place Cubi on the desk.
Tons of possibilities awaits! The design language on Cubi begin with the motivation on creating a sophisticated looking and well function yet easy to navigate wearable device. With that principle in mind, BeLuvv design team start forming ideas and drawing sketches. To create Cubi, our designers first study kid’s toys and observe closely on how young children operate technology devices and what are their go-to habit when playing with it. We then scale down the size in what we think is perfect for our youth. The round shape exterior and color screen was aim to cater young children's wrist and small finger, and the overall style of the Cubi combine with the animated eyes blinking is to resemble what a tiny robot should look like. Mechanism wise, BeLuvv works hard to ensure it is not only light in weight, but also entirely made out of skin-friendly materials with the highest security measure. After 9 months of researching, planning, resketching and developing, Cubi has finally come to life! And we are proud to say, we truly adore our finished design and the overall functionaries that packed into this magical little device. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. title: SOAR Health App
description: SOAR is the single most important tool to help Student-Athletes deal with the unseen pressure and stress they face on a daily basis. Please help our crucial and much needed platform continue to SOAR to new heights! The SOAR Health App is a new and unique anonymous resource platform that helps student-athletes become more confident and comfortable talking about their personal mental health challenges with others. As a result, more individuals will feel more comfortable taking the initiative to seek out and utilize the already available resources and school-provided professionals on campus. According to the NCAA’s chief medical officer, mental health is the single most important health and safety issue facing student-athletes. Sadly, data from NCAA reports also show that only 10% of collegiate athletes ask for help. SOAR is helping overcome the mental health stigma associated with athletes by providing an anonymous platform for them to talk about and share their story and challenges with other athletes from around the country. The SOAR anonymous social platform is the solution for overcoming the personal obstacles facing collegiate athletes and getting them on a track to obtain a better daily mindset with their mental health. SOAR GIVES STUDENT-ATHLETES THE ABILITY TO: • Write, talk, and anonymously post their personal story about their thoughts and mental health challenges to share with other student-athletes. • Scroll through a main timeline feed to read stories and posts shared by other anonymous student-athletes. This promotes a feeling of self-worthiness knowing that you are not alone in your struggles and that there are many others dealing with similar things. • Comment on posts from other student-athletes to relate with them and show your support for their issues and challenges. • Direct message other student-athlete users who are facing similar issues and circumstances in order to show support for them, talk with them about their feelings, or lend advice and share tips that helped you overcome similar issues in the past. Feeling comfortable talking about your issues is the first step in getting better. Having access to an anonymous platform to share your story without having to worry about what people may think of you is the key to overcoming the current stigma in athletes and ultimately overcoming personal mental health challenges. WHY IS SOAR NEEDED? There are an endless amount of professional resources available to student-athletes but yet the utilization of these resources among this group remains very low. SOAR provides athletes a safe anonymous platform to start the process of talking about their personal challenges with others who can relate to their experiences. Currently, no service or resource effectively focuses on bridging the gap between the mental health stigma among athletes and the utilization of professional help. There are many professional resources that can help improve the mental health of student-athletes but the utilization rate will continue to remain low among this group until this is addressed. As a former professional and student-athlete who experienced mental health challenges, I created the SOAR platform to finally give athletes a safe space to anonymously talk about and discuss their personal challenges in order to help them feel more comfortable talking about their mental health with others. SOAR TO BETTER MENTAL HEALTH! The SOAR app gives student-athletes the perfect forum to overcome the mental health stigma by providing them an environment where they can feel comfortable without outside pressure to write and talk about their feelings to share with other student-athletes who can easily relate to how they feel. By providing a platform where the student-athlete's identity can remain anonymous, they can feel comfort in knowing that they can share their story with others that are in very similar situations without revealing their identity. This anonymous function promotes more dialogue among student-athletes who are desperate to talk about their mental health challenges while also giving them the freedom to be more open and honest with their thoughts. ___________ Click to visit the SOAR Health App Website for more information about our services and to learn more about why our mental health app is desperately needed for student-athletes. Readthe SOAR Flipbook to learn more about the goals and purpose of the SOAR app platform . The flipbook tells a great story of why I created the platform, why it is needed, how it works, and how it will help.

title: 3rd Wave of YouTube Con #3WYCON
description: What is the 3WY Con? The 3WY conference is all about the small YouTuber! In past years, there have been various panels and workshops for large YouTubers trying to explain what happened to them as an example of what could be possible. The thing is, those examples don't always (or ever) work anymore. Things change. This is now! This conference is going to be for the small YouTuber that is serious about their brand and channel. The speakers will be talking about how to optimize your channel for views, how to link up with brands and influencers, and how to create communities that have real people in them! All of this on the eve of VidCon so that you can take what you learned at 3WY and apply it to everything you will be hearing and doing during VidCon. This is also (and most excitingly ) a chance for people at the small YouTuber level to connect, network and get to know each other! These are people you need to meet that are taking this experience as serious as you! When and where is the Con? Wednesday the 22nd of June 2016 at the Doubletree Hotel in the Anaheim Conference Plaza, right next to the Convention center. The Small Youtuber Movement Small YouTubers have been growing and shaping the YouTube experience since the dawn of... since 2005. Now over 10 years later we have something to say! Something to do! And we want to do it together! Also, like never before, people are looking to small YouTubers to do things they can't get bigger creators to do. Big YouTubers are expensive, unattainable and sometimes not relatable in way that small YouTubers are! That's why when people are seeing the value in great personalities and great content, we need to be equipped to embrace this 3rd Wave of YouTube. This year we have the opportunity to do something we thought only the YouTube royalty got to do... collaborate on amazing life changing projects! This is why we are on YouTube! To do amazing stuff together in an amazingly supportive community! This year that community gets to meet up in unison and make an impact on this year’s events! The Journey We are about to embark on a great journey! Filmmakers, comedians, producers and creators of all walks of life are changing the way we interact with our entertainment! As the 3rd Wave we have seen this change and want to be a part of sculpting the next wave of creators and entertainers. On June 22, we are taking that first step! The 3rd Wave Con is the Small YouTuber Conference of 2016! Will you be there? Will you help make it happen? On the right side there are a ton of awesome rewards for creators and supporters alike! Join the revolution! We are the next big thing in online entertainment! The Rewards For Sharing we will love you and be forever indebted to you! Please make a video or tweet or share on Facebook, Reddit. Basically anywhere and everywhere! Let’s get the word out! We want to connect with you, so let’s do this! For $1 we will be doing a lot of work to make sure you are getting proper shout outs and "thank you’s” including putting you on our Heroes Wall of Fame in the 3wy.org website. For $5 we will also be giving you shout outs and links to your website or YouTube channel as well as sending you the 3WY pin so that you can rep that you are a part of the 3WY wherever you go! These things look great on backpacks and I will be getting a backpack just so I can sport mine! We are designing a special commemorative coin for the occasion as seen below! For supporting us in the $15 reward you will be getting this as a big thank you! Kickstater Coin designed by Gulliver $20 is the "3WY Small Tuber Con" shirt and pin! We have a really cool shirt to make a scene plus the pin! It’s cool swag to rep the team! $25 is all the cool stuff mentioned above but without a pass to go to the con. If you think all this merch is awesome you can get it! $30 Golden Ticket: This will get you into the event! We are going to have a blast at the conference with special guest speakers and loads of other surprises! Do not miss this event! You will also get a shirt and a gift bag! $50 Golden Ticket Plus! This is an awesome reward! You will get everything above! A ticket in, awesome 3WY bottle opener, t-shirt, pins and a gift bag with some awesome stuff in it! Where is the money going? Most of the money will be going to the venue. We picked a spot right next to the Anaheim Convention Center because everyone needs to be there that night anyway. So it will cost a bit. We would also love to pay Gulliver from Inimitable Vlog for his design! And of course all of the rewards that are made of something! We do have some stretch goals in mind that will cost money as well, so there is that incentive to share this as if it were your own Kickstarter.  Because if you are in the 3rd Wave, it is!

title: Categories
description: (CLICK ON VIDEO ABOVE TO SEE FOIL CARDS IN MOTION) WHO ARE WE? I'm Mike Wilson (@thedoc318), and the man behind the design continues to be one of the premier and most versatile designers in the card designing world, Randy Butterfield (@midnightcards). I'm a long-time dabbler in the world of magic and cardistry. I enjoy incorporating that into working with individuals with special needs. You may recognize Randy's work as it's possibly already part of your collection. Randy is the designer behind Draconian , ROME , Honeybee , Wild West , and Red Rising to name a few. Inspired by Greek Mythology, the Medusa Deck has a mesmerizing Back design of green and orange snakes. Printed by Legends Playing Card Co., the Cards will be printed on a Holographic Foil material. TUCK BOXES - The design for the Tuck Boxes highlight a closeup of Medusa, everyone’s favorite Gorgon sister. Medusa’s seductive face fills most of the front of the Tuck and wraps around to the side and back of the Tuck. There are two choices for the Medusa Decks. The Matte BLACK paper Tuck Box will be the standard version of the design. The Matte GREEN paper Tuck Box is Limited to only 500 and will be a KICKSTARTER EXCLUSIVE item! Both versions will have the same Foil Cards inside. BLACK TUCK BOX SPECS: Premium Quality BLACK Matte Paper Stock Green FOIL and Orange FOIL GREEN TUCK BOX SPECS (Limited to 500 and Kickstarter Exclusive): Premium Quality GREEN Matte Paper Stock Green FOIL and Orange FOIL FOIL CARDS - Each side of the Cards will be printed CMYK Ink on a Holographic Foil material. Strategic usage of White Undercoat printing will help the Indices, PIPS and Black Court outlines standout to help with gameplay. LIGHT GREEN EDGES - Continuing the Legends tradition of constant experimentation and innovation, the Card edges feature ULTRA GREEN, which is an all-new dyed light green paper for playing cards. The edges of this deck are not white or light grey, like you have seen on nearly every high-quality deck of playing cards up to this point. ULTRA GREEN does not chip, and the deck will look and feel new for much longer. BACK CARD - The Back Card for the Medusa Deck features a borderless design formed from dozens of snakes. The orange snakes in the center draw the eye, and the green snakes form a mesmerizing swirl pattern. FACE CARDS - The Face Cards feature random grunge elements over a rich green background. The grunge elements are also incorporated into the designs of the PIPs, Courts, Ace heros and Jokers. The Aces feature a Green Medusa (Spade), the winged horse Pegasus (Club), a Gold Medusa (Heart) and the sword and shield of Perseus (Diamond). The Jokers feature the demigod Perseus, who is holding the head of Medusa. The Classic Courts are flanked with green and gold snake clusters to cement home the theme. Everything comes together to create a cool look that is very playable! CARD SPECS: Printed by LEGENDS PLAYING CARD CO. Backs and Faces - Double-Sided Full Foil with printed CMYK Inks ULTRA GREEN Dyed Paper Edges DIECUT DEALER COIN - The Medusa Dealer Coin is 2-Sided and has a custom Diecut shape. It will be 3.475”w x 2.88”h and will feature a Black Nickel Finish with three different Enamel Accents on each side . The perfect companion for any Poker night! ADD-ONS - To add any extra items to your base Pledge Reward, just click on the BLUE “Manage Your Pledge” Button and change the dollar amount to account for the added item(s) - prices listed in the Add-Ons Chart above. Please send me a PM if you have any questions or concerns (or e-mail Randy at midnightcard@yahoo.com). PRINTER - The Medusa Decks will be printed by Legends Playing Card Co. This will be Randy’s fifteenth time printing with Legends Playing Cards. They do an amazing job!! SOME MORE MEDUSA PLAYING CARDS PHOTOS

title: NOUNS - REVOLUTION OF THE AFRICAN GAMING INDUSTRY
description: THE PROBLEM Have you ever played a mobile game? I’ll take a wild guess and go with yes, yes you have. Those hyper casual games that keep us company on a cab/train on our way to work or school, while our date is running thirty-five minutes late (It’s okay, we’ve all been there too), during that boring business meeting or just casually passing the time. In a generation that spends about a quarter of the day on their mobile phones, mobile games are one of the huge driving factors of this. We love our games. What’s not to love? From the flawless design to attention to detail, most games are simply a work of art, making them addictive masterpieces. Africa, and Nigeria in focus, is no exception from the rest of the world in mobile usage, and gaming interest. Nigeria has one of the largest young population in the world, so this is basically a given. However, with this huge reputation, the gaming industry in Africa is hugely undervalued, leading to the release of the low budget, unimpressive and repetitive games from the continent. Our Western counterparts have shown us that a successful gaming model is possible, with mobile game development giants like King, Epic Games, Gameloft, etc., racking up millions of dollars in revenue daily. However, African investors have completely neglected this sector which has the potential not to only create job opportunities for thousands of developers and designers on the continent, but also create a ripple effect, thereby inspiring the emergence of other successful gaming campaigns. THE VISION Dash Studios Logo We're Dash Studios, and we’re working tirelessly to change this narrative. We’re working on developing Nigeria's first global mobile game for Android and iOS, which will allow everyone in the world connect and play on our unique server. We're trying to accomplish a feat that has never been reached in the African gaming industry, and with our talented team and your support, we’re confident that we can pull this off. Dash Studios has a team of 12 talented young individuals consisting of Programmers, UI/UX designers, Animators, Database specialists, Sound Engineers and Marketers. We're currently at the development stage, and we have a functioning prototype. NOUNS Splash Screen NOUNS is a next gen word game, with a concept that has never been used in any preceding game, bringing to light a casual Nigerian game and upgrading this to fit the demands of a more global audience. NOUNS is not just a leisure game, but also educational, and is more than beneficial to the young populace, as it improves their vocabulary, as well as focus and concentration under pressure. NOUNS Prototype Main Menu Layout. NOUNS is divided into three categories for maximum enjoyment for the players: -	NOUNS Single player -	NOUNS Multi player (Local) -	NOUNS Multi player (Online) NOUNS SINGLE PLAYER NOUNS S.P is a battle against time NOUNS Single player is simply a game against time. Player is required to  supply answers against a declining clock. Each correct answer adds three (3) seconds to the timer, and consecutive correct inputs unlocks Sprees and Combos. Game’s over when time runs out. Rewards are given in virtual in-game currencies of Dash Coins (DCs) and Pencils ✏. Educational and Exciting! NOUNS is simply a game of 'Nouns', as there are different categories in the game which consists of Animals, Countries, Fruits, Musical instruments, Colors, languages, sports, etc., which all fall into a group name, 'NOUNS'. You'll be required to provide answers to this on a random shuffled infinity loop, as we have a database that contains up to 12,000 words. For example, at the start of the game you're required to input the name of an Animal that begins with the letter 'B', and if you get that right, you're asked a Country that begins with the letter 'H' and after that, a Sport that begins with the letter 'Z' and so on until your time runs out. You're given 120 seconds at the start of the game which keeps regressing until game ends. Every correct answer adds 3 seconds to the timer, giving you more time, so think fast and accurately! Singleplayer games are on a random loop every single game, so don't expect the same sequence of questions the next time you play! NOUNS uses a custom keyboard, as your regular mobile keyboard goes against the point of the game, as there are features like auto correct and suggestion. After the development team took this into consideration, only a custom NOUNS keyboard will be used inside the game. Word Combos are unlocked during NOUNS Single player when a player gets consecutive correct answers in record time. In implementation, the duration between the last CORRECT answer and next CORRECT answer should be equal to, or less than 2.5 seconds, to unlock and sustain a word combo. Word Combo Prototype Sample Word Sprees are rewarded to players based on the number of CONSECUTIVE answers they’ve gotten correctly. Word – 5 consecutive CAs Awesome – 10 consecutive CAs Genius – 25 consecutive CAs Amazing - 50 consecutive CAs Master – 80 consecutive CAs Nerd Up – 120 consecutive CAs Seer – 200 Consecutive CAs You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 NOUNS Single player’s gameplay is enhanced by ten (10) NPCs which can be used by the players depending on their strengths, or preference. Only two of the available 10 are free on download, the remaining eight (8) will be unlocked as player progresses with the game and levels up. There are 30 levels in the game, from Amateur (Level 1) to NOUNS Overlord (Level 30). These characters have special ‘Impression gauges' that increase or decline based on the character’s impression of the player. This is made possible by correct answers, wrong answers, Sprees, Combos, etc. When impression gauge is full, ‘Character assist' is activated which rewards the player with power ups during the game. 'Impression' gauges Power-ups are available in NOUNS Single player which assist the player when he/she is running out of time/ideas. The ‘time machine' sets the stopwatch back by 5 seconds, giving the player more time, the ‘Time Freeze’ stops the clock in its track by 8 seconds and the Auto fill suggests an answer from our database for the player. Power-ups are purchased with Virtual in-game currencies ( Dash Coins and Pencils). Prototype Demo Version is below: You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 NOUNS MULTI PLAYER (LOCAL) NOUNS LAN Mode allows friends to connect & play in a closed loop NOUNS Multi player allows friends/family to connect through a local network and interact with each other through NOUNS. NOUNS Multi player (Local) is the next gen of LAN gaming, as a single loop can hold up to fifteen(15) players, with minimum of three (3) players in a loop. Data is shared between the loop, and points are shared based on performance of other players in the loop. This highly addictive game mode is a must have. NOUNS has up to 15 different 'Nouns' Categories in the game, but in this mode, you only get to chose any four (4). So, your loop/group of friends can choose any of the four you want to play this mode with. No worries  in your next game, if you fancy another different ser of four, you can freely make your pick! A host creates the game, and using a local network, up to 15 other players in your locality can connect to your game. The Creator of the game above, chose to play with Animals, Colors, Currencies and Objects. Great picks! Game has 26 rounds, according to the 26 letters of the alphabet, as you're required to input an answer for each letter, corresponding to the category. Game works in random shuffles, so you can never predict which alphabet comes next. The above shuffle stops at letter H. Therefore, you're required to input an answer to all the four categories you chose, that begins with the letter H. Each player in the loop has 15 seconds to type in all their answers, and once time runs out, the game calculates your score based on the input in your dialogue boxes. Scoring system works on plagiarism. If a player in the loop inputs an answer that is already used by another player in the same loop, the score for that input decreases across the loop. For example, while the game's AI is calculating what score to give to Femi's 'Hyena' input for animals, and it finds out that no one else in the loop chose Hyena as an Animal input ,  Femi gets 10 points. However, if another player inputted Hyena, Femi and the other culprit of plagiarism gets 5 points. If up to 3 players inputted Hyena, they all get 4 points. If up to 4 players used Hyena, they all get 3 points. If up to five players in the loop used Hyena, they all get 2 points. If 6 players and above inputted Hyena, they all get 1 point. This scoring system increases the fun and unpredictability of NOUNS. After scoring ends, the score for each category is summed, added to the game's leader board, and shuffle 2 begins. This process is run 26 times in a game. N/B: Shuffle per game is random and can never be predicted . Prototype Demo Version is below: You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 NOUNS MULTI PLAYER (ONLINE) NOUNS Online Upgrading on the local multi player mode, NOUNS takes players online! A fantastic opportunity to compete with other players from around the world and gain special rewards. This highly competitive mode is for players who have the stomach to handle the pressure and a high vocabulary knowledge. NOUNS online follows the exact gameplay of LAN mode, but this time, instead of competing in your locality, you can play online in real time with other players on the network. This feature can hold up to 50 players per loop. Just open online mode, search for games and connect to any game you like! You could also create a private online game, so your friends around the world can connect and you show  them who's boss. NOUNS HUNT Every character in the game has a unique origin story which would explain their strengths, weaknesses and interests. Dive into a whole new world of competition as you conquer different challenges and milestones with NOUNS Hunt, alongside a captivating story mode. Nouns Hunt is a special seasonal event that will occur every month online, and will involve players from every part of the globe. Players have a chance to unlock hidden words for the season and get real time rewards delivered to them anywhere in the world. Season ends after three(3) months, and winners are announced via our social media platforms and personal messages to winners in the game. NOUNS hunt will increase the time spent per user on the game, and also set up a reward system for our best, loyal players. PROPOSAL We have been working on NOUNS since late 2019, and we could use your support to bring this to fruition. Join us, as we change a narrative and bring about a revolution in Africa, through the ripple effect of this project. NOUNS will be made available globally for free on iOS and Android, so you don’t need to worry about accessing this game. This is a game for everyone. If we reach our target, funds raised will help us acquire: -	3D/2D Design/Drawing tablets for character design/Animation -	Accessories for marketing purposes (Shirts, Caps, Hoodies, etc.) -	Marketing (Ad Campaign and Marketing Video) -	A work space for developers with suitable work conditions -	An Online server -	Freelance Costs. -      Extra developers to speed up development process. For supporting our cause, you'll be rewarded with custom merch from Dash Studios, delivered around the world, as well as signed exclusive copies of drawings of characters in the game. Top contributors will also be given a chance to meet us over skype, as well as be included in the game's beta testing phase. THE RIPPLE EFFECT NOUNS will create a a ripple effect on the Nigerian and African gaming industry at large, which will lead to an advancement in technology on the continent. Employment opportunities will be made available for designers and developers of all specialties. We hope to set the pace for a better future in Africa. Its a heck of a journey, but we're confident that with your support, its more than possible to achieve this. SUPPORT US! Do you believe in this project? We would appreciate your support! You can't do so financially? Sharing this project will go a long way in helping us reach our goals. We would be overjoyed if you could help us make some noise! Thank you for your support always! If you've got any questions on the project or perks (sizes, delivery), please do not hesitate to contact us. We will be delighted to hear from you! Contact us: Twitter: https://twitter.com/DashGamingSTUD?s=09 Instagram: https://instagram.com/dashgamingstudios?igshid=625n18a2x3xa Phone: +2349067167182 Email: Dashgamingstudios@gmail.com

title: Categories
description: A Journey to Celebrate the Divine Feminine Five years ago, I set out to create the Nouveau Goddess Oracle/Tarot deck , a deck inspired by the elegance of Art Nouveau and the wisdom of the divine feminine. This deck brings together goddesses and angels in 60 beautifully illustrated oracle cards, each capturing the nurturing, intuitive, and empowering energy of the feminine spirit.  As a bonus it also includes 22 Major Arcana Cards. The idea for this deck grew from my daily connection with angels and spirit guides. Their messages have guided me, comforted me, and inspired me. Now, I want to share that same sense of guidance and support with you through this deck. What Is the Nouveau Goddess Oracle ? The Nouveau Goddess Oracle is more than a deck of cards—it’s a tool for self-discovery and spiritual connection. Each card is designed to help you honor your emotions, trust your intuition, and connect with the divine wisdom within you. The illustrations are inspired by Art Nouveau, featuring flowing lines, intricate details, and graceful figures that represent the many sides of the feminine spirit—nurturers, healers, protectors, and mystics. These cards are a reminder that you are surrounded by unseen support and that the qualities you admire in others are already within you. Why I Need Your Support After years of creating and refining this deck, I’m ready to bring the Nouveau Goddess Oracle to life. Your support will help cover the final costs of production, including high-quality printing, packaging, and the creation of a guidebook to help you get the most out of the deck. By backing this project, you’re helping me share the beauty and wisdom of the Nouveau Goddess Oracle with the world. Join Me in Bringing This Vision to Life The Nouveau Goddess Oracle is a heartfelt project, created to inspire and uplift. With your help, this deck can become a reality. Thank you for supporting this dream and helping to share its magic with the world. Let’s celebrate the beauty and power of the divine feminine—together. 💖

title: The Boob Cube
description: We accidentally created this impossible puzzle. We have performed all of the science but to no avail. Kickstarter, you're our only hope. Join our science team and become an author of the the solution manual: http://bit.ly/BoobCubeScientistApplication - Dane Christianson and Erfan Ahmadi A solved Boob Cube. Train your brain: Develop spatial reasoning skills-- hone critical thinking. Weeks, even years of challenging play. Impress your friends: "Wow. Such puzzle. Very boob." Mathematics: 2^2 possible permutations! That's 6.642156×10^-24 moles,  0.3333333 dozen, and e^( i Pi)+5 permutations! A complicated equation Nutritional Benefits: Probably none. Testimonials: "Amazing. Simply mind blowing" - someone taken out of context. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Construction: Precision engineered for unmatched handling and acceleration. The Boob Cube measures  2"x2"x2" and is made of black, injection-molded ABS plastic with vinyl stickers. The stand is made of black acrylic and is manufactured via laser cutter. Assembled by Erfan Ahmadi and Dane Christianson-- two good looking mechanical engineering undergraduates at the Illinois Institute of Technology in Chicago, IL. Ideas: See, at first we thought "hey let's just 3D print all these Boob Cubes for the Kickstarter, then we wind up with 3D printers in the end. This is such a smart idea." Then we realized that was a dumb idea. It's the 21st century. We can pay an injection molder to crank out Boob Cubes. So we used math to figure out that we need exactly $58008 to injection mold one Kickstarter's worth of Boob Cubes in time for Christmas. Yeah that's totally a lot of dollars, but if you tell two friends and then they tell two friends-- that's like 8008 friends and that's more than enough. **Laser sounds** The Boob Cube history: The Boob Cube's past is shrouded in mystery. It was first made limitedly available around 1980  by a now vanished "Jim Bouton Corporation". Our scientists discovered this so-called "Jim" abandonded pursuing the "Boob Cube" trademark in 1982. He obviously couldn't live with creating this monster and jumped off a bridge. RIP "Jim". We're bringing back the Boob Cube in another limited edition run thing and with Kickstarter. We're not sure if we're going to ever make these again. #scarcity A picture of history. A picture of the Boob Cube beneath a picture of history. Special thanks: To whomever has a bigass laser cutter we can use to cut and etch a huge acrylic sheet. To Steph, the videographer for the campaign video. To Bret Christianson, Dane's big brother, who created the music for the campaign video. To Colton Christianson, Dane's little brother, the graphic design consultant. To Lydia Christianson, Dane's older sister, because she corrected "whoever" to "whomever" and was feeling left out. And to Katrina Gossman and her mom, who inspired the development of this puzzle.

title: Categories
description: The Grimm Parasites have overtaken most of the universe -- würms released from their desolate planet to spread as a plague throughout humanity, twisting us into zombified mutants . But that was 663 years ago. Those still alive band together in Crews . Clawing toward another day. Scraping together credits in what time the ’verse has left. Sqwürmish is a stand-alone tabletop skirmish miniatures game by Brian Colin (Vast Grimm) with miniatures by Sól Blair (Malevolent Minis). Build your crew from our line of minis, or kit-bash your own version of a dismal faction. Set in the Vast Grimm universe, it is a full hack of the Forbidden Psalm miniatures games and is inspired by and fully compatible with the MÖRK BORG . Easy to pick up, even if you've never played a skirmish wargame! The Book Sqwürmish is a 28mm miniatures-agnostic game. This means you can use any miniatures you have. They can be ones you own, build, or the miniatures we make. ▶ Approximately 144 pages ▶ A5 size ▶ 14+ Threats (monsters) ▶ 13 interconnected Scenarios ready to play ▶ Play as a one-off game or as a long-form campaign ▶ Contains solo play, co-op , and versus rules for 1–4 players ▶ Easy to pick up, even if you've never played a skirmish wargame! ▶ Content is compatible with the MÖRK BORG and Vast Grimm TTRPGs ▶ Track your total score across the 13 Scenarios ▶ Black & White "Skeleton Crew" PDF included for easy reading The playtest (stripped-down) version is available for FREE with one Scenario. Click the image above to download a zipped file with PDFs. ▶ ▶ ▶ Playthrough Video The Miniatures Building a Faction When planning out the minis for this campaign we wanted to make sure they could be used for Sqwürmish and Vast Grimm. Even though you may choose Devout as your Faction, that doesn't mean each model has to look like a religious zealot. Some of the crew may be keeping their love of The Grimm close to the chest. Physical Miniatures These will be 3D printed by Sól (the sculptor) in 8K Photopolymer Resin. The ability of the current resin printers to produce high-quality models is our priority. We wanted to have a wide variety of models, which put traditional injection molding beyond our financial reach. We also wanted to get the models to you as fast as possible! Digital Miniatures We love how 3D printing has revolutionized wargaming! All of our models will be available as presupported STL files. Along with the preselected packs, we will have individual STL files in the pledge manager (though buying the bundled packs will be cheaper). Pledge Levels New sculpts unlocked in the pledge manager will get added to this pledge New sculpts unlocked in the pledge manager will get added to this pledge Add-Ons Introducing Violence. Action. Cash. Prizes. The Neon Lords of the Toxic Wasteland add-on supplement book for the Sqwurmish skirmish wargame! We turned up the volume to 11 and ripped the knob off with more high-octane game content! This stylish, A5 hardcover, 80-ish page, full-color book not only makes julienne fries but holds all the sick rulez to bring the world of Neon Lords to your Sqwurmish games Stretch Goals When the World Jumper stretch goal unlocks everyone wins! Brian Shutter 's Neon Lords of the Toxic Wasteland will invade Sqwümish with new Specialties, Backgrounds, Gear, and all-new Scenarios! The PDF is free for all backers. A physical book and The Neon Eight minis will be included in the Würm Lover pledge level and available as add-ons. Not only that, but The Neon Eight STLs will be included in the Technomaniac pledge level and available as an add-on. When the Printed Ruler unlocks every backer with a physical reward will receive a 16" x 2" double-sided ruler. One side has inches marked out and the other side is a quick reference for keywords! All backers will receive a Print & Play version. A Grimm Horde of 8 different Grimm is unlocked as an option! Minis shown not final. Every backer with a physical reward will receive four Dry Erase Favor Cards! All backers will receive a Print & Play version. A Raider Pack of 8 different Space Raiders has unlocked as an option! Minis shown not final. Every pledge level will receive a Print & Play version of four different Faction-themed Crew sheets . Get ready, when we hit $25k WIRD, the creator of Forbidden Psalm will write three scenarios! Harnessing a mechanic in Sqwürmish that allows Crew to travel through portals into other worlds, these scenarios will be set in the Last War . I’m excited to put my layout spin on their writing! When we hit $30k EIGHT NEW Character minis will unlock! Minis shown not final. Factions Play as a Crew of five on daring missions in search of fortune, glory, and survival. You found a crew and stuck together. You may not love each other; hell, you might not even like each other. But you know it’s safer than going it alone. You’ll do whatever you can to ensure you and yours live to see another day. /// Each Legionnaire begins the game with one additional piece of random Gear. At the end of each Scenario where at least one Legionnaire survives, an additional 5CR is earned per survivor. /// Your Crew has more than blind faith; you are a truly devout Disciple of Fatuma. You have studied the scriptures and traveled to the Mausoleum of THEY, letting your blood spill onto the Altar of Convergence. You do not fear The Grimm; instead, your crew is on a mission to usher in the reign of THEY! /// Any number of your crew can begin as a Würm Lover Specialist for 5CR each. At the end of each Scenario where at least one Grimm has been unharmed, an additional 5CR is earned per surviving Grimm. /// You and your crew have always loved getting dirty and digging around in other people’s filth. There are handsome rewards for those willing to harvest würms from the bodies of the fallen. Your crew has made a decent living for a number of years doing just that, and together you’re damn good at it. /// Each crew member begins with random Würm Extraction Tools. At the end of each Scenario, the crew earns 10CR for each würm harvested. /// Adrift in the cosmos are solitary Legions known as Raiders. Some are salvagers and scrappers, picking through the debris and wreckage of failed dreams; others are more sinister, pillaging those less vicious. These gangs or factions are revered by most and feared by all. /// Each Raider starts with a Raider Rebreather Helmet. Raiders can reroll once when Looting but must always take the second roll. /// Crews should be customized with a wide array of weapons and gear. From throwing bones, to pulse rifles, to mini-BOOM boxes, each mini can be as unique as the character in your Crew. Now you're ready for the table. Play solo, co-op, or versus. Play one-off scenarios. Play it connected as a campaign. It's all locked and loaded in the book (see below). Mechanics Dice Rolls Actionable events in Sqwürmish usually involve rolling dice. The standard difficulty rating (DR) is 12. To succeed the player would need to roll a d20 and get a 12 or higher. Most Tests are associated with an ability, ie. Strength DR12 test . In this case, the player would roll a d20 and add their Strength modifier (positive or negative) to get the total result. Modifiers Along with dice rolls being modified by abilities, modifiers stack to include Feats, Flaws, and Weapons. Measurements All measuring is done in inches (aside from the mm scale of the miniatures). If you use the metric system, search the netwürk for the proper conversion. Scenarios The adventures in Sqwürmish are broken into three Arcs each with three Scenarios in its storyline. The final Arc consists of four Scenarios packing the book out with a total of thirteen Scenarios for your crew to explore! Whether you're accessing an underground laboratory on a hidden moon, fending off swarms of Salazarites in toxin-filled caverns, or repairing a radiation leak before the space station's population becomes mutants, the Scenarios are packed with a wide variety of goals and obstacles. Game Rounds In a game of Sqwürmish, players activate their Models from their Crew in alternating order, attempting to achieve the Scenario's Goal. Each Model takes a movement and an action each round. Most actions are resolved with a test, rolling a d20 and adding a modifier for the Ability used. Most tests succeed when a 12+ is rolled. The Crew consists of 5 Models, each with their unique Abilities, Feats, Flaws, Gear, and Backgrounds. Difficult Decisions With the risk of most Threats being infected by the Grimm Parasite, players must make strategic choices regarding which Models should engage in melee combat. Ranged combat may be useful but often keeps those models from reaching the Scenario’s Goal. Certain Models will control powerful Tributes, which harness the neuromancy of the ’verse. Just try not to roll a Fumble and cause a Cataclysmic Condemnation! Not Dead DEAD If a Model is reduced to zer0 HP, it is Downed and laid face up on its back. These Models may continue to be healed during the Scenario, or drug off the board before the session ends to keep them as part of the Crew when playing in ongoing campaign mode. Press/Reviews Vintage RPG Podcast – Hambone and Stu chat with Brian about Sqwürmish Gaming Trend – A miniatures game set in the Grimm Dying Universe Rascal News – Sqwürmish is an Infectious Miniatures-Agnostic Game " That is exactly what I want in a skirmish game!"– James Floyd Kelly, The Tabletop Engineer Plays " Fast, brutal, and absolutely unhinged. A beautifully grimy, blood-slicked brawl. Solo, PVP or Co-Op, dodge Grimm infected horrors and the writhing Wurms of unspeakable awfulness. A relentless skirmish game with quick rules, nonstop action, and a glorious body count. Sqwürmish delivers. Hard. "– Dan Frederick, Author: Dead Flesh Interview on Ship of the Dead podcast Doug of Victory Condition Gaming and I had some pretty terrible rolls which made this Scenario last a good bit longer than usual About Us Why Sqwürmish? In recent years my son started getting into skirmish games. I have always been very heavy into the RPG side of the hobby and we do a fair amount of board games as well, but I had never ventured into wargames. After playing a few of my son's favorites (High Noon, MCP), I was reminded that I had a couple of the Forbidden Psalm books on my shelf. Forbidden Psalms are skirmish games based on the Mörk Borg RPG. When playing my son's games I was missing that sense of familiarity with RPGs. Playing Forbidden Psalm I got that right away as I rolled a d20 to see whether or not I hit the monster and I was hooked. Since I had co-created Vast Grimm and have created numerous expansions I knew I wanted to play skirmish in my own sandbox. Why Malevolent Minis? Last year I was a guest at Granite State Comicon, where I was set up next to Brian Shutter ( Neon Lords of the Toxic Wasteland) who had his minis at the show. They looked awesome! The characters had so much personality. I could tell they were from a universe not that different from Vast Grimm. That was my lucky day because Sól Blair, the sculptor of those minis, just happened to be showing up for the con to hangout. The ideas of custom minis for Sqwürmish seemed so far out of reach up until then. I was just planning to publish the book, but that day got my brain juices going. A month later our paths crossed again and I knew I had to ask if Sól would be down to sculpt characters and monsters for Sqwürmish . Luckily enough he had a window between other projects to dive in and create the amazing sculpts you see on the page today! Creature Curation has been in business since 2017. We are the creative force behind Vast Grimm, Plunderlust, RPG Squeeze, RPG Pins & Patches, World of Revilo, Cardography, and so much more! We've partnered with our friend Sól of Malevolent Minis to make all of the incredible miniatures for this campaign. Brian Colin // President: Creature Curation // Writer, Artist, Graphic Designer Sól Blair // Digital Sculptor & Mini producer Walton Wood // Editor Zac Goins // Marketing Compatible With Sqwürmish was inspired by Forbidden Psalm , which was inspired by Mörk Borg, the incredible game created by Pelle Nilsson and Johan Nohr. Sqwürmish does not require you to have either book to play, but what we've created would not exist without them. Both of those books should be in your collection. Sqwürmish is an independent production by Creature Curation and is not affiliated with Ockult Örtmästare Games or Stockholm Kartell. It is published under the MÖRK BORG Third Party License. MÖRK BORG is copyright Ockult Örtmästare Games and Stockholm Kartell. Sqwurmish is compatible with Vast Grimm . Manufacturing Resin Miniatures will be manufactured by Malevolent Minis. This is an early test print and is not final. Hardcover books and packaging will be manufactured by LongPack. Shipping Shipping Timeline At the launch of the campaign, the majority of the book is completely written, with only a handful of the scenarios left to complete. Our goal, if funded, is to have the manuscript edited around the end of the campaign in mid-March. Layout has already begun with plans to send the finished book to the printer at the end of April. With proofing, manufacturing, and freight, we should be able to fulfill the Kickstarter in September 2025 comfortably. While the book is being printed, Sól will print the minis so that they can be ready to pack with everything else. Shipping Fees Constantly changing: Ever since the pandemic, shipping has fluctuated greatly from month to month. Both pricing and delivery schedules continue to change regularly. My goal will be to utilize shipping options that minimize risk and expense for both myself and you, the backer. Because of this, the shipping costs below are just estimates. All shipping fees will be charged separately, AFTER the campaign, during pledge management. Actual shipping prices will be determined after production is finished and we’re gearing up to send out the game. THE FINAL SHIPPING COSTS WILL BE WEIGHT BASED. Also, if you add on additional physical copies of the game to your order, your shipping cost may increase. Estimated shipping & handling costs (for the hardcover book) $7 USA $9 UK $12 Canada, EU $15 Australia, NZ, Norway Estimated shipping & handling costs (for the hardcover book + an 8-pack of minis) $12 USA $14 UK $20 Canada, EU $26 Australia, NZ, Norway US fulfillment will be handled by Creature Curation. Non-US fulfillment will be handled by Zatu.

title: Touchdown Tots - Play Together, Learn Together
description: Inside the Game: A Visual Look at Touchdown Tots A sleek 3D render of the physical game box, showing the high-quality manufacturing and depth of the product. This angle highlights the side panel details and professional-grade production—ideal for retail placement, gifting, and educator adoption. It also gives investors a clear sense of how the product appears off the shelf and in packaging. A complete top-down view showcasing the entire Touchdown Tots game experience. This layout features the full board, character tokens, game box, and subject cards—all designed with color-coded subjects for clarity and engagement. The layout shows immediate retail and educational readiness, ideal for investor confidence in both design and functionality. The heart of the game. A full football field layout designed for immersive play, with Player A and Player B clearly marked end zones. Surrounding the field are the five subject decks—Math, Science, Language Arts, Social-Emotional, and History & Geography—each placed in bleachers with cheering crowds to amplify the theme. The penalty cards sit at the center bottom, blending academic and physical challenges into one cohesive gameplay system. Custom-designed player tokens representing four diverse football characters—two red, two blue—each in a unique athletic pose. These standees bring the game to life on the board and allow children to choose an avatar that reflects their personality. Designed with thick bases for durability and easy handling by young players. One of two printed guides included with the game. This version explains the purpose behind each subject card— highlighting the intentionality behind learning objectives for Math, Science, and more. The colorful layout shows clarity and structure, reinforcing the educational credibility of the product. This second guide walks parents or educators through game setup, format, and learning goals. It confirms that the product is more than fun—it’s curriculum-aligned. Each subject is broken down with specific skill-building outcomes, ideal for homeschoolers, therapists, and teachers. This snapshot showcases the comprehensive, balanced structure of Touchdown Tots, offering 190 total cards. Each card set is color coded and curriculum-aligned, helping investors and educators alike understand the breadth and educational depth of the game These orange cards focus on self awareness, empathy, teamwork, and emotional regulation—core developmental pillars. Tasks range from creating handshakes to role-playing social scenarios, offering both playful bonding and deeper SEL learning. Ideal for classroom SEL time or at-home bonding. These bright yellow cards emphasize vocabulary, storytelling, word games, and phonics. Tasks include creative challenges like story starters, riddles, and spelling movement games—boosting language skills through imaginative play. Purple science cards spark curiosity and observation skills. Kids explore senses, space, plant life, and environmental topics in fun, conversational ways. Every task is designed to build scientific reasoning while staying fully age-appropriate. Blue math cards are designed to build numeracy through motion. From measuring with hands to estimating distance, every card turns abstract concepts into embodied learning moments—great for early learners and movement-based thinkers. The brown deck introduces children to culture, maps, leaders, and historical figures. These cards are approachable yet thought-provoking—bridging storytelling and civic awareness in a playful format. A high-energy blend of movement and quick-thinking challenges. Penalty cards drive game momentum through physical action and light consequence—designed to be fun, fair, and skill-building. They also reinforce the game’s unique kinesthetic learning approach Who Are We? Hey, I’m Kay Jungle, the founder of Chief Jungle, a mission-driven family engagement company dedicated to transforming early childhood education through play. My partner, Jazmin Benton, and I have built this brand from the ground up, blending my backgrounds in education, parenting, and leadership to create powerful learning tools for families. Together, we’ve crafted an ecosystem that includes a board game, curriculum guides, home economy systems, and digital learning tools all designed to inspire confident, well-rounded learners. Our flagship product, Touchdown Tots , is the first educational football-themed board game that integrates core academic subjects like math, literacy, science, and social-emotional skills into a fast-paced, family-friendly game night experience. It’s more than just a game, it’s a playbook for growing young minds, building family bonds, and preparing children for life’s big moments. What Are We Planning to Make? With your support, we’re not just producing more board games, we’re building a complete, polished educational ecosystem that transforms family game nights into powerful learning experiences. The first 100 copies of Touchdown Tots will serve as our beta run, allowing us to gather real-world feedback from families, teachers, and educational experts. This feedback will directly inform the next production wave, ensuring the final version is as polished, professional, and impactful as possible. Optimized Game Components for the Next Production Run: 250 Total Educational Cards Expanded from 150 to 250 cards, now balanced across 5 key learning subjects: • Math • Science • History & Geography • Language Arts • Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) Each category contains 50 cards carefully designed for ages 5 and up, ensuring dynamic, developmentally-aligned play that feels fresh every time. 50 Penalty Cards Expanded from 40 to 50 Penalty Cards, adding more strategic challenge, funny twists, and emotional regulation moments—based on real classroom and home testing. Game Tokens & Team Pieces (Now Up to 6 Players) • Real, non-cardboard player tokens, upgraded for feel and quality • Includes new Cheerleader tokens for supportive sibling or classroom roles • Supports up to 6 players for larger families or small group classrooms Dry-Erase Yard Boards • Integrated mini whiteboards with expo markers for answering yard-based challenge questions • Encourages kids to show their work, practice number formation, or illustrate science ideas • Easy to wipe clean and reuse every play session Magnetic Family Scoreboard • A football-themed scoreboard for tracking family wins, personal bests, or championship streaks • Dry-erase and magnetic, designed to mount in kitchens, classrooms, or play areas Rivalry Record Book • Keeps track of wins, rematches, and most epic moments • Great for long-term engagement and sibling/family rivalries • Doubles as a journaling space for kids to write reflections after gameplay Team Vibes: Jerseys & Ref Shirts • Optional add-ons include Touchdown Tots–themed jerseys and referee shirts • Create a game night atmosphere with matching gear that builds identity and hype • Especially fun for classrooms, homeschool pods, or recurring game nights Endzone Celebration Kits • Fun physical components like mini trophies, confetti poppers, and victory chants • Celebrate touchdowns with rituals that make learning memorable and motivating Game Night Soundtracks & Playlists • Curated music playlists from a professional engineer and producer • Sets the tone for family fun, focused learning, or hype competition—game night ready • Bonus: Special victory anthems included for winners! Travel Edition (NEW) • Made from stitched neoprene for flexibility, premium feel, and on-the-go durability • Rolls up neatly for easy carrying—perfect for road trips, therapy offices, or field-based learning • Comes with a portable deck and mini tokens for full gameplay anywhere • Ideal for play therapists, homeschoolers, or active families How to Play Polished Ecosystem with Tiered Offerings: Premier Launch Pad - $43 Touchdown Tots Core Game: The foundational learning experience, including the fully optimized 250-card set, 50 penalty cards, and upgraded game components. Card Guide: A comprehensive guide to each card category, explaining the educational benefits and real-world skills being developed, from critical thinking to emotional regulation. Game Night Bundle – $97 Touchdown Tots Board Game (Launch Pad Edition) 2 Dry-Erase Yard Boards: for answering challenges and showing work in real time Magnetic Family Scoreboard: track wins, growth, and family milestones Rivalry Record Book: log epic plays, rematches, and unforgettable moments Curated Game Night Soundtracks & Playlist Access: professionally produced to set the mood, build hype, and end each game night on a high Optional Add-Ons (Customize Your Game Night) Endzone Celebration Kits Victory Mini Kit: confetti + chant card Championship Kit: trophy, banner, confetti, and winner’s anthem (Select at checkout) Team Vibes: Jerseys & Ref Shirts - Dress the part with Touchdown Tots–branded game night gear. Sizes for kids and adults Prices range from $15–$25 Travel Edition (Coming Soon!) A portable, stitched-neoprene version of Touchdown Tots for on-the-go learning. Perfect for road trips, therapy offices, or field-based education. Founders Package Exclusive Concierge Experience: Personalized delivery, branded materials, exclusive webinars, and a custom backpack. All-In-One Legacy Kit: Includes every product in the ecosystem, personalized family scoreboards, and early access to future releases. Personalized Family Legacy Plan: Custom guides, private webinars, and direct support from the Chief Jungle team. Future Expansion Packs and Add-Ons: Curriculum-Style Packs for Grades 1-3: Adding age-appropriate, curriculum-aligned cards to support learners as they progress through elementary school. Influencer Collaborations: Partnering with top influencers and educators in exciting fields like wildlife, ocean life, space, and more—each creating their own unique 50-card sets for expanded learning. Seasonal and Holiday Packs: Special expansion sets themed around holidays, seasons, and special occasions to keep learning fresh and relevant year-round. Exclusive Add-Ons for Backers: Limited-edition game pieces, collector’s cards, and personalized family scoreboards for early supporters. Game Night Strategy – Building a Movement We’re not just selling games, we’re building a community around family learning, connection, and fun. Our Touchdown Tots Across America campaign will take the excitement of game nights on the road, starting with free, high-yield community game nights in local neighborhoods. Monthly Game Nights: Hosting free, family-friendly game nights with refreshments and the chance to play Touchdown Tots in a fun, supportive environment. These events are perfect for generating UGC (user-generated content), building real-world relationships with families, and driving local buzz. Speaking Engagements: Using these events as opportunities to share the Chief Jungle mission, connect with families, and create long-term customers. Backend Sales Offers: While the events are free to attend, we’ll offer exclusive product bundles, package deals, and early access to upcoming releases to convert attendees into long-term customers. East Coast RV Tour: Once the buzz builds, we’ll hit the road for a coast-to-coast Touchdown Tots Across America tour, partnering with organizations to spread the message worldwide. Corporate Partnerships: Creating opportunities for funding through corporate CSR and wellness budgets, with a focus on long-term impact and family engagement. Real-World Testing and Iteration: Feedback-Driven Design: Using insights from families, teachers, and educational experts to refine our entire ecosystem, ensuring every piece is effective, engaging, and impactful. Professional Layout and Design: Polishing every aspect of our ecosystem, from packaging to digital assets, to ensure the highest standards of quality and presentation. We’re not just creating a game, we’re building a fully professional, world-class family learning platform. By supporting this campaign, you’re helping us move from a passionate idea to a polished, professional ecosystem that changes the way families learn, bond, and grow together. Where Did This Project Come From? Touchdown Tots started as a personal mission to make learning fun for my daughter, Nova, and quickly grew into a movement to help all parents prepare their children for success. During game nights at home, I noticed that traditional board games were either too simple or too complex for young learners, often missing the chance to teach critical skills in a meaningful way. As a homeschooling parent, I wanted something that combined the thrill of competition with real educational value, something that could teach math, reading, social skills, and critical thinking, all while making family time more intentional and impactful. That’s when the idea for Touchdown Tots was born. Since then, we’ve manufactured 100 initial units and is slowly building a community of passionate parents. We’re now ready to scale, but we need your help to get this game into more homes, classrooms, and community centers. What’s the Plan and Schedule? Here’s our roadmap to bringing Touchdown Tots to life: Phase 1 – Preparing for Launch (Month 1-2) - Currently 100 Unit Arrival: Waiting for the first 100 units to arrive for early testing, educator feedback, and initial sales. This phase isn’t just about a launch – it’s about building trust. These initial games will be gifted to educators, teachers, and franchised organizations (sports institutions, educational institutions) to gather real-world, age-appropriate feedback from diverse groups of kids. This input will be critical in refining the game for a sound, reliable product. Simultaneously, we’re vetting potential partners to plant the seeds for long-term relationships while building an early email list. This includes targeting high-yield locations and establishing a network of potential brand ambassadors. Venue Scouting and Funding: Securing funds through Kickstarter to cover venue costs, marketing materials, and initial event expenses. However, this also includes soft-launch game nights using the initial 100 units as beta testers.
