title: Categories
description: KAT Walk C is the world’s first gamer-dedicated, personal VR Omni-Directional Treadmill (ODT) – A new generation mechanical device that allows for 360 degrees of human motion, creating infinite movement area in VR on minimum physical space in reality. Our new device is the most innovative VR walking solution suitable for home use and affordable for individuals – Your personal gate into the virtual dimension! Bringing a VR ODT such as KAT Walk C into play effectively addresses the main problems existent in traditional VR locomotion solutions and offers a more complete virtual reality experience. Designed entirely for gamers, KAT Walk C offers a complete VR Locomotion experience integrating everything you might need in your virtual adventures. We’re developing it to let you dive into VR and experience ultimate immersion the way WE have always desired – uncompromisingly. A personal Omni-Directional Treadmill has to fit into your gaming cave and offer just enough mobility to be taken in and out of sight easily! All of that without losing on affordability and multifunctionality – KAT Walk C meets all the standards of a personal device and brings the dream of immersive gameplay straight into your home. KAT Walk C is the world’s first VR Omni-Directional treadmill that is dedicated entirely to gamers and therefore, even with all of its bells and whistles, it’s still cost-effective. Come, join us now and get it for a bargain - Early-bird rewards start at  $699 and even the latest supporters can get a unit for no more than $999 plus delivery! Our innovative ergonomic design makes KAT Walk C the most compact Omni-Directional Treadmill up to date . With an effective walking area of just 0.69m², KAT Walk C fits into almost all spaces. *KAT Walk C is available in two versions. You will be able to select either of them without paying any additional fees. We will collect your model request altogether with the shipping address after the campaign is over. KAT Walk C is not only C - ompact , C - onsumer-friendly , and C - ost-effective . It is also a C - omplete , C - omprehensive , and C - ompatible solution that's optimized to meet all the requirements of modern VR gaming, where there is no place for immersion-breaking compromises. Unleash your full physical capabilities for it’s time to bring your body into play! KAT Walk C unlocks uncharted levels of immersion with an increase of the locomotion physicality and reduction of motion sickness . Thanks to open ergonomics and an unrestrictive back support structure providing maximum safety without restricting the leg and arm motion, movement on the KAT Walk C is never limited by any mechanical components. Thanks to a special Mg&Si alloy material that is much stronger than steel but much lighter, KAT Walk C can keep you safe and balanced without affecting the optimal inertia required for quick and easy turning around and full balance and control even at larger & faster spins. KAT Walk C lets you achieve instant and natural movement . Use this opportunity to experience thrilling virtual-reality adventures. Ever wondered what would it be like to explore the caves and ruins of Skyrim on your own feet? Why not just do it? Ps: If you happen to bump into a horde of Draugrs, running might be particularly useful. We’re dead serious about that! High freedom in vertical motion spices up the gameplay increasing immersion in just any virtual reality game. it will come in handy on many different occasions - crouch to take cover, hide from your opponents , or take a good shooting position! In addition to the movement up and down, we have equipped the KAT Walk C's harness with an additional degree of horizontal waist freedom (Pitch) for your upper body to let you easily lean forward, peek from behind the covers, and pick items up. Use this freedom in FPS games like Pavlov, where each gun you find on your way can save your life! KAT Walk C enables you to also move backward! How else would you be able to retreat while keeping an eye on the field of battle and continuously fighting back the approaching enemies in competitive shooters like Contractors VR, Onward or Pavlov? Being one of the main mechanics of many games, strafing is incorporated as an integral function of the KAT Walk C’s locomotion system! Use it to dodge bullets, take cover , or simply stay in motion when fighting multiple enemies! KAT Walk C offers also a special cruise mode allowing you to continuously move in a certain direction with a constant speed without moving your legs. And let’s face the truth – you’re gonna need it for easier and more effective journeys when traversing vast lands through Skyrim, No Man’s Sky, or any other Sandbox games! A complete and natural locomotion system makes KAT Walk C the only VR ODT meeting the requirements of modern gaming. Whether you’re a maniac of story-driven RPGs, an enthusiast of competitive FPSes, or a fan of social games, KAT Walk C is tailor-made for you! What’s more, all of that contributes to a natural walking experience that we all pay so much attention to. Imagine having your immersion shattered right in the middle of an epic battle just because you realized how unrealistic it actually feels.. We know that pain too.. That’s why we’re fully dedicated to our research to develop effective technological solutions capable of improving the gait naturalness. Throughout the years of professional experience with virtual reality locomotion, we’ve been studying the physiques and biomechanical properties of the human body to obtain the optimized walking pattern of a healthy individual. Application of high manufacturing standards, carefully selected materials with the optimized friction coefficient, and proper base surface curvature, as well as structure adaptation to biomechanical requirements of human gait, allows KAT Walk C to closely fit that pattern and achieve high technical accuracy necessary for providing a natural walking experience. Each KAT Walk C comes with a pair of our cutting-edge footwear that pushes the boundaries of immersive VR experience further than ever, offering high customization to the user preferences . With multiple available levels of friction, KAT Walk C offers a natural walking experience to any type of player from complete novices to VR veterans! Last but not least, your natural walking posture characterized by a constant fluctuation of the body gravitational center as well as the pelvic tilt deviation forwards will be supported at all times with our body- adaptive waist harness . Its smart ergonomic design incorporates multiple mechanical advancements that increase the level of human-machine interaction, giving you maximum control over your KAT Walk C. In order to ensure that the KAT Walk C can truly become the extension of your body, we’re equipping the harness with a multi-layer reverse-tightening system that not only helps you get securely fastened but also improves the harness contiguity to your body. This ensures a highly natural walking experience and also allows for a wide range of safe and smooth vertical actions. The haptic feedback will increase your virtual reality immersion by simulating a physical interaction with the digital world. It is going to vibrate in response to certain events taking place in VR (such as explosions or ground shakes) and let you feel them in reality! The function will be provided for free exclusively to the Kickstarter supporters. However, backers will need to cover the delivery cost and the local taxes upon the package arrival. We have also made sure you are never going to run out of great titles to beat! After all, what would be the meaning of that all without the world’s finest content to experience it with? We all know that in the end, everything comes down to gaming! KAT Walk C is a complete plug and play solution that supports all free locomotion games on SteamVR and PSVR! There are dozens of compatible titles! · Get fully immersed in Skyrim VR and experience what it’s like to be an adventurer! Well.. at least until you get an arrow in a knee! Or get smashed by a giant! Or fried with Alduin’s fire! Or.. well.. forget that, just experience what it’s like to face a real adventure on your own feet!* *We are doing our best to ensure your maximum safety at all time. However, please be sure to use the device according to our instructions. KAT VR will not be held responsible for frostbites, cut wounds, animal bites, or any other injuries inflicted by swords, magic or dragons. If any of the above-mentioned symptoms occur when using the device, please consult your healer. · Traverse the streets of city 17 in Half Life: Alyx and utilize the capabilities of your KAT Walk C to show the interdimensional invaders who’s the new sheriff in town! Pssst: If you meet an entire Combine’s squad, it is still strongly recommended to turn tail – luckily enough KAT Walk C lets you run really fast! · Stand up to your opponents in competitive shooters such as Pavlov VR, Contractors VR or Onward! With KAT Walk C you’ll be able to carry out just any action you might need to dominate the modern field of battle! What’s even better – you’ll finally get the taste of modern VR e-sport! · AND MORE! There are hundreds of compatible titles – Explore them yourself and experience your own virtual adventures! KAT Walk C’s universal compatibility will allow you to enjoy your favorite VR games at their best! What’s more, our technology ensures that even the upcoming titles will be compatible by default as long as they support Free Locomotion! Besides making it compatible with the most popular platforms, we also designed KAT Walk C to operate as an independent “controller” allowing it to directly work with any major headset including Valve Index, Oculus Rift, Oculus Rift-S, HTC VIVE, HTC VIVE Pro, PSVR*, Windows Mixed Reality Headsets, and Pimax. It is even compatible with Oculus Quest through Link. * Compatibility with PSVR ensured through KAT PiSystem Adapter. You can purchase it by adding its value ($119) to your original pledge. For more information, please refer to our accessories section and FAQ. ** For more information about headset compatibility, please refer to our FAQ Keyboard and gamepad modes are two new functions of our locomotion algorithm that will become integrated directly with the KAT Walk C dedicated software – KAT Gateway. These two modes will let you use the KAT Walk C with some of your favorite non-VR games such as DOOM 4 or The Witcher 3. Moreover, KAT Walk C comes with a complete algorithm system and high-performance, deep-integrated sensors utilizing their full capabilities. Their unique combination ensures high technical accuracy and low motion latency to enhance each aspect of your gaming experience and elevate it up to a whole new level! There’s nothing worse in the entire world than lags ruining a perfect killing spree! Thanks to our algorithm, the entire process of motion data collection, processing, and transmission takes a blink of an eye letting you walk, run, and stop instantly. And the implementation of analog speed allows you to achieve realistic acceleration through a higher frequency of steps in each VR game and simulation that supports it. One of the main differences between standard motion in games and real-life movement is independent control over the head and body directions which are not fixed. Our algorithm decouples them allowing you to freely look around, aim, and shoot while continuously moving towards any intended direction! Our intelligent motion-capture algorithm recognizes each movement you make, and ensures high precision of its transmission into the virtuality - from walking and running through using cruise mode to walking backward and even strafing! High accuracy is absolutely necessary for multiplayer gaming where small details make a big difference! Adaptive tension design of the two available KAT Walk C versions (Standard, Large) allows people of wide ranges of body types to use them without having to change any components. The reverse tightening safety system of our harness allows people as thin as 62 cm (24.4 in) in waist circumference or as wide as 130cm (51 in) to use the device safely and smoothly. What’s more, you don’t need to be the jack of all trades to set up your KAT Walk C. It can be easily assembled or dismantled by just anyone even without any technical background! The whole process is as quick, easy, and user-friendly as it gets! Store your KAT Walk C when it’s not in use to save some space and assemble it again in no time! Last but not least, KAT Walk C offers our new multi-functional software – KAT Gateway. We’ve combined the simplicity of its control panel with the adjustability of the parameter to let you easily turn your KAT Walk C into a perfect VR input device for YOUR needs! Chilling out in a single-player experience right after winning an online match of the century? Adapt the settings in no time! Thanks to KAT Gateway, you can get quick access to the KAT Walk C’s control panel both from a computer desktop and directly from your VR headset. You’ll be able to easily adjust all the parameters in only a matter of seconds, and most importantly – you can do it without having to leave the virtual world or asking for anyone’s assistance. Parameters such as foot tracking sensitivity or decoupled head and body directions can be adjusted at any time to provide you with a more enjoyable experience and properly address the requirements of specific content. We are fully aware that different game genres require different, individual approach - Sandbox RPGs, Competitive FPSes, Adventure Games, Fighting Simulators, and all others are all played in a totally different way! With KAT Gateway you’ll be able to easily switch between different setups and adjust them to your liking for ultimate gaming experience! After all, every single one of us is a different type of player and expects slightly different gameplay. With KAT Gateway YOU make the call! What’s more, KAT Gateway also integrates all functions of our highly acclaimed inSteam technology that allows you to play just any free locomotion VR games. And that’s not all! Thanks to the application of our newest enhancement - inSteam Turbo, each compatible game no matter if opened directly through steam, shortcuts, or even with the KAT Walk C’s control panel turned off, will be automatically launched with an optimal settings configuration. Let's not forget that virtual reality is not only about gaming! With KAT Walk C you can effectively lose weight while having fun in your favorite virtual reality environments. So why not connect business with pleasure when that's simpler than ever? KAT Walk C will help you increase the physicality of your VR experience and stay in healthy shape! And that's not all - being compatible with all free-locomotion VR games, KAT Walk C lets you also enjoy more the social interactions in Rec Room or VRChat . And you can experience that at almost any place. The compact construction lets KAT Walk C to become integrated for good with your living environment. Besides the universal compatibility with all Free Locomotion Games, we offer a wide variety of titles additionally adapted to our solutions with the use of our native Software Development Kit in order to provide an even deeper and more immersive VR experience. And most importantly - our SDK is simple and easy to use by just any developer! With Unity and Unreal engine plugins , full video tutorials, and around the clock support from our in-house dev team, the whole process of integration can be completed in a matter of hours , letting you focus and stick to your existing development schedules. We are on hand for any testing or trouble-shooting, but we can also provide our sensors kit or a KAT WALK C itself for you to play with and test out in your office. We’re always delighted to work with new developers and expand our integrated games list to provide the players with even a wider variety of compatible VR titles to play. Please, visit the developer center at www.katvr.com, or contact us at developer@katvr.com to find out more details and answers to any questions you have. You are always welcome to join the KAT VR family! Using our SDK, you can quickly integrate just any virtual reality game and much more! The technical specification of KAT Walk C has been prepared to closely fit the needs of virtual reality enthusiasts like you! According to the current project development stage, we are planning to begin the shipping of your rewards in early October 2020 letting you enjoy your KAT Walk C soon after the campaign wraps up! As an early backer and true KAT supporter, you get to join our community and receive early exclusive updates about our development progress. Not just that, all early backers will get to vote on, suggest and request features and design modifications. All pledges in this campaign are priced to be lower than the final retail version, the goal of this campaign is to take our supporters' input and suggestions for the final retail version. In addition, we have saved some space in the KAT Walk C standard package to make sure you can get an additional pair of shoes and our PlayStationVR adapter. You can get them by adding the accessory value to your initial pledge. Due to the package size limitations, we won't be able to offer you unlimited accessories. If however, you would like to get additional accessories units above the limit, we could ship them to you via separate delivery charged extra. Contact us at global@katvr.com for more information And if we manage to reach certain levels of campaign funding, we are going to develop some extra features for all the KAT Walk C units on the Kickstarter platform! *  We are really thrilled to explore the levels of immersion that will become possible with a haptic feedback module installed in the platform base! Should we reach that goal, we will start working on its development immediately! We must let you know, however, that we are only going to deliver functions and features that have been properly developed, tested, and ensured flawless. In order to stick to our principles and at the same time avoid delays of the KAT Walk C delivery, the haptic feedback module may be provided to you after you receive the main reward. It will be delivered in a separate package with an additional delivery cost. KAT VR is an independent company dedicated to the research, development, and sales of VR Locomotion products and solutions. Founded in 2013, we have quickly grown to become one of the world’s leading professional suppliers of VR games’ & simulations’ equipment. Our mission is safe, realistic, and deeply immersive locomotion in virtual reality. VR is our passion and we can’t imagine holding off with it even for a second, nor compromising on any of its crucial aspects! That’s why each of KAT VR’s solutions even though different, offers a complete virtual reality walking experience. Now, five years after introducing the world’s first, and up to this date the world’s only unrestrictive Omni-Directional Treadmill with an open ergonomic structure, we are back! And we’re ready to finally bring it to your home letting each VR maniac like us experience the new generation of gaming the way we have always dreamt to – big time! You might wonder why a well-established company would take the Kickstarter way again with all the risks involved. There are many reasons -firstly, this project is dedicated to gamers and we’d love to take all of your input and feedback into perspective. Kickstarter can also help us get a better understanding of the market demand and better prepare ourselves for the commercial launch with optimized production lines. Please, feel welcome to share your honest feedback with us! This product has been developed for you – help us understand how can we make it better Since starting the work on the KAT Walk C last year, we have made huge progress! We've built four fully functional prototypes and continued perfecting and polishing them until we were certain that we are ready to offer them to you! We have tested the KAT Walk C for hundreds of hours to ensure that all the features of our new Omni-Directional Treadmill work as intended. Of course, we had some fun with it too - We hope you don't mind! You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Also special thanks to all of the KATers from our previous Kickstarter campaigns - without your love and support, KATVR would not be here today. We know how hard it is to put your trust and pledge to a startup company, and we will not fail you. After all the support and feedback from you, we are back again to bring true locomotion to your home, and give everyone the VR experience they deserve! We will be constantly posting updates on our social media. Follow us to never miss an update. Our official accounts: Official Website Blog - Facebook - Twitter - Reddit - YouTube - Instagram Thank you for supporting us. -Sincerely, the KATVR Team.

description: Become a backer today! Voxile is a stunning, ray-traced voxel FPS RPG Survival game where you can explore hand-crafted worlds or build your own. Every world in Voxile is a self-contained island with its own unique quests and gameplay style! Ray tracing meets voxel! Voxile is planned to be available on PC via Steam. You can wishlist Voxile on Steam now! Join our Discord or follow us on Twitter/X to keep up with the latest Voxile news! Subscribe to our YouTube for development and world editor content! The ooze is coming for you. About the Game Every island in Voxile focuses on different mechanics. You may need to craft items, build new structures, or blow up hordes of enemies in explosions of voxels with a rocket launcher. Some islands may focus on leveling up, growing stronger, and getting powerful weapons and armor, while others may have you solving environmental puzzles in peaceful surroundings. Our hand-crafted worlds will offer a wide gameplay experience, but if you have an idea for your own world- you can make it! Our world editor allows you to craft an island and adventure all of your own to share with your friends and the world! Play the Demo and Wishlist on Steam! A demo for Voxile is live now on Steam for free! Play our first world and create your own island in our world editor. Create-A-World Competition Want to put your world creating skills to the test? We are running a competition to see who can build the most creative island. You can win up to $2,500 as a cash prize or snag a Steam Deck if you are a runner up! You have until February 20th to submit your world. Join our Discord for rules and more details on the competition! Press Kit Visit our Press Kit to download Logos, Key Art, Screenshots, GIFs and more! Twitter/X Follow us on Twitter for your daily dose of voxel goodness. Discord Have a question or want to learn more? Join the Official VoxRay Games Discord! A long way to go! Help us reach funding stretch goals to add more features to the game! Current goal: $20,000 - Hang Glider If we hit $20,000, we will add a Hang Glider into Voxile so you can soar over our scenic voxel lands. The Hang Glider will be added as a usable item both in our playable worlds and in the world editor! The Worlds of Voxile Every world in Voxile is a self-contained island with its own hand-crafted environment, NPCs, stories, and quests. That means on every island there is a new scenario to discover, new goals to pursue, and new items to discover, craft, and upgrade. In a way, each world in Voxile is its own little game! A look at one of our islands! At its core, Voxile is an FPS RPG Survival game built from voxels with a focus on exploration. But every world you play may have a different focus. Some worlds may have you battling hordes of enemies as you build structures to protect your island. Other worlds may have no combat at all, and instead focus on crafting items and exploring serene environments. Some worlds may take twenty minutes to complete, while others may be a ten hour experience filled with leveling, a massive sprawling world, and epic combat encounters. Create an Isle of Your Own While we have a team of designers building unique islands, we built Voxile with the idea that anyone can build an island. Our voxel world editor allows you to build, create, and eventually even share islands with others. You can even design your own NPCs! You can design everything: from the way the island is shaped, to where the buildings and trees are placed, to what hordes of enemies the player will encounter, all of it is in your control! You can design your own NPCs, write your own quests, and place your own items for players to discover. Voxel Art Voxels are the root of our game's visual appeal. They're timeless, charming, for some even nostalgic.  And we've paired our voxels with cutting edge raytracing and lighting techniques to create a unique art direction that's all our own. Those water reflections! The entire world is made of voxels. That means when you destroy a building, tiny voxel particles will fly out. When an enemy is hit, their head bursts into voxels as the skeleton underneath becomes visible. FPS, RPG, and Survival Gameplay When creating Voxile, we wanted to create a combat system that would work with our many different worlds. The first-person style and our hot-bar allows us to create many different weapons that can fit every variety of worlds. Don't miss! So while some levels may have you fighting up close with swords and axes, dodging and blocking enemies, other levels may have you shooting your foes from a far with guns and taking cover. Our Engine We built Voxile on a custom engine that we created completely from scratch so your game play will be as smooth as possible. We believe that player feedback and transparency are core components to building a great engine and game. We want to deliver large, seamless, raytraced voxel worlds and hope to improve the engine and support the game for years to come. As the game grows, we’ll continue to add more hand-crafted worlds and our hope is that as our community grows, there will be islands to explore made by our players . The Music of Voxile We are working with Rich Douglas (who has worked on soundtracks for games like Insurgency, Onward, and Takedown) to deliver an amazing soundtrack! Here is a sneak peek at one of the tracks from in-game. Who We Are VoxRay Games is a game studio created early 2022 with the sole purpose of creating and supporting Voxile. We have over 40 AAA games shipped with almost 100 years of game development experience between us. That's us! The studio was founded by Wouter van Oortmerssen , and continues to evolve and grow to support the scope of Voxile. The team has worked across the gaming industry at places like Blizzard, CryTek, Gearbox, EA, Google, Microsoft, Avalanche Studios, and Cloud Imperium Games. We have worked on titles like Borderlands, Far Cry, Just Cause, World of Warcraft, Diablo, and Star Citizen. More importantly than that, everyone on the team loves games, and Voxile is our way of creating something we love, too. We put the player experience first and we want to run our Kickstarter by listening to player feedback and making the game into something our players want to play day after day after day. Why Kickstarter? Kickstarter backers can help us achieve our full vision of the game through their feedback and conversations about the game. Players will be able to explore and create exciting new styles of gameplay thanks to the flexibility of our world editor, so we want to work closely with our community and listen to their input as the game develops and grows. Help us shape Voxile! We have core features that we know we want to implement into the game, but there are plenty of mechanics we are still debating on. Should we add a farming system into the game? What about different weather effects? We want community and player input on development questions like these to help shape what Voxile becomes. If you have any questions, message us or email us at nkoruna@voxraygames.com! You can also join our Discord to talk about the game or ask us any questions you have!

title: Categories
description: Hi there! My name is Horatiu Radoiu, and I'm an art director from New York, NY. My journey in making games started during the pandemic, when I found the power of GB Studio and started making Game Boy games. I've been fortunate to have two of my games published, part of the Traumatarium series. The more I spent time designing those two games, the more the world grew in my mind, and wanted to take that lore end expand it into the physical world. I grew up playing board games and Magic; The Gathering, so physical manifestations of games were something that was always important to me. But with growing up, jobs, life, and everything else, I found less and less time to play and set up games. But my love of enjoying the art of the cards and manuals stayed So I wanted to create a card game that combined all of the above. Growing the world of Traumatarium, a game that I can super quickly play solo, and searching out some of my favorite artists to create cards that I would want to collect. Thus, Traumatarium: Deckulus was born! Almost everything you need comes inside the deck box! Only thing needed are some dice for tracking health and items, and a D6 for the rolls. The cards will complete the narrative of your journey Once you set your hero card aside with the starting health (usually 20, but you can up or decrease the difficulty), and any items you may choose to start the game with, all you have to do is shuffle the remaining deck together and start flipping cards. Cards are broken down into dungeon cards, showing events and rooms, and monsters, who you need to fight before moving to flip another card from the dungeon deck. You keep going until you find and defeat the boss card! The goal was to create as artistic of an expression for the game's cards. Similar to the Game Boy games, the art had to be memorable. I reached out to some of my favorite artists and gave loose briefs, with the context of the world of Traumatarium, and let them express themselves. I then went in and worked the type design around their art, trying to maintain a varied, yet cohesive style And a few more surprise guests ;) Wanted to keep it simple and sweet! All stretch goals will apply to all decks! $25 - The Deckulus Game deck! Everything you need to play the game! $40 - The Deckulus Game and Art deck! Play the game and also have an art only deck! $120 - The Deckulus Game store bundle! Get 10 copies of the base game! Bonus Stretch Goal! Two additional cards added to the deck by two guest artists! Every deck comes with a 20 page rulebook, featuring background info, more detailed rules, extra optional "boons and busts" table, as well as blank hero tracker pages at the end!

title: Discover the WAY: A strategically creative board game
description: Discover the GAME Ages 14+.   Playtime 20 minutes per player . 2-4 players (1-4 with stretch goals unlocked) Discover the WAY: Forge Your Path in a World of Endless Possibilities Embark on an epic journey with Discover the WAY, a highly customizable tabletop game that puts you in control of your adventure. Tailor every aspect—from board orientation and starting positions to the placement of Discoveries and the routes you take. No two games are ever the same, ensuring a fresh experience each time you play. Dynamic Gameplay with Upgradable Dice Elevate your strategy with our innovative upgradable dice system. Manage resources wisely to enhance your dice, unlocking new abilities and tactics. This mechanic adds depth and replayability, challenging you to adapt and evolve your approach in every session. Join Our Community and Share Your Creativity Become part of a vibrant community of explorers and strategists. Connect with fellow players on our social media platforms and in the comments section to share your own variants and house rules. Your creativity can inspire others and contribute to the ever-expanding universe of Discover the WAY. https://www.facebook.com/groups/discovertheway https://www.facebook.com/DeliveranceGames https://www.instagram.com/deliverance_games_llc/ Play test Video What's in the box? 4 Colored Meeple Sets 4 Player Boards (5 boards with the first stretch goal) Pathway Tiles Customizable Dice Die Faces Player Aid Cards 4 Gold Counters 4 Colored Fortresses Water Tiles Draw Tiles Wood, Stone and Gold Discoveries 2 Draw Bags *Discover the WAY is manufactured by LongPack Games. Games will be shipped out of Hong Kong or Vietnam depending on the tariff situation. Deluxe Box and Super Deluxe The options for the Deluxe and Super Deluxe sets are the creators version of the game. With this version we (the creators) are giving you a version with all the upgraded pieces. For starters: The wooden soldiers (level 1 and 2), the relics (now slide on the back of the soldiers), and the discoveries are all upgraded from wood to 3D models. We also add the level 3 soldier the Juggernaut for each player color. The cardboard punch out draw tiles are being upgraded to wood burned tiles. The coin counter is replaced with metal coins. And finally, the boxes include an extra board. If the stretch goal is hit then they will receive a 6th board as well. The Super Deluxe is the double down version of the Deluxe box where you receive 2 copies of the creators version. Stretch Goals *All backers will receive all stretch goals once they are unlocked because we love you! Stretch Goal #1: Extra Board - Unlocks at $58,500 This is exactly as it sounds! You will receive an extra board to add to the customizability of game play and for extra game modes! Stretch Goal #2: - Unlocks at $66,300 Stretch Goal #3: - Unlocks at $75,000 Who We Are At Deliverance Games, our mission is simple: to love others, serve communities, and create meaningful connections through unforgettable gaming experiences. We're a family-centered board game company rooted in the Pacific Northwest, born out of adventure and guided by Jesus. Our story began in an RV park nestled in the forests just outside Jacksonville, North Carolina. As two families traveled the country together—led by founders Travis (a.k.a. short beard ) and Ben (a.k.a. red beard )—an unexpected spark of inspiration struck. The Holy Spirit delivered the vision for a board game like no other. What began as a simple idea around a board quickly grew into something extraordinary. "Discover the WAY" is the first installment in our planned trilogy. Blending strategy, creativity, and a touch of the divine, it’s been compared to Settlers of Catan , Chess , and Tetris —but stands on its own as a unique experience for players of all backgrounds. As our families returned to our hometown of Spokane, Washington, the dream continued to grow. We're excited to invite you on this journey with us. Prepare to Discover the WAY! Why Back Us Now? 1. Be First to Play: Kickstarter backers will receive the game before it hits retail shelves. Be among the first to experience Discover the WAY and start building connections with family and friends. 2. Help Bring the Vision to Life: This game was born from a calling and a dream. Your support helps us bring it to the world and fuels future projects in the trilogy. 3. Support a Family-Owned Startup: You're not just backing a game—you’re supporting two families who stepped out in faith to create something meaningful for communities everywhere. 4. Community-Driven Design: We've play tested extensively with families, game groups, and communities. Your feedback helps shape the final product—we want you to be part of the journey! 5. Limited-Time Pricing: Early backers receive discounted pricing and special bundles that won’t be available after the campaign ends. 6. Be Part of Something Bigger: This isn't just a game—it's a mission to encourage connection, purpose, and joy. When you back us, you're helping spread that mission one game night at a time. Rules Video Downloadable Rulebook Download a printable copy of the rulebook here! Game Modes We have several fun, alternate game modes available (you can also create your own or modify them as you'd like!). Here are a few below! -Capture The Flag: This is the basic set up. Players will build their world as they race to their neighbor's base to retrieve their lost helmet and return it to their king. -Co-Op: This game mode is similar to Capture The Flag, but has a twist! Co-op allows players to team up, share resources, and work to retrieve their helmets and return them to their king. -Single Player (Unlocked at with Stretch Goal #2): Single player mode allows a person to play Discover The WAY against an automated player (the automated player can be used in multiplayer games as well and with any game mode). On the automated player's turn, simply flip a card from the deck and complete the action using the automated player's pieces.

description: The Game Vice: Magic City Mayhem is a top-down 8-bit retro action/adventure game inspired by Zelda with a GTA: Vice City theme. You play as Dutch, one of Magic City’s top enforcers off on a quest to save your one true love, Sophie. Make your way through bustling nightclubs, scenic beaches, and raptor-infested yachts on this raunchy adventure to save the day! Vice: Magic City Mayhem combines two of our favorite games, Zelda (exploration, combat, and puzzles) and GTA: Vice City (Theme, story, and humor). Explore Magic City and face off against a colorful cast of enemies and bosses to find your top floozy (Princess). Features Unique Dungeons with Engaging Puzzles: Navigate intricately designed dungeons filled with inventive puzzles, blending challenge with discovery. Thrilling Hack-and-Slash Combat with Ranged Options: Dive into fast-paced battles, using melee and ranged attacks to overcome diverse enemies. Epic Boss Fights: Conquer formidable bosses with unique attack patterns, delivering unforgettable challenges. Exploration with Hidden Secrets: Uncover hidden areas and rewards, encouraging curiosity and exploration. Unique Gear: Use an arsenal of fantastical Weapons and Items, each with its own unique abilities and effects. Coming to: Vice running on Steam Deck and Nintendo Switch Example of a cheat code You can download and play the Vice: Magic City Mayhem demo on Steam now! You never know when you'll need a little bottle of fire! The Story Your one true love, Sophie, has vanished under mysterious circumstances, leaving behind only whispers of danger and a trail that leads to the heart of Magic City. You step into the boots of Dutch, a determined and charismatic hero with a checkered past, on a pulse-pounding adventure to save the love of your life and uncover the dark secrets lurking in the neon-drenched shadows. The Journey: Explore the Grand Magic City: Navigate sprawling streets, hidden alleys, and glitzy rooftops in an open world inspired by the decadent 1980s. Seek out secrets, unlock upgrades, and transform Dutch from a scrappy underdog to a legendary force to be reckoned with. Face Off Against Eight Fearsome Bosses: Confront eight unforgettable bosses, each ruling a different district of Magic City with their own unique themes, mechanics, and larger-than-life personalities. These battles will test your skills, strategy, and determination as you get closer to uncovering Sophie’s fate. Unravel the Mystery: As you fight your way through the city, piece together the web of betrayal, greed, and corruption that led to Sophie’s disappearance. Every victory reveals another fragment of the story, pulling you deeper into a conspiracy that could change the city forever. Save Sophie and Ride into the Sunset: The Ultimate Goal: rescue Sophie, confront her captors, and prove that love truly conquers all. Will your efforts bring closure, or will the truth about Magic City leave you questioning everything you thought you knew? The Vibe: Step into a world where every corner is bathed in vibrant neon lights, synth-wave soundscapes pulsate through the air, and the spirit of the 1980s reigns supreme. From the towering skyscrapers to the sun-soaked beaches, Magic City feels alive—a perfect blend of nostalgia and adventure waiting to be explored. This isn’t just a game; it’s an experience. Suit up, power up, and dive headfirst into the adventure of a lifetime in Vice: Magic City Mayhem! In Vice, Weapons & Items are essential for combat , puzzle-solving , and exploration . Each item has unique functionalities and strategic advantages; mastering their use is key to success. Katana: Dutch's weapon of choice Ninja Stars: For when the bad guys are just out of reach Dynamite : The key that can open almost every door And more weapons/items to obtain in-game! Gameplay Fans of Zelda-like games will find Vice: Magic City Mayhem's gameplay familiar, with its core elements centered around: Combat: Real-time combat using a Katana and an additional Weapon or Item at a time. Dodge enemy attacks and strike back using your available arsenal. Items: 8 unique items (some upgradable) to use on the adventure to unlock new strategies, turn the tide of battle, or help you solve that really tricky puzzle. Exploration: Magic City is formed by 6 unique environments (Downtown, Magic Beach, Bling Kong's Nightclub…) and is full of secrets to discover, treasures, people to meet, and challenges to overcome. Puzzle-solving: You'll find puzzles in each of the dungeons as well as Magic City itself. You will need to use the right Weapons or Items and think creatively to solve them. Solving them will reward you with important upgrades or allow you to progress. The World The vast and diverse world of Magic City is comprised of 6 unique environments . Explore this world to discover secret locations, dungeons, and colorful characters. Magic City, a sprawling metropolis teeming with adventure, is home to a network of 8 challenging dungeons . Defeat the dungeon's challenges and boss to find another piece of the puzzle surrounding Sophie's disappearance and acquire a new Weapon or Item. You have obtained the Pimp Cane! The hero of the game ( Dutch ), the damsel in distress ( Sophie ), and the NPCs that help you along the way. These include Reggie - the town gossip who can get things opened, for a price. A$$hole Tony - the grouchy shopkeeper of Maul-Mart that sells all the goods. Dorothy - the wise old pimp who helps set Dutch on his journey. And many more! Dutch, Sophie, Reggie, A$$hole Tony, Dorothy In Vice: Magic City Mayhem, you will encounter a wide variety of enemies in the city's many dungeons and throughout the city itself. Use your Weapons and Items strategically, as they'll have varying effects on different enemies. Some of Magic City's enemies Your combat skills will also be put to the test against more challenging foes, including mini-bosses and bosses. First dungeon boss fight - Bling Kong Can Dutch outrun a raptor... Rewards Tier Rewards $5 - Support Thank you! $15 - Neon Enforcer (Standard Edition) 🎮 Digital copy (PC or Console) 📣 Name in the credits under "Special Thanks" 👕 Backer-exclusive in-game cosmetic $22 - 8-bit Brawler (Digital Bundle Edition) 🎮 All rewards from the Basic Edition 🎨 PDF Art Book and Instruction Manual 🎵 Digital soundtrack $45 – Pixel Pimp (Early Upgraded Edition) 🎮 All rewards from the Digital Bundle Edition 👨‍🎨 Exclusive backer-created Phone Booth Message 🖼️ Backer-exclusive digital wallpaper (Dutch) 🕹️ Early access to the game's playable beta before release (PC) $50 – Pixel Pimp 🎮 All rewards from the Digital Bundle Edition 👨‍🎨 Exclusive backer-created Phone Booth Message 🖼️ Backer-exclusive digital wallpaper (Dutch) 🕹️ Early access to the game's playable beta before release (PC) Example of backer-created Phone Booth message $ 80 – Magic City OG (Collector's Edition) 🎮 All rewards from the Digital Bundle Edition 👨‍🎨 Exclusive backer-created NPC (name or likeness featured) 🖼️ Backer-exclusive digital wallpaper (Dutch) 😈 8 Backer-exclusive digital Boss wallpapers 🕹️ Early access to the game's playable beta before release (PC) 💌 Personalized thank-you letter from the development team Example of a backer-created NPC $400 – Henchman (Creators Edition) 🎮 All rewards from the Digital Bundle Edition 👨‍🎨 Design a Mini-boss 🖼️ Backer-exclusive digital wallpaper (Dutch) 😈 8 Backer-exclusive digital Boss wallpapers 📣 Name in the credits under "Developer" 🕹️ Early access to the game's playable beta before release (PC) 💌 Personalized thank-you letter from the development team $650 – Kingpin (Developer's Edition) 🎮 All rewards from the Digital Bundle Edition 👨‍🎨 Design a Boss 🖼️ Backer-exclusive digital wallpaper (Dutch) 😈 8 Backer-exclusive digital Boss wallpapers 📣 Name in the credits under "Developer" 🕹️ Early access to the game's playable beta before release (PC) 💌 Personalized thank-you letter from the development team Vice: Magic City Mayhem is our way of paying homage to the games we loved as kids. We're pushing the NES pixel style and working within the original limitations to recreate the experience and achieve a unique look. Music The music for Vice: Magic City Mayhem was crafted to immerse players in the retro vibe of an 8-bit action-packed city. Our talented Audio Director, Chris Sensebe, meticulously designed each track using NES-inspired techniques, blending chiptune melodies with modern twists. Every piece—from the upbeat club mixes to the atmospheric street beats—was tailored to complement the energy and personality of each environment, ensuring the soundtrack feels like an integral part of the gameplay experience. It’s a love letter to classic gaming soundtracks with a fresh spin! The Team Hi everyone, we're the team at Jurassic Sunset Games developing Vice: Magic City Mayhem ! Matt Schulz (EP), Ali Jiraki (Lead Engineer), Chris Sensebe (Audio Director), Meeka Elliot (Art Director), Ryan Jenkins (Engineer), Caroline Holtgrewe (Art), Nick Seyer (Design), Michael Kondracki (Marketing) We've been developing games for over 8 years at studios like Telltale Games and EA Tiburon , working on everything from indie gems to AAA titles. With Vice: Magic City Mayhem , we're pouring everything we've learned into crafting a retro-inspired experience that’s as bold and chaotic as the games we grew up loving. Myla - Quality Assurance Tester Meet Myla, our entire QA department. 🐾 She’s got very specific skills, including: 🛠️ Finding every bug we thought we fixed 🎮 Testing controller durability (with her claws) 🥫 Demanding Fancy Feast as payment Our builds will never be the same... We’re using Kickstarter because it’s the best way to team up with people who love retro gaming as much as we do. It’s not just about raising funds but about building a community that’s as excited about Vice: Magic City Mayhem as we are. This lets us stay independent while giving the game the extra polish it deserves. With your help, we can make Magic City Mayhem an unforgettable adventure for everyone! Development Progress We're deep into development, and Vice: Magic City Mayhem is about 80% complete ! Here’s what’s left before we reach the finish line: Boss Fights: A few more epic boss battles are in the works, each bringing unique mechanics and challenges. Expanding the Map: The world of Magic City is nearly complete. We’re adding final details, secrets, and locations to explore. Final Features: We’re fine-tuning a few gameplay mechanics to ensure a smooth and polished experience. We're on track to deliver a chaotic, action-packed adventure, and your support will help us bring the final pieces together! Budget breakdown Your support means we can go all-in on Vice: Magic City Mayhem , covering the team's hard work, as well as all those Kickstarter fees and taxes. Social Media Follow our journey on social media for updates and behind-the-scenes looks, pick your favorite platform and stay in the loop!

title: Cascadia: Alpine Lakes
description: Cascadia: Alpine Lakes is a beautiful strategy board game for 1-4 players that plays in 30-45 minutes. From the team that brought you Calico, Cascadia, Verdant, Fit to Print, Nocturne, and Knitting Circle , this puzzly game designed by Randy Flynn and developed by the Flatout Games CoLab is a new stand-alone tile-layering game in the Cascadia universe that takes the beloved tile and token-drafting and environment-building to new heights! Cascadia: Alpine Lakes features dozens of unique and tactile components - each with stunning artwork by Beth Sobel! The game comes with a variety of Habitat and Environment Scoring Cards, allowing you to mix and match new challenges and create new combos each and every time you play! There are limitless unique game setups to explore! Cascadia: Alpine Lakes is designed by Randy Flynn. Randy has designed many wonderful games, including Cascadia, Cascadia: Rolling , and co-designed Cascadia: Landmarks , and Cascadia Junior . The solo mode design was led by Shawn Stankewich - designer of the International Gamers Awards (IGA) 2022 Solo Award winning Cascadia solo mode. It is developed and art directed by the award-winning creative team behind Calico , Cascadia , Verdant , Fit to Print, Nocturne, and Knitting Circle - Molly Johnson, Robert Melvin, Shawn Stankewich, and Dylan Mangini. CoLab members Joseph Z. Chen and Ashwin Kamath helped bring the game to life and polish all the edges through their contributions to the game’s development. Finally, Beth Sobel contributed the most breathtaking illustrations! Beth is the illustrator of past CoLab games Calico , Cascadia , Verdant , Nocturne , Cascadia: Rolling , Cascadia Junior , and Knitting Circle , as well as countless other board games! What's in the Box? Free Kickstarter Promo Kickstarter backers of Cascadia: Alpine Lakes receive the Pristine Peaks Mini-Expansion for FREE! This mini-expansion includes 1 unique double-sided Lake Scoring Card, 6 Unique Habitat Scoring Cards, and 9 Unique Environment Scoring Cards! With these additional cards, players will have new ways to play that create new spatial challenges and add completely new gameplay elements! These promo cards are a special THANK YOU to all backers for being early supporters and will not be included with future editions of the game! Free Cascadia Mini-Expansion If you own Cascadia , Cascadia: Alpine Lakes also includes the Alpine Animals Cascadia Mini-Expansion ! This expansion uses components from Cascadia: Alpine Lakes and features alternate animal scoring for Cascadia so you can play a modified version of the game that uses the Wildlife Tokens from Cascadia: Alpine Lakes to add new placement and scoring conditions to the game! How to Play Want a more in-depth explanation? Learn how to play Cascadia: Alpine Lakes with Kovray! Check out the draft rulebook to read the current rules for yourself! Once you know how to play, you can test out Cascadia: Alpine Lakes for yourself on Tabletopia! We have partnered with the fabulous folks at Tabletopia to build a digital version so you can try the game out now! Solo Mode Like Cascadia, Cascadia: Alpine Lakes can be played solo! The solo mode is easy to set up and closely simulates the multiplayer experience with limited upkeep. It is a quick and engaging experience that is simple to learn, while still offering interesting puzzly choices and challenging thresholds to overcome! Like our other Flatout Games CoLab games, Cascadia: Alpine Lakes comes with Solo Achievements, Rules Modifications, and Scenarios with escalating difficulty, so you can challenge yourself to unique game setups and progress toward the title of Cascadian Biologist! Family Mode Cascadia: Alpine Lakes also has a Family Mode! If you are playing with children, those new to gaming, or you just want to make the puzzle and rules a little simpler, you can play with the included Family Variant rules and Scoring Card. These adjusted rules streamline the game so that anyone can get in on the action! With this range of gameplay modes, Cascadia: Alpine Lakes can be tuned to offer different game experiences to different players, depending on experience level and preferences so that it can fit into any game night! Why Pledge? Cascadia: Alpine Lakes provides a fantastic mix of approachable gameplay with strategic depth. It is a natural follow-up to our wildly successful trilogy of puzzle games, Calico, Cascadia, and Verdant and our recent hits Fit to Print, Nocturne and Knitting Circle . We wanted to provide fans of gorgeous puzzly games another easy-to-teach, yet challenging-to-master game. Cascadia is a special game and we have spent the past three years carefully crafting this follow-up. Our collaborative team has worked hard to make Cascadia: Alpine Lakes an approachable, accessible, and exciting game for a range of audiences. This game brings a lot of the same signature Flatout Games polish that you know and love, while providing a unique new experience. The puzzly tension of drafting the perfect combinations to build the most harmonious ecosystems remains from Cascadia, and with the addition of the third dimension the puzzle is even more satisfying - we cannot wait for you to try it! While Cascadia: Alpine Lakes can be a fun gateway experience for new gamers, it provides more experienced players with variable goals, the tension of balancing different paths to victory, and a great mix of long-term strategy and short-term tactics. This makes the challenge and reward of each new puzzle extremely satisfying! We are very proud of both the gameplay and quality of the product. The Environment Scoring cards were inspired by the massive success of the original Cascadia solo mode that added spatial challenges. These new cards bring that level of uniqueness of each game setup to the multiplayer game so you can enjoy it on your own or with others! We know that board gamers love sharing the hobby with their friends and family and Cascadia: Alpine Lakes is the perfect game to do just that! The members of our team have years of experience working on a number of successful projects, from Point Salad to Cascadia ! What we think these games all have in common is their attention to detail and focus on great gameplay and amazing production quality. Last year, after we successfully fulfilled Calico, Cascadia, Verdant, Fit to Print, Nocturne, Cascadia: Rolling, Point City , and Deep Dive , our projects Knitting Circle and Point Galaxy + Propolis had over 16,000 backers combined!Since then, all fourteen of our publications have received various accolades - from being some of the most anticipated games on Boardgamegeek.com, to praise from countless reviewers. Calico and Cascadia both won the American Tabletop Awards, and Cascadia won the 2022 Spiel des Jahres - broadly considered the highest international achievement in board games! Since this is our fifteenth published game, we have partnered with AEG to bring Cascadia: Alpine Lakes to broader distribution after the campaign. However, as with our previous campaigns, we offer our backers the best possible value for purchasing the game. Kickstarter is your first and best opportunity to bring Cascadia: Alpine Lakes home! The Kickstarter Edition comes with free promo cards that will not be part of any standard retail editions, even when the game does make it into broader distribution channels. The pledge price is also significantly lower than the MSRP will be. Our philosophy is that our backers are major contributors to our passion and our business. We do not take this lightly, and we know that there is always risk in backing a crowdfunding campaign. Because of this, we want to make sure that our backers get the best possible experience and we show our appreciation for their early support. We encourage you to peruse the comment sections of this and our past projects. We pride ourselves on being open, transparent, and responsive creators. The pledge levels you are backing this project at are set to give you the greatest possible value by subsidizing both the overall cost of the game and shipping, as our way of saying thank you for your support. You are all vital and play a major role in the success of the game - we can’t do this without all of you, and we appreciate that! We look forward to chatting with you all about the process and the game overall. We commit to being focused on you and anything we can do to improve the backer experience! Retailers Certified brick-and-mortar retailers interested in backing can reach out to us through our website form ( www.flatout.games/retailer ). Interested retailers will be invited to our pledge manager after the campaign has ended. Retailers are encouraged to back the project for any amount with the same email address as they sign up with, in order to stay up-to-date with the project. Playthroughs Tune into any of the below playthrough videos to see Cascadia: Alpine Lakes in action! Richard and Jen and Amy and Maggie play a tag-team version of Cascadia: Alpine Lakes in two acts on Rahdo Runs Through! Check it out!
