description: I'm Angela Autumn, a country, indie, and bluegrass singer-songwriter based in Nashville, Tennessee. I am releasing my second full-length record this summer! One of Nashville's most iconic recording studios, numerous artists have produced music within the Sound Emporium's walls, including Kesha, Pop Evil, Little Big Town, Pharrell Williams, Kenny Rogers, Johnny Cash, John Denver, Keith Whitley, New Grass Revival, REM, Alan Jackson, Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood. The day of recording, Robert Plant & Allison Krauss were also recording/filming some live footage for their newest release in Studio A. The recording project was lead by co-producer and mixing engineer Tommy Carnes. Together, we put together an incredible live band to play with in the studio: Jess Nolan - keys and vocals Milly Raccoon - fiddle Ross McReynolds - Drums Chris Donahue - upright bass I also had a special guest, folksinger and banjoist Willi Carlisle (@willicarlisle) sing and play accordion on my tearjerker 'Musician's Bride. As my second studio release, this record carries plenty of weight for me, emotionally and from a storyteller's perspective. It covers my first 2 years spent in Nashville, which were ironically marked by the pandemic. The live feel of the record captures the ephemeral nature of myself, as I change and shed layer after layer. I have plans to work with Joshua Shoemaker on a professional music video for 'Dancer.' This song is a kicker. It is a new direction for me. The video is going to be epic, and expensive. Showbiz ain't cheap, folks. ($3500) Another goal of mine is to have sick cover art. Something that tells a story, because, heck, these songs are meaningful.  I love working with a solid team of graphic designers, photographers, and artists to get the album cover just right. Here is the cost breakdown: Vinyl Production: $2,000 Video for 'Dancer': $3500 Photoshoot: $500 Album design/logo work: $400 Styling: $100 Media/PR: $3,500 Last but not least, let's get my last release printed on vinyl. Most of the pressing plants are backed up for like, 5 years or something. I can get vinyl of the record to you in 9 months, just in time (hopefully) for my third record to come out! I'm sure Frontiers Woman will be a vintage classic by then. Thank you for supporting my songwriting craft for many albums to come. This album is only a small glimpse of what I have to offer, creatively. I feel honored to make music in 2022 and ONWARD! XOXO

title: Categories
description: Rhythm surrounds us . From the pitter-patter of raindrops to the crash of an ocean wave, the natural world percolates with rhythmic possibilities. Rhythm is the beat of our hearts; rhythm is the pulse of life. This fall, Taalim School of Indian Music will be celebrating the relationship between rhythm and nature with Rhythmic Freefall , a large-scale outdoor musical event held at Enfield Falls in Ithaca, NY.  With the waterfall as their muse, 100 tabla drummers will play powerful, hypnotic beats in unison throughout the afternoon. There is an undeniable beauty, power and rhythm in the flow of water—just imagine the sight and sound of 100 hand drummers playing alongside the waterfall, music and nature merging as one! Rhythmic Freefall will be a one-of-a-kind, epic celebration of rhythm! Rhythmic Freefall: The Power of Rhythm in Nature September 22, 2018 at 2:30pm  |  Treman State Park, Ithaca, NY Free event  |  Open to the public This event is the brainchild of Pandit Divyang Vakil , an internationally renowned tabla composer and founder of the Taalim School. Twenty years ago, Vakil organized a similar spectacle at the Jhanjari Waterfall near Ahmedabad in western India. Jhanjari Waterfall in Gujarat, India in 1999 It was a historic event, but this year’s gathering of musicians in Ithaca raises the bar even higher. Rhythmic Freefall is not only a celebration of the unity between music and nature, but also of the unity between distant cultures. (Ithaca, NY is no less than 8,000 miles away from Vakil’s hometown in India, for those keeping track.) It is the culmination of Vakil’s dream to spread the art of tabla to the entire world . Jhanjari Waterfall in Gujarat, India in 1999 What is the tabla? Tabla is the primary hand drum of Northern India, a delicate yet powerful instrument known for its lyrical phrasing and fast rolls. Tabla music involves skillfully composed rhythmic patterns, intriguing compositions, and complex beat structures. The tabla is comprised of two drums, the baya, or bass drum, and the daya, or treble drum. The beauty and essence of tabla-playing lies in the harmonious balance between the daya and baya. The tabla is a highly versatile percussion instrument that can be played solo or in accompaniment with just about any musical instrument in the world. Tabla:  classical hand-drum of India Who are we? We are the Taalim School of Indian Music .  Founded in 2002, Taalim offers instruction in Indian classical music and dance in 14 locations in NY, NJ, PA, CT and VA.  Our main centers are located in Edison, NJ and New Hyde Park, NY.   We share the music and dance of India  to a diverse audience through performances, workshops, lecture-demonstrations, seminars, residencies, K-12 outreach, and formal education. Our Director and Founder:  "Guruji" Pandit Divyang Vakil Our teachers/musicians: Mike Lukshis Jin Won Sejal Kukadia Ray Belli Kaumil Shah Rushi Vakil Heena Patel Students/teachers in our Edison, NJ center, with Pandit Divyang Vakil Students, teachers and Pandit Divyang Vakil at our Edison, NJ branch Where will our event take place? Rhythmic Freefall will take place at the picturesque Enfield Falls, which is located in the heart of Robert H. Treman State Park in Ithaca, New York.  Most of Taalim School students, teachers, and professional musicians live and work in central NJ or in the New York City region.  So, we will be renting two (possibly three) buses to transport 100 tabla players and 100 instruments, as well as equipment, crew, volunteers and chaperones, north to Ithaca.  It's a 4 and half hour trip one way.  It will be a fun and adventurous road trip! Thank you to New Delhi Diamonds Indian Restaurant in Ithaca for providing the event with lunch! Also, thank you to the Treman State Park Rangers for allowing us to carry out this event. We could not have gotten this far without their help and enthusiasm. Enfield Falls Ithaca, NY Taalim School of Indian Music needs your support to make Rhythmic Freefall a success! In order to bring this grand-scale vision to life, the Taalim School needs your support! We are charging all participants an admission fee, but there are still costs to cover! Our remaining overhead expenses total approximately $7500, and include the following. 1.) Transportation costs: $3500.  This includes the rental of two buses for students, teachers, and other participants. One bus will depart from Long Island, and the other from Central New Jersey. Transportation fees also include gas, tolls, and a special insurance policy required to transport young children. 2.) Professional Video Crew: $4000.  In order to visually capture this breathtaking event forever, two professional videographers will be filming with state-of-the-art cameras and a drone. This crew also includes an on-site sound engineer who will be taking a field recording of the performance, plus an editor. Other Production Costs: 4.) Permits. These include permission to use the premises of the waterfall for the project and permission to park on site. 5.) Insurance and Liability Costs. In exchange for your help in bringing this dream to life, the Taalim School has curated a list a very special rewards. Please check them out,  and thank you so much for your support! Every little bit of help adds up! Check out our official Rhythmic Freefall t-shirts! About our Director and Mentor,  Pandit Divyang Vakil Pandit Divyang Vakil (known as Guruji, or “respected teacher”) is a rhythm composer and teacher.  Balancing the traditional guru-shishya parampara with a modern touch, he has developed his own teaching pedagogy for today’s student. With thousands of compositions to his name, Pandit Vakil has helped shaped a contemporary form of classical tabla, and expanded beyond tabla as a rhythm composer with his works for jangu (Korean barrel drum), standard drum kit, cajon, and other percussion instruments. His tabla work has a contemporary feel while carrying the essence and richness of the classical art form. Some his group tabla compositions include Tabla Tarkhat, Power of Tabla, Tabla Triveni and Tabla Ecstasy, many of which are performed by his ensemble, Talavya. His latest work, Pradhanica, explores how rhythm unites dance and music and was created for kathak dance, tabla, djembe, and cajon. Pandit Divyang Vakil We appreciate your interest in our project and in helping us produce this exciting event! With Love, from the Taalim School of Indian Music

title: Najazara:  - A Fusion of Jazz and African Drumming
description: Najazara combines elements to make sparks! The name Najazara is a combination of our names - Najite, Aziz, Art and Richard. Everything about our band has to do with combinations - ancient and modern, Nigerian style and Senagalese style, free-flowing-in-the-moment improvisation jazz and traditional, highly synchronized African drum ensemble patterns, tight compositions and wide open sonic outreach, etc. What emerges from this mixture is sparks! -  the creation of sometimes new and unique forms of music that surprise, stimulate and vibrate the mind/body. Best of all, we really enjoy playing with each other and are looking forward to adding bass and guitar. Some background. Prior to forming Najazara , we were part of a group called Tribaljazz http://www.hiddenbeach.com/discover/tribaljazz This was a seven piece group formed by Art Ellis with John Densmore, master trance drummer and co-founder of The Doors. Featuring Art's original music, we recorded for Hidden Beach Records, with distribution by Universal Music. We played a lot of great gigs, from jazz clubs such as Catalinas's in LA, to The San Jose Jazz Festival - we even opened for Obama twice! As mentioned in the narrative to our video, in all cases, people seemed to like the jazz part of Tribaljazz - and we had some amazing keyboard players such as Quinn Johnson and David Garfield, as well as bass players Carlitos DelPuerta and Osama Affifi. But what people loved was when the drums took over! The venue would become a spaceship. All barriers broken down - young, old, rockers, jazz freaks, Latino, Asian - it didn't matter. There was literally an explosion of joy and love when Aziz would take the stage and lead the audience in a mass trance-dance. We once got 3,000 people up and dancing at the Dorothy Chandler Pavilion in LA for the PBS Christmas Show! (the sexy tuxedo crowd). Time to record! How will your help and financial support make this happen? Tribaljazz has since ended, but we want to continue with a passion like never before.  First, we'll use the money to record live in our favorite studio, engineered and guided by our long-time friend, great musician and Uber Sound Meister Franz Pusch (he's from Austria - www.vrsound.com ). At this point we'll expand the band to 6 pieces and add bass and guitar, while still retaining some more open grooves such as you hear in the video (which was "composed" right before the session).Then, we'll master, post on our website, press the CD and push the music out as far as we can at colleges, clubs, concerts and festivals. We envision this as the most ideal life we can imagine - performing music around the world that is non-egocentric and a pure joy to play and perform. So - how does Kickstarter work? The way Kickstarter works is when you pledge your support, Amazon holds the funds until we reach our funding goal. Once the goal is reached or (if we're lucky) exceeded, then we receive the money and start blasting away - and everyone gets the rewards they signed up for. If we don't reach our goal, in one month, then the whole deal is off - no money, no recording or touring. So, please pass this page on to your friends and network. Our website is coming soon - you can also contact us with questions at najazara@gmail.com Thanks! Art, Najite, Aziz and Rich

title: Categories
description: A children's book about overcoming challenges, believing in yourself, and finding your inner warrior! Courageous Camila,  will help families & young children who have always been curious about martial arts or any other sport.  Readers will be inspired & motivated to start their own journey! Our children learn subjects like math, writing, and history in school, but this book provides a map on a critical skill that is not typically taught in the classroom: Courage. Readers will follow Camila's journey to finding her " inner warrior," as she faces challenges like trying a new sport,  overcoming obstacles and believing in herself. Courageous Camila is set in multicultural Los Angeles, and although Camila lives near many exciting things - it is only now that she begins to explore new activities that help her tap into her inner warrior .  Camila also learns courage from the everyday people that surround her. In this first book of the "Courageous Camila" series, Camila is encouraged by her Mama to begin taking martial arts classes.  Although the sport is at first intimidating, together they ride the waves of excitement, fear, disappointment, until she finally taps into her "inner warrior" and ultimately finds her courage. Camila is intrigued by the martial arts class Camila tries a new sport Camila finds her Courage! LESSONS IN BOOK: Trying new things Perseverance Self-Confidence The benefits of sports go well beyond the physical—and well beyond the playing field. builds self-confidence and self-esteem teamwork leadership social skills discipline managing emotions Good news! You have the option of "adding-on" other products with Kickstarter's NEW add-on feature! Besides the reward tier you choose, you will also have the option of buying extras with your order, including an author reading, stickers, and other books from the Con Todo Press library. For more info on other CON TODO PRESS titles visit: contodopress.com or follow me on Instagram @contodopress Where the Kickstarter funds will go:

title: Categories
description: Time to lift that mask and Talk about Emotions! According to Kindergarten teachers, social-emotional skills are the most important factor in children's readiness for school. Research shows kids who can name and recognize emotions in themselves and others are better prepared to succeed in school and beyond, deal with challenges, and clearly communicate their needs. Feeling Sad Over the last year, we've all had some difficult emotions to deal with. And recognizing those emotions has become very challenging, with masks and social distancing complicating social-emotional learning. As the pandemic is slowly getting under control (we hope!), it's time to turn that experience into an opportunity! This book was born out of our experience as parents in 2020. Our daughter Maya grew up into a bizarre world of masks, virtual music classes, and family gatherings on Zoom. Like many others, we’ve struggled to explain the world we currently live in to our sweet little human in a way that felt positive and empowering. We started wondering: How can we teach our child these social-emotional skills when everyone's facial expressions are covered by masks? Feeling Silly It started as an art project. Maya and I drew pictures of emotions and made cloth masks to lift, like in the lift-the-flap books we love to read. We called it “Unmasking Feelings.” This is what our first prototype looked like: Images of Our First Paper Prototype We were so inspired, that our entire family spent the last couple of months turning this idea into a print-ready board book. We designed it to be inclusive and educational, and everyone we shared it with loved it too. Kids were excited to flip the mask flaps again and again, and parents said it helped them start empowering conversations about both recognizing emotions and mask-wearing. Feeling Surprised As a special thanks to our early supporters, we also created a variety of well-designed educational materials that will make the Unmasking Feelings experience even better! They include a Parent Guide about teaching kids to recognize emotions, a Do It Yourself (DIY) printable activity, and a series of beautiful educational posters. A Few of Our Educational Posters Now, all we need is your help to make this book a reality. We have a print-ready design and a self-publishing partner all lined up, all we're missing is the funds to get started. We hope you’ll support our project. You can also show your support by helping us spread the word! Share a link to the campaign on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, or any other social media platform. ** This lift-the-mask board book is dedicated to the medical staff who risked everything to keep us all safe during the pandemic. If we reach our funding goal, we would be donating a dozen books to Children's Hospitals and Little Libraries across the nation in their honor! Thank you backers! Please share the love!

title: Categories
description: What Is Nanny Magazine ? Our Mission By publishing a magazine uniquely geared toward nannies, Nanny Magazine provides a resource offering advice, ideas, and a dose of care to those who spend their whole careers caring for others. About Nanny Magazine Nanny Magazine is a bimonthly publication designed for nannies who care for children ranging in age from newborn through age 18. The magazine also has a heavy online presence that continually connects nannies with one another and informs the public about what is going on today in the life of a nanny. The magazine’s tagline, teach.play.love, embraces everything that Nanny Magazine provides for its readers. Teach. Nanny Magazine covers education at all levels, for both the child and the nanny. We will provide engaging content to give nannies easy access to the latest news in pediatric health, like the latest trends in word recognition, so that they are fully equipped to do their job. But we also cover education for the nannies – professional education, tax education, and contract education, just to name a few. Like any other professional, nannies need to have the tools they need to be successful in their careers. Play. Nanny Magazine understands the value of play. Our readers are active influences in the lives of their charges, whether running around outside pretending or sitting contentedly inside creating. To encourage this behavior, we provide nannies with many how-to ideas and advice on how to keep the kids happy, healthy, and exploring their world through play. Love. Nanny Magazine is all about love. Validating a nanny’s love for a child, embracing a child’s love for their nanny, respecting a parent’s love for a child, sustaining a nanny’s love for themselves and their job, and tempering too much love when needed. Nannying is a profession of caring, but those nonparental relationships can often be difficult to navigate. Nanny Magazine provides support and advice for readers to manage this tricky aspect of the job. Just a sample of some of the amazing articles on our website! What Makes Nanny Magazine Different Nanny Magazine is the only magazine in the United States published just for nannies. That’s right – the only one. Although parenting and family magazines are often read by nannies, the only real resources that are just for American nannies are blogs, newsletters, forums, and each other. Real nannies who care about their field want a magazine just for them. Parenting and family magazines don’t adequately cover the subjects nannies want to read about the most, such as tax issues, ethical dilemmas that are specific to nannying, falling in love with someone else’s child, and how to quit with grace when it’s time to move on. Nannies want to read real-life advice and research that is specific to their chosen career path; that’s something a parenting magazine just can’t provide. Why We Need You Nanny Magazine is preparing to go to print next January, but there is so much to do before then! We need your help to get the ball rolling! Here’s a breakdown of our costs and what the $8,500 we hope to raise would go to. 32% - Printing Costs: This covers all printing costs for our first issue of Nanny Magazine . How cool! 32% - Advertising: Before nannies can start using us as a resource, they need to know about us! Help us get our name out there through list rentals and strategic ad placements to help us increase our visibility. 18% - Startup Fees: This includes things like incorporation fees. We want to be legitimate and start this business off right by filing our LLC paperwork. 2% - Legal Fees: We want to make sure we’ve crossed all of our T’s and dotted all of our I’s. To make sure we’re on the up and up, we need to talk with a couple of lawyers about things like copyright and trademark. 6% - Website Fees: We want to keep bringing our readers great content through our website, but everything comes with a cost… Who We Are Nanny Magazine ’s editors are well qualified to bring this publication to its intended audience. The result of combining our backgrounds in graphic design, writing, editing, and publishing with our backgrounds in nannying, childcare, and education has never been more natural. Editor Jennifer Kuhn is a writer/editor based in the DC Metro area. She holds a Master’s degree in Publishing from the George Washington University and a Bachelor’s in English from Eastern Connecticut State University. She has written for 303 Magazine (Denver-based fashion magazine), The Frisky , XOJane , Spirits Literary Magazine , Southern Writer Magazine , and numerous other publications. In her free time, Jennifer is a freelance copy editor for major association publications, and is familiar with a variety of editorial styles. But before all of this, Jennifer was a… drumroll, please… nanny! Jennifer has worked for four families as a nanny, and her experiences brought her from her home state of Connecticut to the Jersey Shore, Long Island, New York, and finally the Washington, DC area. Editor Whitney Tang is a freelance writer, graphic design artist, and most importantly, a nanny! Whitney has a Bachelor’s Degree in Creative Writing from Loyola University of Chicago and is finishing up her degree in Graphic Web Design. She runs her own nanny-centered website, The Naptime Nook, and writes the weekly column “Wednesdays with Whitney” for Be the Best Nanny . But the best part of her day involves a lot less typing and a lot more mess making, with glitter and flour being the usual suspects! With the help of a dedicated street team to help spread the word and contributors from around the country, Nanny Magazine has the potential to be hugely influential with its target demographic. In Nanny Magazine' s first year, authors with a diversity of expertise are scheduled to publish articles on hot topics like guns in the workplace, obesity, and autism. Our roster of authors includes professional freelance writers, PhDs, veteran nannies with years of experience working with children, agency staffers, well-followed real-life Moms from the blogosphere, and subject-matter experts in autism and pediatrics. We’ve got all the bases covered. Sample of our Facebook activity. Nannies Want Nanny Magazine Here’s what some of them have to say: @SavannahHankins: Why hello hello @NannyMagazine where have you been all my life? Australian Nanny Association: What a fantastic idea! NannyPay Payroll Software: Great idea. We look forward to your launch! The Numbers Don't Lie Since the launch of our Facebook account in mid-March 2013, Nanny Magazine has reached a tremendous number of viewers and potential subscribers. Check out some of these insights regarding our social media engagement from Visual.ly to see why we are confident that we will succeed. We think this is pretty huge! Let the numbers do the talking; Nanny Magazine has a huge reach in under two months of existence! Just wait until we REALLY get started!

title: Categories
description: This Kickstarter campaign is to help publish and market a book I wrote about my father (and his sidekick in real life, Penny, a now 17 year old beagle). Funding for this project will assist in self publishing the book as well as a marketing program to increase it's reach across the country. The reward for participating in this Kickstarter is a hardcover copy of the first batch of books signed by myself, my father, and a pawprint from Penny. That being said, let me give you a small backstory on how this book was born.  It starts with my Dad... Tony. Not much more can be said about him than he's one of the good ones.  My family and I are lucky to have him. This book was written as a birthday present to him, poking fun at his famous summer barbeques taking a backseat to his love of animals.  Him and his sidekick Penny care for and feed all sorts of animals most normal people (and beagles) would hire an exterminator to remove.  As a result, the yard is overrun with critters, forcing him to find a new venue for his annual 4th of July party. The funniest part of this book is that it is a true story. The most exaggerated part out of all the ridiculous things mentioned, is that I have never seen a squirrel eating ramen at his house.  I just needed something to rhyme there, and thought it would be a funny illustration. Feeding cats spaghetti, turkeys perching on his car, renting a churchyard to host his annual 4th of July bash due to his new hobby of caring for non-domesticated animals.... All true. If you are from Staten Island/West Brighton, there is a strong chance he has purchased you a coffee.  Or something else just to make you happy. That being said, I self published a single "test" copy to give to him for his birthday. Anyone who has read it loves it, and Tony has been pushing me to print more copies. So, here I am asking for you to help Tony & Penny reach the world.  Your participation in this campaign will help me reach a broader market and have the first batch of books delivered. Thanks for reading the story behind this book and I hope you invest in the project and read the book next.

title: Precious Plastic Pinellas Workspace to Recycle Plastic Waste
description: Equipment needed to grind, melt, and mold plastic waste Precious Plastic Pinellas is part of a global community of people working together towards a solution for plastic waste pollution. Knowledge, tools and techniques are shared online, for free. So everyone can start (yes, you too!). Precious Plastic’s was started in 2013 by Dave Hakkens and is now at its third iteration (version) counting on dozens of people working on the project, remotely or on site (somewhere below sea level in the Netherlands). 8 MILLION METRIC TONS OF PLASTIC WASTE RESIDES IN OUR OCEANS ALONE https://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/oceans-plastic-fish-2050_us_569e9963e4b00f3e986327a0 BY 2050 THERE WILL BE MORE PLASTIC IN OUR OCEANS THAN FISH IN THE SEA I want to join the fight against plastic pollution! Will you join me? I am here as an independent collaborator who would like to bring this process to my community. I would like to emphasize the importance of keeping our beaches, oceans, and our whole environment free of plastic waste. This will help lead us towards a cleaner planet and will in effect, inspire others to  join in on the movement. This work-space will be an organization that will support community awareness about plastic waste pollution. Proceeds will go toward plastic waste management, work-space rental and equipment, and promoting educational awareness about enviromental effects on ocean/marine life and  plastic pollution solutions. Our goal is to have as many recycle cans as there are trash cans around Pinellas county. This also helps support Florida's goal of a 75% rate of waste recycling in the state by 2020 https://floridadep.gov/waste/waste-reduction/content/recycling Plastic concept Visit our website www.preciousplasticpinellas.org Follow us on Instagram www.Instagram.com/preciousplasticpinellas Become a monthly supporter on Patreon www.patreon.com/preciousplasticpinellas Like us on Facebook www.fb.com/preciousplasticpinellas Below is one of the many videos on youtube by Dave Hakkens that breaks down the process of small space plastic recycling If you would like to know more about the Precious Plastic global project or are interested in becoming a collaborator yourself, please visit www.preciousplastic.com where you can learn more about how precious plastic started. Once you join,  you to can also download the plans, pictures, and blueprints yourself, while also getting your own community involed. There’s are also step by step "how to" videos that can help you along the way. I am looking to backers to help fund the work space and equipment.I will be building most of the equipment myself, with some help from a metal worker to weld and laser cut parts needed and also volunteers/friends. Some part can also be fabricated from a few different companies, others can be bought online or through other collaborators.The fully built equipment isn’t sold online and must be bought in separate pieces and assembled. Some parts are very inexpensive, where others such as the motors that bring the equipment to life are a little more expensive to purchase. Funding from backers will go towards the purchase of all parts needed, assembly, fabrication of equipment. Another portion will go towards purchasing or renting a work space, ensuring its inviting and safe with some renovations depending on choices and location in association with local laws. There will also be promotional fees, possible permit and licensing fees associated with location and plastic fabrication, depending on where the work-space will be located in Pinellas County. I would also like to purchase or fabricate plastic waste recycling bins for people to place their plastic waste in, instead of throwing it in the trash where it ends up in a landfill. A portion of proceeds will also go towards shipping costs and kick starter. A Portion of all sales made from the pieces sold from this plastic waste startup once we have it going will go towards, plastic waste recycling educational awareness and promotion of our small space plastic recycling workshop to help inspire others to do the same in their communities. Here is another video promo on the precious plastic process I believe each and every human being has it in them to do what is right for the planet. Earth and all it’s inhabitants need us now more than ever to clean up the tangled web we have woven of waste plastic pollution in our oceans, our food, and most inevitably in our very own body’s from the foods we eat. We need to come together to help clean up the planet and that’s where you come in- If 5,000 people backed this project for $2.00 If 10,000 people backed this project by $1.00 If 20,000 people backed this project by 0.50 cents or If 40,000 people backed this project by 0.25 cents then this kickstarter goal will be met and this start up could become a reality. You will be apart of something special, something global. You will be one of the few encouraging others to join the fight against plastic pollution on planet earth. We have to act now and start thinking about future generations and the effects plastic waste pollution will have. 700 YEARS - THE AMOUNT OF TIME IT TAKES FOR PLASTIC WASTE TO DEGRADE NATURALLY IN THE ENVIRONMENT Anyone who backs this project by $1.00 will receive a special gift(Key chain) made out of recycled plastic as a special Thank You for supporting Precious Plastic Pinellas. We also have other gifts available such as a recycled plastic bowl, Precious Plastic Pinellas t-shirts or a recycled plastic clock. If this project is not fully backed by January 18, 2018 the project will not be funded and no charge will be made to any account Here is one last video about how plastic waste can be used in 3d printing We can do this if we work together. We can make plastic waste an ecofriendly, sustainable rescource. It will take time, patience, and dedication to create awareness, but together, anything is possible. Thank you so much for your support!

title: Categories
description:
We're Back! It's been two and half years since we launched our last successful Kickstarter campaign and it's been such an incredible journey with many wonderful experiences and lessons learned. During this time we had many requests from our fans wanting a desktop version of our class leading CNC machines. While we offer medium and large sized CNC machines, we never had an option for those with small spaces so research and development went underway. We didn't want to simply make a smaller and less capable version of our current lineup of CNCs, so we always had two goals in mind. The first was that we would offer the same level of cutting performance as our larger models no matter what. Resorting to using a dremel or a low powered 50-300 watt spindle like on other machines out there was simply not an option. The second goal was to push the machine's precision to a level way beyond anything we had done before. We believe we exceeded those goals. Introducing The Routakit M Series The new Routakit M series has all the perks of a larger cnc in a fraction of the size. It stands a little under 2 feet height and is an easy fit for smaller work stations. The Routakit M series comes in two models, the M and the M Pro. The M is the standard model offering 8x6 inches of cutting area with a 600w spindle, while the M Pro offers a greater cutting area of 12x8 inches, an upgraded 1.5kw spindle, and an optional rotary axis for making 3D parts. Whether you're new to CNC machines or you already own one, we are confident that our new Routakit M series will take your projects to the next level. Routakit M Routakit M Pro Some Examples of what the Routakit M Can Do Work with a variety of materials Engrave fine detail (1/16" ball nose end mill used) Etch PCB with extreme precision Cleanly cut metal such as aluminum Etch fine text (Using a .1mm tip bit) The word "Test" etched Etched Routakit logo using dot pattern style Specifications Dimensions: 380 x 400 x 530 mm / 15 x 15.75 x 20.85 in (Measured from base)

 ​ Travel: ~200 x 150 x 100 mm   /  8 x 6 x 4 in Rapids: ​4000mm/min (160in/min)- Direct Drive,
    1800mm/min (70 in/min- Pulley Reduction Drive ​Step Resolution: ~0.0003mm/.00001in​​ (With Pulley Reduction Drive) Repeatability: ~.003mm/.0001in (With Pulley Reduction Drive)

 ​ Drive System: Custom Machined Ball Screw ​Stepper Motor: Nema 23 175oz/in (x3)

 ​ Plate Material: 6061-T6 Aluminum

 ​ Rail Material: 6061-T6 Aluminum Spindle: 600w, ER11 Collet, 6k to 13k working RPM Dimensions: 480 x 500 x 530 mm / 18.9 x 19.7 x 20.86 in (Measured from base)

 ​ Travel: ~300 x 200 x 100 mm / 12 x 8 x 4 in Rapids: 4000mm/min (160in/min) - Direct Drive
,  1800mm/min (70in/min)- Pulley Reduction Drive Step Resolution: ~0.0003mm/.00001in​​ (With Pulley Reduction Drive) Repeatability: ~.003mm/.0001in (With Pulley Reduction Drive) Drive System: Custom Machined Ball Screw Stepper Motor: Nema 23 175oz/in (x2)
, Nema 23 345oz/in (x1) Plate Material: 6061-T6 Aluminum Rail Material: 6061-T6 Aluminum Spindle: 1.5kw, ER11 Collet, 9k to 24k working RPM Rotary Axis add-on available Our Secret Sauce In order to achieve high levels of cutting performance and extreme precision we designed our machines to be highly rigid using .25" thick 6061-T6 aluminum plates and high strength extrusions. In conjunction with our custom industrial grade ball screws the Routakit M series is able to house heavier duty spindles over the competition and increase your productivity with faster and more accurate cuts. With our optional pulley reduction drive you can take precision to a whole other level giving you incremental spindle and table movements as small as .00001" (one hundred-thousandth of an inch), that's over 350 times thinner than the average thickness of human hair! Robust 16mm Wide Ball Screw Smooth and Precise Movement Pulley Reduction Drive on Z-axis 600w spindle (Left), 1.5kw spindle (Right) What's included? We are offering three kit levels with each model that will meet various needs and budgets. The first level is called the "Skeleton Kit" and is aimed at users who simply just want the bare bones with the freedom to pick and choose various electronics, spindles, and accessories. The Routakit M features many mounting hole patterns for different branded electronic boards so you are not limited to just Planet CNC boards. Other compatible electronic boards include the PoKeys57CNC for users that want to use Mach3 or Mach4, as well as the TinyG and xPro allowing for maximum flexibility. Skeleton Kit includes: Anodized aluminum plates Custom ball screws (x3) Pre-cut extrusions & rails Assembly hardware The second level is called the "Starter Kit" and is aimed at users that want a functioning machine from the supplied parts. Some accessory items and upgrades are not included such as the pulley reduction drive and bellows. Starter Kit includes: Skeleton Kit T-slot Work bed Spindle with mount Nema 23 stepper motors (x3) Motor driver boards (x3) Power supply Assembly hardware for starter kit Planet CNC MK3/4 Controller Planet CNC software license The third level is called the "Full Kit" and includes all the upgrades and accessories that we offer. This is for the user that want's maximum performance, cleanliness, and that doesn't want to deal with the hassle of hunting down other parts to fully complete their machine. For the M Pro model a rotary lathe is even included to allow for the creation of 3D parts. Full Kit includes: Starter Kit Pulley reduction drive set (x3) U-shaped bellows (x4) Adjustable feet Dust shoe Rotary Lathe (M Pro model only) Adjustable Feet Rotary Lathe Add-on Custom Made Bellows Dust Shoe Lathe mounted onto Routakit M Pro Routakit M Full Kit with Dust Shoe Attached Let's Kickstart This Project! Producing and purchasing parts in bulk is a huge investment but is necessary to be able to bring a new product like this into market. Like our previous campaign if we are fully funded we will use the funds to fulfill all rewards and build up an inventory so that we can continue offering these amazing new machines that we hope will push new boundaries in the DIY community. We can't wait to see what everyone will make with the new Routakit M series and we hope to gain your support so we can bring it into reality! On another note, while we would love for you to support our project we know that the Routakit M may not be for everyone so if you're in the market for a CNC machine but you want something larger than a desktop model please visit us at www.routakit.com and check out our other selections, we have something for everybody. Track us at:

title: Categories
description: A wearable, "learning" device that makes you and your dog smarter and better looking.   ;-) Read all our news releases here . Have you ever been humiliated when your new friends come over and your dog proceeds to jump all over them no matter what you say? Well, YOU, my friend, need a WÜF! Have you ever been terrified or brought to tears when your dog ran away from home and you thought you’d never see your best friend again?? Then WÜF is perfect for you. Have you ever missed your dog so much when away at work and wish you had a way to check in and say hi? Well, you guessed it - WÜF is for you too! Have you ever been concerned about your dog’s health, wondering if he’s getting the exercise he needs or if you’ll even know when to bring him to the vet? WÜF is happy to help you. Have you ever wished that your dog respect you more and was better under your control? Then you’ve come to the right place because WÜF is definitely for you! WÜF is a dog collar unlike any that have come before. WÜF is not just for training or tracking, but rather for learning. With a unique combination of hardware, tucked inside a beautifully designed case, WÜF studies and understands your dog’s movements, sounds, activities, locations and interactions , in order to gather a full picture of his lifestyle and habits. Once WÜF understands who your dog is, we start to learn what sort of relationship you and your dog have together. From the walks you go on, to the way you talk to each other and what your favorite playtime activity is. This learning allows us to provide simple and actionable ways to improve on the major challenges (barking, pulling on leash, anxiety, etc.) and find even more ways to bond and play (new games at the park, advanced training, etc.). With one suggestion a day, our goal is simple, to help dog owners around the world have a Good Dog, Every Day. Inputs Microphone - We can hear when he barks, understand the type of bark and even listen for external causes for the bark.This allows us to recognize patterns in his barking that help us find the root of the bark rather than addressing the symptom. GPS - Main purpose is for peace of mind that your pup is never lost, but also handy to show us where they go on a daily basis.Do they have a perimeter that they must inspect every morning and what does this say about them being territorial? Accelerometer - Measuring their activity to see when they are most (in)active, how much they sleep during the day and how far the walker really walked them to learn how many calories they burn so we know how much to feed them. Bluetooth - BLE (Low Energy) connects to “smart” devices inside and outside the house to exchange information about location, proximity, speed and more. Can be used to snap a picture from your DropCam, to turn on the DOG TV, or even to detect if he’s going in a room he doesn’t belong in. Outputs Speaker - Say “hi” when you are missing them at work, work on obedience through voice commands or enable the invisible leash for off-leash control (more on that below). There are so many possibilities for training, safety and games when you can talk to your dog from anywhere. Vibration - More humane than a shock while still useful for getting his attention. Bluetooth - Constant connection with smartphone to share information about distance apart, “Best Friend Time” and other contextual data. GSM - Utilizing the 2g/3g networks, we keep your family connected around the world, even when separated by oceans and time zones. By pre-ordering through our Kickstarter campaign, you will receive your WÜF before anyone else in the world, you can get a limited edition color, you can become a beta tester (ask us!), you can get a full year of premium for free , you have a voice in our final development and you also help a startup bring a powerful idea to life . We take care of our friends. C ontribute today and let us show you how. :-) We believe that the training industry is ripe for a rethink . Everyday, we witness owners who have the best intentions but a lack of guidance in getting the “dog of their dreams”. With trends like “flipping the classroom”, MOOCs or Gamified language learning, the traditional ways that we learn are being challenged and updated. WUF is doing the same thing for dog training. With fun, daily exercise, supported by data , WUF is bringing a whole new concept to becoming the pack leader to fit our active, mobile lives. "No more lost dogs" is just the beginning! GPS is vital, but is only just scratching the surface of what's possible with WÜF. Through customer development, speaking with hundreds of owners, trainers and vets, we looked at the entire relationship to discover what would be most useful in a "wearable" device. This led to our unique and patent-pending combination of hardware, including microphone and speaker, to inspire a whole new slew of capabilities and benefits . Because, having a dog is a lifestyle and every way we can learn how to bring more balance to it, means healthier and better behaved pups living with happier families, friends and neighbors. Some of the things we’ve mentioned above have been tried before. The GPS and activity tracking are obvious , with several startup companies creating products that do just that, while training products have been around for years that include shock, vibration and anti-bark methodologies. Not a single one of these products is taking the approach that WUF has invented, turning a product that is always with your dog into a learning device that recognizes, analyzes and advises in real time. Finally an e-collar that looks cool. Our device is sleek, modern and attractive . Further, it comes in multiple colors and has an interchangeable system so you can accessorize and personalize your pup’s look . Just imagine, vibrant orange for a trip to the park, cool grey when walking around town and camo for the weekend in the woods. Close up of our latest prototype Renderings of WÜF's Two Main Colors Latest Renderings with SAMPLE Collars Rendering of WÜF internals WÜF's smartphone app follows the " Freemium " app model. There is a core version that will ALWAYS BE FREE alongside multiple ways to upgrade the experience with a-la-carte Premium Features . Learn more about our Free and Premium features in the FAQs below. Industrial Design By splitting the product into two pieces, the Brains and the Case , our collar allows dog owners around the world to find the perfect style to express their (dog's) personality . We are launching with a couple core cases, with the future of "WÜF Wear" holding unlimited options to personalize your pup's look. Externally, our approach combines an appealing, minimalist design with a soft, yet durable, outer case, creating a contoured feel for comfort and a eye-catching look for self-expression. Internally, we’ve designed the electronics to maximize space, providing for optimal battery capacity and antenna reception. Fitting inside a waterproof shell, the brains can pop into and out of any case you want. Safe As the technologies are the same as in human smartphones, they have been extensively tested and approved for humans to use, let alone dogs. So, if you ever want to put one on your kid or significant other, they would be totally safe too! Disclaimer - WÜF is not responsible for any relationship issues that result from the above suggested idea. ;-p Biteproof So when your two 120 pound dobermans are roughhousing in the backyard, no matter who wins, WÜF comes out on top. The outer case is made of similar materials to the most durable dog toys while the “brains” are tucked away in a hard, molded plastic shell. Waterproof Go ahead, swim, roll in the mud, take a shower, do what dogs do! Our smart collar device will stay fully functional, safe and dry up to at least 1 meter of water. Shockproof Considering the playful nature of dogs, WÜF collar device must be shockproof . All the delicate electronics are enclosed in a rigid enclosure protected by a flexible outer cover for plenty of ample cushioning. Main Hardware Features Accelerometer Our 6 axis motion processing unit captures the entire range of doggie movements. We can detect and learn all about your dog's favorite ways to move: Movement: Up, down, left, right, forward, backward. Positioning: lean right/left, bend forward/backward, turn side/side. GPS Our 48 channel GPS includes advanced power saving modes and assisted tracking; we can track your pup’s movements in dense city environments and deep wooded areas. Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Bluetooth 4.1, the industry's latest standard. Our algorithms automatically default to BLE when in range so as to maximize its extreme power saving advantages. Cellular + IoT network CURRENT: Quad band 2G and 3G enabled. Cellular networks enable WÜF to connect to your smartphone when away from your pup. FUTURE: IoT networks like Helium or SigFox are currently being evaluated for potential use in first generation product. Processor ARM cortex microprocessor with dedicated digital signal processing unit. The heart of the device has its own embedded operating system, swiftly managing all of the functionality and features. Intelligent Power Management Power management IC with over-voltage, under-voltage and short circuit protection connected to Lithium Polymer battery. Current setup achieves 5 day battery life on second generation prototype. Goal is to make it so you never have to take the collar off to charge, with new wireless charging technologies hopefully making that possible. Main Software Features GPS Tracking + Geo Fencing Peace of mind to always know where your dog is. Let's work together to a future with no more lost dog signs! Set the “fence” around your yard and if your dog leaves the area, you’ll be be notified to start tracking immediately. Activity Monitoring Charts and graphs are cool for a bit, but eventually get old. We calculate it all for you and give you the one metric that really matters for your dog's health: How much do I feed my dog today? Beyond that, we’ll provide ongoing suggestions to live a healthy, active lifestyle based on age, breed, season and location to get you off the couch and keep you moving! Two-Way Audio A “smart microphone” listens in and sends you alerts if your dog is barking a lot, crying, whining, growling or whimpering unexpectedly. A powerful speaker allows you to talk to your dog from anywhere in world, whether to check in when away at work, or to train with manual or automatic commands such as “sit”, “stay”, “down” and more. Invisible Leash The off-leash control you’ve always wanted! Let your pup wander: just set the perimeter around you and WÜF will keep him as close or far as you desire. Based on two-way audio, vibration and our included training program (think “advanced clicker training”) whenever your dog approaches the perimeter, it’ll receive a series of commands to: a) stop, b) listen and c) come on back to you to get a treat or affection! Training Bite sized training programs to build you up into the family’s top dog trainer, 10 minutes at a time. Games Few ideas: 1) Augmented reality RPG with you and your dog as the main characters. 2) Geo-Caching with your dog in on the hunt. 3) The Quiet Game :-) Have an idea for a cool game? Connect with us and lets build it together. Gamification At the end of the day, living with a dog should be FUN! Our platform adds Gamification elements to encourage, support and reward you for doing the tough stuff, while throwing in some competition for you and your fellow dog “parent” friends. The Hardware Evolution From development boards strewn across a desk to a tight, 2x quarter sized PCB with dozens of components nested into a compact design. The Software Evolution Just like the hardware, our software has gone through several iterations. From an MVP app (below) that proves the concept, to a fully immersive UX that highlights only the most important things for you, each day. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Color Gray is sleek while Orange has pop. Which one is best for your pup? Size How big is your pup? Our devices will come in a standard size range for small, medium, large/extra large dogs, based on the following collar widths: Large strap opening: 1 inch (2.54 cm), Medium strap opening: ¾ of an inch (1.9 cm), and Small strap opening: ⅝ of an inch (1.6 cm). We’ve gotten to this point as bootstrapping entrepreneurs, on what we like to say, “one tank of gas”. Now we are ready to FUEL UP and take things to the next level. We've garnered great support and excitement in our local networks and are now coming to Kickstarter to attain an initial market validation that we need to prove that this product is a winner and has the potential to improve the lives for millions of dog owners around the world. We need your help to prove this demand and enable WÜF to become a true market reality. Thank You! From left: Azmat, Sean and Lizelle in Boulder, Colorado Headquarters. Team WÜF is comprised of 6 incredible team members, and is headquartered in beautiful Boulder, Colorado, USA! We have literally lived and worked all over the world while making WÜF a reality. From Germany, to New York, Chicago, Paris, Pakistan, Boulder and Denver, our team has stuck together through all adversity one can imagine. We've stuck with it for a reason and are honored to finally bring our hard work to all of you. Azmat Billal - Head of Engineering Sean Kelly - CEO Jonathan Ozeran - CTO Lilly Rollins - Head of Customer Experience Todd Stockbauer - Consulting CFO Lizelle van Vuuren - CMO We also have an extensive group of brilliant advisors and mentors that stretch from veterinary doctors, electrical engineers, industrial designers and developers to enable our leadership team to stay focused on massive opportunity at hand. Long story short, we are not just a group of kids in a basement building a project, but rather a sharp, savvy and capable team combining some youthful exuberance with industry veterans to ensure that we build not just a product but a real company. We could not be doing this without these incredibly supportive companies. Thank you folks! Thank You Everyone! With your help, the future is looking bright! Follow WÜF online at: Twitter , Facebook , Instagram , Pinterest , Youtube , and Our Website .

description: WearME is your advanced wearable companion that you can use to Improve Your Health and Fitness sessions. Each WearME sensor can track your body posture and temperature, monitor your heart and lungs, and improve your health at home or when on-the-go. It consists of the smart sensor, custom jacket, and companion application. WearME is the first ever multi-modal sensing solution that can be used to capture both physiological and range-of-motion data at any point along the body. It is 4-in-1, EKG monitor, Digital Stethoscope, Temperature Sensor, and Motion tracker. You can connect up to 14 WearME sensors wirelessly for full body motion tracking. The WearME devices set up their own encrypted wireless body mesh network, so you don’t need a Wi-Fi connection. You simply turn on the WearME devices, insert them on desired pockets in the apparel and begin your exercise. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Most exercise use cases will only need up to 3 WearME sensors. For basic health monitoring and single joint posture tracking during exercise activities, you only need 1 WearME sensor. To track two joints simultaneously during exercises, you will need two WearME sensors. To track three joints simultaneously during exercises, you will need three WearME sensors. The WearME companion application is easy to use and includes a personal avatar that acts both as a data interpreter and personal trainer. You can customize your companion avatar to look like you or anyone you want. Customers love using the WearME. Here are some of the words from our WearME testers: You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 The WearME companion application is designed for an engaging experience . You can use the WearME companion application to configure your WearME sensors, view your body mesh data, track your exercises, and even connect with your personal trainer, physician, or physical therapist. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 The WearME sensors are available in 3 colors . All backers will receive a survey once the campaign ends to pick their favorite one! WearME is founded by a strong team with over 50 years of cumulative experience. We are backed by research from Intel and the National Science Foundation and have published peer-reviewed papers about WearME to top journals. This project is promoted by Jellop , the ad tech power behind the best Kickstarters with 1,100+ successful Kickstarter projects with over $460M raised between them.

description: You’d never think of Apps that bring you so much fun and make fitness so easy. Thanks to the powerful Fineck-Engine you can know your addition from app straightly. Neck pain can be caused by: Using your mobile devices with a bad posture, working long hours in the office, a long drive, etc. People of age 25-45 common have occupational diseases, 72% suffer pain on the shoulder muscles, 11% on the cervical nerves and 4% on the cervical artery. In fact, Neck activity is good for health. We have a solution now! Fineck is the first wearable device for you neck that tracks your neck activity and warn you when you are in a bad posture for too long. You can also exercise your neck with Fineck’s interactive games. Fineck™ is the world’s first titanium wearable device. Titanium is widely utilized in fashion accessories due to its lightweight, strong durability and lustrous appearance. It is the most ideal choice for all-day wearing and for those with skin allergy issues. No matter where are you and what you are doing: at office, on the go, or simply just feeling bored, Fineck™ will bring you enriched exercise experience through motion sensing games and therapies. Every little piece of MICRO-FITNESS contributes to a healthier life. With adorable interfaces and animation, you can have intuitive feedback of health information that is carefully analyzed. Fineck-Engine : Set goals, keep progress and Share with friends with one-click! We will be bringing more interactive games soon. These games will track your neck’s movement as inputs! Keeping your neck healthy has never been easier! Material and care Casing: Pure titanium Band: TPVIS medical grade silicone Caution: IP6 Water-proof, but not suitable for long-time underwater use. Size POWER AND BATTERY Rechargeable lithium-polymer battery,60min charge for up to 7days. Sensors and Interfaces BLE Accelerator and Gyroscope 4 LEDs and 1 motor showing different status Compatibility Compatible with iphone4s or later Ipod touch5Ipad3 ipad mini or later Android app is being developed Inbox Fineck Necklace User Manual USB Cable . We are the team of workaholics and smartphone geeks. We spend hours on the computer and smartphone every day and eventually we all started to suffer in neck pain. We figured we are not the only people suffering these problems and there must be a solution. We wanted to fix this problem in a novel way. We have tried many different pedometers and health tracking wearable device but none of these actually solved our problem. We knew there was a need for us to make a device that’s specific for the neck. That’s why we’ve created Fineck to help others that are also suffering the same pain. Fineck can track the movements of our neck and recognize the body postures, reminding you of your health status. By using those features, we make it possible that your neck can be the motion input for games on different platforms. Currently we’ve designed several cute games on iOS, which let you feel that exercising your neck can be so fun! With lots of effort, we’ve made much progress in the early stage, and recently 200 pieces of Fineck were produced and put into the user test session. We carefully collected feedback from the users and the analysis helped improving the user experience. Your pledges will pool together so that we can begin producing more Fineck.Kickstarter is just the beginning.You can also participate in the discussion and activity of promoting Fineck.

description: 中文介紹點這裡 In cold winter days, a nice scarf is what most people would instantly reach for to keep one’s neck area warm. But before your neck starts to feel warm, it’ll take a little time before your body temperature warms up the scarf. So we thought, wouldn’t it be even better if this scarf could generate warmth on its own? Active Portable Warmth Instead of putting on layers of clothes “ just “ to keep your body temperature at best, there is a better way. SUSTAIN Sport Heated scarf generates heat higher than your body temperature to fight off coldness, proactively provides the heat your body needs to feel warm right when you need it! SUSTAIN SPORT Heated scarf is a soft and lightweight scarf with an ultra-efficient graphene fiber heating core providing almost instant warmth. With the use of silver nano processed anti-bacterial fabrics, quick drying and breathable properties keep your neck comfortable at all times. Quickly absorbs moisture to keep you dry under the scarf. Quick adaption to climate changes Drastic climate change affects all us all. The temperature can drop 29 Fahrenheit (15 degrees) from the mid-day to the evening. We know you want a hassle-free garment. Graphene carbon fiber heating core, providing heat in 15 secs. 2 constant heat settings, 107 ℉/114℉ (42℃/46℃), can be easily toggled to fit your needs. Silver nano processed fabrics Silver nano is an effective agent in defending against bacteria. Since scarves are worn close to the mouth and nose area, it’s crucial to make this scarf anti-bacterial and allergen-free. ( Official test report included in the specs section ) Silver nano embedded particles protect against invading bacteria as soon as they are attached to the fabric. Ultra slim and soft Highly efficient and stable Waterproof and durable Graphene carbon fiber heating core Thanks to the ultra-efficient graphene carbon fiber heating system embedded in the SUSTAIN Sport Heated scarf, one full charge will keep your neck warm for more than 3 hours. Up to 3.5 hrs of use on one charge. ( Could vary under different ambient temperature conditions ). If you wish to use your own or a larger capacity power bank, you can make use of the USB extension cable included and leave the power bank in your pocket. Stay warm working on your PC or laptop, using the USB extension cable to get warmth wherever there is a powered USB plug. Easy to wear system - So quick and easy to wear Never get tangled up in long scarves again! Long scarves are often very bulky around the neck and can take a while to wrap on and unwrap. SUSTAIN heated scarf's easy to wear system enables you to put it on and take it off within seconds. Magnets stitched within the scarf, no more bulky wrapping around. These 2 ways of wearing lets you quickly adapt to the environment, so if you frequently move in-between indoors and outdoors, just simply change between the 2 ways. Far infrared emission SUSTAIN SPORT heated scarf uses a special fabric that induces far-infrared (FIR) emission when heated. The merits of FIR is that the warmth penetrates deeper under the skin and it creates a microclimate in between the neck and the scarf, making the heated scarf comfortable to wear without feeling dryness during wearing. After a long day at work spending a long time looking down on our smartphone and laptop, it is time to give your neck a good rest. Put on our comfortable warming scarf, sit back & relax the tense neck muscles. It is like the comfort of a hot towel on your neck, but it doesn’t get cold. It is arguably the most efficient personal heater you can own. You are keeping yourself warm on the only 5w of power, instead of wasting over thousands of watts of power heating up the whole room that you can’t feel instantly. Minimal, low keyed designed, it is so easy to match with your outfit. SUSTAIN SPORT Heated Scarf comes in Steel grey, Navy and Red. You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 Premium packaging makes a perfect gift for every occasion. Simply put in the power bank and press the button to start heating. Featured on CloudBT Australia - Keep toasty warm with the Sustain Sport Heated Scarf Started in 2013, HOMI CREATIONS was established for the causes of a seamless lifestyle we envision. The SUSTAIN collection was established to create advanced clothing, we have chosen a scarf to be our first product, because we know how people depend on it for extra warmth and how it could be carried with easily. Utilizing advanced technology, we blend in between different industries, we add in fashion elements and design in the fabrics we use, relying on traditional stitching works to finish the final product. SUSTAIN SPORT is a perfect collaboration across technology, design, fashion, and craftsmanship. To redefine the present way we live and things we use with simpler, easier, cleaner, minimalistic products, creating a modern and seamless lifestyle is what we envision and set out to achieve. 1. How do I clean SUSTAIN SPORT? We recommend to clean with a damp cloth and leave it dry before use again. You can also hand-wash if you wish, only to make sure the power bank has been taken out and the USB cap is on. Do not dry clean or tumble dry. 2. Will it overheat with time? The 2 heat settings are constant and they do not get hotter with time, for some sensitive groups, we suggest you to stop using it as soon as you feel the temperature is too high. 60 mins auto-shut off makes sure the contacted area gets a rest from heating. 3. How long will the heating last on one charge? With our designated power bank ( 4000 mah ), it could last in between 3 - 3.5 hrs depending on the given temperature conditions. You can also use the USB extension cable included to use your own power bank that might have a larger capacity. 4. How heavy is the scarf with the power bank? The total weight is 205g, this is lighter than most of the thicker scarves. During our test trial we have 50 female across all ages to try the scarf, only 1 had shown concerns about the weight while others do not feel any difference in comparison with their own regular scarves. 5. Can I use my own power banks? Yes, only our power bank is designed to put in to the hidden pocket in the scarf, if your power bank does not fit into the pocket, you can make use if the USB extension cable included. With our own power bank, you will be able to operate the button on the scarf without switching on the power bank. For other power banks, you might have to switch on the power bank before pressing the button on the scarf.

description:
100% Funded!!! You'll need an HTML5 capable browser to see this content. Play Replay with sound Play with sound 00:00 00:00 We're back and better than ever! This is where it all started. One year ago you supported our vision to make the world’s thinnest, warmest jacket — a jacket insulated with NASA spacesuit technology. The Kickstarter community and our early adopters believed in us before anyone else even knew we existed. You blew us away with your support and kicked off a worldwide movement! Now we're back. And this time, we mean business. The Orion Series can take you from the top of a mountain, back home, and everywhere in between. Traditional outerwear is cumbersome and boring! You have to wear big, bulky clothes and plenty of layers just to stay warm. What if you could wear thin gear with no layers and be perfectly warm whether you were on top of a mountain or relaxing with your friends? Using the same insulation NASA used in their space suits and space shuttles, OROS brings you its line of thin, warm performance apparel. No layers. No compromises. Aerogel, in geek terminology, is the lowest thermal conductive solid on the planet. Put simply, that means aerogel is the best insulator in existence! Today, aerogel is used by NASA as insulation in their space suits. It can trap space dust on space shuttles, de-ice aircrafts, and insulate some of the coldest oil pipelines in the world.
Aerogel is also very light. In fact, it would take 150 brick-sized pieces of aerogel to weigh as much as a single gallon of water!
So what does all this mean? When you invest in OROS performance apparel, you get a thin and warm garment that even the astronauts would be proud of. Solarcore Aerogel: We use a proprietary formulation of aerogel called Solarcore . It is the first aerogel suited for apparel with its incredible flexibility, hydrophobicity, durability, sound absorbency, and breathability all while maintaining the incredible insulation that aerogels are known for. Jacket: Available in Black & a second color to be selected by backers upon successful funding of the campaign. Beanie: Available in Grey & a second color to be selected by backers upon successful funding of the campaign. Gloves: Available in Black. Snow Pants: ONLY AVAILABLE IF WE REACH $500,000 IN FUNDING! Stretch Goals: Michael, Rithvik, and Max (left to right) are lifelong friends who share passions for two things: Science & Adventure. By uniting the two, they believe they can change the way people think about outerwear and performance wear. WHY WE MAKE OUTERWEAR: Science gets a bad rap. Many believe science can't be sexy. Well, OROS thinks otherwise. We appreciate the flowing locks of Albert Einstein and find talks on epigenetics to be stimulating. We believe in challenging the status quo and pushing the boundaries of what is possible. Using the same technology applied by the National Aeronautics and Space Agency (NASA) as insulation in their space suits, we made outerwear slimmer, warmer and sexier. Besides, it's the 21st century. Aren't we beyond wrapping ourselves in animal furs and goose feathers? OROS: OROS means mountain in Greek. But more than the gargantuan mass of land a rock formed by the clash of Earth's tectonic plates, OROS represents the challenge - and the accomplishment. The journey and the conquest. And the ultimate joy in achievement. Reward Tiers: Help us by sharing OROS Performance apparel with your friends! Know someone who would be just as stoked as you are about OROS Performance apparel? Share our campaign with them through the "Share this project" button at the top. Sharing is caring! Sizing charts: Our team consists of experts in industries ranging from fashion and design to apparel and aerogel engineering. We are all here to make sure the Orion series lives up to its name and you get your gear on time. Here is our plan to achieve that: February/March : Make tons of Kickstarter buddies, finalize the engineering and prototyping iterations, quality assurance, product validation April-July : Procurement of raw materials and components, shipping of aerogel to apparel manufacturer, begin manufacturing July-September : Conclude manufacturing, shipping of finalized product to distributor October : Delivery of jackets to Kickstarter friends and fulfillment of rewards!

title: Categories
description: Written by Ashley Bratcher and Scott Evans, Apricity is the story of two people meeting at a crossroads in their lives:  Alex, a high strung over-achiever on the brink of a breakdown; and John, a surface cool guy with deep rooted fears must both face their demons for true self discovery.  It explores the dynamic of human relationships and prompts the analysis of the role that others play in our journey. Storyboards by Tad Butler . Because we're passionate about stories that are thought provoking, leave the audience with something to talk about, and inspire them to make a change. I'm Ashley Bratcher , the writer, producer, and lead actress.  Most of you know me for my work in front of the camera and you may recognize me from my roles in 90 Minutes in Heaven, Princess Cut, and Badge of Faith .  What many of you don't know is that for the last several months I've been working hard behind the scenes, developing the script for Apricity and building a team of incredibly talented and passionate people to help bring my vision to life.  One of the first people to jump on board and believe in that vision was Scott Evans , who has played a pivotal part in getting this story off the ground. Scott is the co-writer and producer of the film and will also aid the team as a utility player.  No job is too big or too small for Scott and his vision and commitment to the project make him an invaluable asset to our team. Sean Michael Weber joins the cast in the role of John.  Sean is an up and coming actor from Rockville Centre, New York and a graduate of the University of North Carolina Wilmington.  His recent credits include the lead role in the Matthew Sefick cast film, Isle of Palms , working opposite Terry Serpico. Matt Batchelor will serve as Director of Photography.  His passion and vision bring a level of expertise and artistic excellence to the team.  His work speaks for itself and we are honored to have him on board. See Matt's work here: Be on the lookout for behind the scenes photos and beautiful shots from our incredible Still Photographer, Janet Adamson . ( JaImages.biz , Facebook ) Crew Costs: If you want to create an incredible finished product, you have to assemble an experienced and passionate crew. The problem is that these talented people are taking time out of their busy schedules to help bring this project to life and they need some sort of compensation in order to do so. Equipment Rental: You have a camera, great! But what about a lens? Oh, and lights, and microphones, and generators, etc? The list could go on and on. So much equipment is needed behind the scenes of a film set. Your donation would help ensure that we have the adequate materials needed to deliver a great product. Permits & Location Fees: Shooting a film in a public place calls for someone to coordinate the ability to do so. A lot of times it costs to shoot in certain places. Some of your donation will go to covering any of these costs that arise. Festival Fees & Marketing: So, we finish the film and it's fantastic! That is good news in and of itself, but there's more! What good is a great film if no one gets to see it. Entering film festivals and marketing your film can cost some money. Part of your donation will go to covering this cost. Craft Services: Ah, the forgotten cost of film making. Film crews work extremely hard and sometimes for long, grueling hours. Since this is the case, it is a necessity to keep them fed. Part of your donations will go to helping fund the catering of food for the duration of the shoot. Find answers to our FAQ here.

description: OURVINYL.TV is doing this campaign to fund our 2012 web series. About OurVinyl: OurVinyl.Tv is a service that allows people to discover new music through video. We shoot exclusive performances with independent artists, and upload new videos on a weekly basis. Being based out of the international music hub that is Nashville, TN, we are fortunate enough to have access to some of the most interesting and entertaining musical acts in the world. Our goal is not only to bring you new songs to listen to, but also to give indie artists an unprecedented form of exposure, at no expense to them. The Problem: Creating video content is no easy feat. Equipment is more affordable now than it has ever been, but it is still an expense we can’t handle on our own. Until this point, we have been renting the majority of the equipment we use to capture our videos (i.e. microphones, stands, cameras, lenses). Since we do not accept money from the artists we film, the video shoots have been setting us back significantly. As a result, we are not sure how much longer we will be able to continue making videos without going bankrupt! How you can Help: If we were able to own all of our the equipment we need, that would eliminate our rental expenses. If our rental expenses disappear, then we will be able to continue shooting these videos at little to no cost. We are asking for $6,000 to allocate towards new equipment. Each and every donation is greatly appreciated, and will help us finish our 2012 webseries. Every penny over this amount will just help us to deliver a higher quality product to our viewers. Your payment is processed through Amazon (and is as easy as buying a CD, Book or DVD from Amazon.com ). Your money is not taken until the project is funded in full. If the project is not funded, no money is taken. If we reach our goal, we promise to deliver the best videos we are capable of making. And, in addition, give you a simple interactive way to experience them. Make a donation today, and help keep the music alive! Our Generation, Our Way to Listen, OurVinyl.

title: The HAIR TV CHANNEL -First 24HOUR TV Channel all about HAIR!
description:
Hair Art NETWORK TV Join us in creating the First ever 100% Educational Hair Channel! Imagine all those day of Not knowing what to do with your Hair, GONE!
