title: CutStudio: A web-browser based design software for CNCs
description: CutStudio by WebCAM CNC Project Subtitle Browser-based CNC design software built for makers—no downloads, no complexity, no expensive software. Just open your browser and start creating. A product of WebCAM CNC LLC The Problem We're Solving If you've got a CNC router, laser cutter, or plasma table, you know the software struggle: - Pro software costs more than your machine ($500-$2,000+ for programs like VCarve or Fusion 360) - Free options are clunky and haven't been updated since 2010 - Learning curves are brutal - weeks of YouTube tutorials just to cut a simple sign - Locked to one computer - can't work on your design anywhere else - No community - you're figuring everything out alone You bought a CNC to make cool stuff, not to become a CAD engineer. You deserve software that's actually fun to use. Introducing CutStudio CutStudio is CNC design software that actually makes sense. Open any browser, sketch your idea, and get ready-to-cut files for your router, laser, or plasma cutter. No installation, no manual, no headaches. What inspired this I was in the garage with my 5 year old daughter. She saw my CNC machine and asked if we could make a sign for our new dog, Benny. I jumped at the chance. I grabbed my laptop and opened up Fusion360, by all accounts a very capable and perfect software for professionals. An hour later, after she had lost patience and gone inside, I was still fumbling around in the CAM configurations, unsure of how to do a simple V carve path for the text we had designed. I opened Easel instead, had the G-code set up in seconds. Trouble was, I couldn't use a V bit because I didn't have the subscription. I thought, this is ridiculous. There has to be a better way, but I was not able to find it. Then, I decided to design CutStudio. Something simple for casual use, that won't break the bank. What Makes CutStudio Different Easy to Learn Start making things in minutes, not weeks. We built CutStudio for makers who want to create, not people who want to master CAD software. Works on Whatever You Have Design on your laptop, check it on your phone in the garage, finish it on your tablet. As long as you've got a browser, you've got CutStudio. Built for Real Projects Make signs, furniture, enclosures, artwork, or whatever's in your head. Import ideas from the internet, create from scratch, or start with community templates. Growing With You Start with simple 2D cuts and v-carving. When you're ready, unlock 3D carving and advanced features. No need to buy different software as your skills grow. Key Features Design Made Simple Draw shapes, text, and designs without CAD complexity Import SVG files from the internet or design apps Built-in clipart and font library Snap-together joinery for box and furniture projects Automatic nesting to save material Get Ready to Cut One-click toolpath generation for common operations Visual preview so you know exactly what you'll get Works with routers, lasers, pen plotters, and drag knives Export G-code for all popular controllers (GRBL, Mach3/4, LinuxCNC, etc.) Beginner-friendly defaults that just work Maker-Friendly Tools Project templates for signs, boxes, coasters, and more Share your designs with friends via a simple link Save all your projects in the cloud Learn as You Go Interactive tutorials built right into the software Community project library for inspiration Video guides for common tasks Active maker community forum We actually answer support emails How It Works Open Your Browser - Works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge—Windows, Mac, Linux, even tablets Start Designing - Choose a template or start from scratch with intuitive tools Generate Toolpaths - Smart CAM features create optimized cutting strategies Simulate & Verify - See exactly what your machine will do before sending code Export & Cut - Download G-code formatted for your specific controller The Technology CutStudio is built on modern web technologies: - WebGL rendering for smooth, fast graphics even with complex designs - Cloud-based computation for heavy CAM processing - Progressive Web App architecture—works offline when you need it - End-to-end encryption for your project data - Cross-platform compatibility without compromise We're leveraging the same technologies used by professional tools like Figma and Onshape, bringing enterprise-grade performance to CNC design. Funding Goals & Use of Funds Primary Goal: $20,000 Core software development (65%) Cloud server costs for the first year (15%) Support for popular CNC controllers (10%) Community building and tutorials (10%) Stretch Goals $50,000 - More Machine Support - Expanded controller library - Import DXF and other common file formats - Advanced text tools and custom fonts $75,000 - 3D Carving - True 3D toolpath generation - STL file import for relief carving - More simulation features $100,000 - Mobile Apps - Native iOS and Android apps - Full offline capability - Even better performance $125,000 - Premium Features - Photo tracing tools - Advanced v-carving - Texture and pattern libraries - Parametric design tools After Kickstarter: CutStudio will be $10/month or $100/year. Lock in these backer prices and save! Timeline & Milestones Month 1-2: Polish Core Features (We Are Here) - 2D design tools working great - Basic toolpath generation - Currently being finished by a paid agency. Month 3-4: Beta with Backers - Invite all backers to test - Add your requested controllers - Simulation preview - Tutorial system launch Month 5-6: Public Launch - Official v1.0 release - Community project library - Mobile-optimized interface - All basic features complete Month 7-12: Growth Phase - Roll out stretch goal features - Continuous improvements from your feedback - Grow the template library - Build the maker community We're committed to regular updates - you'll hear from us at least twice a month with progress reports, sneak peeks, and chances to influence what we build next. WebCAM CNC LLC CutStudio is developed by WebCAM CNC LLC, a company dedicated to making CNC technology more accessible to makers and hobbyists. We understand the CNC community because we're part of it—we've experienced the same software frustrations you have, and we're building the solution we wish existed. Our team combines years of CNC experience with modern software development expertise. We're not just building software; we're building tools for people like us who want to spend more time making and less time fighting with complicated programs. Learn more about WebCAM CNC at webcamcnc.com Risks & Challenges We believe in being upfront about what could go wrong: Software is Complex Building good CAM software is hard. We're not claiming to replace pro tools - we're making something better for hobbyists. The core already works, but polish takes time. Browser Performance Big, complex designs might be slow on older computers. We're optimizing constantly and using cloud processing for the heavy stuff. Supporting Every Machine There are hundreds of CNC controllers out there. We'll start with the most common ones (GRBL, Mach3/4, LinuxCNC) and add more based on what you tell us you need. Building a Community Software is only as good as the people using it. We're committed to building tutorials, answering questions, and fostering a helpful maker community around CutStudio. The good news: we're already using CutStudio for our own projects. We're building this because we want it to exist. Why Kickstarter? Honestly? We need to know if other makers want this as badly as we do. WebCAM CNC has been serving the CNC community for years, and we kept hearing the same complaints about design software: too expensive, too complicated, too limiting. We decided to build the solution ourselves. Building software is expensive and time-consuming. Your backing proves there's a real community of people tired of expensive, complicated CNC software. It also means we can work on CutStudio full-time instead of nights and weekends. Plus, we want to build this WITH you, not just FOR you. Early backers will directly shape what features we prioritize, which machines we support first, and what the community becomes. We're making CutStudio regardless - your support just determines how fast we can build it and how good it can be. FAQ Q: Will there be a free version? A: Yes! The free tier will let you make unlimited projects with basic features - perfect for learning and simple cuts. Premium features (3D carving, advanced tools, more storage) require a subscription. Q: What machines does it work with? A: At launch: GRBL (X-Carve, Shapeoko, etc.), Mach3/4, and LinuxCNC. We'll add more based on what backers request. If you have something unusual, let us know and we'll prioritize it. Q: What about VCarve / Fusion 360 / Carbide Create? A: Those are great tools! CutStudio is designed to be simpler and cheaper for hobbyists. You might use both - CutStudio for everyday projects, your existing software for complex stuff. Or you might find CutStudio does everything you need. Q: What file types can I use? A: Import SVG files from anywhere. Export G-code for your machine. We'll add DXF and other formats as stretch goals. But generally, our designer will have all the graphic tools you need built right in. Q: Is my data safe? A: Yes. All your projects are encrypted and backed up. We'll never look at your designs or sell your data. You own everything you create. Q: What if CutStudio shuts down? A: We're in this for the long haul, but if the worst happens, we'll open-source the code and give everyone time to export their projects. Q: I'm not very good with computers. Can I still use this? A: That's exactly who we're building this for! If you can browse the web, you can use CutStudio. Plus we'll have tons of tutorials and a friendly community. Q: Can I suggest features? A: Please do! Backers get direct input on what we build. We'll have a feature voting system and we actually listen. Updates & Communication We'll send updates at least twice a month - no corporate BS, just honest progress reports about what's working, what's not, and what we're building next. Backers get: - Behind-the-scenes development updates - Early access to test new features - Private Discord community - Direct line to the developers (yes, we actually respond) - Vote on what features we build next Join the Movement Look, CNC software shouldn't cost more than your CNC machine. It shouldn't take weeks to learn. And it definitely shouldn't lock you to one computer running Windows XP. At WebCAM CNC, we're building CutStudio as the solution to these problems—CNC software for people who just want to make cool stuff. Whether you're cutting your first sign or building furniture in your garage, you deserve tools that work with you, not against you. Back CutStudio today and let's build something awesome together. The maker community deserves better software. Let's make it happen. Connect With Us Website: webcamcnc.com Email: hello@webcamcnc.com CutStudio: Coming soon at mycutstudio.com All funds will be used exclusively for CutStudio development, operations, and marketing. Estimated delivery: June 2026 This project will be charged immediately upon campaign success. © 2026 WebCAM CNC LLC. All rights reserved.

title: The Lumen Dash | A New Way to Monitor Your PC
description: The Lumen Dash is the latest in PC hardware monitoring, delivering real-time insights into your performance in a completely new style. The Lumen Dash keeps you informed about every critical aspect of your hardware from CPU and GPU temperatures to voltages, fan speeds, clock speeds, and utilization with a sleek, automotive-inspired gauge design. The real, tactile gauges offer a stunning new way to stay on top of your PC's performance. Easily notice when your PC’s resources are under heavy load or running cool at a glance — no charts, overlays, or on-screen clutter. The movement of each gauge gives you a real sense of what your system is doing in real time. Whether your CPU spikes during a demanding render, your GPU ramps up mid-game, or your fans kick in to keep temperatures under control, you’ll see it all happen right in front of you. The Lumen Dash bridges the gap between digital performance data and physical feedback. It gives your system a voice — one that doesn’t just appear on your screen, but lives on your desk. With its responsive, analog display and sleek automotive-inspired design, it turns your PC’s performance into something you can truly experience, not just monitor. Effortlessly toggle between any available hardware sensors to instantly display key metrics of your PC's performance. With seamless USB streaming and real-time updates, the Lumen Dash converts and displays the data you need, keeping you confidently in control of your computer's performance at all times. Features of the Lumen Dash The Lumen Dash is a comprehensive solution for monitoring your computer’s hardware in real time. Designed with both functionality and user experience in mind, it offers a variety of features to keep you informed about your system’s performance: Real-Time Hardware Monitoring: Track key metrics such as CPU temperature, fan speed, clock speed, and voltage in real time. Stay updated on your system's performance without any delays. Support for Multiple Sensors: The Lumen Dash seamlessly integrates with sensors from a variety of components, including CPUs, GPUs, and storage devices, ensuring you get a complete picture of your system. Broad Compatibility: Compatible with a wide range of hardware, including Intel and AMD processors, Nvidia and AMD graphics cards, and other commonly used components. Customizable Gauges: Adjust colors, metrics, and units to tailor the interface to your preferences, allowing you to monitor your hardware exactly the way you want. User-Friendly Design: With its plug-and-play setup, the Lumen Dash ensures a hassle-free experience right out of the box. Benefits of the Lumen Dash The Lumen Dash isn’t just a monitoring tool—it’s a game-changer for anyone who wants to stay on top of their PC’s performance. Here’s what makes it invaluable: Prevent Overheating: Keep your system safe by monitoring temperatures and identifying issues before they cause damage. Troubleshoot Hardware Issues: Quickly pinpoint hardware irregularities by keeping tabs on metrics like voltage, utilization, and fan speeds. Optimize System Performance: Use real-time data to identify inefficiencies, eliminate bottlenecks, and ensure your PC is running at its best. Tailored Experience: With customizable gauges and interfaces, you can set up Lumen Dash to display exactly the information you need in a format that suits your style. The Lumen Dash isn’t just useful hardware—it’s a statement. People immediately notice it and ask, “Wow, what the heck is that?” With its sleek, automotive-inspired gauges responding to PC performance in real time, the Lumen Dash is more than functional—it’s a unique centerpiece that stands out in any setup. The backlight can be set to 7 colors plus two color changing modes and off. They can be independently controlled using a button on face of each gauge. The needle is lit red and the 7 segment displays are blue. The Lumen Dash desktop application runs quietly in the task tray and has all of the features and feel you would expect from a modern application. The user interface is made to be as simple and intuitive as possible, while still making it incredibly fast to see what is available to monitor and reconfigure gauges. Create and manage custom presets to match any setup or situation. With a single click, switch between dash configurations right from the task tray—without having to open the application. Lumen Dash makes it quick and effortless. The Lumen Dash desktop application is available NOW! Download it from our website today to check out what system components are available to monitor in your system. For decades, analog gauges have been the trusted tools of racers and pilots alike. The simple, intuitive design of a physical needle makes them invaluable when split-second decisions are required in the heat of the moment. Whether you're pushing a race car to its limits or navigating the skies, a quick glance is all it takes to gather the information you need. The Lumen Dash takes inspiration from this heritage and brings it to your PC, combining precision and simplicity for any user. Designed for quick glances when you're in the heat of the moment and effortless casual monitoring during everyday use, it adapts seamlessly to your needs. No distractions, no clutter—just real-time stats presented with the timeless practicality of analog gauges. With the Lumen Dash, it’s not just about staying informed; it’s about staying connected, whether you’re pushing the limits or simply ensuring smooth operation. With the Lumen Dash, it’s more than monitoring—it’s a revolution in how you stay connected to your performance. Completed Work The Lumen Dash isn’t just an idea—it’s here. We’ve been running fully functional prototype units with 3D-printed enclosures out in the wild, tested and loved by early users. This Kickstarter will primarily fund the production of our injection-molded housings —the final step in moving from prototype to full production—and help us build our initial inventory. Over the past few years, we’ve poured countless hours into designing, building, and refining every detail of the Lumen Dash to ensure it delivers a smooth, polished experience from the moment you plug it in. Here’s what we’ve accomplished so far: Design & Engineering: Every detail, from the hardware to the software, has been thoughtfully refined to deliver exceptional performance and usability. The plastic housing has been designed with clean lines and a compact footprint to ensure a premium feel and perfect fit for production. Together, these elements come together to form a cohesive, polished product that feels purpose-built and ready for the spotlight. Manufacturing Partnerships: We’re working with local trusted manufacturers to produce the injection-molded housing, ensuring quality and durability. The main PCB design has been finalized, produced, and tested in small batches. The gauges are real 52mm car gauges, which gives the Lumen Dash its striking appearance and is what makes it look so…real. The gauges have been customized for our application, and these designs have also been finalized, produced, and tested. Partnerships have also been established for other materials such as hardware, cables, and packaging. Software Integration: The desktop application is fully developed and is ready for launch. It’s designed to offer an intuitive, plug-and-play experience that makes setup effortless. The update server is online and updates are seamlessly downloaded and installed through the app. We will continue to push updates for bugs after launch along with other new features we can't wait to unveil. Trademarks and Certifications: The branding for Lumen Labs is filed, protecting the brand’s identity. We are also working with a laboratory to become fully certified for FCC compliance, making it legal for sale in the United States. It's our goal to have a rock steady launch in the United States so that we can set the foundation for going global. This project began as a passion—something built during long nights and weekends while balancing work, school, and early careers. Along the way, we’ve had the support of incredibly talented people who’ve helped shape and refine the Lumen Dash into what it is today. A sincere thank-you to everyone who’s been part of that journey so far. Rather than pouring resources into marketing, we’ve focused on crafting a product that speaks for itself—one that’s fully developed, functional, and ready for production. We believe that once people on Kickstarter see the Lumen Dash in action, they’ll understand the care and detail that went into creating it. Thanks to that groundwork and careful planning, we only need an initial 200 backers to bring the Lumen Dash to life. With your support, we can make it happen. The Lumen Dash is ready—let’s bring it to life together. 🚀 Early Backer Rewards To thank you for supporting Lumen Labs, we’re offering special early-bird pricing: 30% OFF for the first 50 backers : Get the Lumen Dash for just $179 (retail $255.99). 20% OFF for the next 500 backers : Get the Lumen Dash for just $204 . After Kickstarter, the Lumen Dash will retail for $255.99 —this is your chance to grab it at the best price. How to Use the Lumen Dash? Using the Lumen Dash is simple. Here’s a step-by-step guide: Step 1: Download the setup .exe from www.lumenlabs.app and complete the quick installation process. Step 2: Once the installation is finished, the Lumen Dash software will automatically launch. Plug in the device. Step 3: Select one of the three gauges to begin monitoring. Choose your hardware, then pick the sensor type you’d like to track. As soon as you select a sensor, the data starts streaming to the gauge in real-time. Additional Features: When you select a sensor, the bottom-left panel displays extra information such as the hardware type and measurement units. You can easily switch temperature units between Celsius and Fahrenheit for more flexibility. Scaling Your Gauges: If the values you’re monitoring fall outside the default range of 0-100, you can scale the gauge to better suit your needs. For example, if you're monitoring processor clock speeds that range from 3,600 to 5,400 MHz, you can scale the gauge to read 0-10,000. This adjustment allows the gauge to display values like percentages—showing 36 and 54 instead of the full MHz values—keeping the display clean and easy to read. With Lumen Dash, setup and customization are intuitive, letting you focus on monitoring what matters most.

title: Phone by Mako
description: Phones. They're a part of our everyday lives. Almost everyone uses their phones every day. Whether it's to text someone about meeting somewhere, calling in sick to work, sharing images over social media, or just lying on the couch watching YouTube, phones keep us entertained while making multiple aspects of our lives easier. But have you ever taken a moment to pause and wonder how the phone was created? How it works, with each little component interacts with other components? Meet the Phone by Mako. It's a simple, do it yourself phone that teaches you how cellphones work. It comes in a premium, hand-crafted wooden box, with a hand-crafted wooden housing. The phone is powered by the Adafruit Feather FONA, which is an Arduino with a cellular card. The kit also includes a keypad to type in phone numbers, and a 2000mAh battery to last a good long while. Our mission is to teach people how everyday electronics work by having them build their own version of a device. In the kit, people learn how phones work, how keypads work, and how to code in the Arduino programming language. We are raising funds to buy a laser engraver/cutter for the housing and box pieces. Some  of the money will go towards the laser, while the other will go to ordering parts. We then plan to set up work in a large garage. We will set up a laser engraver to work on cutting out the case pieces, while we put together some of the parts and ready the kits for distribution. Currently, we are still testing the fit and feel of all of the components. However, most of our prototyping is finished, which means we may be able to start production soon. For the first fifty backers that pledge $130 or more, they will receive an early version of the Phone by Mako, which is estimated to ship in October of 2019. For regular customers, the phone will be available to order around December. However, since all kits are crafted by hand, supplies will be limited and may sell out quickly. Who are we? Our company, Mako Software, is managed and run by Collin Wentzien, a passionate 13-year-old maker who built and coded this phone. He wanted to make this kit to show people that it isn't difficult to make everyday electronic devices. Ryland Goldman, another 13-year-old, is COO and is managing the Kickstarter and other products. He specializes in software and codes in over 8 coding languages. Credits to Bob Murphy ( http://thisoldgeek.blogspot.com ) for writing the base of the code, but the code was modified by us to be simpler and more intuitive to use.

title: That Dance Show: Feel-Good Interview and Dance Show
description: Beyond dance, That Dance Show strives to instill confidence and joy in everyone who watches it. Watch the first episodes here. What Is That Dance Show? You can watch the first episodes here. That Dance Show is an interview-dance show where we interview influential people while teaching them a popular dance move. That Dance Show's host, Conor, has always found joy in expressing himself through dance and is passionate about making others feel confident in their own groovy skin. That's why none of our guests are highly-trained dancers! Our show explores the beauty of human connection and self-expression through the magic of dance. You won't see us correct a guest for not being technically "right" in their grooves. On our show, everyone can dance. We hope our show introduces you to a cool person, helps you feel more positive about yourself, and inspires you to bust a move. We've shot three episodes , and with your help, we can continue to spread joy through feel-good interviews and dance! Who's Behind This Show? Conor Biddle - Creator, Host Conor has been a dance lover his entire life. He's danced at the Phillies' stadium... Conor dancing at Phillies' stadium. ...had his dance video played on the jumbotron at Fenway Park for the entire 2016 season... Conor's "Community of Dancers | Boston" playing at Fenway Park in 2016 ...danced with It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia star Kaitlin Olson... Dance video with Kaitlin Olson. ...and co-wrote a TV episode about dancing mythical birds where he helped choreograph the birds' greeting dance... Conor Biddle's and Matthew Fichandler's greeting choreography in Santiago of the Seas on Nick. ...but his favorite dance memory is grooving with his mom on his childhood street over a decade ago. Conor's mom instilled the idea of dance being all about letting loose and having fun. Conor and his Mom grooving one summer night in 2014. All of Conor's life experiences led him to create That Dance Show. The show combines Conor's passions: self-expression, dancing for fun, making people feel good, and connecting with wonderful folks. Conor's goal has never been to be the best dancer; it's to have fun dancing and help others find their inner dancers. Hint: It's already in you. Jordan Cipolla - Director & Executive Producer Jordan Cipolla is a lifelong creative and film buff. He studied film at Emerson College and has directed and produced various content over the years. He’s worked in production on It’s Always Sunny, King Richard, Jumanji, and more. He’s also worked with Conor on shooting a wide range of dance content and has a knack for achieving humorous yet heartfelt content—precisely what That Dance Show is. But more importantly than his creative skills: he's always ready to bust a move. One day, when Jordan was slated to film Conor dancing, the tables got turned and it was Jordan who ended up slaying the dance floor that day... This combination of creative and production talent mixed with a love of grooving and making people laugh makes Jordan a critical piece in making That Dance Show a success. Together, Jordan and Conor are ready to tackle any obstacles that may present themselves for That Dance Show. Jordan and Conor on the first test day of That Dance Show discussing the look of the stage. Jordan and Conor are not the only folks on the team though. Everyone on this list is a critical member of making TDS happen: Ryan Bergeron — Director of Photography Mike Gilchrist — Production Designer Emma Stack — Producer Brittany Shear — Copy Editor, PA, and Best Person Alexa Sanchez — Social Media Tyler Eaton — Editor Morgan Wright — Animator Luke Metzler, Drelli, Tabiyus, Jak Lizard — Musicians (licensed or original music) What are we planning to make with the funds? 5 new episodes (guests, crew, gear rental, studio rental, and post-production). 5 new dance history animations like this one to ensure we're properly honoring the significant cultural history of every dance move we teach (this is not a final animation but a work-in-progress animatic of The Charleston): A dance history animatic by our impeccable animator, Morgan Wright (Morganimation) 5 new licensed songs/original music from indie artists 5 new Dancimation® loops like this one: A Dancimation™  by our animator Morgan Wright (Morganimation) based on Conor's cat, Tofu. The Genesis of That Dance Show Conor came up with the idea for That Dance Show (originally called The Breakdown ) in 2018 and shot a proof of concept for $150 with his brother Jesse and his pal Luke Farley behind the cam. Conor and Jesse shooting the no-budget proof of concept for That Dance Show Then the idea fizzled because to make it right, he needed more money. Every six months for nearly five years, Conor would think about the concept and fall in love with it all over again. Then he'd look at his list of priorities (and his bank account), and TDS wouldn't make sense all over again. Until 2023, when he decided to spend his savings to shoot three episodes of the show and make it how he wanted to. Conor spent pretty much all of his money to make the first three episodes of this show, which will be released between July 15th and July 29th so folks can see what TDS is all about. Several thousand dollars poorer but three episodes of TDS richer, Conor needs your help to make more TDS! Watch the show here. The Schedule August 15th, 2024 — Campaign Ends. September 2024 — Secure guests + crew for October shoot. October 2024 — Shoot 5 new episodes. October - December 2024 — Edit 5 new episodes. January 2025 — Market these 5 new episodes February - April 2025 — Release the show that you made happen. What's the General Format of the Episodes? Guest Introduction Go-To Dance Move Warm-Ups Intro Move to Learn Breakdown Move Into Steps Dancer Facials Finishing Pose Performance Post-Performance Chat Watch the Show Episode 1 — Moviestar Emma Pasarow Knits While Learning Charleston Dance Out now! Episode 2 — MLB Pitcher Jesse Biddle Talks Baseball While Learning Shoot Dance Releasing July 22nd, 11 AM PST Episode 3 — Writer-Comic Liz Mitts Clowns While Learning The Spongebob Dance Releasing July 29th, 11 AM PST Episode 4 - 8 — We're already in talks with some exciting new guests. But these episodes only happen if we meet our funding goal! Go follow us on Instagram , subscribe on YouTube , and check us out on TikTok ! Every follower, like, and share helps us achieve our goal of creating feel-good dance content that warms the hearts of everyone who watches.

title: _FRONT_LEFT FILM
description: "Front Left" is an LGBTQ+ experimental short film.  To Follow along for updates click here for our linktree ! SYNOPSIS A misfit crew of queer dancers meet in their favorite Berlin club for a 48hour party. Shy, Tinker, Mikel, and Hermes quickly disappear into the darkness of techno beats. When the mundane rituals of the club transform into charged thresholds, the crew inadvertently traverses the seven gates of the underworld. Their descent evokes the ancient mythology of Inanna, and each one must confront their inner darkness to reveal their own truths. DESCENT PORTRAIT OF BERLIN CLUB COMMUNITY LOW BUDGET PASSION PROJECT UNDERWORLD MYTHOLOGY PARADOX AND DESIRES EUPHORIA AND DARKNESS TRANSFORMATION SCRIPT The research and writing of the script has been in process since 2023. The concept was created while in residence at California Institute of the Arts in Los Angeles. Working closely with several mentors including Calum Walter, Ernest Marrero, Nicole Panter Dailey and Abigail Severence. The script is a queer refusal of the "hero's journey'. Instead, Front Left is based on Scandinavian narrative form, built around multiple characters with a central ritual-based truth as the red thread. It serves as a recurring point of convergence where characters discuss, realign, and develop- or sometimes not . Front Left is structured on the mythological seven gates one must pass through to traverse the underworld. It is set in the hyper specific milieu of the local club scene and written to reflect the linguistic diversity off all the queers who have sought shelter in the space of one city; Berlin. Drawing from the concrete details of my own life and the shared experiences of the queer immigrant community around me, the script carries an authenticity and a determination to reflect the traumas, intensities, and joy in the queer search for belonging. DIRECTORS STATEMENT Front Left is a deeply personal story for me. The genesis of this project stems from a search for belonging , and the dance floors along the way that supported my own transformation. It is inspired by my own profound reckoning with gender and the lifelong sensation of being not a girl but also not a boy. The visual style of FRONT LEFT is one of hybridity and a unity of opposites. I will contrast a naturalistic approach with staged tableaus and choreography. I plan to achieve this by creating an entire world for the cast and crew to inhabit together. We will construct an environment that oscillates between gritty realness and playful artifice . Front Left gathers a nuanced landscape of gender queer individuals who have sought refuge from around the world in the Berlin club community. It is here, within the architectural and emotional space of a club, that I delve into the transformative power of feeling seen. PREVIOUS WORK Research around mythology, transformation, and queer space culminated in the trilogy Nix, Pup&Scrap, and Teddie Time. Three performance pieces made for film which inhabit queer kink worlds with a specificity towards awkward encounters and how they can bond a situational group of strangers towards a common goal. Each video piece begins with the sentence "Hi. Can I sit here?" and proceeds to redefine relationality for its duration. The works have exhibited as video installations in Museums and Gallerys, and paved the way for the first single channel narrative work of Front Left. Nix | 2022 21min Pup&Scrap | 2023 12min Teddie Time | 2024 18min The CREW Rb Poodle Moran is an American Icelandic artist based between Los Angeles, Reykjavik and Berlin. They received a BFA from the Art Institute of Chicago and are currently finishing a three years interdisciplinary masters from Calarts. This project combines for the first time twenty years of experience into one project! a visual artist, writer, and performer (exhibited and performed accross the world including Reykjavik, Berlin, Chicago, Tokyo, and Los Angeles) an analogue filmmaker and teacher (co-founder of Kinosmidja in Reykjavik Iceland, teaching workshops, expanded cinema performances, and programmer at Filmverkplaats, WORM, Filmverkstaden, Mono No Aware, MIRE, and LIFT) a set decorator and art director in the industry (Black Mirror, Foundation, Noah, Greenland, and more) a queer immigrant nomad! (non binary with a heart in many homes!) Follow our INSTAGRAM as we highlight the amazing accomplishments of our growing creative team! Everyone on this project contains a world of experience both professionally, but also is a fully queer crew! Many of them with second jobs within the Berlin Club Community <3 The CAST We already have so many core members of the Berlin Club Community excited to perform in this film! While some roles have already been cast, we are still casting several of the main characters... and aim to bring together an entire club full of the queers that have touched our hearts and many more in the last decade of Berlin Dance Floors. If you haven't already reached out, please jon our OPEN CALL below ! You can find more information on our linktree if you click HERE <3 PRODUCTION SCHEDULE PRE-PRODUCTION | September/October 2025 PRODUCTION |November 2025 in BERLIN POST-PRODUCTION |Spring 2026 at CALARTS in LOS ANGELES PICTURE LOCK |SUMMER 2026 We are so excited to announce the co-production from VENGAfilms from Berlin and CAVE13 in Los Angeles. Both are committed to queer, independent cinema that combines vulnerability, critical thinking, and a passion for stepping into the unknown. SUPPORT & REWARDS "FRONT LEFT" is made by and from within the LGBTQ+ club community on a micro budget. Even though this is a Passion Project, some expenses can't be cut! PAY A MINIMAL SALARY TO THE TEAM PAY A MINIMAL SALARY TO THE CAST RENTING CAMERA AND SOUND EQUIPMENT CATERING FOR CAST & CREW LOCATION COSTS EQUIPMENT TRANSPORT PROPS AND WARDROBE Whats your favorite Portal in the club? ! Each threshold you pass, takes you deeper into our project! We list below the main reward from each Pledge. But of course you also receive all the perks from every portal before it... title: Categories
description: After already losing his first wife, Edwin Gray, the wealthy banker, finds himself at the funeral of his only child, Rose Mae, who, despite the doubts of the suspicious town gossipers, fell prey to the same sickness that took his wife, the Spanish Flu. Through the twists and turns of the many conversations and inner thoughts of the funeral attendees, we learn the truth behind Rose Mae’s demise. We are excited to share our fully-produced score, composed by Gray Fagan with lyrics by Grace Courville, and orchestrated/arranged by Sara Lopez ( M.M. Scoring for Film and Multimedia. ) All of our music is played by real musicians on real instruments! Rose Mae studio score recording session in Columbia. Courtesy of orchestrator Sara Lopez. Our production team consists of recent graduates from Chapman University’s Dodge College of Film and Media Arts (ranked #6 top film schools by The Hollywood Reporter ) and seasoned professionals. LSU Rural Life Museum LSU Rural Life Museum complex map The LSU Rural Life Museum dedicates itself to preserving and exhibiting materials from the cultures of 18th and 19th-century rural Louisianans. The museum includes 32 historic outbuildings spanning over 25 acres. The LSU Rural Life Museum has four sections: the Working Plantation, the Upland South Region, the Gulf Coast Region, and an Exhibit Barn. *Luckily, this location requires minimal production design, as it is already period-accurate 20th Century Replica Church . We are still cutting down costs as much as we can, but our current estimated budget sits at roughly $70,000. Budget breakdown Thank you in advance for any support you are willing to provide. All funding will go toward travel and accommodations, quality equipment, daily craft services, location fees, production insurance, and all other costs associated with standard SAG- AFTRA productions. Contributions will also fund the distribution of The Ballad of Rose Mae into the international short film festival circuit. We look forward to partnering with you!

title: Categories
description: “Not My Father’s Child” tells the story of Nate, Mark and Dortha Phelps, three of the 13 children of the late Fred Phelps, founder of the notorious Westboro Baptist Church in Topeka, Kansas. While Phelps and the members of Westboro Baptist are well-known for their “God Hates Fags” public protests, the excruciating abuse levied by Phelps against his wife and children has remained, for the most part, hauntingly hidden away for decades. Told through chilling re-enactment scenes and personal interviews with Nate, Mark and Dortha, “Not My Father’s Child” reveals the untold story of the only three first-generation runaways. From their daily struggle to endure the abusive outbursts of their father to breaking free from the indoctrination of a belief system grounded in hate to their search for emotional and psychological healing to their desire to eradicate hate and help others, they invite viewers to join them for a behind-the-scenes look at their journey from hate to hope. Story Outline On a mission to make sense of their abusive past, the first act of the film follows Nate, Mark and Dortha as they retrace their father’s early footsteps and recount the stories of abuse each child endured at the hands of their father. Reenactments bring these stories to life as the children are forced to sell candy as the only family income, punish each other for missed quotas, yet still find ways to deceive the “pastor” and have childish fun. As the abuse intensifies within their home, during the second act, Nate, Mark and Dortha give us an unprecedented look into the mindset of religious abuse survivors as they independently escape their father’s grasp and begin to develop their own lives outside of the church. Unsure of their new world around them, they must face challenges of faith and integration into a life outside the family cult where they quickly discover they can’t leave the past behind them. Intertwined in their journeys and facing personal and professional challenges stemming from the abuse suffered during their upbringing, we connect with the characters in present day and learn of their desire to help subsequent generations now leaving the church. The third act of the film shows our three characters reuniting for the first time in 20 years, and concludes with an open, multi-generational gathering to all who have escaped Westboro. As the three siblings begin to establish new relationships with family they never knew, they must overcome deep preconceived notions and distrust instilled in each follower of the Phelps family cult. Messages and Introductions to the Cast Mark Phelps My core purpose for joining my brother and sister in this documentary about our family is to support them in telling the truth. My father’s abusive use of religion was unique to his own pathology and it was dark and evil. I know my father’s god condemns, intimidates and enjoys crushing the life out of human beings. Based on my father’s teachings and behavior, I know his god can hardly wait to destroy the world, and will take delight in doing so. I know that his god has no compassion or love. Fred W. Phelps Sr.’s hateful god leaves the world with no hope and, if my father would have had his way, hundreds of millions of Christians all over the world would be denied their Savior and their salvation today. I am so thankful that the god of Fred W. Phelps Sr. is not my god and not my savior, and not the true God of the universe. My God announced "Peace on Earth. Good Will to Men" the day His Son was born to a virgin here on the earth, and this statement represents great hope for all human beings! My deepest desire for those who have been hurt by my family, or who have experienced religious or spiritual abuse, or any kind of abuse in the name of religion, or in the name of God, is that this film will help them know they are not alone and that there is hope. --- Mark Dortha Phelps Bird For me, the documentary is essential to cast light upon the origin of the violent picketing that is perpetrated by Westboro Baptist Church/my birth family (hereafter referred to as WBC). The foundation of WBC is specialness. WBC claims they are the only chosen elect of God in the whole of humanity - that Calvinism is the only truth. WBC's focus in the Bible is upon what can justify cruelty and manipulation to, through fear, ensure that WBC's specialness is taught to the world. This documentary is an answer to this abomination. My evidence is my experience in interacting with the complexity, diversity and profound beauty of humanity. My experience has shown me that God is not an ally of specialness. No one person's path is less sacred than another. Importantly, you exist to share and live your truth. It is your duty to express yourself authentically. That doesn't mean you're special, it means you are singing your part in this one song of the universe. So, to reiterate, WBC is profoundly mistaken - they perpetrate great error and I think this must be addressed. This documentary will, help in this regard. With it, the conversation is fuller. With a more complete picture, there is a hope for healing. As my brother Nathan says, "Hope floats." My profound blessings in this invitation to take this journey with us. --- Dortha Nate Phelps When I saw Brad Johnson’s vignette about his mother’s coming out experience at the age of 52, I knew he had an understanding of abusive religious dynamics that only comes from experience. When I met them a few months later in Lawrence, Kansas, and they asked if they could do a documentary about my story, I knew they were the ones who would do it right. Because they get it. When I watched the trailer they’ve created for "Not My Father’s Child," I was reminded again…they get it. I am so grateful for the opportunity to work with them and the remarkable team they have assembled to get this message out…the cure for bigotry of the brain is to inoculate the heart with loving connections. In addition to my sincere thank you to each of you who are investing in this project, I make this commitment: This investment will not return empty. We will change hearts and minds. We will save lives. We will secure a better future for the coming generations. --- Nate Reward add-on! Receive the "STOP HATING PEOPLE coffee mug by adding $30 ($45 for international shipping) to any pledge.  Send us a message saying that you want the coffee mug! Team Brad Johnson – Director Brad was raised in Kansas and has always been fascinated with stories involving the heartland. After several encounters with protesters from Westboro Baptist Church, the idea of filming a documentary about the church grew into a deep desire to tell a different story – it wasn’t the church that caught Brad’s heart, it was their victims. As an accomplished Director of Photography and Post Production Manager, Brad has the perfect combination of talent and discipline to tackle a story of this magnitude. Brad has an extensive background in television working many different roles on shows for Showtime, National Geographic, Discovery, AMC, WGN, PBS, and ESPN; in addition to national commercials, local advertising campaigns and awarded documentaries. Jason Badgett – Director Jason was born and raised in Paola, Kansas, before graduating from the University of Kansas in 2010 with a degree in Film and Media Studies and a minor in Religious Studies. While attending KU, he was a founding member of the Documentary Film Society. As a production sound mixer and editor, Jason worked on television programs for CBS, ABC and Hulu, as well as independent films including Jayhawkers, The Profit and Destination Planet Negro. He works as a lighting designer and sound engineer for concerts, theatre and other performing arts productions. Jason recently designed the lighting for Barry Crimmins' comedy special "Whatever Threatens You" produced by Louis CK and has also worked with artists Aziz Ansari, Tig Notaro, Marc Maron, John Waters, Adam Lambert, The Mountain Goats, Mount Eerie and John Cale. Terrie Johnson – Producer Terrie’s story is difficult to condense into one paragraph, but as a well-known public speaker, she has the unique gift of establishing an immediate connection with her audience. Within moments of meeting Terrie, people say they feel like they’ve known her their entire lives. Her sense of integrity, coupled with a genuine love and concern for others, causes people both young and old to open up and share their lives and their stories with her. As the Senior Editor of a nationally recognized advertising agency in Kansas City, Terrie has been involved with media production in all forms for more than 20 years. She is the author of two books and writes a blog that has a large and growing readership base. This is Terrie’s first step behind the camera as she directs the interview sessions. We Need Your Help! The goal of this Kickstarter is to generate enough funds to allow us to complete production of the film over the next six months. Due to the geographic locations of our characters, we have multiple international and cross-country trips still to make. Every dollar gets us closer to the goal of making this film a reality, but we will need much more than our initial goal to finish post-production. In addition to grant funding, anything over our goal will go toward the following, in order: Filming of cinematic recreations of key events Pay our wonderful composer Sam Billen Pay our Assistant Editor enough to eat Hire an incredibly talented Emmy Award-Winning Editor to oversee post production Expanding our distribution strategy so the film can be seen by more people in more places Where Will It Be Seen? We want our film to have broad and extensive distribution so that it will reach and impact as many individuals as possible who are currently trapped in abusive environments. In addition to participating in pitch competitions such as IF Week, we plan to work closely with multiple fellowships in preparation for distribution. The film will be submitted to film festivals, and we hope to make it available to stream through services such as Netflix, Hulu, Amazon and HBO. We will also organize a grassroots effort for screening the film in a variety of venues, including LGBTQ organizations on college campuses, churches and other faith-based groups, conferences for mental health professionals, law enforcement agencies and child abuse prevention organizations. These screenings will include a question and answer session following the showing of the film. The goal of this grassroots campaign is to enlist the aid of these organizations in raising awareness of the issues addressed in the film.

title: Categories
description:
Captains Log: In the year 1732 , on the 25th of May ,
 me and me crew were stuck on a sandbar off the coast of what is now Cuba . We were privy to tales of a Plate Fleet of Incan gold left behind by the Spanish. So, we went ashore to seek this unclaimed treasure. As we were walking along the shore we spied a Mermaid bound to a chest. In our greedy haste, we released the creature and foolishly cast her aside like deck bucket squabble, to see what was in the chest. To our great disappointment, there be only rotten provisions and food. As we scowled and scorned her to get the answers we so tirelessly sought, she intervened with a querry of her own : "What are the five key behaviours of being a good person?" Stumped by the riddle-- due to our arrogance and dull-witted ploy, she cast us out-- ship, crew and all into a bottle until we were able to answer her riddle. Armed with only a Magical Hourglass and a wee bit o' sailors wit, we are now on the Quest to find the Five Keys of Knowledge! Henceforth, we shall be transported to potential locations where the keys be hidden.. Come join us on our quest to help unlock the clues-- learn to be respectful pirates and aquire the vast treasure that is knowledge!! This will be a web series that everyone can view! We are also pushing for syndication on our Regional Television Networks all throughout upstate New York! If this campaign is successful, we will be shooting a 5 part web series that we think will captivate and inspire audiences of all age groups! Our goal is to drive the importance of teaching literacy, behavioral lessons and general history to our youth. We feel that visual storytelling is paramount when trying to get a message across to the masses. BUT, IF WE DO NOT MEET OUR GOAL, THE PROJECT WILL NOT BE FUNDED. THE MORE WE RAISE, THE BIGGER AND BETTER THE SHOW! The Crew: Captain Richard Crow - A knowledgeable, arrogant, but witty sea dog! Scurvy Joe - A lazy, dirty, yet humerous scallywag. Giggling Gertie - A silly, giggling lass with the ability to calm any situation, but a bit of a stickler for punctuality. Handsome Tom - Full of himself , but the best crew hand a pirate could ask for (when he's not looking in the mirror). Smarty Sam - A by the book, savvy, resident know-it-all, who needs to earn her sea legs. THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR MAKING THIS KICKSTARTER A TRUE SUCESS!! WE CANT WAIT TO GET THIS UP AND RUNNING! YOU ARE ALL FANTASTIC AND WE (THE CAST AND CREW) THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT!! WE ARE IN THIS TOGETHER AND PROMISE TO BRING YOU A SHOW TO BE PROUD OF!!!

title: Peekaboo Planet– The AR App That Turns Screen Time Into Real
description: You know the look. That spark in your kid’s eye when they ask something wild and brilliant— “How big were dinosaurs?” “What’s inside a volcano?” “Can we go to space?” You want to answer. But more than that, you wish you could show them. Peekaboo Planet lets you do exactly that. It turns your home into a living, breathing learning space—without extra gear or complicated setups. One tap, and your kitchen table becomes a jungle. Mars rises in the hallway. A blue whale swims through the living room. These aren’t just “why” moments anymore. They are “see it, feel it, remember it” moments. Not all screen time is the same—and kids know it. Peekaboo Planet was built to turn passive scrolling into active discovery. It’s made for ages 5 to 12. No ads. No fluff. Just one simple goal: turn curiosity into learning. What your child can do: See real-size animals in 3D Watch them appear in your space—walk, roar, eat, move Tap, play, and explore Feed a tiger, open a volcano, orbit a planet Dive into new subjects every week From the ocean floor to the moon—and everything in between Go offline, stay learning Works anywhere, no internet needed Stay safe with built-in limits Screen time boundaries and parent tools included Most learning apps aren’t built for kids. They’re built for tapping through screens. Or watching the same animation again and again. Peekaboo Planet brings the learning to life. Literally. This isn’t just “better than YouTube.” It’s something else entirely. Here’s the science behind the fun: Kids learn more when they’re part of the experience. Studies show hands-on interaction boosts retention by up to 75% compared to passive watching. So when your child builds a rainforest or explores a prehistoric world, they’re not zoning out—they’re locking in real knowledge. That’s what makes Peekaboo Planet stick. Peekaboo Planet is ready to go with a full set of interactive features designed for hands-on learning—no setup, no extra hardware. At launch, you’ll get: 3D animal and object interactions Tap, move, and feed lifelike creatures that respond in your real space. Mini games and quick quizzes Reinforce learning through simple puzzles, matching, and object spotting. Story mode Narrated adventures that guide kids through science, nature, and history. Pop-up facts Tap anything to learn its name, sound, or fun facts on the spot. Offline mode Works anywhere, even without an internet connection. Time limits and progress tracking See what your child has explored and set gentle boundaries for daily use. Safe design No ads. No hidden purchases. Fully COPPA- and GDPR-compliant. What’s Coming Next We’re building on the experience with new features to grow with your child: Scavenger hunts Clue-based activities using AR to encourage movement and problem solving. Trophies and rewards Digital stickers and badges to celebrate progress and encourage return play. Multiplayer mode Take turns or explore together on one device—great for siblings. Creative tools Draw, build, and decorate scenes using virtual objects. Custom avatars Let kids choose or design their animal guide or learning companion. Language support Learn animal names and facts in Spanish, French, and more. Classroom mode A simple teacher dashboard for group learning in schools or at home. Seasonal content Limited-time AR scenes tied to holidays and real-world events. I didn’t start with a business plan. I started with my son zoning out on YouTube, and me feeling guilty every time I handed him a screen. I wanted something better—something that gave us both peace of mind. Peekaboo Planet grew out of that need. First as an idea, then a project, and now an app that turns those moments of curiosity into something real. It’s designed to spark wonder, not just fill time. And it’s built for parents like me who want their kids to learn, explore, and still be kids. The mission is simple: turn everyday screen time into hands-on learning, powered by AR and guided by curiosity. The vision? A generation of kids who grow up not just watching the world—but interacting with it.

title: The Last Worlds Crossed Souls - Open World 3D Action RPG
description: -🎮 The Game🎮 - - 🌎 Welcome to the Planet NESS-444 🌎 - On NESS-444 , every creature can be foe or ally . The Last Worlds: Crossed Souls is an open-world action RPG of exploration, resource gathering and crafting across unique biomes and ancient ruins. Your choices shape the journey as you survive, forge bonds, and uncover the truth behind the planet’s fall. - 🐾 Strange creatures called Nessky fill this world 🐾 - The Nessky inhabit NESS-444, mysterious beings torn between light and darkness. Some guard safe shelters , while corrupted ones strike without mercy. Events of the past have transformed certain species into creatures of devastating power. And in the deepest shadows, ancient rarities rise again—living calamities that challenge every step of your journey. - ⚔️ Play your way 🛡️ - Play your way. Choose to face the journey as Lupio, agile and instinctive, or as Matwin, powerful and determined— you can switch characters anytime. Experiment with 20+ weapons, unlock spells and abilities, customize your stats, and build your own playstyle. Explore, fight, craft, and conquer on your terms. - ⚒️ Craft and try to survive in this hostile world ⚒️ - Your strength comes from what you forge. Experiment with a deep crafting system : create devastating weapons , resilient armor , and rare accessories to adapt to any challenge. Discover special equipment unlocking forbidden areas like the Caves of Dark Reflection or the deadly lands of Toxmoria. Level up , gain skill points, unlock recipes, and turn every resource into survival. -🎁 Rewards 🎁- The standard edition of the game contains the activation key for the platform of your choice once the game is released. Only 1,000 physical copies of the nessky limited edition will be available. It will not be very likely to release more in the future, and we would prefer to create a new limited version so as not to devalue this one. For this Kickstarter campaign only, the Lupio Plush Toy (20 cm) and the exclusive Matwin & Lupio Figurine (25 cm) will be available. They will not be distributed after the campaign so as to preserve their value. Don't miss this Exclusive reward ! -🎯 Stretch Goals 🎯- We are immensely proud of collaborating with Yuko Komiyama-san for the music of the game. -💡 About 💡- The Last Worlds was born with the dream of being able to combine the action-full, character-filled component of RPGs with the incredible freedom and sense of adventure of the Open World and to weave them into a story that is both entertaining and dramatic. The Last Worlds - Crossed Souls, a 3D Action RPG Open World , Third-person videogame with real-time combat developed by Lupio Studios since 2020. It draws inspiration from big titles like Dragon Quest, The Legend Of Zelda, Monster Hunter and Pokemon. -📖 Story 📖- Prepare to leave reality behind; immerse yourself in adventure. Discover our first project: The Last Worlds : Crossed Souls . Set on the alien planet NESS-444 full of surprises and mysteries. In this world on the brink of ruin , you will find the NESSKY . Strange creatures fill this world. Some, like your loyal friend Lupio , will aid you. Others may be hostile, driven by darkness. Your mission is to uncover past mysteries and see where others like you have gone. You're here for a reason. Only you can bring balance back to this planet. Uncover where your special powers come from. You'll need them to overcome the fierce enemies you’ll face on your journey. Are you ready to change your destiny and the fate of the world? The story follows young Matwin and his loyal friend, Lupio . They live in a world without their kind. Together, they will face tough battles and uncover the truth about their past. They will also reveal what caused the planet's ruin. Matwin has the TimeFlame power, which lets him see fragments of past events . However, he struggles to control his powers. Lupio, the last of his kind, is haunted by unclear memories of his past. The origins of his powers are a mystery, and he uses them rarely ,still he has always stood by Matwin, showing his loyalty to their friendship . -🎹 Soundtrack 🎹- We are thrilled to present the original soundtrack for The Last Worlds Crossed Souls, created in exclusive collaboration with Emanuele Marchese , a promising young artist who has cultivated his passion for composition since childhood. Here you can listen to a preview of four tracks featured in the demo available on Steam: You can listen to the other tracks that Emanuele composed here : -🎨 Art Style 🎨- The Last Worlds began as an original RPG, but our great admiration and devotion to the artistic style of our master Akira Toriyama 🙏 inspired us greatly with his works, including Dragon Ball and Dragon Quest/Dragon Warrior. Finding an artist who could be original and at the same time follow a very detailed cartoon style seemed really difficult, but Silvia succeeded in this endeavor and in just a few months created all the icons that are present in the demo, including: -Icons for all objects -Icons for all foods -Icons for all equipment -All menus + HUD The graphics section of The Last Worlds demo has an appealing and beautiful look, and we owe this to her. Thank you, Silvia🧡! If you too like the artistic style of Silvia and would like to commission something for your project , you can follow her on her social media down below : -⚔️ Main Characters ⚔️- An 18-year-old boy lives on the planet NESS-444. He grew up with Lupio in the NESSKY shelter beneath the world tree. His personality shaped by struggles, he faces wild beasts and survives with his strength and powers. Only Lupio can bring out his playful side. Unaware of his origins, he carries a heavy burden that most cannot bear. He can summon temporal flames that show lost fragments of time, but he can't master this power yet. After tough battles and long journeys for answers, he hopes to find rest and draw. His favorite food is flame berries. A creature from the planet NESS-444. He brought Matwin to the NESSKY refuge when he was just a child and has been caring for him ever since. Today there are no other examples left on the planet and his past is shrouded in mistery. He is a very smart and very loyal creature. He is able to sneak into hard-to-reach places and is very agile and strong, making him very helpful in battle. Although he never uses his hidden powers, he is able to restore dying souls before they fade away. He can’t resist hunting neon dragonflies. But often, while chasing them, he gets lost. He loves silver berries. -💻 Platform and Languages 💻- The game will be available on every platform and console , release times on other platforms may vary based on the success of the project. The game will be distributed in Digital and Physical form. The game is in development for PC. In the future it will also be launched on PS5, Xbox Series X and Nintendo Switch. Initially, it will be available in English and Italian . If the project is successful, we will target other languages with the help of translators and partners. We have been developing The Last Worlds Crossed Souls for 5 years and our launch plan consists of releasing the playtest in the first half of 2025 in order to give you a preview of the project and to collect your feedback and report any bugs, after which we will proceed to create the final version to be released by the end of 2026-2027 in case of any contracts. Once the game is released we will continue to update it by adding new content and fixing any remaining issues. Finally we will begin the development of the 3 DLCs. Development times may vary depending on the success of the fundraising campaign. -👔 The Team 👔- Thanks to Sander Van Zanten to being part of the team as the SFX artist ❤️‍🔥 -----Important Note----- After five years of hard work and, above all, thanks to the help of our incredible team , we have managed to release the Steam demo of The Last Worlds Crossed Souls. We would also like to point out that, at the time of the first demo's release, all the code and programming for the demo was done by just one person: Diego. As a result, the game currently has several bugs ; Despite this, we will continue to improve the game with your help, support, and feedback! Diego Programming The Last Worlds : Me Looking At Diego Programming The Last Worlds : -----Lupio Studios Story----- Our love for video games began in our very young age. Since childhood, we've been shaped by the video game world. We've played classics like Zelda, Pokémon, and Monster Hunter. But our biggest inspiration comes from the Dragon Quest saga. Its blend of drama, irony, and important values in a fantasy adventure captured our hearts early on. Now, we've spent four years chasing our dream: making a game together. Despite our limited resources and skills, our passion and hard work pushed us. We aimed for high quality and detail, which made it tough, but we overcame the hardest parts ,now, we're focused on delivering the best experience. But we need support from backers. Backers' support is the key to achieving our vision. Our goal? To create an original, immersive adventure. What you see now is just the beginning. Our hopes are high, both as developers and gamers. If you find our work appealing, please believe in us and you won't regret it. We're Pasquale, Vittorio and Matteo. Three brothers, three gamers, dreaming of creating unforgettable story. Adam is a mentor and inspiration to us. Thanks to his availability and work, we are here today. He helped us through the most difficult times, and his experience on kickstarter was helpful in creating a campaign to the best of our potential! A special thanks from the team at Lupio Studios! Adam too is creating a Kickstarter campaign so don't forget to check it out! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/1779186685/lifelongdeo -📱 Social 📱- -📰 Press Kit 📰- -❓ Why Kickstarter ❓- Can three gamer siblings with limited skills and a small budget achieve their dream video game? We proudly present The Last Worlds: Crossed Souls. After four years of hard work, we want to make our mark. Our indie projects focus on originality, creativity, and a passion for adventure. We aim to connect gamers and developers. Kickstarter makes this possible. It allows you to help turn our ideas into reality. You can take part in developing The Last Worlds while supporting us. We want to know how much this project means to you. As lifelong gamers, we’ve always wondered what it would be like to share our ideas with developers. That’s why we’re here today—to listen to you and break down the barrier between developers and players. We want everyone to leave their mark. We aim for high-quality projects and an engaged community. Join us and make your mark! -⭐ Special Thanks ⭐- -Thanks to Killinx for the beautiful covers art of the game⭐️ -Thanks to Wiz from Telegram Groups of Steam Deck🕹️

title: The Lexicon of Creation: A D&D 5.5e Expansion
description: New Stretch Goal! What's New? The Lexicon of Creation is an upcoming supplemental book for the 2024 edition of Dungeons & Dragons.  Countless character choices can be found in here, including 100 new subclasses, a handful of new species, backgrounds, feats, a new crafting system, and hundreds of new spells and items. 100 New Subclasses A Gravity Knight Fighter, Oath of Death Paladin, a Stoneforged Fighter, and a Fungoid Sorcerer, from left to right. Defy physics as a Gravity Knight .  Unleash unholy power as you take the Oath of Death .  Brush off your opponents blows as a mountain-dwelling Stoneforged .  Be one with nature as a Fungoid .  Navigate new surroundings as a Time-Lost traveler. With so many character options to choose from, you'll never run out of new characters and combinations to try. New Feats & Spells An Oath of Arcana Paladin, Circle of Spirit Walking Druid, Crimson Soul Sorcerer, and a Dungeoneer, from left to right. Become a renowned crafter with the Magical Crafter feat.  Make the most out of your treasure trove as an Attunement Master .  Witness past events through Timewalking .  Undergo an unholy ritual and create for yourself a Phylactery . Wield new, powerful feats and spells uncovered in this compendium. New Items & Crafting A blacksmith, cook, and tinkerer, from left to right. Cut down your foes with a Katana , reinvigorate yourself with a healthy serving of Homebrew , and turn back the clock with the Sands of Time . Craft powerful items with a fleshed out, yet simple crafting system, utilizing 10 different artisan's tools, including the new, Runist's Tools , to create whatever your party needs. Hundreds of items will be at the disposal of the GM to spread throughout your campaign or for you to craft. Artist Erie Dini is our hardworking artist that has worked one-by-one from sketch to finish for each of our characters.  His incredible art style has helped to bring our project to life as well as the imagination of many others. Playtest Playtest Feedback Form Playtest Discord Where are we in the process? The book is already complete (technically)!  All that's left is artwork and the final production, which the funding will be used for.  We'll also be playtesting and fine tuning all content in the meantime. Reward Tiers Add-Ons As we reach new milestones, new add-ons will be made available and bundled with reward tiers. title: New N64, Gameboy, NES & Unity Games from GGS!
description: We've been hard at work cranking out new games and instead of doing one Kickstarter for each game we've decided to launch FOUR games at once and new ports from our library of games. We will also have signed copies of the Five Clans of Tresibra Novels available if you are a fan of the series! This Kickstarter has a ton to offer to take your time and review all of the games and backer rewards. The Kickstarter limits the number of images I can provide so please check out the Youtube Links for game reviews. This is a massive Kickstarter and unfortunately we can only show so many images. Guardian Games Studio is committed to quality games with meaning, heart and a few Dad jokes sprinkled in for good measure. We are probably best known for our series of novels The Five Clans of Tresibra and our Gameboy Color hit Winsley's Guardian, but we are excited to introduce the following games. The images on the N64 carts are only placeholders and the final cover art, boxes and manuals will be designed by John Beech at Go Box it! :) Who I would like to add does an amazing job with all the boxes, manuals and much of the design for GGS. Please review both the Gameboy, NES and N64 games of the same name because there are many differences between the ports. Just a reminder that the N64 versions are not 3D graphics, these are simply ports of the original game with additional content added. We figured that some might be more interested in playing the games on a larger screen or for those N64 collectors. Shipping is kind of a mess for add on items so if you end up buying multiple carts or books and we are far over the needed funds for shipping we will either refund the difference when Kickstarter takes payment at the end or we can include additional copies of games/books of your choice. Thank you for understanding, shipping to some countries and remote areas in the US can be expensive with tracking and insurance on multiple games/books. Soren Rising - The Five Clans of Tresibra. This is a new game for the Gameboy Color with art and programming by the amazing Elvies! With music from Jordan Walters, story, dialog and game design by Spencer Walters and game testing my Matt Ammirati. This side scroller is based on the novel of the same name "The Five Clans of Tresibra: Soren Rising". This is certainly not an easy fly by game, you'll side scroll through all five of the clans territories while battling Re'gul, Crown Gall and Beasts of the Tresibra. Use all of the five different weapons of the clans and make a name for yourself as the true warrior of Tresibra! If you enjoy lore and meaning in your video games you'll enjoy taking a deep dive into the novel. With a top down Super Mario 6 Golden Coin type overworld and Mega Man 6 gameplay style you'll love this new addition to the Guardian Games Studio lineup. We tried to reduce the number of spoilers but below you'll find a quality sneak peak at the game play. You will be able to buy the game for the following systems - Gameboy (Playable on Gameboy Color and Advanced) PC emulation and for the N64!~ The N64 Port will differ from the Gameboy and PC Rom, with some different tunes, frame rates and of course the game will be on a N64 carts! Interested in listening to the novel to understand the lore behind Soren Rising? Check out the link below for the entire audio book. Nathan and Luke - Badasses @ Law. Ever wanted to play as a badass in an adventure side scroller before? How about a badass attorney? Well, if you said yes to either, this might be the game for you! You will be able to buy the game for the following systems - Gameboy (Playable on Gameboy Color and Advanced) PC emulation and for the N64!~ The N64 Port will differ from the Gameboy and PC Rom, with some different sound effects, frame rates and of course the game will be on a N64 carts! In Nathan and Luke: Badasses at Law , take on the role of either Nathan or Luke as you fight your way through over 25 action-packed levels to take down the ultimate villain: the corrupt and demonic President of Dirty Car Dealers Inc. Face off against an army of sinister lawyers who will stop at nothing to defend their leader's wicked deeds. Armed with only your sharp wit and a barrage of truth-bombs & facts fired from your mouth, you'll battle through relentless assaults and five unique bosses in this challenging side-scrolling adventure. With tight, responsive controls that ensure every failure is a result of player error, Nathan and Luke: Badasses at Law offers a perfect pick-up-and-play experience. Choose between Nathan or Luke to experience varied gameplay styles and increase replay value. Prepare to outwit, outmaneuver, and outplay as you defend your client against the forces of corporate corruption in this fast-paced, comedic showdown of justice. This game will test your platforming skills while you battle through legions of dirty attorneys and the 5 unique bosses of Dirty Car Dealers Inc. This is no easy platformer, this game will test your skills like many of the great platformers of old. The game starts out easier but ramps up quickly putting the NES hard name to the test. The N64 port will be called Jesse & Matt Badasses @ Law. Much of the game art will be redone to make the new characters fit and the game mechanics will also be modified. Lastly the storyline will be modified to support a different storyline and area of law. FINAL BOSS - The President of Dirty Car Sales Inc. This game is already in production, so when the Kickstarter ends we will start shipping the game to our backers! (Talk about fast service!) All carts will be produced in Red carts. This will be a limited run game with only about 300 copies being produced. If we ever produce additional copies in the future they will not be the "Arrest Me Red" color. :) Game design, art and programming by Spencer Walters of Guardian Games Studio, Game testing by Matt Ammirati and Rocking Pixel Tunes by Personal Galaxy AKA - Jordan Walters. Jab This! Welcome to Jab This!, where we are making a game that "pokes fun" at the cough cough that we all had to go through. I think many of us really expanded our love of gaming when we were locked down and this game takes the liberty ; ) of creating a game out of it. There will be many more Dad jokes so if you think they are bad now, just wait... This is not meant to be a political game and we do not take sides. I have played the game and it "pokes" fun at both sides. THIS IS A SATIRICAL GAME, WE DO NOT ENDROSE ANY OF THE VIEWS IN THIS GAME, WE ARE SIMPLY PUBLISHING IT. You will be able to buy the game for the following systems - Gameboy (Playable on Gameboy Color and Advanced) PC emulation and for the N64!~ The N64 Port will differ from the Gameboy and PC Rom, with some different sound effects, a small amount of additional art, frame rates and of course the game will be on a N64 carts! This game takes a "shot" at the many years that government overreached when they forced us to all take something that literally did nothing except line their pockets. In Jab This! you play as Dr. Paul Brand a commonsense physician who is out to give the Freedom Jab to as many corrupt politician, government employees and big pharma executives as possible. You'll shoot hypodermic needles full of freedom with the only side effect being them waking up to government overreach and corporate greed. Traverse through the 9 filthiest cities of California and avoid piles of feces that have mutated from being injected by their hosts too many times with boosters. Take on 5 different corrupt political figures (all fake, we don't actually have any current politicians in the game) and for the final boss you'll face off against Dr. Falsey Money Bags a truly evil and maniacal man who's only motivations in life are to cover up his prior indiscretions so he can go back to robbing the taxpayer's blind. This is the perfect gift for the friend of yours that still wears a mask anywhere they go, not for protection (because we all know it offers none) but to virtue signal to everyone else they have been boosted with all the drugs suggested by the government & big pharma like the good little sheep they are. THIS IS A SATIRICAL GAME, WE DO NOT ENDROSE ANY OF THE VIEWS IN THIS GAME, WE ARE SIMPLY PUBLISHING IT. Diabetor and the sugar monsters! This game is a passion project to create something special from something that effects so many people in a negative way. Diabetes is the number 8 killer on the list of diseases that effect Americans and number 10 across the world. I suffered for many years from uncontrolled blood sugars and the complications that followed. 4 years ago I read a book published by Dr. Richard Bernstein and it changed my life. So, in honor of Dr. Richard Bernstein I wanted to spread some of the advice he so eloquently delivered in his book but in a more digestible version for children and those looking to better control their diabetes. You will be able to buy the game for the following systems - Gameboy (Playable on Gameboy Color and Advanced) PC emulation and for the N64!~ The N64 Port will differ from the Gameboy and PC Rom, with some different sound effects, a small amount of additional art, bug fixes from original game, frame rates and of course the game will be on a N64 carts! But don't be fooled this isn't a boring education game, first and foremost the game is fun! I like to compare the game to a cross between Mario and Mega Man. Anyone who enjoys a good retro side scroller will fall in love with its charm and unique approach to incorporating diabetes education and puns. For a more robust overview of the game check out the review from Mike's Gaming Gala! You'll traverse more than 8 levels on your quest to defeat Diabetor and his evil sugar monsters! This game incorporates several different styles of game play.
