Outside of the traditional side scroller you'll also hop on the Insulator's hoverboard on one level and fly over the sugar forest in the Insulator's ship in another. Diabetor and the sugar monsters is filled with fun and exciting game play that the entire family will enjoy! Diabetes doesn't have to be fun to manage but at least this game can be fun to play while learning how to manage it more effectively. None of what is included in this game is medical advice. Information in the game is based on my own personal experience with managing my type 1 diabetes for the last 28 years. Winsley's Guardian This game was created to pay tribute to my daughter Everly who we lost almost 6 years ago. Everly's story is important, especially to any parent who's had a premature and unexpected delivery. Even though we had so little time with her, I cherish those memories and being able to hold her but only for a moment. If you know someone who's gone through this, or lost a child, you know how important keeping their memory alive is. I especially wanted her younger sister Winsley to know that she has someone always watching over her... her Guardian Angel. You'll follow Winsley on her quest through life to find only someone described as her guardian. This action RPG will touch your heart as you follow Winsley through the trials and tribulations that any young girl will be presented with. You will be able to buy the game for the following systems - Gameboy (Playable on Gameboy Color and Advanced) PC emulation and for the N64!~ The N64 Port will differ from the Gameboy and PC Rom, with some added game play (about an additional 20 minutes of game play we couldn't fit on smaller GBC Cart), sounds,  additional art, frame rates and of course the game will be on a N64 carts! This isn't just a cutesy action RPG, we bring elements of EarthBound and Link's Awakening to create a game unlike any before. You'll be swashbuckling with Winsley as she uses her everyday "weapons" to strike the fear into her enemies all while being as cute as a button. You'll traverse through the many stages of life that we will all inevitably follow. Childhood, teen years, young adult, middle age, retirement and finally you will battle death himself to close on an incredible story of a lifetime told by the most talented game creator and artist I have ever had the pleasure of working with. If you are interested in more game play footage you can check out this review by Mike's Gaming Gala on YouTube. Special Thank you to Mike for all his support in reviewing our games. You can play a demo of the game here with this link! https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1cZWSPnB1pw2K6vrWR_KaTDSJw4BtPvpe?usp=sharing Watch yourself progress and mature visually throughout your journey. What this game brings beyond fun is a sense of purpose and meaning to life. I've never played a game before with such deep meaning that still had its main focus being playability and fun. We've poured our hearts into this game and while making the game I felt the real fragility of life and what kind of impact each of us can have on one another. The game isn't a breeze and we made a specific goal to have this be a fair and difficult game with tons of replayability. Keep your eyes out for hidden easter eggs and special messages from our team. Traverse through the different stages of life as dungeons such as Winsley's hometown, the Zoo, School, the Dreamworld, Corporate world, raising children, fighting off old age and much more. Gain the powers of your Guardian to aid you against the bosses in 2D Zelda action/adventure-style Uncover clues and figure out the mystery of who exactly Winsley's Guardian is! The Five Clans of Tresibra Bloodshed - 6 Player Online Dungeon Crawler Board game! Welcome to the world of Tresibra! This online dungeon crawler has been in development for more than 18 months. We first started with a prototype boardgame that had a limited run late in 2023. With the positive feedback we received from the boardgame, the novels and the NES game we went to work on an online multiplayer boardgame using the Unity Engine. This game will only be available for the PC and can only be played with internet access as a USB mailed to you or as a Digital Download. Buy one copy of the game and share it with your five other friends!~ This will be one of the cheapest game nights and with an average game only lasting 60 to 90 minutes you'll be able to play several rounds while you refine your skills! The game is one of the most well balanced with 6 players I've ever played. One of the 6 playing as the "dungeon master" Gummosis. We took the guess work out of learning a new tabletop and created something that is easy to learn but hard to master! We are setting a very low Kickstarter goal to ensure that the game hits its goal as we plan to publish the game on Steam and Itch.io at a later date and higher price. This Kickstarter will fund additional game testing, art, features and music. The game is complete at this time and upon funding the backers will receive their rewards. Choice your clan members carefully! Each player has unique abilities you'll need to master in an effort to stop the Crown Gall and Gummosis in a final battle. Your team will take turns flipping field cards and battling the evil forces of Tresibra. Be careful in your travels traversing the lands of Tresibra as Gummosis controls the field cards, laying traps in your wake attempting to stop the five warriors reach his layer. Check out the soundtrack to the game below! Mystery Gameboy Color and N64 Port - ANNOUNCED BELOW! I thought it would be an interesting concept to offer a new game from GGS that is a complete mystery! All I can tell you is that I have asked a friend of GGS to come up with a game idea that we could design for the Gameboy Color and that would also be portable to the N64. I cant say much about the game I can only say that the game design is by one of my favorite musician Jordan Walters! Because we aren't disclosing a lot about the game we will be selling it at a lower cost compared to our other offerings. This will be available in a Gameboy Color game and N64 game, the N64 cart will have about 10 more content and higher frame rate on a few of the arcade games that are a little more stressful for the GBC system. UPDATE! DO TO A LOT OF LEAKS FROM SOCIAL MEDIA INFLUENCERS WE ARE ANNOUNCING OUR SECRET GAME BELOW! Jordan’s 1980s Adventure invites you to play as Jordan , Guardian Games Studio’s rocking pixel-tune musician! Embark on a totally tubular journey back to the 1980s, where the world is inspired by classic top-down games like Pokémon and EarthBound . You’ll start your day waking up around noon (because, hey, it’s the 80s), doing chores, and grabbing your allowance before heading to the ultimate hangout—the arcade. The overworld offers tons of rad activities, from side quests to snack runs! Don’t forget to hit up the 7/11 for some Clear Pepzi, Shark Bitez Fruit Snacks, Dunkaroos, and Bugles Corn Snacks. Get off your plastic-covered couch, crank up your beatbox, and dive into this epic nostalgic adventure. The goal? Collect cash from various tasks around town, then head to the arcade to master all 12 arcade games, each inspired by iconic classics of the era. Once you’ve crushed every game, prepare for the final showdown against Lucas—the legendary arcade kid with a serious love for the Power Glove. Beat him, and you’ll earn the ultimate title: The Wizard . Every arcade game is a unique level, packed with challenges and retro flair. And of course, the soundtrack is pure 80s magic, composed by Jordan Walters himself, blending inspiration from legendary bands of the decade. This isn’t just another Gameboy Color title; it’s a heart-filled, nostalgia-driven adventure crafted with love by GGS. Fun fact: Jordan is not only an insanely talented musician, but also Winsley’s real-life great-uncle and Spencer’s uncle at Guardian Games Studio! With a killer soundtrack, classic gameplay, and endless love for the 80s, this game promises an unforgettable trip back in time. So grab your favorite cassette, turn up the beat, and get ready for a rad ride into retro glory! You'll play games similar to 1942, Dig Dug, Pac-Man, Squirrel, Joist, Donkey Kong, Defender, Paperboy and many more! ;) Bloodshed The five clans of Tresibra NES game Join us on an EPIC Action RPG, created and published by Guardian Games Studio. You'll get a taste of Zelda, StarTropics and Crystalis in this top down action RPG. 8 Epic Boss Battles, more than 16 different kinds of enemies and 5 very different levels of difficulty and challenge with each of the 5 clansman you can play as in this action packed adventure for the original NES! Interested in listening to the novel? Check out the link below for the audio book read by John Hann! Imagine The Legend of Zelda but being able to play as 5 unique characters with a ton of lore behind each character and the world you traverse. Beautiful Pixel Art by Jesse Warrick, Music by Jordan Davis (Raftronaut), Box art, Manual and Game Label by Ella Reaves, Game Design & Story by Spencer Walters and programming by the amazing Dale Coop! You'll traverse the lands of Tresibra as one of the five clan warriors clashing with Gummosis' army the... Crown Gall and the various beasts that inhabit the lands. This game isn't meant to be "NES hard" but what you will find is fair and rewarding levels of difficulty with a few mind bending puzzles for good measure. This EPIC NES journey is based on the novel series by Spencer Walters. The Five Clans of Tresibra is a fantasy novel published in 2023 with a prequel that was just published! Kickstarter backers at certain levels will be the first to receive a signed copy FIRST EDITION COPY of the prequel before its published to the general public! Most NES games comically lack story and lore, we fixed that! This adventure is based on the first book in the Five Clans saga allowing the player to jump in as shallow or deeply into the lore behind the game as they like. The game is straight forward and isn't filled with tons of text or forced NPC conversations. You'll jump right into the action with as much direction as needed and nothing more... But if you want to dive deep into the lore, we have it by the boat load! We also have the book on audio available on Amazon! You'll be able to journey through the game as Soren Drutt, Keth, Zain or Beckett, each with unique attributes and abilities making traversing the lands of Tresibra a much different experience with each of the five adventurers. There is tons of replayability here and different levels of difficulty based on the warrior you select. Who will you select to appose Gummosis and his armies? For more information on the novel series you can check out the book on Amazon, Audible (read by voice actor John Hann!) or the Guardian Games Studio website . PINBALL The interactive sliding board book for Kids! Tanner is not only an award winning school teacher, he's also my little brother and now author of the interactive kids book Pinball! This was a previously successful Kickstarter and we added it to our GGS Kickstarter to help promote and sell more copies of this cool interactive kids book. My name is Tanner Walters and I am an award winning K-5 STEM teacher in Lakeville, Minnesota. I love incorporating pinball in my classroom and it's a naturally powerful tool to teach children important Science, Coding, Physics, and Artistic Design. Pinball is an essential part of learning in my classroom. Starting from Kindergarten, students create miniature pinball machines to learn about game creation, rules, physics, and the design process. When they get to 5th grade, they create their own working pinball machine with Maker Space supplies and 3D printed parts. Students in all grades get to play (and learn from) an acrylic, see-through pinball machine I made for my classroom. I've decided to dive into a new part of education I've always wanted to get into--publishing a children's book! I didn't want this to be just any book. I wanted this book to be interactive, educational, and allow the young readers to play along as they read. They'll learn about different mechanical parts of a pinball machine and what they do. They will see the physics of the ball as it animates across the page. I also want to build excitement with kids and the silver ball to ensure these beautiful machines instill a special spot in their hearts as it does for us.

title: Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game
description: Special Deals! Magpie Games is excited to bring you Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game , the officially licensed tabletop roleplaying game set in the world of the Temeraire novel series by Naomi Novik! With over a decade of roleplaying design and publishing expertise, Magpie Games is bringing the world of Temeraire to life in a tabletop roleplaying game featuring our innovative Ædana system, newly refined for draconic military adventures. Join us and set off in an immersive roleplaying experience that gives your formation of fighting dragons and brave captains the chance to shape your own stories of duty at war with desire! Download the Quickstart and start playing today! Play The Game Temeraire: The RPG includes setting information for the alternate history of the Napoleonic Era, dynamic systems for carrying out missions across Europe, numerous character types representing the variety of characters fans love from the British Aerial Corps, and even the rules for playing a dragon! Rise into aerial battle. Fly to lands across the world. Face treachery and deceit, alongside honor and nobility. Find your love and fight for it. Save nations by the sweat of your brow and the strength of your scales! Q&A stream with Naomi Novik! Watch the livestream of beloved author of the Temeraire series, Naomi Novik, and Mark Diaz Truman, co-founder & CEO of Magpie Games answering your questions about Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game! Launch party with Naomi Novik! Watch the livestream of Brendan Conway, lead designer for Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game and Naomi Novik, beloved author of the Temeraire series, answering all your burning questions and share in the excitement of the Kickstarter launch! Watch the actual play! Check out the first actual play for the epic new game Temeraire: the Roleplaying Game based on Naomi Novik's award winning book series! Temeraire: The RPG The Temeraire series takes place during an alternative history of the Napoleonic Wars—the series of conflicts led by European coalitions against the first French Empire under the leadership of Napoleon Bonaparte. Though rooted in real world history, Temeraire diverges due to the presence of dragons; often the events you might find in a history book occur similarly, but the existence of dragons reshapes other events completely. Dragons can be as big as a frigate to roughly the size of a person. These great creatures aren’t mere animals. They are as varied as the humans around them; some are intelligent poets and scholars, while others are belligerent warriors. Those who bond with humans become fiercely loyal to their chosen companions, and all dragons are formidable foes in war. In Britain, a newly hatched dragon is encouraged to form a deep and unbreakable bond with the one who “harnesses” it; the bonded human becomes a captain in the British Aerial Corps. The dragon then takes on a crew appropriate to its size, composed of soldiers and officers much like the crew of a naval ship. In Temeraire: The RPG you and your friends take on the roles of human and draconic officers in the British Aerial Corps, carry out missions for your nation, and brave dangerous battles to save the day! The setting of the Temeraire series is like our own with a few unique differences. Here is what you need to know: Dragons are varied and complex. Dragons have lived throughout the world for ages and they’ve shaped the way the alternate history of this series has developed. They have complex inner-lives, social structures, and can accomplish great feats. They’re not seen as pets or animals, but are on equal footing with humans and beings to be respected. Great Britain leads multiple coalitions against France. The British formed coalitions of nations to oppose the French, their revolutionary ideas, and their imperial ambitions. Each coalition was a slightly different combination of nations, and each individual war ended with a treaty and terms before the fighting began again. The British Aerial Corps operates as an isolated branch of the military. Among aviators, being a Captain who has bonded with a dragon is a high honour. However, outside the corps aviators are viewed as rather scandalous figures. The training practices of the Aerial Corps are secret and their ranks are insular. Coalition members know they need aviators, but it doesn’t stop them from being quietly judged. Every culture has a different relationship with dragons. Throughout the world, dragons and humans have forged relationships that differ from culture to culture. From the British largely separating dragons from their human population and relegating them to military service, to China’s deep-rooted inclusion of dragons in their everyday lives, no two human societies think the same way about dragons. Temeraire is a series of alternate history fantasy novels by author Naomi Novik. These nine beloved novels follow the brave British Aerial Captain William Laurence and his dragon, Temeraire, as they undertake missions to fulfill their duty to their country, fight in dangerous battles against French forces, and ultimately reshape history for both humans and dragons alike. If you’d like to immerse yourself in the world, take a dive into the novels and experience the award-winning story, starting with His Majesty’s Dragon ! Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game is a way for you to experience the excitement of draconic battles and Regency era drama all for yourself! The tabletop roleplaying game supports approximately 3-5 players, with one taking on the role of a gamemaster responsible for portraying the world and adjudicating the rules, and the rest taking on the role of their own individual character. The game is designed for ongoing stories, as the characters pursue their dreams and face the consequences of their choices. In this game, you and your friends create characters —both humans and dragons!— who are embroiled in the conflicts of the Napoleonic age. Caught between their duties and their desires, your characters must balance their obligations to country, unit, and each other against their hearts’ strongest yearnings. You play members of a flight formation—a group of dragons and their crew who take on missions together. You could be the lead dragon in the formation, a captain bonded with that dragon, or even a signaler on a dragon in charge of ensuring everyone knows their orders in the air! Formations, and the British Aerial Corps, have a chain of command that must be respected, but no one role in the game is more important than another. No matter what your role is in the formation, you contribute to the missions and ensure its success. Missions can be anything from engaging foes in an aerial battle to sneaking into enemy territory to retrieve vital troop deployment information. Different missions allow for different members of the formation to shine and apply their skills and training in unique ways! British society during this era of history is a silken cage composed of both the neverending demands of your family and class and the weighty responsibilities of your role in the formation. Yet, amidst those burdens, you’re still a complex human being with their own wants and needs. To reflect the push and pull between what a character wants and what a character feels obligated to do, this game uses a system of duties and desires. Your duties are the orders you have and the commitments you’ve made, your loyalty to your nation, the cause, and the people around you. Your ongoing obligations and responsibilities that centre you in society and ground you. Your desires are your personal goals and things you want for yourself beyond the military and the social orders that constrain you. They’re not idle wants, they’re burning passions that help define who you are as a person. You can invoke your duties and desires during a mission to aid in your rolls and get better results after your roll. When you invoke a duty, your commitment to your obligations allows you to change any one die to a hit, rising above the moment to achieve some success; when you invoke a desire, your burning passion allows you to reroll as many dice as you want—your desire urging you on to greatness! However, duties and desires can also complicate your life. Duties restrict what you might do; if you want to act in a way your duty would restrict, then you must roll a test of your duty. Desires push you to act in their pursuit; if you want to ignore a desire, then it must be tested. If your test of duty or desire goes poorly you’ll have to act in accordance with it…or weaken its hold on you. Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game uses the Ædana System™, a new game system built upon many lessons the team at Magpie Games have learned over the past decade of game design. Ædana is built for flexibility, with a simple central dice mechanism alongside more complex and intricate conflict systems to flesh out exciting moments. You can read a lot more about the specifics of the system and how to run it in our Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game quickstart, here! At heart, Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game uses challenge rolls to resolve moments of uncertainty and tension. A challenge roll has a player pick up a bunch of six-sided dice: Dice for an appropriate attribute, usually between 0 and 4 A skill die, if you have a Trained or better applicable skill A die for an asset (resources or equipment), if you have something useful to the situation A die for good circumstances that gives you an advantage Here’s an example of what assembling a challenge roll looks like: Nocturna, a British longwing, just completed her training and joined a formation with the illustrious dragon Cinerax. The young dragon knows she earned her position, but she wants to make a good impression on Cinerax. A training run is just the place to do it! Nocturna knows it takes a lot to catch her formation leader’s attention so she decides to try a particularly impressive maneuver—saving time on her run by flying directly through the rocky formations off the coast rather than around them! For the maneuver Nina, Nocturna’s player, looks at Nocturna’s Body attribute – a 2, so Nina takes two dice. Then, she looks at Nocturna’s skills. Agility is the skill for speed and dexterity, and Nocturna’s Agility is Trained. She adds another die to her roll, for a total of three dice. Nocturna’s trained for this, the weather is good, and only a few weeks ago she tried this maneuver with her captain, Heather Kensington, who now confidently pats her neck—she’s got this! The GM tells Nina, Nocturna has favorable circumstances and Nina takes an additional die. Nina picks up the four dice and rolls! On any challenge roll, you’re looking for 5’s and 6’s, called hits. No hits, and you get a defeat: The GM says what happens, and it won’t be good. One hit, and you get an unstable result: you can make it a success, but only if you pay a cost or face a complication. Otherwise, it's a defeat. Two hits, and you get a success: you get what you wanted in full! Three or more hits, and you get a triumphant success: you get what you wanted and then some! There’s more to explore in terms of the different advantages skills can give you, different kinds of resources and equipment you can pull from, and special abilities you might have that give you some edge…but on the whole, that’s it! Well, except for one exciting way to bring more depth to your story… The Ædana System uses conflicts as an optional way to expand particularly intense moments of uncertainty. Conflicts play out a bit like minigames, with their own procedures designed to reflect the particulars of that scene. The quickstart includes conflicts for Aerial Battles and Balls, but the core game will have many more conflicts! Conflicts are designed to give game groups new options for surprising play, without making demands. Any moment that a conflict comes up could probably be resolved by a few simple challenge rolls instead! But a conflict really focuses and creates tension while producing surprising and deep results. A conflict can take your narrative in a direction you’d never expect! Be sure to check out the conflicts in the Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game quickstart ! When you sit down to start playing Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game , first you fill in some details of your formation as a group. You’ll decide what nation you serve (if any!) and in what capacity you function as a formation, who is a human and who is a dragon, and what roles your characters have within the formation as a whole. The core book is mostly aimed at creating formations in the British Aerial Corps, but the wider possibilities include mercenary formations and formations for entirely different nations! After you’ve settled at your initial formation, you’ll work with the GM to determine your initial orders—what your formation is tasked to do at the start of the game! Then, you go to work creating your PCs based on that starting information. Every PC is built by picking one option in each of the six different Identities, categories that are specific to humans and dragons: Human Identities: Position - What is your rank and job in the formation? Are you a captain? A signaller? Nationality - What is your defining nationality? What brings you to fight? Service Record - What is your level of experience as a soldier? Have you seen combat? How has it affected you? Station - What’s your role in the broader society? Are you a wealthy noble? An impoverished tradesperson? A striving immigrant? Temperament - What is your general disposition and demeanor? Are you jovial and warm? Straightforward and cynical? Determined and unyielding? Distinction - What makes you stand out among the other characters? Are you a spy for a foreign power? A legendary war hero? A scion of an important line? Dragons Identities: Breed - What kind of dragon are you? A Malachite Reaper? A Longwing? A Regal Copper? Age - How old are you, relatively speaking? Are you a newborn, eager to see the world? A senior dragon, rich with experience but slowing down? Education - How much have you learned about the world? Are you an academic soul, often lost in books? A well-traveled adventurer always looking for new experiences? Service Record - What is your level of experience in war? What important events have transpired in your history of service so far? Temperament - What is your general disposition and demeanor? Are you fiery and ambitious? Possessive and controlling? Delightful, but restrained? Distinction - What makes you stand out among the other characters? Are you a diminutive or prodigious dragon for your breed? A partriach or matriarch of a long line? Are you the possessor of a unique draconic ability? Each Identity shapes who your character is fictionally and mechanically. Perhaps it gives you some skills; perhaps you gain some resources or equipment; perhaps it provides an ability or a trait that tweaks the rules for you. After you’ve made your choices, you have your own unique character, ready to serve in the British Aerial Corps! Items & Add-ons Check here for details on items you can get through this Kickstarter! All artwork presented is not final and subject to change. More items will be unlocked through stretch goals as the campaign goes on. You can purchase add-ons for your pledge through a drop-down menu when confirming your payment details on Kickstarter. It will add the additional cost to your pledge before finalising your payment. Reward Tiers Back now to get your hands on Kickstarter-only pricing for the Temeraire: The Roleplaying Game and all its accessories! Stretch Goals With your help, we can make Temeraire: the Roleplaying Game even better – we've lined up exciting stretch goals ranging from new game content to physical accessories. Every flight crew is better with friends! Please let your friends know about the project...we'd love to see them join the mission too! Virtual Tabletop Support At 5,000 follows, we'll work with the helpful online platform Roll20 to bring the game to your virtual table! This implementation will be available for free to everyone who backs at the Digital Only tier and above. Art Print When unlocked, we'll create a gorgeous 8”x10” print featuring the evocative art of Temeraire! Everyone who backs at a level that includes physical stretch goals receives it for free, and it will be available for purchase as an add-on! Character Sheet Upgrade When unlocked, we'll provide a multitude of printable character sheets! Standard, form-fillable, and luxury options! Download, print, and play with your friends in unparalleled style. Dragon Pin When unlocked, we will create a soft enamel pin featuring the celestial dragon, Temeraire! Everyone who backs at a level that includes physical stretch goals receives it for free, and it will be available for purchase as an add-on! Russian Empire Setting Options When unlocked, we'll add details of the Napoleonic Era Russian Empire in the world of Temeraire, providing plentiful setting information and story hooks so you can play formations undertaking missions in that part of the world. The Kingdom of Prussia Setting Options When unlocked, we'll add details of the Napoleonic Era Kingdom of Prussia in the world of Temeraire, providing plentiful setting information and story hooks so you can play formations undertaking missions in that part of the world. New Mission: Little Wars When unlocked, we'll create a new mission you can use either for a one-shot game or to include as part of a larger campaign. For this stretch goal, we will add the mission "Little Wars", about guerrillas fighting Napoleonic forces as they move through Portugal and Spain. Dice Bag When unlocked, we will create a dice bag to hold all of your custom Temeraire: the Roleplaying Game dice from this campaign and more! The Dice Bag is an embroidered velvet dice bag customized for Temeraire: The RPG. Everyone who backs at a level that includes physical stretch goals receives it for free, and it will be available for purchase as an add-on! Human Character Options for the Russian Empire When unlocked, we'll provide new character options for human characters coming from the region of the Russian Empire and its environs. Dragon Character Options for the Russian Empire When unlocked, we'll provide new character options for dragon characters coming from the region of the Russian Empire and its environs. Dragon Chart Poster When unlocked, we will create a stunning 11"x17" dragon chart poster featuring an array of different dragons from around the world and showcasing the varied sizes of all the different breeds, the dragon chart is the perfect accessory any budding naturalists with an interest in the Order Draconia like Sir Edward Howe. Everyone who backs at a level that includes physical stretch goals receives it for free, and it will be available for purchase as an add-on! Dragon & Human Character Options for the Kingdom of Prussia When unlocked, we'll provide new character options for dragon & human characters coming from the region of the Kingdom of Prussia and its environs. Shipping Shipping will be charged during the pledge manager phase of the campaign – when you select your final rewards, we will charge you for shipping based on the best available rates at the time; if your order contains a large number of rewards, your shipping cost will rise. Our estimated costs for shipping are as follows: All shipping is US/EU/CA/UK/AU-friendly. We will cover the cost of importing rewards into those regions, and our reshippers will do their best to ensure that you receive the book from a local address. Pledges shipping to the United States, Canada, Australia, or New Zealand will not incur any additional taxes or customs fees. Backers in the United Kingdom and European Union will be charged VAT during the pledge manager phase of the campaign. Magpie Games will not charge any additional taxes or customs fees to regions not listed above. However, packages sent outside these regions will be shipped Delivery Duty Unpaid and backers will be responsible for paying any taxes or fees imposed by their destination country. We are able to ship almost anywhere in the world except for the following regions: Africa, Central America, South America, Middle East, Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan), and Eastern Europe (Russia, Ukraine, Belarus). Unfortunately, we cannot find a reliable way to ship to those regions. We're sorry! You can read more about our shipping policies in the FAQ! Retail shipping for this campaign is free for most retailers. If you are a retailer located in the United States, Canada, European Union or United Kingdom you will not be charged for shipping if you pledge at a retail tier. Instead, we’ll cover the shipping as a thank you for supporting our work. We know operating a retail store is hard work even in the best of times, and we appreciate you all a ton. For retailers outside of the regions listed above, shipping rates will be charged using the best available rates to the destination country at the time of fulfillment. For more information about shipping to a specific region, please email us at info@magpiegames.com. All digital products will be fulfilled through Roll20. We will deliver coupon codes for you to add all digital products to your Roll20 library via pledge manager digital downloads. While many parts of the supply chain are still reeling from the global pandemic (and the evolving tariffs situation in the United States), we're cautiously optimistic about the timeline for these books. We've got a ton of experience getting games into the hands of backers, and we've weathered challenges and obstacles that most people haven't ever seen. We're excited to print and ship these games! That said, we know that we've often run late. One reason we're excited about our new releases is that we have been working hard to better estimate the work needed and sticking to our proposed schedule—Rapscallion went out to backers on time last year, and we are on pace to deliver the both the Root: Ruins & Rolls Kickstarter and the Fallen London RPG Kickstarter within a few months of our original expected timelines (even with the disruptions from the tariffs) for both projects. Please note that it is likely the production of this book will overlap with other Magpie Games crowdfunding campaigns. While we do our best to deliver every campaign in a timely manner, some delays may arise and other campaigns may launch on their own timelines. We ask that all backers be patient with us—no one wants to ship these games more than us! Magpie Games stands with many other creators, artists, and writers against the use of GenAI. The technology is a constant and unethical violation of copyright laws, made worse by  disastrous social and environmental impact caused by its use. We are passionate about ensuring all of our products are made by human beings. In regards to illustration, we work with human artists—some new and some established—through a multi-step process: from sketches to tights to full color where we (along with the licensors) provide notes or approve each step. To facilitate a healthy collaborative process, we provide detailed art specifications and clear feedback at every stage of our work together. While errors or inconsistencies sometimes occur, they are fully human-made errors and artistic decisions. We are proud to work with and support the real artists who bring our products to life. We do ask artists to sign agreements explicitly prohibiting the use of GenAI in any part of their process, and we hold them accountable to those agreements when necessary. If you see something you suspect may be GenAI, please email us at info@magpiegames.com. We're happy to look into it!  We are human too, doing our best to navigate the current landscape, and mistakes can and do happen. We strongly encourage everyone in the community to join us in our stance against GenAI and to be thoughtful about the very real harm AI accusations can cause to artists creating genuinely wonderful, non-AI artwork.

title: Starscape: Found-family Space Adventures
description: After four years of development and playtesting, Golden Lasso Games is thrilled to present Starscape . With your help we will produce a stunning, full-color, 200+ page core book filled with amazing art and layout that is out of this world! 🚀 What is Starscape? Starscape , a sci-fi tabletop roleplaying game where you are part of a starship crew journeying through space, bonding through adversity, and becoming a found-family . You build your ship and crew, then play to find out if your characters trust each other enough to unite for a shared purpose, or if your differences and the challenges of living in space drive you apart. Individual game sessions usually focus on exploration, overcoming obstacles, or facing threats, but long-term the stories are about how the crew's trust in each other changes over the course of your travels. Starscape is inspired by episodic science fiction stories, like Star Trek, Farscape, Firefly, Battlestar Galactica, Babylon 5 , and the book A Long Way to a Small, Angry Planet by Becky Chambers. Starscape includes a session zero worldbuilding process to unites everyone’s vision and expectations before you create your ship or your characters. This sets the tone and flavor of your game. If you are playing in an existing IP or setting, this goes pretty quickly. If you are collaboratively building something new, you will answer the questions as a group so that everyone agrees on the setting of your story. Setting the Scene Your group will decide what flavor of science fiction you want. Do you want to do utopian exploration, post-apocalyptic, space opera, or maybe retrofuture! The possibilities are endless! Describe your Crew Now it's time to decide what kind of crew you are! You choose between: Trained Service Members - You have been trained by an influential organization, but are mostly autonomous. Choose this if your crew comes together to handle situations with far-reaching impact, such as diplomatic missions, intergalactic politics, rescuing whole civilizations, exploring, and going where no one has gone before. Independent Operators - You are your own bosses and take jobs as you get them. Select this if you want to deal with smaller-scale stories involving the financial and moral challenges of day-to-day life as spacers. Your goal is simple: find a job and keep flyin’. Fortune's Fools - Chance or fate has forced your group together and you are making the best of it, despite the complications. Select this option if you want to deal with the challenge of maintaining a shared purpose for your crew while you bounce around the galaxy. Are you being hunted? Are you looking for someone or something? Or, maybe you’re just doing everything you can, looking for a way home. The ship is the crew’s home and at the heart of your game. Similar to the Sun, it’s the warm, safe center of the characters' universe, with the beautiful dangers of space swirling and orbiting around it. It should, usually, be a safe place where the crew can unwind and be themselves. The custom touches that you put on your ship during worldbuilding and throughout the campaign are vital to making it unique.  Think of the USS Enterprise (any of them), The Millenium Falcon , Serenity , Moya , or the Battlestar Galactica , just to name a few of the iconic ships that have captured the hearts of their crews (and sci-fi fans) throughout the years. Those are all great touchpoints for making the ship in your campaign special. You will choose one of 5 ship types: The Behemoth - a huge transport, designed as a colony, military, or cruise ship The Flagship - a high-tech starship with advanced abilities The Light Freighter - a small to mid-sized cargo carrier The Living Being - a giant living organism that we live inside or on top of The Throwback - a steam or sail-powered vessel resembling those of another era Once you pick your ship, you will customize it even further by describing your ship, deciding what type of propulsion it uses, if it has defenses or weapons and, if so, what kind, and the fun quirks that make it unique. After you build your ship, it's time to assemble your crew! Six character types are included in the Starscape quickstart. They are: The Civilian - The Civilian is a dealmaker. Their preferred battleground is a negotiation table or fancy social event, and words are their weapon of choice. They know how people think and are savvy enough to use it to their advantage. The Civilian can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Diplomat, the Religious Leader, or the Entrepreneur. Touchstones: Quark, Lwaxana Troi, Kai Winn, Star Trek ; Inara, Firefly ; Rygel, Farscape ; Londo Mollari, Babylon 5 The Greenhorn - The Greenhorn’s considerable talents are matched with equal amounts of naïveté. They are usually new to traveling the stars, and are grappling with all the emotions and uncertainty that comes with adventures in space. The Greenhorn can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Fresh-faced Graduate, the Prodigy, and the Stray. Touchstones: Ensign Kim, Nog, Wesley Crusher, Star Trek; John Crichton, Farscape (early seasons); Edward, Cowboy Bebop The Hot Shot - The Hot Shot is impressive. To others they appear cool, capable and fearless in the face of danger. Half of their crewmates want them and the other half want to be them, but in reality, the Hot Shot is hiding their emotional baggage and nagging doubts. The Hot Shot can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Famous Ace, the Rebellious Maverick, and the Pilot for Hire. Touchstones: Kirk, Riker, or Paris, Star Trek ; Wash, Firefly ; Starbuck, Battlestar Galactica; John Sheppard, Stargate: Atlantis The Rebel - The Rebel is not a person who enjoys violence, but it became an inextricable part of their life when they dedicated themselves to fighting for a cause. That fight is behind them now, but they are still carrying the experience with them. The Rebel can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Freedom Fighter, the Saboteur, or the Redeemed. Touchstones: Kira Nerys, B'Elanna Torres, Star Trek ; Mal Reynolds, Firefly ; Cara Dune, The Mandalorian ; Sabine Wren, Star Wars: Rebels ; Aeryn Sun , Farscape The Unfamiliar - The Unfamiliar is decidedly different from their crewmates and their unique nature sets them apart. There are some aspects of normal beings that they struggle to understand, such as emotions, interpersonal relationships, or biological functions. The Unfamiliar can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Artificial Life Form, the First-Contact Species and the Unknown Origin. Touchstones: Original Spock, Data, Odo, or Seven of Nine, Star Trek ; Kosh , Babylon 5 The Warrior - During their adventures, the Warrior has done bloody things. Many other beings may not understand the conflict that rages in the Warrior as they are simultaneously proud of some accomplishments and haunted by others.  The Warrior may have one of three backgrounds: the Warrior Culture, the Military Career or the Mercenary. Touchstones: Ka D'Argo, Farscape: Worf, Star Trek: The Next Generation; Roberta "Bobbie" W. Draper, The Expanse; Zoë Alleyne Washburne, Firefly; Susan Ivanova, Babylon 5 The full version of Starscape also includes: The Explorer - The Explorer is driven by an unquenchable need for discovery and has one specific goal that keeps them out of the lab and among the stars. The Explorer can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Medical Researcher, the Academic Scholar, and the Scientific Crusader. Touchstones: Simon Tam, Firefly ; Captain Picard, Star Trek: The Next Generation ; Daniel Jackson, Stargate ; Stephen Franklin, Babylon 5 ; John Crichton, Farscape The Gifted - The Gifted has exceptional, metahuman abilities that they were either born with or obtained through a life-changing event. The Gifted may have one of three backgrounds: the Untrained Talent, the Professional, or the Hunted. Touchstones: Deanna Troi, Star Trek: The Next Generation; Zhaan, Farscape; River Tam, Firefly; Lyta Alexander, Babylon 5 The Normal - The Normal is a dependable and versatile member of the crew.  They aren’t flashy,  so are often taken for granted or overlooked, but a lot of the crew’s success is due to the Normal. Just don’t wear a red shirt and you will be fine! The Normal may have one of three backgrounds: the Dependable, the Oddball, and the Assistant Touchstones: Miles O’Brian, Star Trek: The Next Generation ; Rom, Star Trek: Deep Space 9 ; Neelix, Star Trek: Voyager; Vir Cotto, Babylon 5 The Outsider - The Outsider has a dubious past that, whether it is from their own actions or the violent actions of a group to which they belonged, others have legitimate reasons to be suspicious of them. The Outsider can choose from one of three backgrounds: the Double Agent, the Exiled Enemy, or the Criminal Past. Touchstones: Garak, Star Trek: Deep Space 9 ; Jayne, Firefly ; Faye Valentine, Cowboy Bebop ; Vala Mal Doran, Stargate SG-1 🎲 Mechanics Starscape is built on a Powered by the Apocalypse (PBTA) foundation, with enhancements that tailor it to found-family space stories. Each crewmate is built from one of ten playbooks that provide a selection of moves that accomplish tasks. Most of those moves are resolved with a 2d6 die roll, which is adjusted by adding stat and skill modifiers. High results give you what you want, but all roll outcomes are designed to move the story forward in engaging ways. Players only roll when the outcome of an action is in question or might impact the game narrative. For example, a trained pilot does not need to make a roll to do easy maneuvers or hold course under calm circumstances. That is their job; of course they can do it. However, that same pilot does need to roll to land the ship if it is badly damaged or during a massive superstorm. The added pressure and the major impact on the plot necessitate the use of a randomizer to make the outcome more interesting. Trust is at the core of all relationships, especially when facing the many hazards of space travel. In Starscape , Trust is represented in the form of a game currency that must be wagered or spent to access Crew Moves, which create narrative moments between PCs. Sometimes when you put your Trust on the line and it pays off, but other times things go sideways, and you lose the Trust of your companions. Backgrounds are the biggest choice you make after you pick what character playbook you want to use. A characters background does not only dictate their past experiences, but their future asperations and their relationship with the crew. Skills represent knowledge gained through experience and training. Anyone can try to fix an engine, but an engineer has been trained to do it. To represent this, you add a +1 to any roll if the GM agrees that skill is applicable. For example, if a player wants to punch someone in the face, they roll Force is Necessary and add +1 to the roll for their Fighting skill. Starting skills are selected by answering the question from your chosen background because, while skills do have mechanical benefits, their main purpose is to reinforce the importance of a character’s backstory and add to the narrative. Stats represent the physical and mental abilities of your character. They cannot be raised higher than +2 and do not change very much over the course of your campaign. Each stat has one of the following values: -1 is below average, 0 is average, +1 is good, +2 is exceptional. Body - Physical acts like strength, dexterity and athletic ability Brains - Analytical, informational processing and academic skills Heart - Emotional intelligence, empathy, understanding and caring Savvy - Common sense, street smarts and cunning Courage - Steadiness, valor, and sense of purpose Starscape tells emotional and dynamic stories about journeys through space. Feel free to try anything and see what happens! Sometimes you will be able to just do things by saying you do them, especially if there isn’t any pressure or time constraints on your character. However, sometimes the things you do trigger a move, which means that the outcome is important or uncertain and you will use game mechanics to find out what happens. Pay attention to the specific wording of each move to understand when it triggers. Starscape has Basic Moves that anyone can do, Crew Moves that are used for interpersonal relationships between crewmates, and Playbook Moves that are abilities unique to each character. Seeing Red Each playbook has a unique list of triggers for this move. If any of the things on that list happens, this move triggers immediately and you must act on it at that moment. Technobabble: Once a scene, when you describe an action using complicated, technical, futuristic vocabulary, you get a bonus to your roll. Starscape even provides a handy-dandy chart to help you come up with technobabble on the fly! The system focuses on the emotional consequences of events and their impact on characters. These emotional consequences are represented by marking Conditions, and the array of Conditions vary for each playbook. Conditions may result from social interactions, but also from physical injuries. All physical harm heals in a dramatically-appropriate amount of time narratively, but that doesn’t clear the emotional Conditions that the injuries caused. Your leg may have healed, but the emotional resentment, anger, hopelessness, or grief that lingers can’t be fixed in the med-bay or bacta tank. Conditions can only be cleared as move results specify. Conditions are linked to your character’s stats, with two Conditions listed under each stat. If both Conditions under a stat are marked, that stat becomes “crashed,” which means that it changes to -1 and you lose a Trust. 🛰️ Media & Press Listen to the CritShow play a one-shot of Starscape Watch Happy Jacks RPG's ongoing campaign of Starscape Listen to Happy Jacks RPG 's ongoing campaign of Starcape Press Articles TechRaptor's article on Starscape Fandomentals' article on Starscape NerdBot article on Starscape 🌟 Rewards 🪐 Pledge Levels This is an overview of our pledge levels. Please read the descriptions in the tiers for more details. ☄️ Stretch Goals 👩🏼‍🚀 Meet the Team 🌓 Transparency We understand that supporting a crowdfunding campaign is all about trust. We will endeavor to keep you informed about our progress on finalizing and publishing the game. Where is the money going? Our goal of $12,000 is the very base cost to finish the production of Starscape . The majority of that figure will go to manufacturing the books, with the next largest share going to art and layout for the full book. If we go beyond $12,000, we will also be able to recoup some of the costs that have already been invested in the development of Starscape. How long will this take? Our goal is to have Starscape delivered to backers before the end of 2025. Fall 2024 - Collect feedback from the quickstart and continue playtesting Winter 2024/Spring 2025 - Finalize the manuscript, start final layout and art Spring/Summer 2025 - Begin manufacturing Starscape . This generally takes about 6 months and is somewhat dependent on the factory. Fall/Winter 2025 - Starscape arrives and is shipped out to backers! This timeline is what we will strive for, but many parts of the supply chain are still unstable due to the Covid pandemic and other factors. Some delays may arise that are beyond our control, but we will always be honest and transparent with you about any production issues. Kickstarter Terms: The following Terms are accepted by you, the backer, when you pledge, so we can ensure smooth delivery for all. Surveys not filled in after 2 months of final delivery (from the "we are shipping" update) or missing reward requests after 2 months of your game shipment will be treated as a no reward pledge. Please help us get you your rewards by emailing us with any issues you may have and filling in your survey in a timely manner! Watch for updates on all shipping statuses. All our major communications will be via Updates. By pledging to this project, you acknowledge that the final look of the project and the rewards are subject to change and may differ from what is presented while the Kickstarter campaign was active. If you do not accept these terms, please do not pledge on this project but instead wait for the possibility of a general release copy. We will always do our best to provide exactly what was pictured, but sometimes small details change or a design is removed and replaced with another, etc. 🌎 Shipping Shipping will be charged for this campaign through the pledge manager when the product is ready to be delivered. We will charge VAT for the UK and EU pledges at that time as well. NOTE: Due to a mistake, some backer levels are charging shipping. We set the prices as low as possible and will give all backers credit for what they pay now when shipping happens in 2025. Choose the lowest shipping option available for your chosen level! Estimated shipping costs for a single copy of Starscape : USA: $8- $12 (Ships from USA) UK: £10- £14 (Ships from UK) EU: €16 - €22 Canada: $25-$30 (Ships from USA) Australia & NZ: $25-34 China: $10 - $16 Japan, South Korea, Phillipines: $24 - $32 Global shipping continues to be uncertain, and these prices may be different by the time the game ships in 2025. Our commitment is that all our backers will get their products in excellent condition. Please note the following: We are unable to ship to Russia, Ukraine, Afghanistan, Belarus, Iran, Iraq, Syria, South and Central America (except Mexico & Brazil), Pakistan, and Nigeria. Israel may have additional fees due to dangerous handling being imposed by couriers to the region. All PDF products will be fulfilled through DriveThruRPG . Contact us at info@goldenlassogames.com if you have questions about shipping! 💫 Golden Lasso Games Golden Lasso Games is a woman-owned tabletop games company, located in Los Angeles, California. Formed in 2018, the owner Kimi Hughes, wanted to create games that empower players and excite the imagination. In 2019, GLG released its first game, Virgins & Vixens , an RPG about breaking the tropes of women in fairy tales. A few years later their first Kickstarted project, Decuma: the R&D for your RPG, won a gold ENnie. You can see more of their work and upcoming projects at goldenlassogames.com .

title: The Good Dog: Chasing Shadows
description: Click to view the game's Steam page! Click to join my Discord server! Has your dog ever stared into the darkness, barking at something you couldn't see? Maybe they've growled at a quiet hallway in the dead of night or watched an empty corner of your ceiling, tracking something invisible with eerie focus. In The Good Dog: Chasing Shadows , step into the paws of a loyal dog defending its owners from paranormal entities. The game will launch with three game modes that can be played alone or with friends , with a fourth already planned post-launch. Each mode will ship with an assortment of settings and tweaks, allowing you to shape it into an experience that is as terrifying, or as close to the opposite, as you want. Stretch Goals New Game Mode - Herd ($25K) In Herd, you'll play as a dog guarding a farm full of livestock. One night, you might find yourself fending off a pack of hungry wolves—the next, something far more paranormal may stalk you from the cover of the forest... Defend your farm and its animals from the threats lurking in the darkness, either alone or with your friends! Modes In Protect , your home is your battleground. Every night, waves of terrifying entities invade, threatening the safety of your sleeping human companions. As the family dog, it's your job to keep the paranormal at bay. Distract the entities with your bark or your squeaky toy, or attack them if they get too close—whatever it takes to keep them away from your family. Larger maps will be more difficult to protect than smaller ones, as a higher number of sleeping family members can spawn around the house. You'll need to manage your time and tools wisely to keep everyone safe. Can you survive until morning? At the end of the world, your family is sick and starving, and they need your help. In Fetch , you're tasked with venturing out into a desolate world to retrieve supplies your family needs to survive. Explore abandoned towns and decaying buildings while avoiding the terrifying entities that haunt the places you once called home. As the days pass, your job will become harder. Resources will spawn less often and farther apart, and your daily resource target will become more demanding, all while the dangers outside grow stronger. In Discover , your task is simple: explore . This mode is playable on every map in the game, including the hub level where you and your friends will spawn when you invite each other to a lobby. Roam the maps and discover their secrets, either with or without enemies spawning around you. In this mode, various activities will be scattered around each map, so keep your eyes open for new games and toys to play with! Post-launch , I will be releasing a full Story Mode as a free content update. See the " Roadmap " section for more details! In the Story Mode , immerse yourself in the game's richly detailed environments as you uncover why the paranormal creatures have targeted you and your family. Each environment can be explored freely, with new sections of the map opening up as time passes and as you make discoveries about the world. Every puzzle you solve brings you one step closer to saving your family. Be vigilant, however; the entities will be tracking you throughout your journey. Using your unique abilities, you’ll need to avoid these threats at all costs—or take a chance at slowing them down by fighting tooth and claw. Gameplay Use your keen sense of smell to scour the area for hidden tools. Dig up buried items to solve puzzles and fight back against the paranormal. Roll over in mud to mask your scent and temporarily hide from threats. Bark at immaterial entities to disperse them, or at physical enemies to draw their attention away from your family. And if all else fails, use your teeth. In The Good Dog: Chasing Shadows , there are many ways to progress and personalize your experience. Level up by playing any of the game's modes to unlock new cosmetics—collar colors and tags, clothing, and more. Additionally, each breed will have their own unique leveling tree, offering more breed-exclusive cosmetics—like coat color and patterns—as you play with that breed. At launch, all available modes will be playable in co-op! Whether you're exploring the forest, fleeing from monsters, or chasing your friends around the hub map, be sure to do it in style. Meet the Pack With over a dozen unique breeds to choose from, you can tailor your gameplay to your preferred style. Will you play as a small breed, perfect for slipping into tight spaces and evading danger, or a larger breed with more health and attack power to take on threats head-on? Will you prioritize a breed with high stamina, tracking capabilities, stealth, or something else entirely? Whatever your approach, there will be a breed that suits your playstyle. Roadmap The game is currently in pre-Alpha testing with select members of my community. After the Kickstarter ends, I'll begin rolling out exclusive limited playtests on my Discord server, available on a first-come basis to all members with the Kickstarter Backer role. Later this year, I plan to publish a closed beta to Steam. All backers of the Closed Beta tier and above will be given access once it releases, giving you the opportunity to play part of the game early and provide valuable feedback before launch. By the end of the year, I plan to release the game in Early Access. All of the game modes mentioned earlier, excluding the Story Mode, will be available at launch and updated over time with new rules, maps, and other features based on player feedback. I made the decision to delay the Story Mode until post-launch for many reasons, the largest being that the rest of the game will be complete long before I finish the story. I don't see a reason to keep you all from enjoying the game in the meantime! When the Story Mode—and any other mode I choose to create in the future—is ready, it will be released as a free content update to all owners of the game. As always, I plan to be transparent throughout development by providing public announcements and updates to my Discord server and social media accounts! Rewards Digital Steam Copy Receive the specified quantity of Steam keys, each redeemable for one (1) copy of the game at launch! Your Dog as a Playable Character This reward has two versions: one for existing dog breeds, and one for new dog breeds. If your dog's breed is included in the list in the Meet the Pack section, then you should back the Good Dog Edition tier. Otherwise, you'll need to back the Good Dog Premium Edition tier so that I can commission the creation of a new dog breed model. Kickstarter Exclusive Game Content As a bonus, receive some exclusive cosmetic items, including a golden collar for your dogs! Closed Beta Access Receive an invitation to the closed beta on Steam later this year! Exclusive Discord Role Receive a special role in my Discord server, giving you access to a private channel for Kickstarter backers. This is where you'll have a chance to sign up for limited playtests in the future! Photo of Your Dog in the Credits As the credits roll, see a picture of your dog displayed on the screen with their name beneath it! Name in the Credits All tiered backers will receive their name listed in the credits as a personal thank you! Your Name Mentioned in a Collectable Item A character will be named after you and will be mentioned in one of the game's hidden collectables! Your Name Mentioned in an Easter Egg Your name will be hidden somewhere on one of the maps, most likely on an object like a tombstone, a sign, or a book! A text document will be included in the game files that reveals where each name is hidden. Digital Soundtrack (.WAV and .MP3) Receive a downloadable copy of the game's full soundtrack on Steam! The soundtrack will feature at least ten (10) tracks.

title: Antiheroes Mobile Game
description: Impound Comics is taking its universe to the next level with Antiheroes , a high-intensity mobile fighting game where every warrior is both protector and executioner. Inspired by the legendary gameplay of Mortal Kombat and Tekken , Antiheroes thrusts players into a world where heroes and villains alike view each other as planetary threats—forcing them into deadly combat to determine the fate of existence. The game features a brutal yet strategic fighting system, allowing players to engage in single-player battles against the CPU or test their skills online against real opponents. Master the abilities of your favorite Impound Comics characters as they clash in epic one-on-one duels, each fighter bringing their own unique combat style, and special moves. With deep progression mechanics, players can climb the ranks, unlock exclusive skins, emotes, and gear, and customize their warriors to stand out in the battlefield. Development is well underway, with several characters and levels already completed. The intricate animations, immersive environments, and dynamic combat mechanics are shaping Antiheroes into a premium mobile gaming experience. However, to bring the full vision to life, we are seeking the necessary budget to finalize all characters, expand the level selection, and optimize the game for a polished release on mobile app stores. As we push forward, our goal is clear: to deliver the ultimate fighting experience for comic book and gaming fans alike. Stay tuned for updates, exclusive previews, and opportunities to be part of this groundbreaking expansion of the Impound Comics universe. Antiheroes isn’t just a game—it’s a battle for survival where the strongest will rise, and the weak will fall. Are you ready to fight? Developing Antiheroes is an ambitious project that combines intense fighting mechanics, deep character lore, and competitive online play. While we have already made significant progress in designing characters, building levels, and structuring the core combat system, there are several challenges we must overcome to bring the game to its full potential. GAME MAPS VS REALITY Development Costs & Funding – Creating a high-quality fighting game requires advanced animations, precise balancing, and seamless online functionality. Our team has already built the foundation, but additional funding is essential to complete character development, enhance combat mechanics, and optimize for mobile platforms. Without proper funding, the release could be delayed, or certain features may need to be scaled back. Technical Challenges & Optimization – A smooth and responsive fighting game demands fluid animations, stable online matchmaking, and precise hit detection. Mobile devices vary in power, and ensuring that Antiheroes runs flawlessly across different hardware is a major challenge. Additional development time will be dedicated to testing and refining performance for a polished gaming experience. Online Multiplayer & Server Stability – Competitive ranked matches and online play are at the heart of Antiheroes . However, maintaining stable servers and preventing lag or disconnects is a complex and costly task. A portion of the funding will go toward securing reliable server infrastructure to provide a seamless multiplayer experience. Game Balance & Competitive Play – Fighting games require deep balancing to ensure no single character dominates unfairly. Our team is dedicated to extensive playtesting and community feedback to fine-tune each fighter, move set, and counterplay strategy. Ensuring fairness while keeping gameplay exciting is an ongoing process that requires both time and expertise. Mobile Store Approval & Launch Process – Successfully launching Antiheroes on the App Store and Google Play requires meeting strict guidelines for performance, security, and monetization. Any unforeseen issues during the approval process could delay the game’s release, making thorough preparation and testing a critical part of our development cycle.

title: "A Candle On A Busy Street" EP - Sammi Accola
description: H I    F R I E N D S, Let's experience the healing power of music, together. Let's make a record. 'A Candle On A Busy Street' is a collection of songs living in the honest tension and middle grounds of life: fear & joy, faith & doubt, justice & injustice, waiting & the now, questions & answers. And the hope of it all. It is good to feel - no matter how deeply. My goal is for you to find safe spaces within these lyrics and soundscapes. A place of belonging. A place where you are not alone anymore. I'll be working with Latifah Alattas (of Paige CXVI , Moda Spira ) & Lori Chaffer (of Waterdeep ), both extremely creative and grounded producers. I am PUMPED for these songs to be  y o u r s. More on the songs - keep reading... Before Moon Crush April '22 opening for Caamp, Brandi Carlile, My Morning Jacket, Lake Street Dive... T H E   S O N G S, Renaissance is a call back to the quiet place where our thoughts first recognize both the brokenness and the beauty of life. A call to keep singing, even if you're the only one. The title of this EP project is named after a lyric from Renaissance : 'Hold a candle on a busy street, I'll sleep when there's heavenly peace. On Earth we are painters, beautiful strangers, walking each other home.' Mona Lisa is very dear to my heart walking in this world as a woman. This song came after a conversation with a Parisian Louvre tour guide, who said the painting became famous "because it was stolen." This struck me. I wrote about it. Mona Lisa is an ode to the women I work with at of Thistle Farms , a nonprofit that serves women survivors of human trafficking, abuse and addiction. We all have parts of our stories that we wish weren't true. Choices that were made outside of our control. Mona Lisa is a friend to our feelings of shame, inadequacy and shares a better word that we are "more than a work of art", we are "the mind, the soul, and the heart." Holy Woman embraces the word "holy," which often times feels like a far off unattainable identity, but simply means "to be set apart." Stand out. To be bold. This song celebrates womanhood. Holy Woman is an stompin' anthem that I hope women can sing in their cars, showers, churches, over their friends, and just rest in! If you did see the 10-piece all-female band singing at Belmont's showcase, you know!!!!!! Turning the Tables is the intersection of faith + justice for me. I want to deeply keep loving the people around me and keep pursuing "curiosity over judgment." This song keeps the fire in my belly and I believe it's a healing, yet fierce sentiment! Waiting Room is a reminder of the questions and hope we cling to and ask in the face of grief. I lost a nephew in December of 2022 and it took a good friend to sit beside me and listen in order to write this one. Feels like sacred ground. All this to say - I care about stories. I care about feelings. I care about questions. I care about you. I, too, want to hear more music that is honest and helpful and also beautiful. I want to feel less alone and I hope you can find that place too within these 5 songs. Performing 'Renaissance' at Belmont's "Best of the Best," May 2023 I N V I T A T I O N, I invite you to be apart of this record. Your donation will enable this message to be heard through the funding of promotional content, marketing, studio time, + more below. Also, there are thoughtful rewards! We have colorful bandana's available, CD's, a merch package, custom songs, and opportunities to host a house show with all your closest people and myself. Not only that, but you can get your name in the liner notes or become an Executive Producer! Let's band together. Sammi & the Holy Women making history after performing as the FIRST EVER all-female band to play             Belmont Showcase G O A L S, Our goal is to raise 27,000 dollars. The stretch goal is to raise 30,000 dollars. This includes: Photo & Video Content Studio Time More Music (B Side of Record) Mixing Mastering Marketing & Public Relations Music Video(s)!! Kickstarter Processing Fees Thanks for all your support and believing in me. With Great Hope, Sammi <3

title: How To Rise To Meet A Woman Like This
description: About The Author Hi, I'm Nugget! An artist who has always tried to alchemize my experiences into something beautiful to lay at the feet of the world. For decades I wielded a paintbrush or a spray can to achieve this mission. After a significant loss and a following heartbreak I fell apart and used my journey into sobriety and journaling to heal, remember myself and rise out of the ashes in phoenix form. Writing became an extension of my art and that art become this book. Why This? Why Now? I created this book because too many people are trying to build relationships without language for what’s actually happening. We’re living in a moment of cultural strain. We are emotionally aware but relationally untrained. People want depth, intimacy, and connection, yet keep repeating patterns that lead to burnout, confusion, and self-abandonment. Often, the damage doesn’t come from malice, it comes from not recognizing dynamics early enough. I didn’t learn these lessons early. I learned them through repetition, heartbreak, and years of trying to make connection work without the right tools. What changed my life wasn’t finding the “right” relationship. It was learning to identify patterns sooner. How to Rise to Meet A Woman Like This How to Rise to Meet a Woman Like This puts language to those patterns. Through archetypes, reflection, and clear naming, the book helps readers recognize relational dynamics before they calcify into harm. I see this project as a form of upstream harm reduction. When people have language earlier, they make choices from clarity instead of wounds. That shift doesn’t just change individual relationships, it changes how people show up in their families, friendships, and communities. This book isn’t about blame or perfection. It’s about awareness, accountability, and choosing differently earlier on with more self-respect and more grace.If this book helps even a few people recognize themselves sooner than I did, it’s worth making. Collaborators Creation is never solitary. It is a constellation of vision, trust, and the hands brave enough to build it together. Each artist contributed their distinct gifts and fire, shaping this work into something layered, dimensional, and far greater than one voice alone. Lacey’s process is rooted in trust, revision, and listening until the work stops speaking. She met these archetypes with that same devotion, translating words into layered, living images. This is the result of years of disciplined craft and shared creative history. Roman is an experienced designer and prepress expert specialising in book layout and print production. He combines technical precision with a hint of design alchemy to bring manuscripts to life. Lydia Plantamura is a writer, editor, and creative coach from Cary, North Carolina. Specializing in immersive nonfiction, she has been growing a professional career writing engaging articles about music, travel, and film. She helps her clients, including authors, musicians, artists, filmmakers, and entrepreneurs, find the right words to share their story and reach their audience. Honey Head Films and I have grown alongside one another in Wilmington’s creative community, building businesses, pitching ideas, and celebrating milestones together. I proudly supported their first crowdfunded feature, and that spirit of belief has always flowed both ways. For this campaign, they invited their newest filmmakers Meredith, Sarah, and Riley to step forward. I was honored to say yes. Creating space for emerging women in film matters to me. They brought fresh vision, real enthusiasm, and cinematic precision. The launch video they created feels intentional, alive, and deeply aligned with this project. My meeting with Brii as a body positivity coach led me to stand in her studio as a subject. That experience shifted my self concept in a way that stayed. I left understanding sovereignty. Ownership. Choice. That reclamation poured into these pages. This retreat is an invitation to feel that for yourself and to celebrate one another in the kind of embodied connection that only happens when we gather. Summer is a fortune teller and intuitive from Elkins, West Virginia whose readings feel like being gently seen in candlelight. We bonded instantly, and I have returned to her again and again for guidance that is honest, loving, and precise. She approaches her work with reverence and heart, offering insight without ego and intuition without theatrics. Drea is pouring Reiki-charged self-love candles on the New Moon, infused with strawberry quartz, lavender, rose, and cinnamon. Designed to accompany the book as a sensory ritual, each flame is crafted with intention and care. Drea is a Reiki Master and a wild woman who has walked through the trenches of life with her heart open, carrying both horror and glory without turning away. She believes you cannot truly support another unless you have faced yourself first. She entered my life during one of my darkest seasons. Her generosity offered comfort, understanding, and hope when I could barely see light for myself. She held it steady until I could stand in it again. Her presence in this creative constellation is devotional, not decorative. The flame she pours is the same kind of flame she tends in the people she loves. Closing Creative work doesn’t move through the world alone. It moves because people choose to believe in it! They decide to fund it, share it, and make space for it to exist. This book is an offering of language, reflection, and lived experience, and its impact will travel in ways none of us can fully predict. Thank you for being part of the collective that believes creativity matters, and that words can help shape how we show up for ourselves and one another.

title: Wild Apple Magazine: Redefining Gluten-Free Living
description:
Food stylist Liza Jernow and photographer Tara Donne are creating a beautiful bi-annual gluten-free print magazine called Wild Apple. We are the New Gluten-Free. Above photographs by Tara Donne (L) and Christina Holmes (R) We love food.  We love making it and photographing it, but most of all, we’re Eaters.  Eaters who have over thirteen years of gluten-free living under our belt. We know firsthand that when you’re on a gluten-free diet it’s easy to turn your focus towards lack.  Yet there are so many great things out there that we can eat!  So much is still delicious and accessible. In Wild Apple , we train our eye to gorgeous, indulgent and useful food .  Our recipes unfold through the seasons, with a focus on what’s available and natural.
 
Our magazine will share love letters to friendly grains, simple snack ideas, well-tested recipes for classics , and menus with which to entertain friends or easily create weeknight meals . It will also cover inspiring international travel, city guides , profiles on interesting creative people, and roundups of beauty products --all of course gluten-free. We are here to help make life easier and to inspire adventure and exploration! WHO WE ARE: The Wild Apple team is full of creatives who are the best in the business . Our Design Director, George McCalman has 14 years experience as a magazine art director and has won numerous design awards throughout his career. Before becoming a photographer, Tara Donne spent 5 years as a photo editor, managing budgets and assigning and producing shoots for national magazines. Liza Jernow spent years in the test kitchen at Martha Stewart prior to launching a food styling career and working with international advertising and magazine clients. There's no doubt that we are the people that will make this happen! REWARDS: Most of our rewards include an issue of the magazine. Here's a little taste: Above photographs by Tara Donne Above photographs by Joseph De Leo, prop styling by Molly FitzSimons Above photographs by Tara Donne The Pancakes with Raspberry Sauce e-recipe card will include this beautiful illustration: Above illustration by Samantha Hahn Everyone at the farmer's market will covet this fun tote: Our gluten-free dessert themed postcards are perfect for writing sweet notes to friends: Above illustrations by Samantha Hahn Converting measurements and wiping up spills is a piece of cake with a Bailey Doesn't Bark Useful kitchen towel: New artwork is always a treat: "The Last Days of Summer" by Tara Donne "Heirloom" by Tara Donne "Pole Bean Flowers" by Tara Donne THANK YOU! If you've made it this far down that means you're as excited as we are! We want to thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your support in creating something beautiful, useful, and relevant for the gluten-free community.
